 137    "delete",
 138    "rm",
 139    "chat",
 140    "shell",
 141    "status",
 142    "health",
 143    "history",
 144    "events",
 145    "activity",
 146    "feed",
 147    "tail",
 148    "updates",
 149    "findings",
 150    "tasks",
 151    "roadmap",
 152    "experiments",
 153    "update",
 154    "dashboard",
 155    "dash",
 156    "start",
 157    "stop",
 158    "restart",
 159    "browser-dashboard",
 160    "artifacts",
 161    "artifact",
 162    "lessons",
 163    "learn",
 164    "findings",
 165    "sources",
 166    "memory",
 167    "metrics",
 168    "usage",
 169    "logs",
 170    "outputs",
 171    "output",
 172    "watch",
 173    "run-one",
 174    "run",
 175    "work",
 176    "steer",
 177    "say",
 178    "pause",
 179    "resume",
 180    "cancel",
 181    "digest",
 182    "daily-digest",
 183    "daemon",
 184    "doctor",
 185    "autostart",
 186    "service",
 187}
 188
 189NIPUX_BANNER = r"""
 190 _   _ _                  ____ _     ___
 191| \ | (_)_ __  _   ___  _/ ___| |   |_ _|
 192|  \| | | '_ \| | | \ \/ / |   | |    | |
 193| |\  | | |_) | |_| |>  <| |___| |___ | |
 194|_| \_|_| .__/ \__,_/_/\_\\____|_____|___|
 195        |_|
 196""".strip("\n")
 197
 198def _db() -> tuple[AgentDB, object]:
 199    config = load_config()
 200    config.ensure_dirs()
 201    return AgentDB(config.runtime.state_db_path), config
 202
 203
 204def cmd_init(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
 205    config = load_config()
 206    config.ensure_dirs()
 207    path = Path(args.path).expanduser() if args.path else config.runtime.home / "config.yaml"
 208    if path.exists() and not args.force:
 209        print(f"Config already exists: {path}")
 210        return
 211    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 212    model = args.model or DEFAULT_MODEL
 213    base_url = args.base_url or DEFAULT_BASE_URL
 214    api_key_env = args.api_key_env or DEFAULT_API_KEY_ENV
 215    if args.openrouter:
 216        base_url = args.base_url or "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"
 217        api_key_env = args.api_key_env or DEFAULT_API_KEY_ENV
 218        model = args.model or DEFAULT_OPENROUTER_MODEL
 219    path.write_text(
 220        default_config_yaml(
 221            model=model,
 222            base_url=base_url,
 223            api_key_env=api_key_env,
 224            context_length=args.context_length,
 225        ),
 226        encoding="utf-8",
 227    )
 228    print(f"Wrote {path}")
 229    env_path = config.runtime.home / ".env"
 230    if not env_path.exists():
 231        env_path.write_text(
 232            f"# Optional local secrets for Nipux. This file stays outside the git repo.\n{api_key_env}=\n",
 233            encoding="utf-8",
 234        )
 235        try:
 236            env_path.chmod(0o600)
 237        except OSError:
 238            pass
 239        print(f"Wrote {env_path} (fill {api_key_env}; do not commit secrets)")
 240
 241
 242def cmd_create(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
 243    job_id, title = _create_job(
 244        objective=args.objective,
 245        title=args.title,
 246        kind=args.kind,
 247        cadence=args.cadence,
 248    )
 249    print(f"created {title}")
 250
 251
 252def _create_job(
 253    *, objective: str, title: str | None = None, kind: str = "generic", cadence: str | None = None
 254) -> tuple[str, str]:
 255    db, config = _db()
 256    try:
 257        title = title or objective.strip().splitlines()[0][:80] or "Untitled job"
 258        plan = initial_plan_for_objective(objective)
 259        job_id = db.create_job(
 260            objective,
 261            title=title,
 262            kind=kind,
 263            cadence=cadence,
 264            metadata={"planning": plan},
 265        )
 266        db.update_job_status(job_id, "queued", metadata_patch={"planning": plan, "planning_status": "auto_accepted"})
 267        db.append_agent_update(job_id, format_initial_plan(plan), category="plan", metadata={"planning": plan})
 268        db.append_agent_update(job_id, "Plan accepted automatically. I will start working from the planned tasks.", category="plan")
 269        db.append_roadmap_record(job_id, **initial_roadmap_for_objective(title=title, objective=objective))
 270        for index, task in enumerate(plan["tasks"], start=1):
 271            task_contract = initial_task_contract(str(task))
 272            db.append_task_record(
 273                job_id,
 274                title=str(task),
 275                status="open",
 276                priority=max(0, 10 - index),
 277                goal=objective,
 278                output_contract=task_contract["output_contract"],
 279                acceptance_criteria=task_contract["acceptance_criteria"],
 280                evidence_needed=task_contract["evidence_needed"],
 281                stall_behavior=task_contract["stall_behavior"],
 282                metadata={"phase": "initial_plan"},
 283            )
 284        program = config.runtime.jobs_dir / job_id / "program.md"
 285        program.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 286        program.write_text(
 287            program_for_job(kind=kind, title=title, objective=objective),
 288            encoding="utf-8",
 289        )
 290        _write_shell_state({"focus_job_id": job_id})
 291        return job_id, title
 292    finally:
 293        db.close()
 294
 295
 296def cmd_jobs(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
 297    db, _ = _db()
 298    try:
 299        jobs = db.list_jobs()
 300        if not jobs:
 301            print('No jobs yet. Create one with: nipux create "objective"')
 302            return
 303        focused = _configured_focus_job_id(db)
 304        daemon_running = daemon_lock_status(load_config().runtime.home / "agentd.lock")["running"]
 305        _print_jobs_panel(jobs, focused_job_id=str(focused or ""), daemon_running=bool(daemon_running))
 306    finally:
 307        db.close()
 308
 309
 310def cmd_focus(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
 311    db, _ = _db()
 312    try:
 313        if not args.query:
 314            job_id = _default_job_id(db)
 315            if not job_id:
 316                print("No focused job. Create one first.")
 317                return
 318            job = db.get_job(job_id)
 319            daemon = daemon_lock_status(load_config().runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
 320            print(f"focus: {job['title']} | job {_job_display_state(job, bool(daemon['running']))}")
 321            return
 322        job = _find_job(db, " ".join(args.query))
 323        if not job:
 324            print(f"No job matched: {' '.join(args.query)}")
 325            return
 326        _write_shell_state({"focus_job_id": job["id"]})
 327        daemon = daemon_lock_status(load_config().runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
 328        print(f"focus set: {job['title']} | job {_job_display_state(job, bool(daemon['running']))}")
 329    finally:
 330        db.close()
 331
 332
 333def cmd_rename(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
 334    db, config = _db()
 335    try:
 336        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
 337        if not job_id:
 338            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
 339            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
 340            return
 341        old = db.get_job(job_id)
 342        renamed = db.rename_job(job_id, _job_ref_text(args.title))
 343        program = config.runtime.jobs_dir / job_id / "program.md"
 344        if program.exists():
 345            try:
 346                content = program.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 347                lines = content.splitlines()
 348                if lines and lines[0].startswith("# "):
 349                    lines[0] = f"# {renamed['title']}"
 350                    program.write_text("\n".join(lines) + ("\n" if content.endswith("\n") else ""), encoding="utf-8")
 351            except OSError:
 352                pass
 353        _write_shell_state({"focus_job_id": job_id})
 354        print(f"renamed {old['title']} -> {renamed['title']}")
 355    finally:
 356        db.close()
 357
 358
 359def cmd_delete(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
 360    db, config = _db()
 361    try:
 362        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
 363        if not job_id:
 364            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
 365            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "usage: delete JOB_TITLE")
 366            return
 367        result = db.delete_job(job_id)
 368        job = result["job"]
 369    finally:
 370        db.close()
 371
 372    removed_files = 0
 373    if not args.keep_files:
 374        job_dir = config.runtime.jobs_dir / job_id
 375        for path_text in result.get("artifact_paths") or []:
 376            path = Path(path_text)
 377            try:
 378                if path.exists() and job_dir in path.parents:
 379                    path.unlink()
 380                    removed_files += 1
 381            except OSError:
 382                pass
 383        try:
 384            if job_dir.exists():
 385                shutil.rmtree(job_dir)
 386        except OSError:
 387            pass
 388    state = _read_shell_state()
 389    if state.get("focus_job_id") == job_id:
 390        _write_shell_state({"focus_job_id": ""})
 391    counts = result.get("counts") or {}
 392    file_text = "kept files" if args.keep_files else f"removed files={removed_files}"
 393    print(
 394        f"deleted {job['title']} | steps={counts.get('steps', 0)} "
 395        f"artifacts={counts.get('artifacts', 0)} runs={counts.get('runs', 0)} | {file_text}"
 396    )
 397
 398
 399def cmd_chat(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
 400    db, _ = _db()
 401    try:
 402        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
 403        if not job_id:
 404            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
 405            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found. Create one first.")
 406            return
 407        _write_shell_state({"focus_job_id": job_id})
 408    finally:
 409        db.close()
 410
 411    _enter_chat(job_id, show_history=not args.no_history, history_limit=args.history_limit)
 412
 413
 414def cmd_home(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
 415    _install_readline_history()
 416    db, _ = _db()
 417    try:
 418        job_id = _default_job_id(db)
 419    finally:
 420        db.close()
 421    if job_id:
 422        _enter_chat(job_id, show_history=True, history_limit=args.history_limit)
 423        return
 424
 425    _enter_first_run_menu(history_limit=args.history_limit)
 426
 427
 428def _enter_first_run_menu(*, history_limit: int = 12) -> None:
 429    if _frame_chat_enabled():
 430        _enter_first_run_frame(history_limit=history_limit)
 431        return
 432
 433    print("Nipux CLI")
 434    print(_rule("="))
 435    _print_first_run_menu()
 436    print(_rule("="))
 437    while True:
 438        try:
 439            line = input("nipux > ").strip()
 440        except EOFError:
 441            print()
 442            return
 443        except KeyboardInterrupt:
 444            print()
 445            continue
 446        if not _handle_first_run_menu_line(line, history_limit=history_limit):
 447            return
 448
 449
 450def _print_first_run_menu() -> None:
 451    config = load_config()
 452    daemon = daemon_lock_status(config.runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
 453    print("Start")
 454    print(f"  model   {config.model.model}")
 455    print(f"  daemon  {'running' if daemon['running'] else 'stopped'}")
 456    print(f"  home    {_short_path(config.runtime.home)}")
 457    print()
 458    print("Commands")
 459    print("  1  new       create a long-running job")
 460    print("  2  jobs      list saved jobs")
 461    print("  3  doctor    check local setup")
 462    print("  4  init      write config/env template")
 463    print("  5  exit      leave")
 464    print()
 465    print('Type an objective, `new OBJECTIVE`, or a command.')
 466
 467
 468def _handle_first_run_menu_line(line: str, *, history_limit: int = 12) -> bool:
 469    line = line.strip()
 470    if not line:
 471        _print_first_run_menu()
 472        return True
 473    if line.startswith("/"):
 474        line = line[1:].strip()
 475    lowered = line.lower()
 476    if lowered in {"exit", "quit", ":q", "5"}:
 477        return False
 478    if lowered in {"help", "?", "commands"}:
 479        _print_first_run_menu()
 480        return True
 481    if lowered in {"1", "new"}:
 482        objective = _prompt_first_run_value("objective")
 483        if not objective:
 484            print("No job created.")
 485            return True
 486        _first_run_create_and_open(objective, history_limit=history_limit)
 487        return False
 488    if lowered.startswith("new "):
 489        objective = line[4:].strip()
 490        if not objective:
 491            print("usage: new OBJECTIVE")
 492            return True
 493        _first_run_create_and_open(objective, history_limit=history_limit)
 494        return False
 495    if lowered in {"2", "jobs", "ls"}:
 496        cmd_jobs(argparse.Namespace())
 497        return True
 498    if lowered in {"3", "doctor"}:
 499        try:
 500            cmd_doctor(argparse.Namespace(check_model=False))
 501        except SystemExit:
 502            pass
 503        return True
 504    if lowered in {"4", "init"}:
 505        cmd_init(argparse.Namespace(path=None, force=False))
 506        return True
 507    first = _first_token(line)
 508    if first in SHELL_COMMAND_NAMES:
 509        before_job_id = None
 510        if first == "create":
 511            db, _ = _db()
 512            try:
 513                before_job_id = _default_job_id(db)
 514            finally:
 515                db.close()
 516        _run_shell_line(line)
 517        if first == "create":
 518            db, _ = _db()
 519            try:
 520                after_job_id = _default_job_id(db)
 521            finally:
 522                db.close()
 523            if after_job_id and after_job_id != before_job_id:
 524                _enter_chat(after_job_id, show_history=True, history_limit=history_limit)
 525                return False
 526        return True
 527    objective = _extract_job_objective_from_message(line)
 528    if objective:
 529        _first_run_create_and_open(objective, history_limit=history_limit)
 530        return False
 531    print(_first_run_chat_reply(line))
 532    return True
 533
 534
 535def _prompt_first_run_value(label: str) -> str:
 536    try:
 537        return input(f"{label} > ").strip()
 538    except (EOFError, KeyboardInterrupt):
 539        print()
 540        return ""
 541
 542
 543def _first_run_create_and_open(objective: str, *, history_limit: int = 12) -> None:
 544    job_id, title = _create_job(objective=objective, title=None, kind="generic", cadence=None)
 545    print(f"created {title}")
 546    print("Opening workspace. Use the right pane to run, switch jobs, or inspect output.")
 547    _enter_chat(job_id, show_history=True, history_limit=history_limit)
 548
 549
 550def _first_token(line: str) -> str:
 551    try:
 552        parts = shlex.split(line)
 553    except ValueError:
 554        parts = line.split()
 555    return parts[0].lower() if parts else ""
 556
 557
 558def _enter_first_run_frame(*, history_limit: int = 12) -> None:
 559    buffer = ""
 560    notices: list[str] = []
 561    next_job_id: str | None = None
 562    view = "start"
 563    selected = 0
 564    editing_field: str | None = None
 565    old_attrs = termios.tcgetattr(sys.stdin)
 566    print("\033[?1049h\033[H\033[?25l\033[?1000h\033[?1002h\033[?1006h", end="", flush=True)
 567    try:
 568        stdin_fd = sys.stdin.fileno()
 569        tty.setcbreak(stdin_fd)
 570        needs_render = True
 571        last_render = 0.0
 572        last_frame = ""
 573        while next_job_id is None:
 574            now = time.monotonic()
 575            if needs_render or now - last_render >= 1.0:
 576                selected = _clamp_first_run_selection(selected, view)
 577                last_frame = _render_first_run_frame(
 578                    buffer,
 579                    notices,
 580                    selected=selected,
 581                    view=view,
 582                    editing_field=editing_field,
 583                    previous_frame=last_frame,
 584                )
 585                needs_render = False
 586                last_render = now
 587            readable, _, _ = select.select([stdin_fd], [], [], 0.05)
 588            if not readable:
 589                continue
 590            char = _read_terminal_char(stdin_fd)
 591            if editing_field is not None:
 592                if char in {"\r", "\n"}:
 593                    notices.append(_inline_setting_notice(editing_field, buffer))
 594                    notices[:] = notices[-10:]
 595                    editing_field = None
 596                    buffer = ""
 597                    needs_render = True
 598                    continue
 599                if char in {"\x04"}:
 600                    return
 601                if char == "\x03":
 602                    notices.append("cancelled edit")
 603                    notices[:] = notices[-10:]
 604                    editing_field = None
 605                    buffer = ""
 606                    needs_render = True
 607                    continue
 608                if char in {"\x7f", "\b"}:
 609                    buffer = buffer[:-1]
 610                    needs_render = True
 611                    continue
 612                if char == "\x1b":
 613                    key, _payload = _decode_terminal_escape(_read_escape_sequence(char, fd=stdin_fd))
 614                    if key == "unknown":
 615                        notices.append("cancelled edit")
 616                        notices[:] = notices[-10:]
 617                        editing_field = None
 618                        buffer = ""
 619                    needs_render = True
 620                    continue
 621                if char.isprintable():
 622                    buffer += char
 623                    needs_render = True
 624                continue
 625            if char in {"\r", "\n"}:
 626                line = buffer.strip()
 627                buffer = ""
 628                if not line:
 629                    action, payload = _handle_first_run_action(_first_run_actions(view)[selected][0])
 630                else:
 631                    action, payload = _handle_first_run_frame_line(line)
 632                if action == "view":
 633                    view = str(payload or "start")
 634                    selected = 0
 635                    notices.clear()
 636                    needs_render = True
 637                    continue
 638                if action == "exit":
 639                    return
 640                if action == "clear":
 641                    notices.clear()
 642                    needs_render = True
 643                    continue
 644                if action == "open":
 645                    next_job_id = str(payload)
 646                    break
 647                if action == "edit":
 648                    editing_field = str(payload)
 649                    notices.append(f"editing {editing_field}; enter saves, escape cancels")
 650                    notices[:] = notices[-10:]
 651                    needs_render = True
 652                    continue
 653                if isinstance(payload, list):
 654                    notices.extend(str(item) for item in payload if str(item).strip())
 655                elif payload:
 656                    notices.append(str(payload))
 657                notices[:] = notices[-10:]
 658                needs_render = True
 659                continue
 660            if char in {"\x04"}:
 661                return
 662            if char == "\x03":
 663                buffer = ""
 664                notices.append("cancelled input")
 665                notices[:] = notices[-10:]
 666                needs_render = True
 667                continue
 668            if char in {"\x7f", "\b"}:
 669                buffer = buffer[:-1]
 670                needs_render = True
 671                continue
 672            if char == "\t":
 673                buffer = _autocomplete_slash(buffer, FIRST_RUN_SLASH_COMMANDS)
 674                needs_render = True
 675                continue
 676            if char == "\x1b":
 677                key, payload = _decode_terminal_escape(_read_escape_sequence(char, fd=stdin_fd))
 678                if key == "up":
 679                    selected = (selected - 1) % len(_first_run_actions(view))
 680                elif key == "down":
 681                    selected = (selected + 1) % len(_first_run_actions(view))
 682                elif key in {"left", "right"}:
 683                    selected = 0
 684                elif key == "click" and isinstance(payload, tuple):
 685                    clicked = _first_run_click_action(payload[0], payload[1], view=view)
 686                    if clicked is not None:
 687                        selected = clicked
 688                        action, action_payload = _handle_first_run_action(_first_run_actions(view)[selected][0])
 689                        if action == "view":
 690                            view = str(action_payload or "start")
 691                            selected = 0
 692                            notices.clear()
 693                        elif action == "exit":
 694                            return
 695                        elif action == "open":
 696                            next_job_id = str(action_payload)
 697                            break
 698                        elif action == "edit":
 699                            editing_field = str(action_payload)
 700                            notices.append(f"editing {editing_field}; enter saves, escape cancels")
 701                        elif isinstance(action_payload, list):
 702                            notices.extend(str(item) for item in action_payload if str(item).strip())
 703                        elif action_payload:
 704                            notices.append(str(action_payload))
 705                        notices[:] = notices[-10:]
 706                else:
 707                    _drain_pending_input(stdin_fd)
 708                needs_render = True
 709                continue
 710            if char.isprintable():
 711                buffer += char
 712                needs_render = True
 713    finally:
 714        termios.tcsetattr(sys.stdin, termios.TCSADRAIN, old_attrs)
 715        print("\033[?1002l\033[?1000l\033[?1006l\033[?25h\033[0m\033[?1049l", flush=True)
 716    if next_job_id:
 717        _enter_chat(next_job_id, show_history=True, history_limit=history_limit)
 718
 719
 720def _first_run_actions(view: str) -> list[tuple[str, str, str]]:
 721    return FIRST_RUN_ACTIONS
 722
 723
 724def _clamp_first_run_selection(selected: int, view: str) -> int:
 725    actions = _first_run_actions(view)
 726    if not actions:
 727        return 0
 728    return max(0, min(selected, len(actions) - 1))
 729
 730
 731def _handle_first_run_action(action: str) -> tuple[str, str | list[str] | None]:
 732    if action.startswith("edit:"):
 733        return "edit", action.split(":", 1)[1]
 734    if action.startswith("secret:"):
 735        return "edit", action
 736    if action == "new":
 737        return "notice", "Type the goal in the input line, then press Enter."
 738    if action == "back":
 739        return "view", "start"
 740    if action == "jobs":
 741        return "notice", _capture_first_run_command("jobs")
 742    if action == "doctor":
 743        return "notice", _capture_first_run_command("doctor")
 744    if action == "init":
 745        return "notice", _capture_first_run_command("init")
 746    if action == "exit":
 747        return "exit", None
 748    return "notice", f"Unknown action: {action}"
 749
 750
 751def _first_run_click_action(x: int, y: int, *, view: str) -> int | None:
 752    width, _height = shutil.get_terminal_size((100, 30))
 753    left_width, _right_width = _first_run_columns(max(92, width))
 754    right_start = left_width + 4
 755    if x < right_start:
 756        return None
 757    body_start_y = 4
 758    action_body_index = 7
 759    index = y - (body_start_y + action_body_index)
 760    actions = _first_run_actions(view)
 761    return index if 0 <= index < len(actions) else None
 762
 763
 764def _chat_page_click(x: int, y: int, *, right_view: str) -> str | None:
 765    del right_view
 766    width, _height = shutil.get_terminal_size((100, 30))
 767    width = max(92, width)
 768    left_width = max(56, int(width * 0.64))
 769    right_width = max(34, width - left_width - 3)
 770    if right_width < 34:
 771        left_width = max(48, width - right_width - 3)
 772    right_start = left_width + 4
 773    if x < right_start or y > 8:
 774        return None
 775    relative = max(0, x - right_start)
 776    third = max(1, right_width // 3)
 777    if relative < third:
 778        return "status"
 779    if relative < third * 2:
 780        return "updates"
 781    return "work"
 782
 783
 784def _handle_first_run_frame_line(line: str) -> tuple[str, str | list[str] | None]:
 785    original = line.strip()
 786    if original.startswith("/"):
 787        original = original[1:].strip()
 788    lowered = original.lower()
 789    if lowered in {"exit", "quit", ":q", "5"}:
 790        return "exit", None
 791    if lowered in {"clear"}:
 792        return "clear", None
 793    if lowered in {"help", "?", "commands"}:
 794        return "notice", [
 795            "Talk normally here, or ask Nipux to create a job with a concrete goal.",
 796            "Use the right pane for jobs, setup checks, and exit.",
 797            "When a job exists, the left pane becomes its chat and output stream.",
 798        ]
 799    if lowered in {"1", "new"}:
 800        return "notice", "Type `new OBJECTIVE` or paste the objective directly."
 801    if lowered.startswith("new "):
 802        return "open", _create_first_run_job(original[4:].strip())
 803    if lowered in {"2", "jobs", "ls"}:
 804        return "notice", _capture_first_run_command("jobs")
 805    if lowered == "settings":
 806        return "notice", "Config is changed with slash commands: /model, /api-key, /base-url, /context."
 807    if lowered in {"back"}:
 808        return "view", "start"
 809    if lowered in {"3", "doctor"}:
 810        return "notice", _capture_first_run_command("doctor")
 811    if lowered in {"4", "init"}:
 812        return "notice", _capture_first_run_command("init")
 813    if lowered == "shell":
 814        return "notice", "The old console is only available as `nipux shell` from your terminal."
 815    first = _first_token(original)
 816    if first == "shell":
 817        return "notice", "The old console is only available as `nipux shell` from your terminal."
 818    if first in CHAT_SETTING_COMMANDS or first in {"api-key", "key"}:
 819        return "notice", _capture_setting_command(original)
 820    if first in SHELL_COMMAND_NAMES:
 821        before_job_id = _current_default_job_id()
 822        output = _capture_first_run_command(original)
 823        after_job_id = _current_default_job_id()
 824        if first == "create" and after_job_id and after_job_id != before_job_id:
 825            return "open", after_job_id
 826        return "notice", output
 827    objective = _extract_job_objective_from_message(original)
 828    if objective:
 829        return "open", _create_first_run_job(objective)
 830    return "notice", _first_run_chat_reply(original)
 831
 832
 833def _first_run_chat_reply(message: str) -> str:
 834    lowered = message.strip().lower()
 835    if lowered in {"hi", "hello", "hey", "yo"}:
 836        return "Hi. Tell me what long-running work you want, or type /new followed by an objective."
 837    if "what can" in lowered or "help" in lowered:
 838        return "I can spin up long-running jobs, keep their output on the left, and let you monitor work from the right."
 839    return "I can chat here, but I only create a job when you give me a concrete goal like 'create a job to monitor nightly benchmarks'."
 840
 841
 842def _create_first_run_job(objective: str) -> str | list[str]:
 843    objective = objective.strip()
 844    if not objective:
 845        return ["No job created. Type an objective first."]
 846    job_id, _title = _create_job(objective=objective, title=None, kind="generic", cadence=None)
 847    return job_id
 848
 849
 850def _capture_first_run_command(line: str) -> list[str]:
 851    stream = StringIO()
 852    with redirect_stdout(stream):
 853        try:
 854            _run_shell_line(line)
 855        except SystemExit as exc:
 856            if exc.code not in (None, 0):
 857                print(f"command exited with status {exc.code}")
 858    lines = [" ".join(item.split()) for item in stream.getvalue().splitlines() if item.strip()]
 859    return lines[-8:] or ["done"]
 860
 861
 862def _current_default_job_id() -> str | None:
 863    db, _ = _db()
 864    try:
 865        return _default_job_id(db)
 866    finally:
 867        db.close()
 868
 869
 870def _render_first_run_frame(
 871    input_buffer: str,
 872    notices: list[str],
 873    *,
 874    selected: int = 0,
 875    view: str = "start",
 876    editing_field: str | None = None,
 877    previous_frame: str = "",
 878) -> str:
 879    width, height = shutil.get_terminal_size((100, 30))
 880    frame = _build_first_run_frame(
 881        input_buffer,
 882        notices,
 883        width=width,
 884        height=height,
 885        selected=selected,
 886        view=view,
 887        editing_field=editing_field,
 888    )
 889    return _emit_frame_if_changed(frame, previous_frame)
 890
 891
 892def _build_first_run_frame(
 893    input_buffer: str,
 894    notices: list[str],
 895    *,
 896    width: int,
 897    height: int,
 898    selected: int = 0,
 899    view: str = "start",
 900    editing_field: str | None = None,
 901) -> str:
 902    width = max(92, width)
 903    height = max(22, height)
 904    config = load_config()
 905    daemon = daemon_lock_status(config.runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
 906    jobs: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 907    db, _ = _db()
 908    try:
 909        jobs = db.list_jobs()
 910    finally:
 911        db.close()
 912    right_width = _first_run_columns(width)[1]
 913    return _build_first_run_tui_frame(
 914        input_buffer,
 915        notices,
 916        width=width,
 917        height=height,
 918        selected=selected,
 919        view=view,
 920        editing_field=editing_field,
 921        config=config,
 922        jobs=jobs,
 923        daemon_text=_daemon_state_line(daemon),
 924        home=_short_path(config.runtime.home, max_width=max(20, right_width - 8)),
 925        config_path=_short_path(config.runtime.home / "config.yaml", max_width=max(20, right_width - 8)),
 926    )
 927
 928
 929def _enter_chat(job_id: str, *, show_history: bool, history_limit: int = 12) -> None:
 930    _install_readline_history()
 931    if _frame_chat_enabled():
 932        _enter_chat_frame(job_id, history_limit=history_limit)
 933        return
 934    db, _ = _db()
 935    try:
 936        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 937        _write_shell_state({"focus_job_id": job_id})
 938    finally:
 939        db.close()
 940
 941    if _fancy_ui():
 942        print("\033[2J\033[H", end="")
 943    print(NIPUX_BANNER)
 944    print(_rule("="))
 945    print(_shell_summary())
 946    print(_rule("="))
 947    if show_history:
 948        _print_startup_history(job_id, limit=history_limit, chars=180)
 949        print()
 950    _print_chat_composer(job)
 951    live_stop, live_thread = _start_chat_live_feed(job_id)
 952    try:
 953        while True:
 954            db, _ = _db()
 955            try:
 956                refreshed = _default_job_id(db)
 957                if refreshed:
 958                    job_id = refreshed
 959                    job = db.get_job(job_id)
 960            finally:
 961                db.close()
 962            try:
 963                line = input(_chat_prompt(job))
 964            except EOFError:
 965                print()
 966                return
 967            except KeyboardInterrupt:
 968                print()
 969                continue
 970            if not _chat_handle_line(job_id, line):
 971                return
 972    finally:
 973        if live_stop is not None:
 974            live_stop.set()
 975        if live_thread is not None:
 976            live_thread.join(timeout=1.0)
 977
 978
 979def _frame_chat_enabled() -> bool:
 980    return (
 981        sys.stdin.isatty()
 982        and sys.stdout.isatty()
 983        and not os.environ.get("NIPUX_APPEND_LIVE")
 984        and not os.environ.get("NIPUX_NO_FRAME")
 985    )
 986
 987
 988def _enter_chat_frame(job_id: str, *, history_limit: int = 12) -> None:
 989    _write_shell_state({"focus_job_id": job_id})
 990    buffer = ""
 991    notices: list[str] = []
 992    right_view = "status"
 993    selected_control = 0
 994    editing_field: str | None = None
 995    snapshot = _load_frame_snapshot(job_id, history_limit=history_limit)
 996    job_id = str(snapshot["job_id"])
 997    old_attrs = termios.tcgetattr(sys.stdin)
 998    print("\033[?1049h\033[H\033[?25l\033[?1000h\033[?1002h\033[?1006h", end="", flush=True)
 999    try:
1000        stdin_fd = sys.stdin.fileno()
1001        tty.setcbreak(stdin_fd)
1002        last_snapshot = 0.0
1003        needs_render = True
1004        last_frame = ""
1005        while True:
1006            now = time.monotonic()
1007            if now - last_snapshot >= 0.75:
1008                try:
1009                    snapshot = _load_frame_snapshot(job_id, history_limit=history_limit)
1010                    job_id = str(snapshot["job_id"])
1011                    last_snapshot = now
1012                    needs_render = True
1013                except Exception as exc:
1014                    notices.append(f"frame refresh failed: {type(exc).__name__}")
1015                    notices[:] = notices[-12:]
1016            if needs_render:
1017                selected_control = 0
1018                last_frame = _render_chat_frame(
1019                    snapshot,
1020                    buffer,
1021                    notices,
1022                    right_view=right_view,
1023                    selected_control=selected_control,
1024                    editing_field=editing_field,
1025                    previous_frame=last_frame,
1026                )
1027                needs_render = False
1028            readable, _, _ = select.select([stdin_fd], [], [], 0.05)
1029            if not readable:
1030                continue
1031            char = _read_terminal_char(stdin_fd)
1032            if editing_field is not None:
1033                if char in {"\r", "\n"}:
1034                    notices.append(_inline_setting_notice(editing_field, buffer))
1035                    notices[:] = notices[-12:]
1036                    editing_field = None
1037                    buffer = ""
1038                    needs_render = True
1039                    continue
1040                if char in {"\x04"}:
1041                    return
1042                if char == "\x03":
1043                    notices.append("cancelled edit")
1044                    notices[:] = notices[-12:]
1045                    editing_field = None
1046                    buffer = ""
1047                    needs_render = True
1048                    continue
1049                if char in {"\x7f", "\b"}:
1050                    buffer = buffer[:-1]
1051                    needs_render = True
1052                    continue
1053                if char == "\x1b":
1054                    key, _payload = _decode_terminal_escape(_read_escape_sequence(char, fd=stdin_fd))
1055                    if key == "unknown":
1056                        notices.append("cancelled edit")
1057                        notices[:] = notices[-12:]
1058                        editing_field = None
1059                        buffer = ""
1060                    needs_render = True
1061                    continue
1062                if char.isprintable():
1063                    buffer += char
1064                    needs_render = True
1065                continue
1066            if char in {"\r", "\n"}:
1067                line = buffer.strip()
1068                buffer = ""
1069                if not line:
1070                    needs_render = True
1071                    continue
1072                if line in {"clear", "/clear"}:
1073                    notices.clear()
1074                    needs_render = True
1075                    continue
1076                notices.append(f"> {line}")
1077                notices[:] = notices[-12:]
1078                last_frame = _render_chat_frame(
1079                    snapshot,
1080                    buffer,
1081                    notices,
1082                    right_view=right_view,
1083                    selected_control=selected_control,
1084                    editing_field=editing_field,
1085                    previous_frame=last_frame,
1086                )
1087                if _is_plain_chat_line(line):
1088                    keep_running, message = _handle_chat_message(job_id, line, quiet=True)
1089                    notices = [notice for notice in notices if notice != f"> {line}"]
1090                    if message:
1091                        notices.append(message)
1092                        notices[:] = notices[-12:]
1093                else:
1094                    keep_running, output = _capture_chat_command(job_id, line)
1095                    for output_line in _compact_command_output(output):
1096                        notices.append(output_line)
1097                    notices[:] = notices[-12:]
1098                snapshot = _load_frame_snapshot(job_id, history_limit=history_limit)
1099                job_id = str(snapshot["job_id"])
1100                needs_render = True
1101                if not keep_running:
1102                    return
1103                continue
1104            if char in {"\x04"}:
1105                return
1106            if char == "\x03":
1107                buffer = ""
1108                notices.append("cancelled input")
1109                notices[:] = notices[-12:]
1110                needs_render = True
1111                continue
1112            if char in {"\x7f", "\b"}:
1113                buffer = buffer[:-1]
1114                needs_render = True
1115                continue
1116            if char == "\t":
1117                buffer = _autocomplete_slash(buffer, CHAT_SLASH_COMMANDS)
1118                needs_render = True
1119                continue
1120            if char == "\x1b":
1121                key, payload = _decode_terminal_escape(_read_escape_sequence(char, fd=stdin_fd))
1122                if key == "right" and not buffer:
1123                    right_view = _next_chat_right_view(right_view, 1)
1124                    selected_control = 0
1125                elif key == "left" and not buffer:
1126                    right_view = _next_chat_right_view(right_view, -1)
1127                    selected_control = 0
1128                elif key in {"up", "down"} and not buffer:
1129                    next_focus = _frame_next_job_id(snapshot, job_id, direction=-1 if key == "up" else 1)
1130                    if next_focus and next_focus != job_id:
1131                        job_id = next_focus
1132                        _write_shell_state({"focus_job_id": job_id})
1133                        snapshot = _load_frame_snapshot(job_id, history_limit=history_limit)
1134                        title = snapshot["job"].get("title") or job_id
1135                        notices.append(f"focus {title}")
1136                        notices[:] = notices[-12:]
1137                elif key == "click" and isinstance(payload, tuple):
1138                    clicked_view = _chat_page_click(payload[0], payload[1], right_view=right_view)
1139                    if clicked_view:
1140                        right_view = clicked_view
1141                        selected_control = 0
1142                else:
1143                    _drain_pending_input(stdin_fd)
1144                needs_render = True
1145                continue
1146            if char.isprintable():
1147                buffer += char
1148                needs_render = True
1149    finally:
1150        termios.tcsetattr(sys.stdin, termios.TCSADRAIN, old_attrs)
1151        print("\033[?1006l\033[?1002l\033[?1000l\033[?25h\033[0m\033[?1049l", flush=True)
1152
1153
1154def _capture_chat_command(job_id: str, line: str) -> tuple[bool, str]:
1155    stream = StringIO()
1156    with redirect_stdout(stream):
1157        keep_running = _chat_handle_line(job_id, line)
1158    return keep_running, stream.getvalue()
1159
1160
1161def _is_plain_chat_line(line: str) -> bool:
1162    stripped = line.strip()
1163    if not stripped or stripped.startswith("/"):
1164        return False
1165    lowered = stripped.lower()
1166    if lowered in {"help", "jobs", "ls", "clear", "exit", "quit"}:
1167        return False
1168    try:
1169        first = shlex.split(stripped)[0].lower()
1170    except (IndexError, ValueError):
1171        first = lowered.split(maxsplit=1)[0]
1172    return first not in {"chat", "focus", "switch", "jobs", "ls", "help", "clear", "exit", "quit"}
1173
1174
1175def _load_frame_snapshot(job_id: str, *, history_limit: int = 12) -> dict[str, Any]:
1176    db, config = _db()
1177    try:
1178        return load_frame_snapshot(
1179            db,
1180            config,
1181            job_id,
1182            default_job_id=_default_job_id(db),
1183            history_limit=history_limit,
1184        )
1185    finally:
1186        db.close()
1187
1188
1189def _render_chat_frame(
1190    snapshot: dict[str, Any],
1191    input_buffer: str,
1192    notices: list[str],
1193    *,
1194    right_view: str = "status",
1195    selected_control: int = 0,
1196    editing_field: str | None = None,
1197    previous_frame: str = "",
1198) -> str:
1199    width, height = shutil.get_terminal_size((100, 30))
1200    frame = _build_chat_frame(
1201        snapshot,
1202        input_buffer,
1203        notices,
1204        width=width,
1205        height=height,
1206        right_view=right_view,
1207        selected_control=selected_control,
1208        editing_field=editing_field,
1209    )
1210    return _emit_frame_if_changed(frame, previous_frame)
1211
1212
1213def _build_chat_frame(
1214    snapshot: dict[str, Any],
1215    input_buffer: str,
1216    notices: list[str],
1217    *,
1218    width: int,
1219    height: int,
1220    right_view: str = "status",
1221    selected_control: int = 0,
1222    editing_field: str | None = None,
1223) -> str:
1224    return _build_chat_tui_frame(
1225        snapshot,
1226        input_buffer,
1227        notices,
1228        width=width,
1229        height=height,
1230        right_view=right_view,
1231        selected_control=selected_control,
1232        editing_field=editing_field,
1233    )
1234
1235
1236def _resolve_job_id(db: AgentDB, requested: Any = None) -> str | None:
1237    requested = _job_ref_text(requested)
1238    if requested:
1239        job = _find_job(db, requested)
1240        return str(job["id"]) if job else None
1241    return _default_job_id(db)
1242
1243
1244def _activate_job_if_planning(db: AgentDB, job_id: str) -> bool:
1245    job = db.get_job(job_id)
1246    if job.get("status") != "planning":
1247        return False
1248    db.update_job_status(job_id, "queued", metadata_patch={"planning_status": "accepted"})
1249    db.append_agent_update(job_id, "Plan accepted. I will start working from the planned tasks.", category="plan")
1250    return True
1251
1252
1253def _ensure_job_runnable(db: AgentDB, job_id: str) -> None:
1254    if _activate_job_if_planning(db, job_id):
1255        return
1256    job = db.get_job(job_id)
1257    status = str(job.get("status") or "")
1258    if status in {"completed", "paused", "cancelled", "failed"}:
1259        db.update_job_status(
1260            job_id,
1261            "queued",
1262            metadata_patch={"last_note": f"reopened from {status} by operator run command"},
1263        )
1264        db.append_agent_update(
1265            job_id,
1266            f"Reopened from {status}; continuing as a long-running job.",
1267            category="progress",
1268            metadata={"previous_status": status},
1269        )
1270
1271
1272def cmd_steer(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1273    message = " ".join(args.message).strip()
1274    if not message:
1275        print("No steering message provided.")
1276        return
1277    db, _ = _db()
1278    try:
1279        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1280        if not job_id:
1281            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1282            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found. Create one first, then send steering.")
1283            return
1284        entry = db.append_operator_message(job_id, message, source="operator")
1285        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1286        print(f"waiting for {job['title']}: {entry['message']}")
1287        print("The next worker step will include this in model-visible context.")
1288    finally:
1289        db.close()
1290
1291
1292def cmd_pause(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1293    db, _ = _db()
1294    try:
1295        job_id, note, ref = _resolve_control_job_and_note(db, args)
1296        if not job_id:
1297            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1298            return
1299        patch = {"last_note": note} if note else None
1300        db.update_job_status(job_id, "paused", metadata_patch=patch)
1301        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1302        print(f"paused {job['title']}" + (f": {note}" if note else ""))
1303    finally:
1304        db.close()
1305
1306
1307def cmd_resume(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1308    db, _ = _db()
1309    try:
1310        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1311        if not job_id:
1312            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1313            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1314            return
1315        db.update_job_status(job_id, "queued")
1316        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1317        print(f"resumed {job['title']}")
1318    finally:
1319        db.close()
1320
1321
1322def cmd_cancel(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1323    db, _ = _db()
1324    try:
1325        job_id, note, ref = _resolve_control_job_and_note(db, args)
1326        if not job_id:
1327            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1328            return
1329        patch = {"last_note": note} if note else None
1330        db.update_job_status(job_id, "cancelled", metadata_patch=patch)
1331        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1332        print(f"cancelled {job['title']}" + (f": {note}" if note else ""))
1333    finally:
1334        db.close()
1335
1336
1337def cmd_status(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1338    db, config = _db()
1339    try:
1340        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1341        if _job_ref_text(args.job_id) and not job_id:
1342            print(f"No job matched: {_job_ref_text(args.job_id)}")
1343            return
1344        state = collect_dashboard_state(db, config, job_id=job_id, limit=args.limit)
1345        if args.json:
1346            print(json.dumps(state, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, default=_json_default))
1347            return
1348        if args.full:
1349            print(render_dashboard(state, width=_terminal_width(), chars=args.chars), end="")
1350        else:
1351            print(render_overview(state, width=_terminal_width()), end="")
1352    finally:
1353        db.close()
1354
1355
1356def cmd_health(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1357    db, config = _db()
1358    try:
1359        config.ensure_dirs()
1360        lock = daemon_lock_status(config.runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
1361        metadata = lock.get("metadata") if isinstance(lock.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1362        events = read_daemon_events(config, limit=args.limit)
1363        job_id = _default_job_id(db)
1364        print("Nipux Health")
1365        print(_rule("="))
1366        print(f"daemon: {_daemon_state_line(lock)}")
1367        if metadata.get("last_heartbeat"):
1368            print(f"heartbeat: {metadata['last_heartbeat']}")
1369        if metadata.get("last_state"):
1370            print(f"state: {metadata['last_state']}")
1371        if metadata.get("last_status") or metadata.get("last_tool"):
1372            print(f"last step: {metadata.get('last_status') or '?'} {metadata.get('last_tool') or '-'}")
1373        if metadata.get("consecutive_failures"):
1374            print(f"consecutive failures: {metadata['consecutive_failures']}")
1375        if metadata.get("last_error"):
1376            print(
1377                f"last error: {metadata.get('last_error_type') or 'error'}: {_one_line(metadata['last_error'], args.chars)}"
1378            )
1379        print(f"model: {config.model.model}")
1380        print(f"state db: {config.runtime.state_db_path}")
1381        print(f"daemon log: {config.runtime.logs_dir / 'daemon.log'}")
1382        print(f"event log: {config.runtime.logs_dir / 'daemon-events.jsonl'}")
1383        print(f"autostart: {'installed' if _launch_agent_path().exists() else 'not installed'}")
1384        if job_id:
1385            job = db.get_job(job_id)
1386            steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
1387            artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job_id, limit=1)
1388            print()
1389            print(f"focus: {job['title']}")
1390            state = _job_display_state(job, bool(lock["running"]))
1391            print(
1392                f"state: {state} | worker: {_worker_label(job, bool(lock['running']))} | "
1393                f"steps: {_step_count(steps)} | latest artifacts: {len(artifacts)}"
1394            )
1395            if steps:
1396                print(f"latest: {_step_line(steps[-1], chars=args.chars)}")
1397        else:
1398            print()
1399            print("focus: no jobs")
1400        if events:
1401            print()
1402            print("recent daemon events:")
1403            job_titles = {job["id"]: job["title"] for job in db.list_jobs()}
1404            for event in events[-args.limit :]:
1405                print(f"  {_daemon_event_line(event, chars=args.chars, job_titles=job_titles)}")
1406        else:
1407            print()
1408            print("recent daemon events: none")
1409    finally:
1410        db.close()
1411
1412
1413def cmd_history(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1414    db, _ = _db()
1415    try:
1416        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1417        if not job_id:
1418            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1419            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1420            return
1421        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1422        events = db.list_timeline_events(job_id, limit=args.limit)
1423        if args.json:
1424            print(
1425                json.dumps(
1426                    [_public_event(event) for event in events], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, default=_json_default
1427                )
1428            )
1429            return
1430        print(f"history {job['title']}")
1431        print(_rule("="))
1432        if not events:
1433            print("No visible history yet.")
1434            return
1435        for event in events:
1436            if args.full:
1437                print(_event_line(event, chars=max(args.chars, 1200), full=True))
1438            else:
1439                _print_event_card(event, chars=args.chars)
1440    finally:
1441        db.close()
1442
1443
1444def cmd_events(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1445    db, _ = _db()
1446    seen: set[str] = set()
1447    try:
1448        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1449        if not job_id:
1450            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1451            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1452            return
1453        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1454        if not args.json:
1455            print(f"events {job['title']}")
1456            print(_rule("="))
1457
1458        def emit() -> None:
1459            events = db.list_timeline_events(job_id, limit=args.limit)
1460            printed = False
1461            for event in events:
1462                event_id = str(event.get("id") or "")
1463                if event_id in seen:
1464                    continue
1465                seen.add(event_id)
1466                if args.json:
1467                    print(json.dumps(_public_event(event), ensure_ascii=False, default=_json_default), flush=True)
1468                else:
1469                    if args.full:
1470                        print(_event_line(event, chars=args.chars, full=True), flush=True)
1471                    else:
1472                        _print_event_card(event, chars=args.chars)
1473                printed = True
1474            if printed and not args.json:
1475                print(_rule("-"), flush=True)
1476
1477        emit()
1478        while args.follow:
1479            time.sleep(args.interval)
1480            emit()
1481    except KeyboardInterrupt:
1482        print("\nevents stopped")
1483    finally:
1484        db.close()
1485
1486
1487def cmd_dashboard(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1488    db, config = _db()
1489    try:
1490        while True:
1491            job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1492            if _job_ref_text(args.job_id) and not job_id:
1493                print(f"No job matched: {_job_ref_text(args.job_id)}")
1494                return
1495            state = collect_dashboard_state(db, config, job_id=job_id, limit=args.limit)
1496            if args.clear:
1497                print("\033[2J\033[H", end="")
1498            print(render_dashboard(state, width=_terminal_width(), chars=args.chars), end="", flush=True)
1499            if not args.follow:
1500                return
1501            time.sleep(args.interval)
1502    except KeyboardInterrupt:
1503        print("\ndashboard stopped")
1504    finally:
1505        db.close()
1506
1507
1508def cmd_artifacts(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1509    db, _ = _db()
1510    try:
1511        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1512        if not job_id:
1513            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1514            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1515            return
1516        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1517        artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job_id, limit=args.limit)
1518        if not artifacts:
1519            print(f"No saved outputs recorded for {job['title']}.")
1520            return
1521        print(f"saved outputs {job['title']} (newest first)")
1522        print(_rule("-"))
1523        print("Open one with: artifact NUMBER, artifact latest, or artifact TITLE")
1524        for index, artifact in enumerate(artifacts, start=1):
1525            title = artifact.get("title") or artifact["id"]
1526            print(f"{index:>2}. {_one_line(title, 72)}")
1527            meta = f"{artifact['created_at']} | {artifact['type']} | id {artifact['id']}"
1528            print(f"    {meta}")
1529            if artifact.get("summary"):
1530                print(f"    {_one_line(_generic_display_text(artifact['summary']), args.chars)}")
1531            print(f"    view: artifact {index}")
1532            if args.paths:
1533                print(f"    path: {artifact['path']}")
1534    finally:
1535        db.close()
1536
1537
1538def cmd_artifact(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1539    db, config = _db()
1540    try:
1541        store = ArtifactStore(config.runtime.home, db=db)
1542        ref = _job_ref_text(args.artifact_id_or_path)
1543        resolved = _resolve_artifact_ref(db, config, ref, job_id=_resolve_job_id(db, getattr(args, "job_id", None)))
1544        if not resolved:
1545            print(f"No artifact matched: {ref}")
1546            return
1547        content = store.read_text(resolved["id"] if resolved.get("id") else resolved["path"])
1548        if resolved.get("title"):
1549            print(f"artifact: {resolved['title']}")
1550            if resolved.get("summary"):
1551                print(f"summary: {resolved['summary']}")
1552            print(_rule("-"))
1553        if args.chars and len(content) > args.chars:
1554            content = content[: args.chars] + f"\n... truncated {len(content) - args.chars} chars\n"
1555        print(content, end="" if content.endswith("\n") else "\n")
1556    finally:
1557        db.close()
1558
1559
1560def cmd_lessons(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1561    db, _ = _db()
1562    try:
1563        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1564        if not job_id:
1565            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1566            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1567            return
1568        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1569        _print_lessons(job, limit=args.limit, chars=args.chars)
1570    finally:
1571        db.close()
1572
1573
1574def cmd_learn(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1575    lesson = " ".join(args.lesson).strip()
1576    if not lesson:
1577        print("usage: learn [--job JOB_TITLE] [--category CATEGORY] LESSON")
1578        return
1579    db, _ = _db()
1580    try:
1581        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1582        if not job_id:
1583            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1584            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1585            return
1586        entry = db.append_lesson(
1587            job_id, lesson, category=args.category or "operator_preference", metadata={"source": "operator"}
1588        )
1589        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1590        print(f"learned for {job['title']}: {_one_line(entry['lesson'], args.chars)}")
1591    finally:
1592        db.close()
1593
1594
1595def cmd_findings(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1596    db, _ = _db()
1597    try:
1598        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1599        if not job_id:
1600            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1601            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1602            return
1603        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1604        findings = _metadata_records(job, "finding_ledger")
1605        if args.json:
1606            print(json.dumps(findings, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, default=_json_default))
1607            return
1608        print(f"findings {job['title']} | {len(findings)} unique")
1609        print(_rule("="))
1610        if not findings:
1611            print("none yet")
1612            return
1613        ranked = sorted(findings, key=lambda finding: float(finding.get("score") or 0), reverse=True)
1614        for index, finding in enumerate(ranked[: args.limit], start=1):
1615            score = finding.get("score")
1616            score_text = f" score={score:g}" if isinstance(score, (int, float)) else ""
1617            print(f"{index:>2}. {_one_line(finding.get('name') or 'unknown', 54)}{score_text}")
1618            details = " | ".join(
1619                value
1620                for value in [
1621                    str(finding.get("location") or "").strip(),
1622                    str(finding.get("category") or "").strip(),
1623                    str(finding.get("status") or "").strip(),
1624                ]
1625                if value
1626            )
1627            if details:
1628                print(f"    {details}")
1629            if finding.get("url") or finding.get("source_url"):
1630                print(f"    {finding.get('url') or finding.get('source_url')}")
1631            if finding.get("reason"):
1632                print(f"    {_one_line(finding['reason'], args.chars)}")
1633    finally:
1634        db.close()
1635
1636
1637def cmd_tasks(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1638    db, _ = _db()
1639    try:
1640        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1641        if not job_id:
1642            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1643            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1644            return
1645        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1646        tasks = _metadata_records(job, "task_queue")
1647        if args.status:
1648            wanted = {status.strip().lower() for status in args.status}
1649            tasks = [task for task in tasks if str(task.get("status") or "open").lower() in wanted]
1650        if args.json:
1651            print(json.dumps(tasks, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, default=_json_default))
1652            return
1653        status_order = {"active": 0, "open": 1, "blocked": 2, "done": 3, "skipped": 4}
1654        ranked = sorted(
1655            tasks,
1656            key=lambda task: (
1657                status_order.get(str(task.get("status") or "open"), 9),
1658                -int(task.get("priority") or 0),
1659                str(task.get("title") or ""),
1660            ),
1661        )
1662        print(f"tasks {job['title']} | {len(ranked)} tracked")
1663        print(_rule("="))
1664        if not ranked:
1665            print("none yet")
1666            return
1667        for index, task in enumerate(ranked[: args.limit], start=1):
1668            status = str(task.get("status") or "open")
1669            priority = int(task.get("priority") or 0)
1670            print(f"{index:>2}. {status:<7} p={priority:<3} {_one_line(task.get('title') or 'untitled', 54)}")
1671            details = " | ".join(
1672                value
1673                for value in [
1674                    f"contract={task.get('output_contract')}" if task.get("output_contract") else "",
1675                    f"accept={task.get('acceptance_criteria')}" if task.get("acceptance_criteria") else "",
1676                    f"evidence={task.get('evidence_needed')}" if task.get("evidence_needed") else "",
1677                    f"stall={task.get('stall_behavior')}" if task.get("stall_behavior") else "",
1678                    str(task.get("goal") or "").strip(),
1679                    str(task.get("source_hint") or "").strip(),
1680                    str(task.get("result") or "").strip(),
1681                ]
1682                if value
1683            )
1684            if details:
1685                print(f"    {_one_line(details, args.chars)}")
1686    finally:
1687        db.close()
1688
1689
1690def cmd_roadmap(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1691    db, _ = _db()
1692    try:
1693        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1694        if not job_id:
1695            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1696            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1697            return
1698        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1699        metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1700        roadmap = metadata.get("roadmap") if isinstance(metadata.get("roadmap"), dict) else {}
1701        if args.json:
1702            print(json.dumps(roadmap, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, default=_json_default))
1703            return
1704        print(f"roadmap {job['title']}")
1705        print(_rule("="))
1706        if not roadmap:
1707            print("none yet")
1708            print("the worker can create one with record_roadmap when broad work needs milestones")
1709            return
1710        milestones = roadmap.get("milestones") if isinstance(roadmap.get("milestones"), list) else []
1711        print(f"title: {roadmap.get('title') or 'Roadmap'}")
1712        print(f"status: {roadmap.get('status') or 'planned'} | milestones: {len(milestones)}")
1713        if roadmap.get("current_milestone"):
1714            print(f"current: {_one_line(roadmap.get('current_milestone') or '', args.chars)}")
1715        if roadmap.get("scope"):
1716            print(f"scope: {_one_line(roadmap.get('scope') or '', args.chars)}")
1717        if roadmap.get("validation_contract"):
1718            print(f"validation: {_one_line(roadmap.get('validation_contract') or '', args.chars)}")
1719        if not milestones:
1720            return
1721        print()
1722        status_order = {"active": 0, "validating": 1, "planned": 2, "blocked": 3, "done": 4, "skipped": 5}
1723        ranked = sorted(
1724            [milestone for milestone in milestones if isinstance(milestone, dict)],
1725            key=lambda milestone: (
1726                status_order.get(str(milestone.get("status") or "planned"), 9),
1727                -int(milestone.get("priority") or 0),
1728                str(milestone.get("title") or ""),
1729            ),
1730        )
1731        for index, milestone in enumerate(ranked[: args.limit], start=1):
1732            status = str(milestone.get("status") or "planned")
1733            validation = str(milestone.get("validation_status") or "not_started")
1734            features = milestone.get("features") if isinstance(milestone.get("features"), list) else []
1735            open_features = sum(
1736                1 for feature in features
1737                if isinstance(feature, dict) and str(feature.get("status") or "planned") in {"planned", "active"}
1738            )
1739            print(
1740                f"{index:>2}. {status:<10} validation={validation:<11} "
1741                f"p={int(milestone.get('priority') or 0):<3} {_one_line(milestone.get('title') or 'milestone', 54)}"
1742            )
1743            details = " | ".join(
1744                value
1745                for value in [
1746                    f"features={len(features)}/{open_features} open" if features else "",
1747                    f"accept={milestone.get('acceptance_criteria')}" if milestone.get("acceptance_criteria") else "",
1748                    f"evidence={milestone.get('evidence_needed')}" if milestone.get("evidence_needed") else "",
1749                    f"result={milestone.get('validation_result')}" if milestone.get("validation_result") else "",
1750                    f"next={milestone.get('next_action')}" if milestone.get("next_action") else "",
1751                ]
1752                if value
1753            )
1754            if details:
1755                print(f"    {_one_line(details, args.chars)}")
1756            for feature in features[: min(3, args.features)]:
1757                if not isinstance(feature, dict):
1758                    continue
1759                print(
1760                    f"    - {str(feature.get('status') or 'planned'):<7} "
1761                    f"{_one_line(feature.get('title') or 'feature', max(30, args.chars - 16))}"
1762                )
1763    finally:
1764        db.close()
1765
1766
1767def cmd_experiments(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1768    db, _ = _db()
1769    try:
1770        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1771        if not job_id:
1772            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1773            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1774            return
1775        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1776        experiments = _metadata_records(job, "experiment_ledger")
1777        if args.status:
1778            wanted = {status.strip().lower() for status in args.status}
1779            experiments = [
1780                experiment for experiment in experiments if str(experiment.get("status") or "planned").lower() in wanted
1781            ]
1782        if args.json:
1783            print(json.dumps(experiments, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, default=_json_default))
1784            return
1785        status_order = {"running": 0, "planned": 1, "measured": 2, "blocked": 3, "failed": 4, "skipped": 5}
1786        ranked = sorted(
1787            experiments,
1788            key=lambda experiment: (
1789                not bool(experiment.get("best_observed")),
1790                status_order.get(str(experiment.get("status") or "planned"), 9),
1791                str(experiment.get("updated_at") or experiment.get("created_at") or ""),
1792            ),
1793        )
1794        print(f"experiments {job['title']} | {len(ranked)} tracked")
1795        print(_rule("="))
1796        if not ranked:
1797            print("none yet")
1798            return
1799        for index, experiment in enumerate(ranked[: args.limit], start=1):
1800            status = str(experiment.get("status") or "planned")
1801            best = " *best*" if experiment.get("best_observed") else ""
1802            metric = ""
1803            if experiment.get("metric_value") is not None:
1804                metric = f" {experiment.get('metric_name') or 'metric'}={experiment.get('metric_value')}{experiment.get('metric_unit') or ''}"
1805            print(f"{index:>2}. {status:<8} {_one_line(experiment.get('title') or 'experiment', 54)}{metric}{best}")
1806            details = " | ".join(
1807                value
1808                for value in [
1809                    str(experiment.get("result") or "").strip(),
1810                    f"next: {experiment.get('next_action')}" if experiment.get("next_action") else "",
1811                    f"delta: {experiment.get('delta_from_previous_best')}"
1812                    if experiment.get("delta_from_previous_best") is not None
1813                    else "",
1814                ]
1815                if value
1816            )
1817            if details:
1818                print(f"    {_one_line(details, args.chars)}")
1819    finally:
1820        db.close()
1821
1822
1823def cmd_sources(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1824    db, _ = _db()
1825    try:
1826        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1827        if not job_id:
1828            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1829            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1830            return
1831        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1832        sources = _metadata_records(job, "source_ledger")
1833        if args.json:
1834            print(json.dumps(sources, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, default=_json_default))
1835            return
1836        ranked = sorted(
1837            sources,
1838            key=lambda source: (float(source.get("usefulness_score") or 0), int(source.get("yield_count") or 0)),
1839            reverse=True,
1840        )
1841        print(f"sources {job['title']} | {len(sources)} scored")
1842        print(_rule("="))
1843        if not ranked:
1844            print("none yet")
1845            return
1846        for index, source in enumerate(ranked[: args.limit], start=1):
1847            score = float(source.get("usefulness_score") or 0)
1848            print(
1849                f"{index:>2}. {_one_line(source.get('source') or 'unknown', 58)} "
1850                f"score={score:g} findings={source.get('yield_count') or 0} fails={source.get('fail_count') or 0}"
1851            )
1852            detail = " | ".join(
1853                value
1854                for value in [
1855                    str(source.get("source_type") or "").strip(),
1856                    str(source.get("last_outcome") or "").strip(),
1857                ]
1858                if value
1859            )
1860            if detail:
1861                print(f"    {_one_line(detail, args.chars)}")
1862            warnings = source.get("warnings") if isinstance(source.get("warnings"), list) else []
1863            if warnings:
1864                print(f"    warnings: {_one_line(', '.join(str(item) for item in warnings[-3:]), args.chars)}")
1865    finally:
1866        db.close()
1867
1868
1869def cmd_memory(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1870    db, _ = _db()
1871    try:
1872        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1873        if not job_id:
1874            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1875            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1876            return
1877        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1878        metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1879        lessons = _metadata_records(job, "lessons")
1880        reflections = _metadata_records(job, "reflections")
1881        compact = db.list_memory(job_id)
1882        active_operator = _active_operator_messages(metadata)
1883        pending_measurement = metadata.get("pending_measurement_obligation") if isinstance(metadata.get("pending_measurement_obligation"), dict) else {}
1884        print(f"memory {job['title']}")
1885        print(_rule("="))
1886        print(f"lessons={len(lessons)} reflections={len(reflections)} compact_entries={len(compact)}")
1887        if active_operator:
1888            print()
1889            print("active operator context:")
1890            for entry in active_operator[-min(args.limit, 8):]:
1891                marker = entry.get("event_id") or "operator"
1892                print(f"  {marker}: {_one_line(entry.get('message') or '', args.chars)}")
1893        if pending_measurement:
1894            print()
1895            print(f"pending measurement: step #{pending_measurement.get('source_step_no') or '?'}")
1896            candidates = pending_measurement.get("metric_candidates") if isinstance(pending_measurement.get("metric_candidates"), list) else []
1897            if candidates:
1898                print(f"  candidates: {_one_line(', '.join(str(item) for item in candidates[:5]), args.chars)}")
1899        if reflections:
1900            print()
1901            print("latest reflection:")
1902            reflection = reflections[-1]
1903            print(f"  {_one_line(reflection.get('summary') or '', args.chars)}")
1904            if reflection.get("strategy"):
1905                print(f"  strategy: {_one_line(reflection['strategy'], args.chars)}")
1906        if lessons:
1907            print()
1908            print("latest lessons:")
1909            for lesson in lessons[-min(args.limit, 8) :]:
1910                print(f"  {lesson.get('category') or 'memory'}: {_one_line(lesson.get('lesson') or '', args.chars)}")
1911        if compact:
1912            print()
1913            print("compact memory:")
1914            for entry in compact[: min(args.limit, 3)]:
1915                print(f"  {entry.get('key')}: {_one_line(entry.get('summary') or '', args.chars)}")
1916    finally:
1917        db.close()
1918
1919
1920def cmd_metrics(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1921    db, config = _db()
1922    try:
1923        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1924        if not job_id:
1925            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1926            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1927            return
1928        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1929        steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
1930        artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job_id, limit=1000)
1931        findings = _metadata_records(job, "finding_ledger")
1932        sources = _metadata_records(job, "source_ledger")
1933        tasks = _metadata_records(job, "task_queue")
1934        experiments = _metadata_records(job, "experiment_ledger")
1935        lessons = _metadata_records(job, "lessons")
1936        reflections = _metadata_records(job, "reflections")
1937        metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1938        roadmap = metadata.get("roadmap") if isinstance(metadata.get("roadmap"), dict) else {}
1939        milestones = roadmap.get("milestones") if isinstance(roadmap.get("milestones"), list) else []
1940        daemon = daemon_lock_status(config.runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
1941        finding_batches = [
1942            artifact
1943            for artifact in artifacts
1944            if "finding" in str(artifact.get("title") or artifact.get("summary") or "").lower()
1945        ]
1946        blocked = [step for step in steps if step.get("status") == "blocked"]
1947        failed = [step for step in steps if step.get("status") == "failed"]
1948        print(f"metrics {job['title']}")
1949        print(_rule("="))
1950        print(
1951            f"daemon: {'running' if daemon['running'] else 'stopped'} | worker: {_worker_label(job, bool(daemon['running']))}"
1952        )
1953        print(f"steps: {_step_count(steps)} | failed: {len(failed)} | blocked/recovered: {len(blocked)}")
1954        print(f"artifacts: {len(artifacts)} | finding_batches: {len(finding_batches)}")
1955        print(
1956            f"findings: {len(findings)} | sources: {len(sources)} | tasks: {len(tasks)} | "
1957            f"milestones: {len(milestones)} | experiments: {len(experiments)} | "
1958            f"lessons: {len(lessons)} | reflections: {len(reflections)}"
1959        )
1960        if sources:
1961            best = max(sources, key=lambda source: float(source.get("usefulness_score") or 0))
1962            print(
1963                f"best source: {_one_line(best.get('source') or '', args.chars)} score={best.get('usefulness_score')}"
1964            )
1965        if findings:
1966            best_finding = max(findings, key=lambda finding: float(finding.get("score") or 0))
1967            print(
1968                f"best finding: {_one_line(best_finding.get('name') or '', args.chars)} score={best_finding.get('score')}"
1969            )
1970        measured = [experiment for experiment in experiments if experiment.get("metric_value") is not None]
1971        best_experiments = [experiment for experiment in measured if experiment.get("best_observed")]
1972        if best_experiments:
1973            best_experiment = best_experiments[-1]
1974            metric = f"{best_experiment.get('metric_name') or 'metric'}={best_experiment.get('metric_value')}{best_experiment.get('metric_unit') or ''}"
1975            print(f"best experiment: {_one_line(best_experiment.get('title') or '', args.chars)} {metric}")
1976    finally:
1977        db.close()
1978
1979
1980def cmd_usage(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
1981    db, config = _db()
1982    try:
1983        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
1984        if not job_id:
1985            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
1986            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
1987            return
1988        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1989        usage = db.job_token_usage(job_id)
1990        usage["input_cost_per_million"] = config.model.input_cost_per_million
1991        usage["output_cost_per_million"] = config.model.output_cost_per_million
1992        if args.json:
1993            print(json.dumps(usage, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, sort_keys=True))
1994            return
1995        lines = format_usage_report(
1996            title=str(job.get("title") or job_id),
1997            usage=usage,
1998            context_length=int(config.model.context_length or 0),
1999            model=str(config.model.model),
2000            base_url=str(config.model.base_url),
2001        )
2002        print("\n".join(lines))
2003    finally:
2004        db.close()
2005
2006
2007def _remote_model_preflight_failures(config) -> list[str]:
2008    host = (urlparse(config.model.base_url).hostname or "").lower()
2009    local_hosts = {"", "localhost", "127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0"}
2010    if host in local_hosts or host.endswith(".local"):
2011        return []
2012    blocking = {"model_config", "model_auth", "model_endpoint", "model_generation"}
2013    checks = run_doctor(config=config, check_model=True)
