2014    return [f"{check.name}: {check.detail}" for check in checks if not check.ok and check.name in blocking]
2015
2016
2017def _ensure_remote_model_ready_for_worker(config, *, fake: bool) -> bool:
2018    if fake:
2019        return True
2020    failures = _remote_model_preflight_failures(config)
2021    if not failures:
2022        return True
2023    print("model is not ready; daemon not started")
2024    for failure in failures:
2025        print(f"  fail {failure}")
2026    print("Run `nipux doctor --check-model` after fixing the model configuration.")
2027    return False
2028
2029
2030def cmd_start(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
2031    config = load_config()
2032    config.ensure_dirs()
2033    status = daemon_lock_status(config.runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
2034    if status["running"]:
2035        metadata = status.get("metadata") or {}
2036        if status.get("stale"):
2037            print(f"nipux daemon stale pid={metadata.get('pid', 'unknown')}; restarting")
2038            _stop_daemon_process(config, wait=5.0, quiet=True)
2039            time.sleep(0.5)
2040        else:
2041            print(f"nipux daemon already running pid={metadata.get('pid', 'unknown')}")
2042            return
2043    if not _ensure_remote_model_ready_for_worker(config, fake=args.fake):
2044        return
2045    log_path = Path(args.log_file).expanduser() if args.log_file else config.runtime.logs_dir / "daemon.log"
2046    log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
2047    command = [
2048        sys.executable,
2049        "-m",
2050        "nipux_cli.cli",
2051        "daemon",
2052        "--poll-seconds",
2053        str(args.poll_seconds),
2054    ]
2055    if args.fake:
2056        command.append("--fake")
2057    if args.quiet:
2058        command.append("--quiet")
2059    else:
2060        command.append("--verbose")
2061    with log_path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as log_file:
2062        process = subprocess.Popen(
2063            command,
2064            cwd=str(Path.cwd()),
2065            stdout=log_file,
2066            stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
2067            start_new_session=True,
2068        )
2069    time.sleep(0.5)
2070    status = daemon_lock_status(config.runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
2071    if status["running"]:
2072        metadata = status.get("metadata") or {}
2073        print(f"nipux daemon started pid={metadata.get('pid') or process.pid}")
2074        print(f"log: {log_path}")
2075        return
2076    if process.poll() is None:
2077        print(f"nipux daemon process started pid={process.pid}, waiting for lock")
2078        print(f"log: {log_path}")
2079        return
2080    raise SystemExit(f"nipux daemon exited immediately with code {process.returncode}; see {log_path}")
2081
2082
2083def _start_daemon_if_needed(
2084    *, poll_seconds: float, fake: bool = False, quiet: bool = False, log_file: str | None = None
2085) -> None:
2086    config = load_config()
2087    config.ensure_dirs()
2088    status = daemon_lock_status(config.runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
2089    if status["running"]:
2090        metadata = status.get("metadata") or {}
2091        if status.get("stale"):
2092            print(f"daemon stale pid={metadata.get('pid', 'unknown')}; restarting")
2093            _stop_daemon_process(config, wait=5.0, quiet=True)
2094            time.sleep(0.5)
2095            cmd_start(argparse.Namespace(poll_seconds=poll_seconds, fake=fake, quiet=quiet, log_file=log_file))
2096            return
2097        print(f"daemon already running pid={metadata.get('pid', 'unknown')}")
2098        return
2099    cmd_start(argparse.Namespace(poll_seconds=poll_seconds, fake=fake, quiet=quiet, log_file=log_file))
2100
2101
2102def cmd_restart(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
2103    config = load_config()
2104    config.ensure_dirs()
2105    stopped = _stop_daemon_process(config, wait=args.wait, quiet=False)
2106    if stopped:
2107        time.sleep(0.5)
2108    cmd_start(argparse.Namespace(poll_seconds=args.poll_seconds, fake=args.fake, quiet=args.quiet, log_file=args.log_file))
2109
2110
2111def _stop_daemon_process(config, *, wait: float, quiet: bool) -> bool:
2112    status = daemon_lock_status(config.runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
2113    if not status["running"]:
2114        if not quiet:
2115            print("nipux daemon is not running")
2116        return False
2117    metadata = status.get("metadata") or {}
2118    pid = metadata.get("pid")
2119    if not isinstance(pid, int):
2120        raise SystemExit("daemon is running but lock file has no pid; stop it from the terminal that owns it")
2121    os.kill(pid, signal.SIGTERM)
2122    deadline = time.time() + wait
2123    while time.time() < deadline:
2124        if not _pid_is_alive(pid):
2125            if not quiet:
2126                print(f"nipux daemon stopped pid={pid}")
2127            return True
2128        time.sleep(0.2)
2129    if not quiet:
2130        print(f"sent SIGTERM to nipux daemon pid={pid}; it may still be shutting down")
2131    return False
2132
2133
2134def cmd_stop(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
2135    requested_job = _job_ref_text(getattr(args, "job_id", None))
2136    if requested_job:
2137        db, _ = _db()
2138        try:
2139            job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, requested_job)
2140            if not job_id:
2141                print(f"No job matched: {requested_job}")
2142                return
2143            db.update_job_status(job_id, "paused", metadata_patch={"last_note": "stopped by operator"})
2144            job = db.get_job(job_id)
2145            print(f"stopped {job['title']} (paused job)")
2146            print("Use resume/run to start it again. Plain 'stop' still stops the daemon.")
2147            return
2148        finally:
2149            db.close()
2150
2151    config = load_config()
2152    _stop_daemon_process(config, wait=args.wait, quiet=False)
2153
2154
2155def _launch_agent_path() -> Path:
2156    return Path.home() / "Library" / "LaunchAgents" / "com.nipux.agent.plist"
2157
2158
2159def _launch_agent_plist(*, poll_seconds: float, quiet: bool) -> str:
2160    config = load_config()
2161    config.ensure_dirs()
2162    command = [
2163        sys.executable,
2164        "-m",
2165        "nipux_cli.cli",
2166        "daemon",
2167        "--poll-seconds",
2168        str(poll_seconds),
2169    ]
2170    command.append("--quiet" if quiet else "--verbose")
2171    args_xml = "\n".join(f"        <string>{_xml_escape(part)}</string>" for part in command)
2172    log_path = config.runtime.logs_dir / "launchd-daemon.log"
2173    return f"""<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
2174<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
2175<plist version="1.0">
2176  <dict>
2177    <key>Label</key>
2178    <string>com.nipux.agent</string>
2179    <key>ProgramArguments</key>
2180    <array>
2181{args_xml}
2182    </array>
2183    <key>EnvironmentVariables</key>
2184    <dict>
2185      <key>NIPUX_HOME</key>
2186      <string>{_xml_escape(str(config.runtime.home))}</string>
2187    </dict>
2188    <key>RunAtLoad</key>
2189    <true/>
2190    <key>KeepAlive</key>
2191    <true/>
2192    <key>StandardOutPath</key>
2193    <string>{_xml_escape(str(log_path))}</string>
2194    <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
2195    <string>{_xml_escape(str(log_path))}</string>
2196    <key>WorkingDirectory</key>
2197    <string>{_xml_escape(str(Path.cwd()))}</string>
2198  </dict>
2199</plist>
2200"""
2201
2202
2203def _xml_escape(value: str) -> str:
2204    return value.replace("&", "&amp;").replace("<", "&lt;").replace(">", "&gt;")
2205
2206
2207def cmd_autostart(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
2208    path = _launch_agent_path()
2209    label = "gui/" + str(os.getuid()) + "/com.nipux.agent"
2210    if args.action == "status":
2211        status = "installed" if path.exists() else "not installed"
2212        print(f"autostart: {status}")
2213        print(f"plist: {path}")
2214        if path.exists():
2215            result = subprocess.run(
2216                ["launchctl", "print", label], check=False, stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL
2217            )
2218            print("launchd: loaded" if result.returncode == 0 else "launchd: not loaded")
2219        return
2220    if args.action == "install":
2221        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
2222        path.write_text(_launch_agent_plist(poll_seconds=args.poll_seconds, quiet=args.quiet), encoding="utf-8")
2223        subprocess.run(
2224            ["launchctl", "bootout", label], check=False, stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL
2225        )
2226        result = subprocess.run(["launchctl", "bootstrap", "gui/" + str(os.getuid()), str(path)], check=False)
2227        if result.returncode:
2228            raise SystemExit(result.returncode)
2229        subprocess.run(["launchctl", "enable", label], check=False)
2230        print(f"autostart installed: {path}")
2231        print("daemon will start at login and launchd will keep it alive")
2232        return
2233    if args.action == "uninstall":
2234        subprocess.run(
2235            ["launchctl", "bootout", label], check=False, stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL
2236        )
2237        if path.exists():
2238            path.unlink()
2239        print("autostart uninstalled")
2240        return
2241    raise SystemExit(f"unknown autostart action: {args.action}")
2242
2243
2244def _systemd_service_path() -> Path:
2245    return Path.home() / ".config" / "systemd" / "user" / "nipux.service"
2246
2247
2248def _systemd_service_text(*, poll_seconds: float, quiet: bool) -> str:
2249    config = load_config()
2250    config.ensure_dirs()
2251    command = [
2252        sys.executable,
2253        "-m",
2254        "nipux_cli.cli",
2255        "daemon",
2256        "--poll-seconds",
2257        str(poll_seconds),
2258    ]
2259    command.append("--quiet" if quiet else "--verbose")
2260    return "\n".join(
2261        [
2262            "[Unit]",
2263            "Description=Nipux 24/7 autonomous worker",
2264            "After=network-online.target",
2265            "Wants=network-online.target",
2266            "",
2267            "[Service]",
2268            "Type=simple",
2269            f"WorkingDirectory={Path.cwd()}",
2270            f"Environment=NIPUX_HOME={config.runtime.home}",
2271            f"ExecStart={' '.join(shlex.quote(part) for part in command)}",
2272            "Restart=always",
2273            "RestartSec=3",
2274            "",
2275            "[Install]",
2276            "WantedBy=default.target",
2277            "",
2278        ]
2279    )
2280
2281
2282def cmd_service(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
2283    path = _systemd_service_path()
2284    systemctl = shutil.which("systemctl")
2285    user_cmd = [systemctl, "--user"] if systemctl else None
2286    if args.action == "status":
2287        print(f"service: {'installed' if path.exists() else 'not installed'}")
2288        print(f"unit: {path}")
2289        if user_cmd:
2290            result = subprocess.run(
2291                [*user_cmd, "is-active", "nipux.service"], check=False, capture_output=True, text=True
2292            )
2293            print(f"systemd: {result.stdout.strip() or result.stderr.strip() or 'unknown'}")
2294        else:
2295            print("systemd: unavailable on this machine")
2296        return
2297    if args.action == "install":
2298        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
2299        path.write_text(_systemd_service_text(poll_seconds=args.poll_seconds, quiet=args.quiet), encoding="utf-8")
2300        print(f"service file written: {path}")
2301        if user_cmd:
2302            subprocess.run([*user_cmd, "daemon-reload"], check=False)
2303            subprocess.run([*user_cmd, "enable", "--now", "nipux.service"], check=False)
2304            print("systemd user service enabled and started")
2305        else:
2306            print(
2307                "systemd not found; copy this service to a Linux server or run: systemctl --user enable --now nipux.service"
2308            )
2309        return
2310    if args.action == "uninstall":
2311        if user_cmd:
2312            subprocess.run([*user_cmd, "disable", "--now", "nipux.service"], check=False)
2313            subprocess.run([*user_cmd, "daemon-reload"], check=False)
2314        if path.exists():
2315            path.unlink()
2316        print("service uninstalled")
2317        return
2318    raise SystemExit(f"unknown service action: {args.action}")
2319
2320
2321def cmd_browser_dashboard(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
2322    from nipux_cli.browser import _find_agent_browser
2323
2324    config = load_config()
2325    config.ensure_dirs()
2326    if args.stop:
2327        result = subprocess.run([*_find_agent_browser(), "dashboard", "stop"], check=False)
2328        if result.returncode:
2329            raise SystemExit(result.returncode)
2330        print("agent-browser dashboard stopped")
2331        return
2332
2333    command = [*_find_agent_browser(), "dashboard", "start", "--port", str(args.port)]
2334    if args.foreground:
2335        raise SystemExit(subprocess.call(command))
2336
2337    log_path = Path(args.log_file).expanduser() if args.log_file else config.runtime.logs_dir / "browser-dashboard.log"
2338    log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
2339    with log_path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as log_file:
2340        process = subprocess.Popen(
2341            command,
2342            cwd=str(Path.cwd()),
2343            stdout=log_file,
2344            stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
2345            start_new_session=True,
2346        )
2347    print(f"agent-browser dashboard started pid={process.pid}")
2348    print(f"url: http://127.0.0.1:{args.port}")
2349    print(f"log: {log_path}")
2350
2351
2352def _clip_json(value: Any, limit: int) -> str:
2353    text = json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, sort_keys=True)
2354    if len(text) <= limit:
2355        return text
2356    return text[:limit] + f"\n... truncated {len(text) - limit} chars"
2357
2358
2359def _print_step(step: dict[str, Any], *, verbose: bool = False, chars: int = 4000) -> None:
2360    tool = step.get("tool_name") or "-"
2361    summary = _one_line(_clean_step_summary(step.get("summary") or ""), chars)
2362    error = _one_line(step["error"], chars) if step.get("error") else ""
2363    print(f"step #{step['step_no']} {step['started_at']} {step['status']} {step['kind']} {tool}")
2364    if summary:
2365        print(f"  summary: {summary}")
2366    if error:
2367        print(f"  error: {error}")
2368    output_data = step.get("output") or {}
2369    if not verbose and isinstance(output_data, dict):
2370        artifact_id = output_data.get("artifact_id")
2371        if artifact_id:
2372            print(f"  artifact: {artifact_id} (view with: artifact {artifact_id})")
2373        lesson = output_data.get("lesson") if isinstance(output_data.get("lesson"), dict) else None
2374        if lesson:
2375            print(f"  lesson: {_one_line(lesson.get('lesson') or '', chars)}")
2376        update = output_data.get("update") if isinstance(output_data.get("update"), dict) else None
2377        if update:
2378            print(f"  update: {_one_line(update.get('message') or '', chars)}")
2379        source = output_data.get("source") if isinstance(output_data.get("source"), dict) else None
2380        if source:
2381            print(f"  source: {_one_line(source.get('source') or '', chars)} score={source.get('usefulness_score')}")
2382        if isinstance(output_data.get("findings"), list):
2383            print(f"  findings: {output_data.get('added', 0)} new, {output_data.get('updated', 0)} updated")
2384        checkpoint = (
2385            output_data.get("auto_checkpoint") if isinstance(output_data.get("auto_checkpoint"), dict) else None
2386        )
2387        if checkpoint:
2388            print(f"  auto checkpoint: {checkpoint.get('artifact_id')}")
2389    if verbose:
2390        input_data = step.get("input") or {}
2391        if input_data:
2392            print("  input:")
2393            print(_clip_json(input_data, chars))
2394        if output_data:
2395            print("  output:")
2396            print(_clip_json(output_data, chars))
2397
2398
2399def _print_artifact(artifact: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
2400    title = artifact.get("title") or artifact["id"]
2401    print(f"artifact {artifact['created_at']} {artifact['type']} {title}")
2402    print(f"  {artifact['path']}")
2403
2404
2405def _print_run(run: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
2406    print(f"run {run['started_at']} {run['status']} {run['id']} {run.get('model') or ''}")
2407    if run.get("error"):
2408        print(f"  error: {run['error']}")
2409
2410
2411def _print_startup_history(job_id: str, *, limit: int, chars: int) -> None:
2412    db, config = _db()
2413    try:
2414        job = db.get_job(job_id)
2415        jobs = db.list_jobs()
2416        steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
2417        artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job_id, limit=1000)
2418        memory_entries = db.list_memory(job_id)
2419        events = db.list_timeline_events(job_id, limit=limit)
2420        daemon = daemon_lock_status(config.runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
2421    finally:
2422        db.close()
2423    print()
2424    _print_session_overview(
2425        job,
2426        steps=steps,
2427        artifacts=artifacts,
2428        memory_entries=memory_entries,
2429        daemon_running=bool(daemon["running"]),
2430        model=config.model.model,
2431        artifacts_dir=config.runtime.jobs_dir / job_id / "artifacts",
2432        jobs=jobs,
2433        chars=chars,
2434    )
2435    print()
2436    print(_section_title("Recent activity", f"{job['title']}"))
2437    if not events:
2438        print("  No visible history yet.")
2439        return
2440    display_events = _important_startup_events(events, limit=min(limit, 8))
2441    artifact_indexes = {str(artifact["id"]): index for index, artifact in enumerate(artifacts, start=1)}
2442    for event in display_events:
2443        _print_event_card(event, chars=min(chars, 140), artifact_indexes=artifact_indexes)
2444    if len(events) > len(display_events):
2445        print(f"  ... {len(events) - len(display_events)} older events hidden. Use /history for the full timeline.")
2446
2447
2448def _print_session_overview(
2449    job: dict[str, Any],
2450    *,
2451    steps: list[dict[str, Any]],
2452    artifacts: list[dict[str, Any]],
2453    memory_entries: list[dict[str, Any]],
2454    daemon_running: bool,
2455    model: str,
2456    artifacts_dir: Path,
2457    jobs: list[dict[str, Any]],
2458    chars: int,
2459) -> None:
2460    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
2461    findings = _metadata_records(job, "finding_ledger")
2462    sources = _metadata_records(job, "source_ledger")
2463    tasks = _metadata_records(job, "task_queue")
2464    experiments = _metadata_records(job, "experiment_ledger")
2465    lessons = _metadata_records(job, "lessons")
2466    roadmap = metadata.get("roadmap") if isinstance(metadata.get("roadmap"), dict) else {}
2467    milestones = roadmap.get("milestones") if isinstance(roadmap.get("milestones"), list) else []
2468    open_tasks = sum(1 for task in tasks if str(task.get("status") or "open") in {"open", "active"})
2469    state = _job_display_state(job, daemon_running)
2470    worker = _worker_label(job, daemon_running)
2471    print(_section_title("Workspace"))
2472    print(f"  model      {model}")
2473    print(f"  focus      {job['title']}")
2474    print(f"  state      {_status_badge(state)}   worker {_status_badge(worker)}   kind {job['kind']}")
2475    next_action = _next_operator_action(job, daemon_running)
2476    if next_action:
2477        print(f"  next       {next_action}")
2478
2479    print()
2480    _print_jobs_panel(jobs, focused_job_id=str(job["id"]), daemon_running=daemon_running)
2481
2482    print()
2483    print(_section_title("Focus"))
2484    _print_wrapped(
2485        "  goal       ", job.get("objective") or "", width=_terminal_width(), subsequent_indent="             "
2486    )
2487    planning = metadata.get("planning") if isinstance(metadata.get("planning"), dict) else {}
2488    if job.get("status") == "planning" and planning:
2489        print("  plan       waiting for your answers or /run")
2490        questions = planning.get("questions") if isinstance(planning.get("questions"), list) else []
2491        for question in questions[:3]:
2492            _print_wrapped("  question   ", question, width=_terminal_width(), subsequent_indent="             ")
2493
2494    print()
2495    print(_section_title("Progress"))
2496    _print_metric_grid(
2497        [
2498            ("actions", _step_count(steps)),
2499            ("outputs", len(artifacts)),
2500            ("findings", len(findings)),
2501            ("sources", len(sources)),
2502            ("tasks", f"{len(tasks)} ({open_tasks} open)"),
2503            ("roadmap", len(milestones)),
2504            ("experiments", len(experiments)),
2505            ("lessons", len(lessons)),
2506            ("memory", len(memory_entries)),
2507        ]
2508    )
2509    print(f"  output dir {_short_path(artifacts_dir, max_width=min(_terminal_width() - 13, 84))}")
2510
2511
2512def _print_chat_composer(job: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
2513    width = min(_terminal_width(), 96)
2514    if _fancy_ui():
2515        print(_accent("╭─ Message " + "─" * max(0, width - 11)))
2516        print("│ Type normally to chat. Live steps stream above. /jobs switches workspaces. /help shows commands.")
2517        print("╰─" + "─" * max(0, width - 2))
2518        return
2519    print(_section_title("Message"))
2520    print("  Type normally to chat. Live steps stream above. /jobs switches workspaces. /help shows commands.")
2521
2522
2523def _chat_prompt(job: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
2524    return f"{_accent('nipux')} > "
2525
2526
2527def _start_chat_live_feed(job_id: str) -> tuple[threading.Event | None, threading.Thread | None]:
2528    if (
2529        not sys.stdin.isatty()
2530        or not sys.stdout.isatty()
2531        or os.environ.get("NIPUX_NO_LIVE")
2532        or os.environ.get("NIPUX_PLAIN")
2533    ):
2534        return None, None
2535    stop = threading.Event()
2536    thread = threading.Thread(target=_chat_live_feed_loop, args=(job_id, stop), daemon=True)
2537    thread.start()
2538    return stop, thread
2539
2540
2541def _chat_live_feed_loop(initial_job_id: str, stop: threading.Event) -> None:
2542    seen_by_job: dict[str, set[str]] = {}
2543    initialized_jobs: set[str] = set()
2544    active_job_id = initial_job_id
2545    while not stop.wait(1.0):
2546        try:
2547            db, _ = _db()
2548            try:
2549                focused = _default_job_id(db) or active_job_id
2550                active_job_id = focused
2551                seen = seen_by_job.setdefault(focused, set())
2552                events = db.list_events(job_id=focused, limit=40)
2553                if focused not in initialized_jobs:
2554                    initialized_jobs.add(focused)
2555                    seen.update(str(event.get("id") or "") for event in events)
2556                    continue
2557                for event in events:
2558                    event_id = str(event.get("id") or "")
2559                    if not event_id or event_id in seen:
2560                        continue
2561                    seen.add(event_id)
2562                    line = _minimal_live_event_line(event)
2563                    if line:
2564                        _print_live_line(line)
2565            finally:
2566                db.close()
2567        except Exception:
2568            continue
2569
2570
2571def _print_live_line(line: str) -> None:
2572    try:
2573        if _fancy_ui():
2574            print(f"\r\033[K{_live_badge(line)} {line}\n{_chat_prompt({})}", end="", flush=True)
2575        else:
2576            print(f"\n· {line}", flush=True)
2577    except Exception:
2578        return
2579
2580
2581def _print_wrapped(prefix: str, text: Any, *, width: int, subsequent_indent: str = "") -> None:
2582    content = " ".join(str(text).split())
2583    if not content:
2584        print(prefix.rstrip())
2585        return
2586    available = max(20, min(width, 96) - len(prefix))
2587    wrapped = textwrap.wrap(content, width=available) or [content]
2588    print(prefix + wrapped[0])
2589    for line in wrapped[1:]:
2590        print(subsequent_indent + line)
2591
2592
2593def _section_title(title: str, subtitle: str = "") -> str:
2594    text = title.upper()
2595    if subtitle:
2596        text = f"{text} - {_one_line(subtitle, 52)}"
2597    width = min(_terminal_width(), 96)
2598    if len(text) >= width - 2:
2599        return text[:width]
2600    if _fancy_ui():
2601        return _accent(f"╭─ {text} " + "─" * max(0, width - len(text) - 4))
2602    return f"{text} " + "-" * max(0, width - len(text) - 1)
2603
2604
2605def _print_metric_grid(items: list[tuple[str, Any]]) -> None:
2606    width = min(_terminal_width(), 96)
2607    cell_width = 24 if width >= 80 else 18
2608    cells = [f"{label:<12} {value}"[:cell_width].ljust(cell_width) for label, value in items]
2609    columns = max(1, width // cell_width)
2610    for start in range(0, len(cells), columns):
2611        print("  " + "  ".join(cells[start : start + columns]).rstrip())
2612
2613
2614def _print_command_grid(items: list[tuple[str, str]]) -> None:
2615    width = min(_terminal_width(), 96)
2616    cell_width = 38 if width >= 90 else 30
2617    cells = [f"{command:<15} {label}"[:cell_width].ljust(cell_width) for command, label in items]
2618    columns = max(1, width // cell_width)
2619    for start in range(0, len(cells), columns):
2620        print("  " + "  ".join(cells[start : start + columns]).rstrip())
2621
2622
2623def _short_path(path: Path | str, *, max_width: int = 80) -> str:
2624    text = str(path)
2625    home = str(Path.home())
2626    if text.startswith(home + os.sep):
2627        text = "~" + text[len(home) :]
2628    if len(text) <= max_width:
2629        return text
2630    keep = max(12, max_width - 4)
2631    return "..." + text[-keep:]
2632
2633
2634def _print_jobs_panel(jobs: list[dict[str, Any]], *, focused_job_id: str, daemon_running: bool) -> None:
2635    print(_section_title("Jobs"))
2636    if not jobs:
2637        print("  No jobs yet. Type an objective or use /new OBJECTIVE.")
2638        return
2639    print("  #  job                         state       worker      kind")
2640    for index, item in enumerate(jobs[:8], start=1):
2641        marker = "*" if str(item.get("id")) == focused_job_id else " "
2642        state = _job_display_state(item, daemon_running)
2643        worker = _worker_label(item, daemon_running)
2644        title = _one_line(item.get("title") or item.get("id") or "job", 27)
2645        print(
2646            f"  {marker}{index:<2} {title:<27} {_status_badge(state):<11} {_status_badge(worker):<11} {item.get('kind') or ''}"
2647        )
2648    if len(jobs) > 8:
2649        print(f"  ... {len(jobs) - 8} more. Use /jobs for the full list.")
2650    print("  switch: /focus JOB_TITLE")
2651
2652
2653def _next_operator_action(job: dict[str, Any], daemon_running: bool) -> str:
2654    status = str(job.get("status") or "")
2655    if status == "planning":
2656        return "answer the plan questions, or use Run when ready"
2657    if status == "cancelled":
2658        return "resume to reopen this job, or delete it"
2659    if status == "paused":
2660        return "resume, then run to continue"
2661    if status in {"queued", "running"} and not daemon_running:
2662        return "run to start background work"
2663    if status in {"queued", "running"} and daemon_running:
2664        return "daemon is active; live steps will stream here"
2665    if status == "completed":
2666        return "inspect history or artifacts"
2667    if status == "failed":
2668        return "resume, then run one worker step to test recovery"
2669    return ""
2670
2671
2672def _important_startup_events(events: list[dict[str, Any]], *, limit: int) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
2673    if len(events) <= limit:
2674        return events
2675    important_types = {
2676        "operator_message",
2677        "agent_message",
2678        "artifact",
2679        "finding",
2680        "task",
2681        "experiment",
2682        "lesson",
2683        "reflection",
2684        "error",
2685        "compaction",
2686    }
2687    selected: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
2688    for event in reversed(events):
2689        if event.get("event_type") in important_types:
2690            selected.append(event)
2691        if len(selected) >= limit:
2692            break
2693    if len(selected) < limit:
2694        for event in reversed(events):
2695            if event not in selected:
2696                selected.append(event)
2697            if len(selected) >= limit:
2698                break
2699    selected.sort(key=lambda event: (str(event.get("created_at") or ""), str(event.get("id") or "")))
2700    return selected
2701
2702
2703def _print_event_card(event: dict[str, Any], *, chars: int, artifact_indexes: dict[str, int] | None = None) -> None:
2704    when, label, detail, access = _event_display_parts(event, chars=chars, full=False)
2705    artifact_indexes = artifact_indexes or {}
2706    artifact_index = artifact_indexes.get(str(event.get("ref_id") or ""))
2707    if artifact_index and event.get("event_type") == "artifact":
2708        access = f"open: /artifact {artifact_index}"
2709    print(f"  {_event_badge(label):<8} {_muted(when):<16} {_one_line(detail, chars)}")
2710    if access:
2711        print(f"  {'':<8} {'':<16} {access}")
2712
2713
2714def _public_event(event: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
2715    public = dict(event)
2716    public.pop("metadata_json", None)
2717    return public
2718
2719
2720def _print_event_details(event: dict[str, Any], *, chars: int) -> None:
2721    metadata = event.get("metadata") if isinstance(event.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
2722    if not metadata:
2723        return
2724    compact = {
2725        key: value
2726        for key, value in metadata.items()
2727        if key not in {"input", "output"} and value not in (None, "", [], {})
2728    }
2729    if compact:
2730        print(f"     meta: {_one_line(json.dumps(compact, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, default=str), chars)}")
2731    if isinstance(metadata.get("input"), dict):
2732        print(
2733            f"     input: {_one_line(json.dumps(metadata['input'], ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, default=str), chars)}"
2734        )
2735    if isinstance(metadata.get("output"), dict):
2736        print(
2737            f"     output: {_one_line(json.dumps(metadata['output'], ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True, default=str), chars)}"
2738        )
2739
2740
2741def _step_line(step: dict[str, Any], *, chars: int = 180) -> str:
2742    tool = step.get("tool_name") or step.get("kind") or "-"
2743    summary = _clean_step_summary(step.get("summary") or step.get("error") or "-")
2744    error = " ERROR" if step.get("error") else ""
2745    return f"#{step['step_no']:<4} {step['status']:<9} {tool:<18} {_one_line(summary, chars)}{error}"
2746
2747
2748def _terminal_width() -> int:
2749    return shutil.get_terminal_size((120, 40)).columns
2750
2751
2752def _rule(char: str = "-", width: int | None = None) -> str:
2753    return char * min(width or _terminal_width(), 96)
2754
2755
2756def _json_default(value: Any) -> str:
2757    return str(value)
2758
2759
2760def _daemon_state_line(lock: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
2761    metadata = lock.get("metadata") if isinstance(lock.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
2762    if lock.get("running"):
2763        pid = metadata.get("pid") or "unknown"
2764        stale = " stale-runtime" if lock.get("stale") else ""
2765        return f"running pid={pid}{stale}"
2766    return "stopped (start with: nipux start)"
2767
2768
2769def _daemon_event_line(event: dict[str, Any], *, chars: int, job_titles: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> str:
2770    at = str(event.get("at") or "?")
2771    name = str(event.get("event") or "?")
2772    pieces = []
2773    job_titles = job_titles or {}
2774    for key in ("status", "tool", "job_id", "step_id", "error_type", "detail", "error"):
2775        value = event.get(key)
2776        if value not in (None, ""):
2777            label = "job" if key == "job_id" else key
2778            if key == "job_id":
2779                value = job_titles.get(str(value), value)
2780            pieces.append(f"{label}={value}")
2781    suffix = " ".join(pieces)
2782    return _one_line(f"{at} {name} {suffix}".strip(), chars)
2783
2784
2785def _job_ref_text(value: Any) -> str | None:
2786    if value is None:
2787        return None
2788    if isinstance(value, list):
2789        text = " ".join(str(item) for item in value)
2790    else:
2791        text = str(value)
2792    text = " ".join(text.split())
2793    return text or None
2794
2795
2796def _note_text(value: Any) -> str:
2797    if value is None:
2798        return ""
2799    if isinstance(value, list):
2800        return " ".join(str(item) for item in value).strip()
2801    return str(value).strip()
2802
2803
2804def _resolve_control_job_and_note(db: AgentDB, args: argparse.Namespace) -> tuple[str | None, str, str | None]:
2805    if hasattr(args, "parts"):
2806        parts = [str(part) for part in getattr(args, "parts") or []]
2807        if not parts:
2808            return _default_job_id(db), "", None
2809        for end in range(len(parts), 0, -1):
2810            ref = " ".join(parts[:end])
2811            job = _find_job(db, ref)
2812            if job:
2813                return str(job["id"]), " ".join(parts[end:]).strip(), ref
2814        return None, "", " ".join(parts)
2815    job_ref = _job_ref_text(getattr(args, "job_id", None))
2816    return _resolve_job_id(db, job_ref), _note_text(getattr(args, "note", None)), job_ref
2817
2818
2819def _default_job_id(db: AgentDB) -> str | None:
2820    configured = _configured_focus_job_id(db)
2821    if configured:
2822        return configured
2823    jobs = db.list_jobs()
2824    for status in ("running", "queued", "planning", "paused", "failed", "completed"):
2825        for job in jobs:
2826            if job.get("status") == status:
2827                return str(job["id"])
2828    return str(jobs[0]["id"]) if jobs else None
2829
2830
2831def _configured_focus_job_id(db: AgentDB) -> str | None:
2832    job_id = _read_shell_state().get("focus_job_id")
2833    if not isinstance(job_id, str) or not job_id:
2834        return None
2835    try:
2836        db.get_job(job_id)
2837    except KeyError:
2838        return None
2839    return job_id
2840
2841
2842def _find_job(db: AgentDB, query: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
2843    needle = " ".join(query.split()).lower()
2844    if not needle:
2845        return None
2846    jobs = db.list_jobs()
2847    for job in jobs:
2848        if str(job["id"]).lower() == needle:
2849            return job
2850    for job in jobs:
2851        if str(job.get("title") or "").lower() == needle:
2852            return job
2853    for job in jobs:
2854        if needle in str(job.get("title") or "").lower():
2855            return job
2856    return None
2857
2858
2859def _shell_state_path() -> Path:
2860    config = load_config()
2861    config.ensure_dirs()
2862    return config.runtime.home / "shell_state.json"
2863
2864
2865def _read_shell_state() -> dict[str, Any]:
2866    path = _shell_state_path()
2867    if not path.exists():
2868        return {}
2869    try:
2870        parsed = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
2871    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError):
2872        return {}
2873    return parsed if isinstance(parsed, dict) else {}
2874
2875
2876def _write_shell_state(patch: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
2877    state = _read_shell_state()
2878    state.update(patch)
2879    _shell_state_path().write_text(
2880        json.dumps(state, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, sort_keys=True) + "\n", encoding="utf-8"
2881    )
2882
2883
2884def _pid_is_alive(pid: int) -> bool:
2885    try:
2886        os.kill(pid, 0)
2887    except OSError:
2888        return False
2889    return True
2890
2891
2892def _step_by_id(db: AgentDB, job_id: str, step_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
2893    for step in db.list_steps(job_id=job_id):
2894        if step["id"] == step_id:
2895            return step
2896    return None
2897
2898
2899def _step_count(steps: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> int:
2900    numbers = [int(step.get("step_no") or 0) for step in steps]
2901    return max(numbers, default=0)
2902
2903
2904def _job_lessons(job: dict[str, Any]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
2905    return _metadata_records(job, "lessons")
2906
2907
2908def _metadata_records(job: dict[str, Any], key: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
2909    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
2910    values = metadata.get(key) if isinstance(metadata.get(key), list) else []
2911    return [entry for entry in values if isinstance(entry, dict)]
2912
2913
2914def _print_lessons(job: dict[str, Any], *, limit: int, chars: int) -> None:
2915    lessons = _job_lessons(job)
2916    print(f"lessons {job['title']}")
2917    print(_rule("="))
2918    if not lessons:
2919        print("none yet")
2920        print("add one with: learn this source is not useful for the current objective")
2921        return
2922    for index, lesson in enumerate(lessons[-limit:], start=max(1, len(lessons) - limit + 1)):
2923        category = lesson.get("category") or "memory"
2924        confidence = lesson.get("confidence")
2925        suffix = f" | confidence {confidence:g}" if isinstance(confidence, (int, float)) else ""
2926        print(f"{index:>2}. {category}{suffix}")
2927        print(f"    {_one_line(lesson.get('lesson') or '', chars)}")
2928
2929
2930def _resolve_artifact_ref(
2931    db: AgentDB,
2932    config: Any,
2933    query: str | None,
2934    *,
2935    job_id: str | None = None,
2936) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
2937    if not query:
2938        return None
2939    ref = query.strip()
2940    path = Path(ref).expanduser()
2941    if path.exists():
2942        return {"path": str(path), "title": path.name, "summary": ""}
2943
2944    ref_lower = ref.lower()
2945    focused_artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job_id, limit=250) if job_id else []
2946    if focused_artifacts and ref_lower in {"latest", "last", "newest"}:
2947        return focused_artifacts[0]
2948    index_ref = ref_lower[1:] if ref_lower.startswith("#") else ref_lower
2949    if focused_artifacts and index_ref.isdigit():
2950        index = int(index_ref)
2951        if 1 <= index <= len(focused_artifacts):
2952            return focused_artifacts[index - 1]
2953
2954    jobs = db.list_jobs()
2955    ordered_jobs = []
2956    if job_id:
2957        try:
2958            selected = db.get_job(job_id)
2959            ordered_jobs.append(selected)
2960        except KeyError:
2961            pass
2962    ordered_jobs.extend(job for job in jobs if not job_id or job["id"] != job_id)
2963    artifacts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
2964    for job in ordered_jobs:
2965        artifacts.extend(db.list_artifacts(job["id"], limit=250))
2966
2967    for artifact in artifacts:
2968        if str(artifact["id"]).lower() == ref_lower:
2969            return artifact
2970    for artifact in artifacts:
2971        title = str(artifact.get("title") or "")
2972        if title.lower() == ref_lower:
2973            return artifact
2974    for artifact in artifacts:
2975        haystack = " ".join(str(artifact.get(key) or "") for key in ("title", "summary", "type")).lower()
2976        if ref_lower in haystack:
2977            return artifact
2978
2979    store = ArtifactStore(config.runtime.home, db=db)
2980    search_job_ids = [job_id] if job_id else [str(job["id"]) for job in ordered_jobs]
2981    for candidate_job_id in search_job_ids:
2982        if not candidate_job_id:
2983            continue
2984        for result in store.search_text(job_id=candidate_job_id, query=ref, limit=1):
2985            try:
2986                return db.get_artifact(str(result["id"]))
2987            except KeyError:
2988                continue
2989    return None
2990
2991
2992def cmd_logs(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
2993    db, _ = _db()
2994    try:
2995        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
2996        if not job_id:
2997            ref = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
2998            print(f"No job matched: {ref}" if ref else "No jobs found.")
2999            return
3000        job = db.get_job(job_id)
3001        daemon = daemon_lock_status(load_config().runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
3002        print(f"{job['title']}\tstate {_job_display_state(job, bool(daemon['running']))}\t{job['kind']}")
3003        print()
3004        print("Runs")
3005        for run in db.list_runs(job_id, limit=args.limit):
3006            error = f"\tERROR {run['error']}" if run.get("error") else ""
3007            print(f"{run['started_at']}\t{run['status']}\t{run['id']}\t{run.get('model') or ''}{error}")
3008        print()
3009        print("Steps")
3010        steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)[-args.limit :]
3011        if not steps:
3012            print("No steps recorded.")
3013        for step in steps:
3014            if args.verbose:
3015                _print_step(step, verbose=True, chars=args.chars)
3016            else:
3017                tool = step.get("tool_name") or "-"
3018                summary = _one_line(_clean_step_summary(step.get("summary") or ""), args.chars)
3019                error = f"\tERROR {step['error']}" if step.get("error") else ""
3020                print(
3021                    f"#{step['step_no']}\t{step['started_at']}\t{step['status']}\t{step['kind']}\t{tool}\t{summary}{error}"
3022                )
3023        print()
3024        print("Artifacts")
3025        artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job_id, limit=args.limit)
3026        if not artifacts:
3027            print("No artifacts recorded.")
3028        for artifact in artifacts:
3029            print(
3030                f"{artifact['created_at']}\t{artifact['type']}\t{artifact.get('title') or artifact['id']}\t{artifact['path']}"
3031            )
3032    finally:
3033        db.close()
3034
3035
3036def cmd_activity(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
3037    db, _ = _db()
3038    seen_events: set[str] = set()
3039    try:
3040        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
3041        if not job_id:
3042            print("No jobs found.")
3043            return
3044        job = db.get_job(job_id)
3045        daemon = daemon_lock_status(load_config().runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
3046        print(f"activity {job['title']} | state {_job_display_state(job, bool(daemon['running']))}")
3047        print("tool calls, artifacts, learning, and messages, oldest to newest")
3048        print(_rule("-"))
3049
3050        def emit() -> None:
3051            events = db.list_timeline_events(job_id, limit=args.limit)
3052            printed = False
3053            for event in events:
3054                event_id = str(event.get("id") or "")
3055                if event_id in seen_events:
3056                    continue
3057                print(_event_line(event, chars=args.chars, full=args.verbose))
3058                if args.verbose:
3059                    _print_event_details(event, chars=args.chars)
3060                if args.paths and event.get("event_type") == "artifact":
3061                    metadata = event.get("metadata") if isinstance(event.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
3062                    if metadata.get("path"):
3063                        print(f"     path: {metadata['path']}")
3064                seen_events.add(event_id)
3065                printed = True
3066            if printed:
3067                print(_rule("-"))
3068
3069        emit()
3070        while args.follow:
3071            time.sleep(args.interval)
3072            emit()
3073    except KeyboardInterrupt:
3074        print("\nactivity stopped")
3075    finally:
3076        db.close()
3077
3078
3079def cmd_updates(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
3080    db, config = _db()
3081    try:
3082        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
3083        if not job_id:
3084            print("No jobs found.")
3085            return
3086        print(
3087            "\n".join(
3088                render_updates_report(
3089                    db,
3090                    config,
3091                    job_id,
3092                    limit=args.limit,
3093                    chars=args.chars,
3094                    paths=args.paths,
3095                )
3096            )
3097        )
3098    finally:
3099        db.close()
3100
3101
3102def cmd_watch(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
3103    db, _ = _db()
3104    seen_runs: set[str] = set()
3105    seen_steps: set[str] = set()
3106    seen_artifacts: set[str] = set()
3107    try:
3108        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
3109        if not job_id:
3110            print(f"No job matched: {_job_ref_text(args.job_id)}")
3111            return
3112        job = db.get_job(job_id)
3113        daemon = daemon_lock_status(load_config().runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
3114        print(f"watching {job['title']} | state {_job_display_state(job, bool(daemon['running']))} | {job['kind']}")
3115        print(f"objective: {job['objective']}")
3116        print(
3117            "Note: this shows model-visible state, tool calls, outputs, and errors. It does not expose hidden chain-of-thought."
3118        )
3119        print()
3120
3121        def emit_snapshot(*, initial: bool = False) -> None:
3122            nonlocal job
3123            job = db.get_job(job_id)
3124            runs = list(reversed(db.list_runs(job_id, limit=args.limit)))
3125            steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)[-args.limit :]
3126            artifacts = list(reversed(db.list_artifacts(job_id, limit=args.limit)))
3127            printed = False
3128            for run in runs:
3129                if run["id"] in seen_runs:
3130                    continue
3131                if not initial:
3132                    print()
3133                _print_run(run)
3134                seen_runs.add(run["id"])
3135                printed = True
3136            for step in steps:
3137                if step["id"] in seen_steps:
3138                    continue
3139                if not initial and not printed:
3140                    print()
3141                _print_step(step, verbose=args.verbose, chars=args.chars)
3142                seen_steps.add(step["id"])
3143                printed = True
3144            for artifact in artifacts:
3145                if artifact["id"] in seen_artifacts:
3146                    continue
3147                if not initial and not printed:
3148                    print()
3149                _print_artifact(artifact)
3150                seen_artifacts.add(artifact["id"])
3151                printed = True
3152            if printed:
3153                print(f"status: {job['status']}")
3154
3155        emit_snapshot(initial=True)
3156        while args.follow:
3157            time.sleep(args.interval)
3158            emit_snapshot()
3159    except KeyboardInterrupt:
3160        print("\nwatch stopped")
3161    finally:
3162        db.close()
3163
3164
3165def cmd_run_one(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
3166    from nipux_cli.worker import run_one_step
3167
3168    db, config = _db()
3169    try:
3170        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
3171        if not job_id:
3172            print(f"No job matched: {_job_ref_text(args.job_id)}")
3173            return
3174        _activate_job_if_planning(db, job_id)
3175        llm = None
3176        if args.fake:
3177            from nipux_cli.llm import LLMResponse, ScriptedLLM, ToolCall
3178
3179            llm = ScriptedLLM(
3180                [
3181                    LLMResponse(
3182                        tool_calls=[
3183                            ToolCall(
3184                                name="write_artifact",
3185                                arguments={
3186                                    "title": "fake-step",
3187                                    "type": "text",
3188                                    "summary": "Fake one-step smoke artifact",
3189                                    "content": "This is a fake bounded worker step.",
3190                                },
3191                            )
3192                        ]
3193                    )
3194                ]
3195            )
3196        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=llm)
3197        print(json.dumps(result.__dict__, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
3198    finally:
3199        db.close()
3200
3201
3202def cmd_work(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
3203    from nipux_cli.worker import run_one_step
3204
3205    db, config = _db()
3206    try:
3207        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
3208        if not job_id:
3209            print('No jobs found. Create one with: nipux create "objective"')
3210            return
3211        _activate_job_if_planning(db, job_id)
3212        job = db.get_job(job_id)
3213        print(f"working {job['title']} | state foreground | {job['kind']}")
3214        print(
3215            "Note: this shows model-visible state, tool calls, outputs, and errors. It does not expose hidden chain-of-thought."
3216        )
3217        print()
3218        for index in range(1, args.steps + 1):
3219            llm = None
3220            if args.fake:
3221                from nipux_cli.llm import LLMResponse, ScriptedLLM, ToolCall
3222
3223                llm = ScriptedLLM(
3224                    [
3225                        LLMResponse(
3226                            tool_calls=[
3227                                ToolCall(
3228                                    name="write_artifact",
3229                                    arguments={
3230                                        "title": f"fake-work-step-{index}",
3231                                        "type": "text",
3232                                        "summary": "Fake foreground work step",
3233                                        "content": f"This is fake foreground work step {index}.",
3234                                    },
3235                                )
3236                            ]
3237                        )
3238                    ]
3239                )
3240            print(f"work step {index}/{args.steps}", flush=True)
3241            result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=llm)
3242            step = _step_by_id(db, job_id, result.step_id)
3243            if step:
3244                _print_step(step, verbose=args.verbose, chars=args.chars)
3245            else:
3246                print(json.dumps(result.__dict__, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, default=_json_default))
3247            if args.dashboard:
3248                state = collect_dashboard_state(db, config, job_id=job_id, limit=args.limit)
3249                print()
3250                print(render_dashboard(state, width=_terminal_width(), chars=args.chars), end="")
3251            if result.status == "failed" and not args.continue_on_error:
3252                print("stopped after failed step; pass --continue-on-error to keep going")
3253                return
3254            if index < args.steps and args.poll_seconds > 0:
3255                time.sleep(args.poll_seconds)
3256    finally:
3257        db.close()
3258
3259
3260def cmd_run(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
3261    requested = _job_ref_text(args.job_id)
3262    if requested:
3263        db, _ = _db()
3264        try:
3265            job = _find_job(db, requested)
3266            if not job:
3267                print(f"No job matched: {requested}")
3268                return
3269            args.job_id = job["id"]
3270            _write_shell_state({"focus_job_id": job["id"]})
3271            _ensure_job_runnable(db, job["id"])
3272            job = db.get_job(job["id"])
3273            daemon = daemon_lock_status(load_config().runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
3274            print(f"focus set: {job['title']} | job {_job_display_state(job, bool(daemon['running']))}")
3275        finally:
3276            db.close()
3277    else:
3278        db, _ = _db()
3279        try:
3280            job_id = _default_job_id(db)
3281            if job_id:
3282                _ensure_job_runnable(db, job_id)
3283        finally:
3284            db.close()
3285    _start_daemon_if_needed(
3286        poll_seconds=args.poll_seconds,
3287        fake=args.fake,
3288        quiet=args.quiet,
3289        log_file=args.log_file,
3290    )
3291    if args.no_follow:
3292        return
3293    cmd_activity(
3294        argparse.Namespace(
3295            job_id=args.job_id,
3296            limit=args.limit,
3297            chars=args.chars,
3298            follow=True,
3299            interval=args.interval,
3300            verbose=args.verbose,
3301            paths=args.paths,
3302        )
3303    )
3304
3305
3306def cmd_digest(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
3307    db, config = _db()
3308    try:
3309        job_id = _resolve_job_id(db, args.job_id)
3310        if not job_id:
3311            print(f"No job matched: {_job_ref_text(args.job_id)}")
3312            return
3313        print(
3314            render_job_digest(
3315                db,
3316                job_id,
3317                model=config.model.model,
3318                base_url=config.model.base_url,
3319                context_length=config.model.context_length,
3320                input_cost_per_million=config.model.input_cost_per_million,
3321                output_cost_per_million=config.model.output_cost_per_million,
3322            ),
3323            end="",
3324        )
3325    finally:
3326        db.close()
3327
3328
3329def cmd_daily_digest(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
3330    db, config = _db()
3331    try:
3332        result = write_daily_digest(config, db, day=args.day)
3333        print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
3334    finally:
3335        db.close()
3336
3337
3338def cmd_daemon(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
3339    config = load_config()
3340    if not _ensure_remote_model_ready_for_worker(config, fake=args.fake):
3341        raise SystemExit(2)
3342    daemon = Daemon.open(config=config)
3343    try:
3344        if args.once:
3345            result = daemon.run_once(fake=args.fake, verbose=args.verbose)
3346            print(json.dumps(result.__dict__ if result else None, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
3347            return
3348        daemon.run_forever(fake=args.fake, poll_seconds=args.poll_seconds, quiet=args.quiet, verbose=args.verbose)
3349    except DaemonAlreadyRunning as exc:
3350        raise SystemExit(str(exc)) from exc
3351    finally:
3352        daemon.close()
3353
3354
3355def cmd_doctor(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
3356    checks = run_doctor(check_model=args.check_model)
3357    for check in checks:
3358        status = "ok" if check.ok else "fail"
3359        print(f"{status}\t{check.name}\t{check.detail}")
3360    if not all(check.ok for check in checks):
3361        raise SystemExit(1)
3362
3363
3364def _chat_handle_line(job_id: str, line: str, *, reply_fn=None) -> bool:
3365    line = line.strip()
3366    if not line:
3367        return True
3368    if line.startswith("chat "):
3369        db, _ = _db()
3370        try:
3371            job = db.get_job(job_id)
3372            print(f"already chatting with {job['title']}; type your message, /run, or /exit")
3373            return True
3374        finally:
3375            db.close()
3376    if line in {"/exit", "/quit", "exit", "quit"}:
3377        return False
3378    if line in {"/help", "help"}:
3379        print("Chat commands:")
3380        print("  /jobs /focus JOB_TITLE /switch JOB_TITLE /new OBJECTIVE /delete [JOB_TITLE]")
3381        print("  /history /events /activity /outputs /updates /outcomes /status /usage /health")
3382        print("  /artifacts /artifact QUERY /findings /tasks /roadmap /experiments /sources /memory /metrics /lessons")
3383        print("  /model MODEL /base-url URL /api-key KEY /api-key-env ENV /context TOKENS")
3384        print("  /input-cost DOLLARS_PER_1M_INPUT_TOKENS /output-cost DOLLARS_PER_1M_OUTPUT_TOKENS")
3385        print("  /timeout SECONDS /home PATH /step-limit SECONDS /output-chars CHARS /daily-digest BOOL /digest-time HH:MM /doctor")
3386        print("  /run /start /restart /work N /work-verbose N /stop /pause [note] /resume /cancel [note]")
3387        print("  /learn LESSON /note MESSAGE /follow MESSAGE /digest /clear /exit")
3388        print("Plain text gets a model reply and is saved as model-visible steering.")
3389        return True
3390    if line in {"clear", "/clear"}:
3391        print("\033[2J\033[H", end="")
3392        return True
3393    if line == "jobs" or line == "ls" or line.startswith("jobs "):
3394        cmd_jobs(argparse.Namespace())
3395        return True
3396    if line.startswith(("focus ", "switch ")):
3397        parts = shlex.split(line)
3398        cmd_focus(argparse.Namespace(query=parts[1:]))
3399        return True
3400    if line.startswith("/"):
3401        parts = shlex.split(line[1:])
3402        if not parts:
3403            return True
3404        command = parts[0]
3405        rest = parts[1:]
3406        if command in {"jobs", "ls"}:
3407            cmd_jobs(argparse.Namespace())
3408            return True
3409        if command == "history":
3410            cmd_history(
3411                argparse.Namespace(
3412                    job_id=job_id,
3413                    limit=int(rest[0]) if rest and rest[0].isdigit() else 40,
3414                    chars=220,
3415                    full=False,
3416                    json=False,
3417                )
3418            )
3419            return True
3420        if command == "events":
3421            cmd_events(
3422                argparse.Namespace(
3423                    job_id=job_id,
3424                    limit=int(rest[0]) if rest and rest[0].isdigit() else 40,
3425                    chars=220,
3426                    full=False,
3427                    json=False,
3428                    follow=False,
3429                    interval=2.0,
3430                )
3431            )
3432            return True
3433        if command == "outputs":
3434            cmd_logs(
3435                argparse.Namespace(
3436                    job_id=[job_id], limit=int(rest[0]) if rest and rest[0].isdigit() else 25, verbose=False, chars=260
3437                )
3438            )
3439            return True
3440        if command in {"updates", "outcomes", "outcome"}:
3441            cmd_updates(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, limit=5, chars=180, paths=False))
3442            return True
3443        if command == "artifacts":
3444            cmd_artifacts(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, limit=10, chars=220, paths=False))
3445            return True
3446        if command == "artifact":
3447            query = " ".join(rest).strip()
3448            if not query:
3449                print("usage: /artifact QUERY_OR_ID")
3450                return True
3451            cmd_artifact(argparse.Namespace(artifact_id_or_path=[query], job_id=job_id, chars=12000))
3452            return True
3453        if command == "lessons":
3454            cmd_lessons(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, limit=10, chars=220))
3455            return True
3456        if command == "findings":
3457            cmd_findings(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, limit=20, chars=220, json=False))
3458            return True
3459        if command == "tasks":
3460            cmd_tasks(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, limit=20, chars=220, status=None, json=False))
3461            return True
3462        if command == "roadmap":
3463            cmd_roadmap(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, limit=20, features=3, chars=220, json=False))
3464            return True
3465        if command == "experiments":
3466            cmd_experiments(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, limit=20, chars=220, status=None, json=False))
3467            return True
3468        if command == "sources":
3469            cmd_sources(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, limit=20, chars=220, json=False))
3470            return True
3471        if command == "memory":
3472            cmd_memory(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, limit=10, chars=220))
3473            return True
3474        if command == "metrics":
3475            cmd_metrics(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, chars=220))
3476            return True
3477        if command == "learn":
3478            lesson = " ".join(rest).strip()
3479            if not lesson:
3480                print("usage: /learn LESSON")
3481                return True
3482            db, _ = _db()
3483            try:
3484                entry = db.append_lesson(job_id, lesson, category="operator_preference", metadata={"source": "chat"})
3485                job = db.get_job(job_id)
3486                print(f"learned for {job['title']}: {_one_line(entry['lesson'], 220)}")
3487            finally:
3488                db.close()
3489            return True
3490        if command == "activity":
3491            cmd_activity(
3492                argparse.Namespace(
3493                    job_id=job_id, limit=20, chars=180, follow=False, interval=2.0, verbose=False, paths=False
3494                )
3495            )
3496            return True
3497        if command == "digest":
3498            cmd_digest(argparse.Namespace(job_id=[job_id]))
3499            return True
3500        if command == "status":
3501            cmd_status(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, limit=8, chars=180, full=False, json=False))
3502            return True
3503        if command == "usage":
3504            cmd_usage(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, json=False))
3505            return True
3506        if _handle_chat_setting_command(command, rest):
3507            return True
3508        if command == "doctor":
3509            try:
3510                cmd_doctor(argparse.Namespace(check_model=False))
3511            except SystemExit:
3512                pass
3513            return True
3514        if command == "init":
3515            cmd_init(argparse.Namespace(path=None, force=False, model=None, base_url=None, api_key_env=None, openrouter=False))
3516            return True
3517        if command == "health":
3518            cmd_health(argparse.Namespace(limit=8, chars=180))
3519            return True
3520        if command == "start":
3521            cmd_start(argparse.Namespace(poll_seconds=0.0, fake=False, quiet=False, log_file=None))
3522            return True
3523        if command == "run":
3524            db, _ = _db()
3525            try:
3526                _ensure_job_runnable(db, job_id)
3527            finally:
3528                db.close()
3529            cmd_run(
3530                argparse.Namespace(
3531                    job_id=job_id,
3532                    poll_seconds=0.0,
3533                    interval=2.0,
3534                    limit=20,
3535                    chars=180,
3536                    verbose=False,
3537                    paths=False,
3538                    fake=False,
3539                    quiet=False,
3540                    log_file=None,
3541                    no_follow=True,
3542                )
3543            )
3544            return True
3545        if command == "restart":
3546            cmd_restart(argparse.Namespace(
3547                poll_seconds=0.0,
3548                wait=5.0,
3549                fake=False,
3550                quiet=False,
3551                log_file=None,
3552            ))
3553            return True
3554        if command in {"work", "work-verbose"}:
3555            steps = int(rest[0]) if rest and rest[0].isdigit() else 1
3556            cmd_work(
3557                argparse.Namespace(
3558                    job_id=job_id,
3559                    steps=steps,
3560                    poll_seconds=0.5,
3561                    fake=False,
3562                    verbose=command == "work-verbose",
3563                    dashboard=False,
3564                    limit=12,
3565                    chars=260 if command == "work" else 4000,
3566                    continue_on_error=False,
3567                )
3568            )
3569            return True
3570        if command in {"pause", "stop"}:
3571            cmd_pause(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, note=rest))
3572            return True
3573        if command == "resume":
3574            cmd_resume(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id))
3575            return True
3576        if command == "cancel":
3577            cmd_cancel(argparse.Namespace(job_id=job_id, note=rest))
3578            return True
3579        if command == "note":
3580            message = " ".join(rest).strip()
3581            if not message:
3582                print("usage: /note MESSAGE")
3583                return True
3584            _queue_chat_note(job_id, message, mode="note")
3585            return True
3586        if command == "follow":
3587            message = " ".join(rest).strip()
3588            if not message:
3589                print("usage: /follow MESSAGE")
3590                return True
3591            _queue_chat_note(job_id, message, mode="follow_up")
3592            return True
3593        if command == "new":
3594            objective = " ".join(rest).strip()
3595            if not objective:
3596                print("usage: /new OBJECTIVE")
3597                return True
3598            created_id, title = _create_job(objective=objective, title=None, kind="generic", cadence=None)
3599            print(f"created {title}")
3600            print(f"focus set to {title}; answer the plan questions, then use /run when ready.")
3601            return True
3602        if command in {"focus", "switch"}:
3603            query = " ".join(rest).strip()
3604            if not query:
3605                cmd_focus(argparse.Namespace(query=[]))
3606                return True
3607            cmd_focus(argparse.Namespace(query=rest))
3608            return True
3609        if command == "delete":
3610            target = rest if rest else [job_id]
3611            cmd_delete(argparse.Namespace(job_id=target, keep_files=False))
3612            if not rest:
3613                return False
3614            return True
3615        print(f"unknown chat command: /{command}")
3616        return True
3617    if reply_fn is None:
3618        reply_fn = _reply_to_chat
3619    _handle_chat_message(job_id, line, reply_fn=reply_fn)
3620    return True
3621
3622
3623def _handle_chat_message(job_id: str, line: str, *, reply_fn=None, quiet: bool = False) -> tuple[bool, str]:
3624    return _controller_handle_chat_message(
3625        job_id,
3626        line,
3627        deps=_chat_controller_deps(),
3628        reply_fn=reply_fn,
3629        quiet=quiet,
3630    )
3631
3632
3633def _chat_reply_text_and_metadata(reply: Any) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
3634    return _controller_reply_text_and_metadata(reply)
3635
3636
3637def _handle_chat_control_intent(job_id: str, line: str, *, quiet: bool = False) -> tuple[bool, str] | None:
3638    return _controller_handle_chat_control_intent(job_id, line, deps=_chat_controller_deps(), quiet=quiet)
3639
3640
3641def _maybe_spawn_job_from_chat(job_id: str, message: str, *, quiet: bool = False) -> str:
3642    return _controller_maybe_spawn_job_from_chat(job_id, message, deps=_chat_controller_deps(), quiet=quiet)
3643
3644
3645def _queue_chat_note(job_id: str, message: str, *, mode: str = "steer", quiet: bool = False) -> None:
3646    _controller_queue_chat_note(job_id, message, deps=_chat_controller_deps(), mode=mode, quiet=quiet)
3647
3648
3649def _chat_controller_deps() -> ChatControllerDeps:
3650    return ChatControllerDeps(
3651        db_factory=_db,
3652        reply_fn=_reply_to_chat,
3653        create_job=_create_job,
3654        write_shell_state=_write_shell_state,
3655        start_daemon=_start_daemon_if_needed,
3656        capture_command=_capture_chat_command,
3657        compact_command_output=_compact_command_output,
3658        friendly_error_text=_friendly_error_text,
3659    )
3660
3661
3662def _reply_to_chat(job_id: str, message: str) -> Any:
3663    from nipux_cli.llm import OpenAIChatLLM
3664
3665    db, config = _db()
3666    try:
3667        job = db.get_job(job_id)
3668        messages = _build_chat_messages(db, job, message)
3669    finally:
3670        db.close()
3671    return OpenAIChatLLM(config.model).complete_response(messages=messages)
3672
3673
3674def cmd_shell(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
3675    _install_readline_history()
3676    _print_shell_header()
3677    print()
3678    if args.status:
3679        _print_shell_status(limit=args.limit, chars=args.chars)
3680    while True:
3681        try:
3682            line = input(_shell_prompt())
3683        except EOFError:
3684            print()
3685            return
3686        except KeyboardInterrupt:
3687            print()
3688            continue
3689        if not _run_shell_line(line):
3690            return
3691
3692
3693def _print_shell_header() -> None:
3694    print(NIPUX_BANNER)
3695    print(_rule("="))
3696    print(_shell_summary())
3697    print("Type 'chat' to talk, 'history' or 'artifacts' to inspect output, or plain text to steer.")
3698    print("Trace output is observable state and tool I/O, not hidden chain-of-thought.")
3699    print(_rule("="))
3700
3701
3702def _shell_summary() -> str:
3703    db, config = _db()
3704    try:
3705        daemon = daemon_lock_status(config.runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
3706        job_id = _default_job_id(db)
3707        if not job_id:
3708            focus = "no jobs"
3709        else:
3710            job = db.get_job(job_id)
3711            state = _job_display_state(job, bool(daemon["running"]))
3712            focus = f"{job['title']} [job {state} | worker {_worker_label(job, bool(daemon['running']))}]"
3713        daemon_text = "running" if daemon["running"] else "stopped"
3714        return f"daemon: {daemon_text} | model: {config.model.model} | focus: {focus}"
3715    finally:
3716        db.close()
3717
3718
3719def _shell_prompt() -> str:
3720    db, _ = _db()
3721    try:
3722        job_id = _default_job_id(db)
3723        if not job_id:
3724            return "nipux> "
3725        job = db.get_job(job_id)
3726        title = str(job.get("title") or job_id).strip()[:22]
3727        daemon = daemon_lock_status(load_config().runtime.home / "agentd.lock")
3728        worker = _worker_label(job, bool(daemon["running"]))
3729        return f"nipux[{title}:{worker}]> "
3730    except Exception:
3731        return "nipux> "
3732    finally:
3733        db.close()
3734
3735
3736def _install_readline_history() -> None:
3737    try:
3738        import atexit
3739        import readline
3740    except ImportError:
3741        return
3742    config = load_config()
3743    config.ensure_dirs()
3744    history_path = config.runtime.home / "shell_history"
3745    try:
3746        readline.read_history_file(history_path)
3747    except OSError:
3748        pass
3749    atexit.register(readline.write_history_file, history_path)
3750
3751
3752def _print_shell_status(*, limit: int, chars: int) -> None:
3753    db, config = _db()
3754    try:
3755        state = collect_dashboard_state(db, config, limit=limit)
3756        print(render_dashboard(state, width=_terminal_width(), chars=chars), end="")
3757        print()
3758    finally:
3759        db.close()
3760
3761
3762def _print_shell_help() -> None:
3763    print(NIPUX_BANNER)
3764    print(_rule("="))
3765    print("Jobs")
3766    for command in (
3767        'create "objective" --title TITLE',
3768        "ls",
3769        "focus [JOB_TITLE]",
3770        "rename JOB_TITLE --title NEW_TITLE",
3771        "delete JOB_TITLE",
3772        "chat [JOB_TITLE]",
3773        "steer [--job JOB_TITLE] MESSAGE",
3774        "pause [JOB_TITLE] [note...]",
3775        "resume [JOB_TITLE]",
3776        "cancel [JOB_TITLE] [note...]",
3777    ):
3778        print(f"  {command}")
3779    print()
3780    print("Inspect")
3781    for command in (
3782        "status [JOB_TITLE]",
3783        "health",
3784        "history [JOB_TITLE]",
3785        "events [JOB_TITLE] [--follow] [--json]",
3786        "activity [JOB_TITLE] [--follow]",
3787        "updates [JOB_TITLE]",
3788        "outputs [JOB_TITLE] --verbose",
3789        "findings [JOB_TITLE]",
3790        "tasks [JOB_TITLE]",
3791        "roadmap [JOB_TITLE]",
3792        "experiments [JOB_TITLE]",
3793        "sources [JOB_TITLE]",
3794        "memory [JOB_TITLE]",
3795        "metrics [JOB_TITLE]",
3796        "usage [JOB_TITLE]",
3797        "artifacts [JOB_TITLE]",
3798        "artifact QUERY_OR_TITLE",
3799        "lessons [JOB_TITLE]",
3800    ):
3801        print(f"  {command}")
3802    print()
3803    print("Worker")
3804    for command in (
3805        "work [JOB_TITLE] --steps N [--verbose]",
3806        "run [JOB_TITLE] --poll-seconds N",
3807        "start --poll-seconds N",
3808        "restart --poll-seconds N",
3809        "stop  # daemon",
3810        "stop [JOB_TITLE]  # pause job",
3811    ):
3812        print(f"  {command}")
3813    print()
3814    print("System")
3815    for command in (
3816        "learn [--job JOB_TITLE] LESSON",
3817        "digest JOB_TITLE",
3818        "daily-digest",
3819        "service install|status|uninstall",
3820        "autostart install|status|uninstall",
3821        "dashboard [JOB_TITLE] --no-follow",
3822        "doctor --check-model",
3823        "browser-dashboard --port 4848",
3824        "help",
3825        "exit",
3826    ):
3827        print(f"  {command}")
3828
3829
3830def _run_shell_line(line: str) -> bool:
3831    line = line.strip()
3832    if not line:
3833        return True
3834    if line in {"exit", "quit", ":q"}:
3835        return False
3836    if line in {"help", "?", "commands"}:
3837        _print_shell_help()
3838        return True
3839    if line == "clear":
3840        print("\033[2J\033[H", end="")
3841        return True
3842    try:
3843        tokens = shlex.split(line)
3844    except ValueError as exc:
3845        print(f"parse error: {exc}")
3846        return True
3847    if tokens and tokens[0] == "nipux":
3848        tokens = tokens[1:]
3849    if not tokens:
3850        return True
3851    natural = natural_command_for(" ".join(tokens))
3852    if natural:
3853        tokens = [natural]
3854    if tokens[0] == "ls":
3855        tokens[0] = "jobs"
3856    if tokens[0] == "focus" and len(tokens) > 1 and tokens[1].lower() in {"on", "more", "only"}:
3857        _steer_default_job(line)
3858        return True
3859    if tokens[0] not in SHELL_COMMAND_NAMES and tokens[0] not in SHELL_BUILTINS:
3860        _steer_default_job(line)
3861        return True
3862    try:
3863        parser = build_parser()
3864        parsed = parser.parse_args(tokens)
3865        if parsed.func is cmd_shell:
3866            print("already in nipux shell")
3867            return True
3868        parsed.func(parsed)
3869    except SystemExit as exc:
3870        code = exc.code if isinstance(exc.code, int) else 1
3871        if code:
3872            print(f"command exited with status {code}")
3873    return True
3874
3875
3876def _steer_default_job(message: str) -> None:
3877    db, _ = _db()
3878    try:
3879        job_id = _default_job_id(db)
3880        if not job_id:
3881            print('No focused job. Create one first, or run: create "objective"')
3882            return
3883        job = db.get_job(job_id)
3884        entry = db.append_operator_message(job_id, message, source="shell")
3885        print(f"waiting for {job['title']}: {entry['message']}")
3886        print("Waiting for the next worker step.")
3887    finally:
3888        db.close()
3889
3890
3891def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
3892    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(prog="nipux")
3893    parser.add_argument("--version", action="version", version=f"nipux {__version__}")
3894    sub = parser.add_subparsers(dest="command", required=True)
3895
3896    init = sub.add_parser("init")
3897    init.add_argument("--path")
3898    init.add_argument("--force", action="store_true")
3899    init.add_argument("--openrouter", action="store_true", help="Write an OpenRouter config that reads OPENROUTER_API_KEY")
3900    init.add_argument("--model", help="Model name to write into config.yaml")
3901    init.add_argument("--base-url", help="OpenAI-compatible API base URL")
3902    init.add_argument("--api-key-env", help="Environment variable that stores the API key")
3903    init.add_argument("--context-length", type=int, default=DEFAULT_CONTEXT_LENGTH)
3904    init.set_defaults(func=cmd_init)
3905
3906    create = sub.add_parser("create")
3907    create.add_argument("objective")
3908    create.add_argument("--title")
3909    create.add_argument("--kind", default="generic")
3910    create.add_argument("--cadence")
3911    create.set_defaults(func=cmd_create)
3912
3913    jobs = sub.add_parser("jobs")
3914    jobs.set_defaults(func=cmd_jobs)
3915
3916    ls_cmd = sub.add_parser("ls")
3917    ls_cmd.set_defaults(func=cmd_jobs)
3918
3919    focus = sub.add_parser("focus")
3920    focus.add_argument("query", nargs="*")
3921    focus.set_defaults(func=cmd_focus)
3922
3923    rename = sub.add_parser("rename")
3924    rename.add_argument("job_id", nargs="*")
3925    rename.add_argument("--title", nargs="+", required=True)
3926    rename.set_defaults(func=cmd_rename)
3927
3928    delete = sub.add_parser("delete", aliases=["rm"])
3929    delete.add_argument("job_id", nargs="*")
3930    delete.add_argument("--keep-files", action="store_true")
3931    delete.set_defaults(func=cmd_delete)
3932
3933    chat = sub.add_parser("chat")
3934    chat.add_argument("job_id", nargs="*")
3935    chat.add_argument("--history-limit", type=int, default=12)
3936    chat.add_argument("--no-history", action="store_true")
3937    chat.set_defaults(func=cmd_chat)
3938
3939    shell = sub.add_parser("shell")
3940    shell.add_argument("--status", action="store_true", help="Render the full dashboard when the shell opens")
3941    shell.add_argument("--no-status", action="store_true", help=argparse.SUPPRESS)
3942    shell.add_argument("--limit", type=int, default=8)
3943    shell.add_argument("--chars", type=int, default=180)
3944    shell.set_defaults(func=cmd_shell)
3945
3946    steer = sub.add_parser("steer", aliases=["say"])
3947    steer.add_argument("--job", dest="job_id")
3948    steer.add_argument("message", nargs="+")
3949    steer.set_defaults(func=cmd_steer)
3950
3951    pause = sub.add_parser("pause")
3952    pause.add_argument("parts", nargs="*", help="Optional job title/id followed by an optional note")
3953    pause.set_defaults(func=cmd_pause)
3954
3955    resume = sub.add_parser("resume")
3956    resume.add_argument("job_id", nargs="*")
3957    resume.set_defaults(func=cmd_resume)
3958
3959    cancel = sub.add_parser("cancel")
3960    cancel.add_argument("parts", nargs="*", help="Optional job title/id followed by an optional note")
3961    cancel.set_defaults(func=cmd_cancel)
3962
3963    status = sub.add_parser("status")
