  77    summary TEXT,
  78    metadata_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  79    created_at TEXT NOT NULL
  80);
  81
  82CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS evidence (
  83    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  84    job_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES jobs(id),
  85    url_or_source TEXT NOT NULL,
  86    artifact_id TEXT REFERENCES artifacts(id),
  87    extracted_text_path TEXT,
  88    summary TEXT,
  89    score_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  90    created_at TEXT NOT NULL
  91);
  92
  93CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS memory_index (
  94    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  95    job_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES jobs(id),
  96    key TEXT NOT NULL,
  97    summary TEXT NOT NULL,
  98    artifact_refs_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
  99    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
 100    UNIQUE(job_id, key)
 101);
 102
 103CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS digests (
 104    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
 105    day TEXT NOT NULL,
 106    target TEXT,
 107    subject TEXT,
 108    body_path TEXT,
 109    sent_at TEXT,
 110    status TEXT NOT NULL,
 111    error TEXT
 112);
 113
 114CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events (
 115    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
 116    job_id TEXT REFERENCES jobs(id),
 117    event_type TEXT NOT NULL,
 118    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
 119    title TEXT,
 120    body TEXT,
 121    ref_table TEXT,
 122    ref_id TEXT,
 123    metadata_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'
 124);
 125
 126CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_jobs_status_priority ON jobs(status, priority DESC, updated_at);
 127CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_runs_job ON job_runs(job_id, started_at DESC);
 128CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_steps_run ON steps(run_id, step_no);
 129CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_artifacts_job ON artifacts(job_id, created_at DESC);
 130CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_job_time ON events(job_id, created_at DESC);
 131CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_ref ON events(ref_table, ref_id);
 132"""
 133
 134
 135def utc_now() -> str:
 136    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
 137
 138
 139def new_id(prefix: str) -> str:
 140    return f"{prefix}_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:16]}"
 141
 142
 143def _slugify(value: str) -> str:
 144    slug = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", value.lower()).strip("-")
 145    return slug[:72].strip("-") or new_id("job")
 146
 147
 148def _unique_job_id(conn: sqlite3.Connection, seed: str) -> str:
 149    base = _slugify(seed)
 150    candidate = base
 151    suffix = 2
 152    while conn.execute("SELECT 1 FROM jobs WHERE id = ? LIMIT 1", (candidate,)).fetchone():
 153        candidate = f"{base[:68]}-{suffix}"
 154        suffix += 1
 155    return candidate
 156
 157
 158def _json_dumps(value: Any) -> str:
 159    return json.dumps(value if value is not None else {}, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)
 160
 161
 162def _json_loads(value: str | None) -> dict[str, Any]:
 163    try:
 164        loaded = json.loads(value or "{}")
 165    except json.JSONDecodeError:
 166        return {}
 167    return loaded if isinstance(loaded, dict) else {}
 168
 169
 170def _as_int(value: Any) -> int:
 171    try:
 172        return int(float(value))
 173    except (TypeError, ValueError):
 174        return 0
 175
 176
 177def _as_float(value: Any) -> float | None:
 178    try:
 179        return float(value)
 180    except (TypeError, ValueError):
 181        return None
 182
 183
 184def _nested_value(value: dict[str, Any], *keys: str) -> Any:
 185    current: Any = value
 186    for key in keys:
 187        if not isinstance(current, dict):
 188            return None
 189        current = current.get(key)
 190    return current
 191
 192
 193def _metadata_list(metadata: dict[str, Any], key: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 194    values = metadata.get(key)
 195    if not isinstance(values, list):
 196        return []
 197    return [value for value in values if isinstance(value, dict)]
 198
 199
 200def _norm_key(value: str) -> str:
 201    return re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", value.lower()).strip("-")[:120]
 202
 203
 204def _clean_status(value: str, allowed: set[str], default: str) -> str:
 205    status = (value.strip().lower() or default).replace(" ", "_")
 206    return status if status in allowed else default
 207
 208
 209def _experiment_metric_value(entry: dict[str, Any]) -> float | None:
 210    try:
 211        value = entry.get("metric_value")
 212        if value is None:
 213            return None
 214        return float(value)
 215    except (TypeError, ValueError):
 216        return None
 217
 218
 219def _same_metric_group(
 220    entry: dict[str, Any],
 221    *,
 222    metric_name: str,
 223    metric_unit: str,
 224    higher_is_better: bool,
 225) -> bool:
 226    return (
 227        str(entry.get("metric_name") or "").strip().lower() == metric_name.strip().lower()
 228        and str(entry.get("metric_unit") or "").strip().lower() == metric_unit.strip().lower()
 229        and bool(entry.get("higher_is_better", True)) == bool(higher_is_better)
 230        and _experiment_metric_value(entry) is not None
 231    )
 232
 233
 234def _best_experiment_for_metric(
 235    experiments: list[dict[str, Any]],
 236    *,
 237    metric_name: str,
 238    metric_unit: str,
 239    higher_is_better: bool,
 240    exclude_key: str = "",
 241) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
 242    candidates = [
 243        experiment
 244        for experiment in experiments
 245        if experiment.get("key") != exclude_key
 246        and _same_metric_group(
 247            experiment,
 248            metric_name=metric_name,
 249            metric_unit=metric_unit,
 250            higher_is_better=higher_is_better,
 251        )
 252    ]
 253    if not candidates:
 254        return None
 255    return max(candidates, key=lambda item: _experiment_metric_value(item) or 0.0) if higher_is_better else min(candidates, key=lambda item: _experiment_metric_value(item) or 0.0)
 256
 257
 258def _metric_delta(
 259    *,
 260    metric_value: Any,
 261    previous_best: dict[str, Any] | None,
 262    higher_is_better: bool,
 263) -> float | None:
 264    try:
 265        current = float(metric_value)
 266    except (TypeError, ValueError):
 267        return None
 268    if previous_best is None:
 269        return None
 270    previous = _experiment_metric_value(previous_best)
 271    if previous is None:
 272        return None
 273    delta = current - previous if higher_is_better else previous - current
 274    return round(delta, 6)
 275
 276
 277def _mark_best_experiments(experiments: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
 278    groups: dict[tuple[str, str, bool], list[dict[str, Any]]] = {}
 279    for experiment in experiments:
 280        metric_name = str(experiment.get("metric_name") or "").strip().lower()
 281        if _experiment_metric_value(experiment) is None or not metric_name:
 282            experiment["best_observed"] = False
 283            continue
 284        key = (
 285            metric_name,
 286            str(experiment.get("metric_unit") or "").strip().lower(),
 287            bool(experiment.get("higher_is_better", True)),
 288        )
 289        groups.setdefault(key, []).append(experiment)
 290    winners: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 291    for (_metric_name, _metric_unit, higher_is_better), entries in groups.items():
 292        winner = max(entries, key=lambda item: _experiment_metric_value(item) or 0.0) if higher_is_better else min(entries, key=lambda item: _experiment_metric_value(item) or 0.0)
 293        for entry in entries:
 294            entry["best_observed"] = entry is winner
 295        winners.append(winner)
 296    if not winners:
 297        return None
 298    return max(winners, key=lambda item: str(item.get("updated_at") or item.get("created_at") or ""))
 299
 300
 301def _row_to_dict(row: sqlite3.Row | None) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
 302    if row is None:
 303        return None
 304    result = dict(row)
 305    for key in ("metadata_json", "input_json", "output_json", "score_json", "artifact_refs_json"):
 306        if key in result:
 307            try:
 308                result[key.removesuffix("_json")] = json.loads(result[key] or "{}")
 309            except json.JSONDecodeError:
 310                result[key.removesuffix("_json")] = {}
 311    return result
 312
 313
 314def _insert_event(
 315    conn: sqlite3.Connection,
 316    *,
 317    job_id: str | None,
 318    event_type: str,
 319    title: str = "",
 320    body: str = "",
 321    ref_table: str = "",
 322    ref_id: str = "",
 323    metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 324    created_at: str | None = None,
 325) -> dict[str, Any]:
 326    event_id = new_id("evt")
 327    when = created_at or utc_now()
 328    conn.execute(
 329        """
 330        INSERT INTO events(id, job_id, event_type, created_at, title, body, ref_table, ref_id, metadata_json)
 331        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
 332        """,
 333        (
 334            event_id,
 335            job_id,
 336            event_type.strip().lower() or "event",
 337            when,
 338            title.strip(),
 339            body.strip(),
 340            ref_table.strip(),
 341            ref_id.strip(),
 342            _json_dumps(metadata or {}),
 343        ),
 344    )
 345    return {
 346        "id": event_id,
 347        "job_id": job_id,
 348        "event_type": event_type.strip().lower() or "event",
 349        "created_at": when,
 350        "title": title.strip(),
 351        "body": body.strip(),
 352        "ref_table": ref_table.strip(),
 353        "ref_id": ref_id.strip(),
 354        "metadata": metadata or {},
 355    }
 356
 357
 358def _projected_event(
 359    *,
 360    event_id: str,
 361    job_id: str,
 362    event_type: str,
 363    created_at: str,
 364    title: str = "",
 365    body: str = "",
 366    ref_table: str = "",
 367    ref_id: str = "",
 368    metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 369) -> dict[str, Any]:
 370    return {
 371        "id": event_id,
 372        "job_id": job_id,
 373        "event_type": event_type,
 374        "created_at": created_at,
 375        "title": title,
 376        "body": body,
 377        "ref_table": ref_table,
 378        "ref_id": ref_id,
 379        "metadata": metadata or {},
 380        "projected": True,
 381    }
 382
 383
 384class AgentDB:
 385    """Small SQLite wrapper with WAL and jittered write retries."""
 386
 387    _WRITE_RETRIES = 12
 388
 389    def __init__(self, path: str | Path):
 390        self.path = Path(path)
 391        self.path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 392        self._lock = threading.RLock()
 393        self._conn = sqlite3.connect(
 394            str(self.path),
 395            check_same_thread=False,
 396            timeout=1.0,
 397            isolation_level=None,
 398        )
 399        self._conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
 400        self._conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
 401        self._conn.execute("PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON")
 402        self._init_schema()
 403
 404    def close(self) -> None:
 405        with self._lock:
 406            if self._conn is not None:
 407                try:
 408                    self._conn.execute("PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(PASSIVE)")
 409                finally:
 410                    self._conn.close()
 411                    self._conn = None
 412
 413    def _init_schema(self) -> None:
 414        with self._lock:
 415            self._conn.executescript(SCHEMA_SQL)
 416            row = self._conn.execute("SELECT version FROM schema_version LIMIT 1").fetchone()
 417            if row is None:
 418                self._conn.execute("INSERT INTO schema_version(version) VALUES (?)", (SCHEMA_VERSION,))
 419            elif int(row["version"]) != SCHEMA_VERSION:
 420                raise RuntimeError(f"Unsupported nipux schema version: {row['version']}")
 421
 422    def _write(self, fn: Callable[[sqlite3.Connection], T]) -> T:
 423        last_error: Exception | None = None
 424        for attempt in range(self._WRITE_RETRIES):
 425            try:
 426                with self._lock:
 427                    self._conn.execute("BEGIN IMMEDIATE")
 428                    try:
 429                        result = fn(self._conn)
 430                        self._conn.commit()
 431                        return result
 432                    except BaseException:
 433                        self._conn.rollback()
 434                        raise
 435            except sqlite3.OperationalError as exc:
 436                if "locked" not in str(exc).lower() and "busy" not in str(exc).lower():
 437                    raise
 438                last_error = exc
 439                if attempt < self._WRITE_RETRIES - 1:
 440                    time.sleep(random.uniform(0.02, 0.15))
 441        raise last_error or sqlite3.OperationalError("database is locked")
 442
 443    def append_event(
 444        self,
 445        job_id: str | None = None,
 446        *,
 447        event_type: str,
 448        title: str = "",
 449        body: str = "",
 450        ref_table: str = "",
 451        ref_id: str = "",
 452        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 453        created_at: str | None = None,
 454    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 455        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
 456            return _insert_event(
 457                conn,
 458                job_id=job_id,
 459                event_type=event_type,
 460                title=title,
 461                body=body,
 462                ref_table=ref_table,
 463                ref_id=ref_id,
 464                metadata=metadata,
 465                created_at=created_at,
 466            )
 467
 468        return self._write(op)
 469
 470    def list_events(
 471        self,
 472        *,
 473        job_id: str | None = None,
 474        limit: int = 100,
 475        event_types: Iterable[str] | None = None,
 476    ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 477        filters = []
 478        params: list[Any] = []
 479        if job_id is not None:
 480            filters.append("job_id = ?")
 481            params.append(job_id)
 482        if event_types:
 483            values = [str(value).strip().lower() for value in event_types if str(value).strip()]
 484            if values:
 485                filters.append(f"event_type IN ({','.join('?' for _ in values)})")
 486                params.extend(values)
 487        where = f"WHERE {' AND '.join(filters)}" if filters else ""
 488        rows = self._conn.execute(
 489            f"""
 490            SELECT * FROM (
 491                SELECT * FROM events
 492                {where}
 493                ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
 494                LIMIT ?
 495            )
 496            ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
 497            """,
 498            [*params, int(limit)],
 499        ).fetchall()
 500        return [_row_to_dict(row) for row in rows]
 501
 502    def list_timeline_events(self, job_id: str, *, limit: int = 100) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 503        """Return visible job history, combining durable events with old projected state."""
 504
 505        actual = self.list_events(job_id=job_id, limit=max(limit * 4, 250))
 506        actual_ids = {str(event.get("id")) for event in actual}
 507        actual_refs = {
 508            (str(event.get("ref_table") or ""), str(event.get("ref_id") or ""))
 509            for event in actual
 510            if event.get("ref_table") and event.get("ref_id")
 511        }
 512        timeline: list[dict[str, Any]] = list(actual)
 513        job = self.get_job(job_id)
 514        metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
 515
 516        for index, entry in enumerate(_metadata_list(metadata, "operator_messages")):
 517            if entry.get("event_id") in actual_ids:
 518                continue
 519            timeline.append(_projected_event(
 520                event_id=f"projected_operator_{index}",
 521                job_id=job_id,
 522                event_type="operator_message",
 523                created_at=str(entry.get("at") or job.get("updated_at") or job.get("created_at")),
 524                title=str(entry.get("source") or "operator"),
 525                body=str(entry.get("message") or ""),
 526                metadata={
 527                    "source": entry.get("source") or "operator",
 528                    "mode": entry.get("mode") or "steer",
 529                    "claimed_at": entry.get("claimed_at"),
 530                    "acknowledged_at": entry.get("acknowledged_at"),
 531                    "superseded_at": entry.get("superseded_at"),
 532                },
 533            ))
 534
 535        for index, entry in enumerate(_metadata_list(metadata, "agent_updates")):
 536            if entry.get("event_id") in actual_ids:
 537                continue
 538            timeline.append(_projected_event(
 539                event_id=f"projected_agent_{index}",
 540                job_id=job_id,
 541                event_type="agent_message",
 542                created_at=str(entry.get("at") or job.get("updated_at") or job.get("created_at")),
 543                title=str(entry.get("category") or "progress"),
 544                body=str(entry.get("message") or ""),
 545                metadata=entry.get("metadata") if isinstance(entry.get("metadata"), dict) else {},
 546            ))
 547
 548        for index, lesson in enumerate(_metadata_list(metadata, "lessons")):
 549            if lesson.get("event_id") in actual_ids:
 550                continue
 551            timeline.append(_projected_event(
 552                event_id=f"projected_lesson_{index}",
 553                job_id=job_id,
 554                event_type="lesson",
 555                created_at=str(lesson.get("at") or lesson.get("last_seen") or job.get("updated_at") or job.get("created_at")),
 556                title=str(lesson.get("category") or "memory"),
 557                body=str(lesson.get("lesson") or ""),
 558                metadata={"confidence": lesson.get("confidence"), **(lesson.get("metadata") if isinstance(lesson.get("metadata"), dict) else {})},
 559            ))
 560
 561        for index, source in enumerate(_metadata_list(metadata, "source_ledger")):
 562            if source.get("event_id") in actual_ids:
 563                continue
 564            timeline.append(_projected_event(
 565                event_id=f"projected_source_{index}",
 566                job_id=job_id,
 567                event_type="source",
 568                created_at=str(source.get("last_seen") or source.get("first_seen") or job.get("updated_at") or job.get("created_at")),
 569                title=str(source.get("source") or "source"),
 570                body=str(source.get("last_outcome") or ""),
 571                metadata=source,
 572            ))
 573
 574        for index, finding in enumerate(_metadata_list(metadata, "finding_ledger")):
 575            if finding.get("event_id") in actual_ids:
 576                continue
 577            timeline.append(_projected_event(
 578                event_id=f"projected_finding_{index}",
 579                job_id=job_id,
 580                event_type="finding",
 581                created_at=str(finding.get("updated_at") or finding.get("created_at") or job.get("updated_at") or job.get("created_at")),
 582                title=str(finding.get("name") or "finding"),
 583                body=str(finding.get("reason") or finding.get("category") or ""),
 584                metadata=finding,
 585            ))
 586
 587        for index, task in enumerate(_metadata_list(metadata, "task_queue")):
 588            if task.get("event_id") in actual_ids:
 589                continue
 590            timeline.append(_projected_event(
 591                event_id=f"projected_task_{index}",
 592                job_id=job_id,
 593                event_type="task",
 594                created_at=str(task.get("updated_at") or task.get("created_at") or job.get("updated_at") or job.get("created_at")),
 595                title=str(task.get("title") or "task"),
 596                body=str(task.get("result") or task.get("goal") or ""),
 597                metadata=task,
 598            ))
 599
 600        for index, experiment in enumerate(_metadata_list(metadata, "experiment_ledger")):
 601            if experiment.get("event_id") in actual_ids:
 602                continue
 603            metric = ""
 604            if experiment.get("metric_value") is not None:
 605                metric = format_metric_value(
 606                    experiment.get("metric_name") or "metric",
 607                    experiment.get("metric_value"),
 608                    experiment.get("metric_unit") or "",
 609                )
 610            timeline.append(_projected_event(
 611                event_id=f"projected_experiment_{index}",
 612                job_id=job_id,
 613                event_type="experiment",
 614                created_at=str(experiment.get("updated_at") or experiment.get("created_at") or job.get("updated_at") or job.get("created_at")),
 615                title=str(experiment.get("title") or "experiment"),
 616                body=str(experiment.get("result") or metric or experiment.get("hypothesis") or ""),
 617                metadata=experiment,
 618            ))
 619
 620        for index, reflection in enumerate(_metadata_list(metadata, "reflections")):
 621            if reflection.get("event_id") in actual_ids:
 622                continue
 623            timeline.append(_projected_event(
 624                event_id=f"projected_reflection_{index}",
 625                job_id=job_id,
 626                event_type="reflection",
 627                created_at=str(reflection.get("at") or job.get("updated_at") or job.get("created_at")),
 628                title="reflection",
 629                body=str(reflection.get("summary") or reflection.get("strategy") or ""),
 630                metadata=reflection.get("metadata") if isinstance(reflection.get("metadata"), dict) else {},
 631            ))
 632
 633        for step in self.list_steps(job_id=job_id):
 634            ref = ("steps", str(step["id"]))
 635            if ref in actual_refs:
 636                continue
 637            event_type = "error" if step.get("status") == "failed" or step.get("error") else "tool_result"
 638            title = str(step.get("tool_name") or step.get("kind") or "step")
 639            body = str(step.get("summary") or step.get("error") or "")
 640            timeline.append(_projected_event(
 641                event_id=f"projected_step_{step['id']}",
 642                job_id=job_id,
 643                event_type=event_type,
 644                created_at=str(step.get("ended_at") or step.get("started_at")),
 645                title=title,
 646                body=body,
 647                ref_table="steps",
 648                ref_id=str(step["id"]),
 649                metadata={"step_no": step.get("step_no"), "status": step.get("status"), "kind": step.get("kind")},
 650            ))
 651
 652        for artifact in self.list_artifacts(job_id, limit=10000):
 653            ref = ("artifacts", str(artifact["id"]))
 654            if ref in actual_refs:
 655                continue
 656            timeline.append(_projected_event(
 657                event_id=f"projected_artifact_{artifact['id']}",
 658                job_id=job_id,
 659                event_type="artifact",
 660                created_at=str(artifact.get("created_at")),
 661                title=str(artifact.get("title") or artifact["id"]),
 662                body=str(artifact.get("summary") or artifact.get("path") or ""),
 663                ref_table="artifacts",
 664                ref_id=str(artifact["id"]),
 665                metadata={"type": artifact.get("type"), "path": artifact.get("path")},
 666            ))
 667
 668        for memory in self.list_memory(job_id):
 669            ref = ("memory_index", str(memory["id"]))
 670            if ref in actual_refs:
 671                continue
 672            timeline.append(_projected_event(
 673                event_id=f"projected_memory_{memory['id']}",
 674                job_id=job_id,
 675                event_type="compaction",
 676                created_at=str(memory.get("updated_at")),
 677                title=str(memory.get("key") or "compact memory"),
 678                body=str(memory.get("summary") or ""),
 679                ref_table="memory_index",
 680                ref_id=str(memory["id"]),
 681                metadata={"artifact_refs": memory.get("artifact_refs") or []},
 682            ))
 683
 684        timeline = [event for event in timeline if event.get("created_at")]
 685        timeline.sort(key=lambda event: (str(event.get("created_at") or ""), str(event.get("id") or "")))
 686        return timeline[-int(limit):]
 687
 688    def create_job(
 689        self,
 690        objective: str,
 691        *,
 692        title: str | None = None,
 693        kind: str = "generic",
 694        priority: int = 0,
 695        cadence: str | None = None,
 696        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
 697    ) -> str:
 698        now = utc_now()
 699        title = title or objective.strip().splitlines()[0][:80] or "Untitled job"
 700
 701        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> str:
 702            job_id = _unique_job_id(conn, title)
 703            conn.execute(
 704                """
 705                INSERT INTO jobs(id, title, objective, kind, status, priority, cadence, created_at, updated_at, metadata_json)
 706                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
 707                """,
 708                (job_id, title, objective, kind, priority, cadence, now, now, _json_dumps(metadata)),
 709            )
 710            _insert_event(
 711                conn,
 712                job_id=job_id,
 713                event_type="daemon",
 714                title="job created",
 715                body=objective,
 716                metadata={"title": title, "kind": kind, "cadence": cadence},
 717                created_at=now,
 718            )
 719            return job_id
 720
 721        return self._write(op)
 722
 723    def get_job(self, job_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
 724        row = self._conn.execute("SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
 725        job = _row_to_dict(row)
 726        if job is None:
 727            raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
 728        return job
 729
 730    def list_jobs(self, *, statuses: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 731        if statuses:
 732            values = list(statuses)
 733            placeholders = ",".join("?" for _ in values)
 734            rows = self._conn.execute(
 735                f"SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE status IN ({placeholders}) ORDER BY priority DESC, updated_at",
 736                values,
 737            ).fetchall()
 738        else:
 739            rows = self._conn.execute("SELECT * FROM jobs ORDER BY updated_at DESC").fetchall()
 740        return [_row_to_dict(row) for row in rows]
 741
 742    def update_job_status(self, job_id: str, status: str, *, metadata_patch: dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> None:
 743        now = utc_now()
 744
 745        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> None:
 746            metadata_json = None
 747            if metadata_patch:
 748                row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
 749                if row is None:
 750                    raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
 751                current = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
 752                current.update(metadata_patch)
 753                metadata_json = _json_dumps(current)
 754            if metadata_json is None:
 755                conn.execute("UPDATE jobs SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?", (status, now, job_id))
 756            else:
 757                conn.execute(
 758                    "UPDATE jobs SET status = ?, updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
 759                    (status, now, metadata_json, job_id),
 760                )
 761            _insert_event(
 762                conn,
 763                job_id=job_id,
 764                event_type="daemon",
 765                title=f"job {status}",
 766                body=str((metadata_patch or {}).get("last_note") or ""),
 767                metadata={"status": status, "metadata_patch": metadata_patch or {}},
 768                created_at=now,
 769            )
 770
 771        self._write(op)
 772
 773    def update_job_metadata(self, job_id: str, metadata_patch: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
 774        now = utc_now()
 775
 776        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> None:
 777            row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
 778            if row is None:
 779                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
 780            current = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
 781            current.update(metadata_patch)
 782            conn.execute(
 783                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
 784                (now, _json_dumps(current), job_id),
 785            )
 786
 787        self._write(op)
 788
 789    def claim_operator_messages(
 790        self,
 791        job_id: str,
 792        *,
 793        modes: Iterable[str] = ("steer",),
 794        limit: int = 1,
 795    ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 796        now = utc_now()
 797        allowed = {mode.strip().lower().replace("-", "_") for mode in modes}
 798
 799        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 800            row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
 801            if row is None:
 802                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
 803            metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
 804            messages = metadata.get("operator_messages")
 805            if not isinstance(messages, list):
 806                return []
 807            claimed: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 808            for entry in messages:
 809                if len(claimed) >= limit:
 810                    break
 811                if not isinstance(entry, dict):
 812                    continue
 813                mode = str(entry.get("mode") or "steer").strip().lower().replace("-", "_")
 814                if mode not in allowed or entry.get("claimed_at"):
 815                    continue
 816                if entry.get("acknowledged_at") or entry.get("superseded_at"):
 817                    continue
 818                entry["claimed_at"] = now
 819                entry["delivered_at"] = now
 820                claimed.append(dict(entry))
 821            if not claimed:
 822                return []
 823            metadata["operator_messages"] = messages[-200:]
 824            metadata["last_claimed_operator_messages"] = claimed
 825            conn.execute(
 826                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
 827                (now, _json_dumps(metadata), job_id),
 828            )
 829            for entry in claimed:
 830                _insert_event(
 831                    conn,
 832                    job_id=job_id,
 833                    event_type="loop",
 834                    title="steering claimed",
 835                    body=str(entry.get("message") or ""),
 836                    metadata={
 837                        "source": entry.get("source"),
 838                        "mode": entry.get("mode"),
 839                        "operator_event_id": entry.get("event_id"),
 840                    },
 841                    created_at=now,
 842                )
 843            return claimed
 844
 845        return self._write(op)
 846
 847    def acknowledge_operator_messages(
 848        self,
 849        job_id: str,
 850        *,
 851        message_ids: Iterable[str] | None = None,
 852        summary: str = "",
 853        status: str = "acknowledged",
 854    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 855        now = utc_now()
 856        wanted = {str(message_id).strip() for message_id in (message_ids or []) if str(message_id).strip()}
 857        status = status.strip().lower().replace("-", "_") or "acknowledged"
 858        if status not in {"acknowledged", "superseded"}:
 859            status = "acknowledged"
 860
 861        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
 862            row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
 863            if row is None:
 864                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
 865            metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
 866            messages = metadata.get("operator_messages")
 867            if not isinstance(messages, list):
 868                messages = []
 869            acknowledged: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 870            for entry in messages:
 871                if not isinstance(entry, dict):
 872                    continue
 873                mode = str(entry.get("mode") or "steer").strip().lower().replace("-", "_")
 874                if mode not in {"steer", "follow_up"}:
 875                    continue
 876                event_id = str(entry.get("event_id") or "")
 877                if wanted and event_id not in wanted:
 878                    continue
 879                if not wanted and not entry.get("claimed_at"):
 880                    continue
 881                if entry.get("acknowledged_at") or entry.get("superseded_at"):
 882                    continue
 883                if status == "superseded":
 884                    entry["superseded_at"] = now
 885                else:
 886                    entry["acknowledged_at"] = now
 887                if summary:
 888                    entry["acknowledgement_summary"] = summary.strip()
 889                acknowledged.append(dict(entry))
 890            metadata["operator_messages"] = messages[-200:]
 891            metadata["last_operator_context_ack"] = {
 892                "at": now,
 893                "status": status,
 894                "summary": summary.strip(),
 895                "message_ids": [entry.get("event_id") for entry in acknowledged if entry.get("event_id")],
 896                "count": len(acknowledged),
 897            }
 898            conn.execute(
 899                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
 900                (now, _json_dumps(metadata), job_id),
 901            )
 902            event = _insert_event(
 903                conn,
 904                job_id=job_id,
 905                event_type="operator_context",
 906                title=f"operator {status}",
 907                body=summary.strip() or f"{len(acknowledged)} operator message(s) {status}",
 908                metadata={
 909                    "status": status,
 910                    "message_ids": [entry.get("event_id") for entry in acknowledged if entry.get("event_id")],
 911                    "count": len(acknowledged),
 912                },
 913                created_at=now,
 914            )
 915            return {"event": event, "messages": acknowledged, "count": len(acknowledged), "status": status}
 916
 917        return self._write(op)
 918
 919    def rename_job(self, job_id: str, title: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
 920        now = utc_now()
 921        new_title = title.strip()
 922        if not new_title:
 923            raise ValueError("title is required")
 924
 925        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
 926            row = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
 927            if row is None:
 928                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
 929            conn.execute("UPDATE jobs SET title = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?", (new_title, now, job_id))
 930            _insert_event(
 931                conn,
 932                job_id=job_id,
 933                event_type="daemon",
 934                title="job renamed",
 935                body=f"{row['title']} -> {new_title}",
 936                metadata={"old_title": row["title"], "new_title": new_title},
 937                created_at=now,
 938            )
 939            updated = dict(row)
 940            updated["title"] = new_title
 941            updated["updated_at"] = now
 942            return _row_to_dict(updated)
 943
 944        return self._write(op)
 945
 946    def delete_job(self, job_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
 947        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
 948            row = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
 949            if row is None:
 950                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
 951            artifact_rows = conn.execute("SELECT path FROM artifacts WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchall()
 952            artifact_paths = [str(artifact["path"]) for artifact in artifact_rows if artifact["path"]]
 953            counts = {
 954                "evidence": conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM evidence WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()["n"],
 955                "artifacts": conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM artifacts WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()["n"],
 956                "memory": conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM memory_index WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()["n"],
 957                "steps": conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM steps WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()["n"],
 958                "runs": conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM job_runs WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()["n"],
 959                "events": conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM events WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()["n"],
 960            }
 961            conn.execute("DELETE FROM evidence WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,))
 962            conn.execute("DELETE FROM artifacts WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,))
 963            conn.execute("DELETE FROM memory_index WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,))
 964            conn.execute("DELETE FROM steps WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,))
 965            conn.execute("DELETE FROM job_runs WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,))
 966            conn.execute("DELETE FROM events WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,))
 967            conn.execute("DELETE FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,))
 968            return {
 969                "job": _row_to_dict(row),
 970                "artifact_paths": artifact_paths,
 971                "counts": counts,
 972            }
 973
 974        return self._write(op)
 975
 976    def append_operator_message(
 977        self,
 978        job_id: str,
 979        message: str,
 980        *,
 981        source: str = "operator",
 982        mode: str = "steer",
 983    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 984        now = utc_now()
 985        text = message.strip()
 986        if not text:
 987            raise ValueError("message is required")
 988        mode = mode.strip().lower().replace("-", "_") or "steer"
 989        if mode not in {"steer", "follow_up", "note"}:
 990            mode = "steer"
 991        entry = {"at": now, "source": source, "mode": mode, "message": text}
 992
 993        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
 994            row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
 995            if row is None:
 996                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
 997            event = _insert_event(
 998                conn,
 999                job_id=job_id,
1000                event_type="operator_message",
1001                title=source,
1002                body=text,
1003                metadata={"source": source, "mode": mode},
1004                created_at=now,
1005            )
1006            entry["event_id"] = event["id"]
1007            metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
1008            messages = metadata.get("operator_messages")
1009            if not isinstance(messages, list):
1010                messages = []
1011            messages.append(entry)
1012            metadata["operator_messages"] = messages[-200:]
1013            metadata["last_operator_message"] = entry
1014            conn.execute(
1015                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
1016                (now, _json_dumps(metadata), job_id),
1017            )
1018            return entry
1019
1020        return self._write(op)
1021
1022    def append_agent_update(
1023        self,
1024        job_id: str,
1025        message: str,
1026        *,
1027        category: str = "progress",
1028        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1029    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1030        now = utc_now()
1031        text = message.strip()
1032        if not text:
1033            raise ValueError("message is required")
1034        entry = {
1035            "at": now,
1036            "category": category.strip() or "progress",
1037            "message": text,
1038            "metadata": metadata or {},
1039        }
1040
1041        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
1042            row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
1043            if row is None:
1044                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
1045            event = _insert_event(
1046                conn,
1047                job_id=job_id,
1048                event_type="agent_message",
1049                title=entry["category"],
1050                body=text,
1051                metadata=entry["metadata"],
1052                created_at=now,
1053            )
1054            entry["event_id"] = event["id"]
1055            job_metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
1056            updates = job_metadata.get("agent_updates")
1057            if not isinstance(updates, list):
1058                updates = []
1059            updates.append(entry)
1060            job_metadata["agent_updates"] = updates[-100:]
1061            job_metadata["last_agent_update"] = entry
1062            conn.execute(
1063                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
1064                (now, _json_dumps(job_metadata), job_id),
1065            )
1066            return entry
1067
1068        return self._write(op)
1069
1070    def append_lesson(
1071        self,
1072        job_id: str,
1073        lesson: str,
1074        *,
1075        category: str = "memory",
1076        confidence: float | None = None,
1077        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1078    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1079        now = utc_now()
1080        text = lesson.strip()
1081        if not text:
1082            raise ValueError("lesson is required")
1083        entry = {
1084            "at": now,
1085            "category": category.strip().lower() or "memory",
1086            "key": _norm_key(f"{category}:{text}"),
1087            "lesson": text,
1088            "confidence": confidence,
1089            "metadata": metadata or {},
1090        }
1091
1092        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
1093            row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
1094            if row is None:
1095                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
1096            job_metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
1097            lessons = job_metadata.get("lessons")
1098            if not isinstance(lessons, list):
1099                lessons = []
1100            existing = next(
1101                (
1102                    item
1103                    for item in lessons
1104                    if isinstance(item, dict)
1105                    and (item.get("key") or _norm_key(f"{item.get('category', 'memory')}:{item.get('lesson', '')}"))
1106                    == entry["key"]
1107                ),
1108                None,
1109            )
1110            if existing is None:
1111                lessons.append(entry)
1112                current = entry
1113            else:
1114                existing["last_seen"] = now
1115                existing["seen_count"] = int(existing.get("seen_count") or 1) + 1
1116                if confidence is not None:
1117                    existing["confidence"] = confidence
1118                if metadata:
1119                    merged = existing.get("metadata") if isinstance(existing.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1120                    merged.update(metadata)
1121                    existing["metadata"] = merged
1122                existing["key"] = entry["key"]
1123                current = existing
1124            event = _insert_event(
1125                conn,
1126                job_id=job_id,
1127                event_type="lesson",
1128                title=current.get("category") or "memory",
1129                body=current.get("lesson") or text,
1130                metadata={
1131                    "confidence": current.get("confidence"),
1132                    "seen_count": current.get("seen_count"),
1133                    **(current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}),
1134                },
1135                created_at=now,
1136            )
1137            current["event_id"] = event["id"]
1138            job_metadata["lessons"] = lessons[-200:]
1139            job_metadata["last_lesson"] = current
1140            conn.execute(
1141                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
1142                (now, _json_dumps(job_metadata), job_id),
1143            )
1144            return current
1145
1146        return self._write(op)
1147
1148    def append_source_record(
1149        self,
1150        job_id: str,
1151        source: str,
1152        *,
1153        source_type: str = "",
1154        usefulness_score: float | None = None,
1155        yield_count: int = 0,
1156        fail_count_delta: int = 0,
1157        warnings: list[str] | None = None,
1158        outcome: str = "",
1159        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1160    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1161        now = utc_now()
1162        text = source.strip()
1163        if not text:
1164            raise ValueError("source is required")
1165        key = _norm_key(text)
1166
1167        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
1168            row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
1169            if row is None:
1170                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
1171            job_metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
1172            sources = _metadata_list(job_metadata, "source_ledger")
1173            current = next((entry for entry in sources if entry.get("key") == key), None)
1174            if current is None:
1175                current = {
1176                    "key": key,
1177                    "source": text,
1178                    "source_type": source_type.strip() or "unknown",
1179                    "usefulness_score": 0.0,
1180                    "fail_count": 0,
1181                    "yield_count": 0,
1182                    "warnings": [],
1183                    "last_outcome": "",
1184                    "metadata": {},
1185                    "first_seen": now,
1186                }
1187                sources.append(current)
1188            if source_type:
1189                current["source_type"] = source_type.strip()
1190            if usefulness_score is not None:
1191                current["usefulness_score"] = float(usefulness_score)
1192            if yield_count:
1193                current["yield_count"] = int(current.get("yield_count") or 0) + int(yield_count)
1194            if fail_count_delta:
1195                current["fail_count"] = int(current.get("fail_count") or 0) + int(fail_count_delta)
1196            if warnings:
1197                merged = list(dict.fromkeys([*current.get("warnings", []), *[str(warning) for warning in warnings]]))
1198                current["warnings"] = merged[-20:]
1199            if outcome:
1200                current["last_outcome"] = outcome.strip()
1201            if metadata:
1202                merged_metadata = current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1203                merged_metadata.update(metadata)
1204                current["metadata"] = merged_metadata
1205            current["last_seen"] = now
1206            event = _insert_event(
1207                conn,
1208                job_id=job_id,
1209                event_type="source",
1210                title=current.get("source") or text,
1211                body=current.get("last_outcome") or outcome,
1212                metadata={
1213                    "source_type": current.get("source_type"),
1214                    "usefulness_score": current.get("usefulness_score"),
1215                    "yield_count": current.get("yield_count"),
1216                    "fail_count": current.get("fail_count"),
1217                    "warnings": current.get("warnings") or [],
1218                    **(current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}),
1219                },
1220                created_at=now,
1221            )
1222            current["event_id"] = event["id"]
1223            job_metadata["source_ledger"] = sources[-250:]
1224            job_metadata["last_source_record"] = current
1225            conn.execute(
1226                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
1227                (now, _json_dumps(job_metadata), job_id),
1228            )
1229            return current
1230
1231        return self._write(op)
1232
1233    def append_finding_record(
1234        self,
1235        job_id: str,
1236        *,
1237        name: str,
1238        url: str = "",
1239        source_url: str = "",
1240        category: str = "",
1241        location: str = "",
1242        contact: str = "",
1243        reason: str = "",
1244        status: str = "new",
1245        score: float | None = None,
1246        evidence_artifact: str = "",
1247        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1248    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1249        now = utc_now()
1250        name = name.strip()
1251        if not name:
1252            raise ValueError("name is required")
1253        url = url.strip()
1254        source_url = source_url.strip()
1255        key = _norm_key(f"{name}|{url or source_url}")
1256
1257        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
1258            row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
1259            if row is None:
1260                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
1261            job_metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
1262            findings = _metadata_list(job_metadata, "finding_ledger")
1263            current = next((entry for entry in findings if entry.get("key") == key), None)
1264            created = current is None
1265            if current is None:
1266                current = {
1267                    "key": key,
1268                    "name": name,
1269                    "url": url,
1270                    "source_url": source_url,
1271                    "category": category.strip(),
1272                    "location": location.strip(),
1273                    "contact": contact.strip(),
1274                    "reason": reason.strip(),
1275                    "status": status.strip() or "new",
1276                    "score": score,
1277                    "evidence_artifact": evidence_artifact.strip(),
1278                    "metadata": metadata or {},
1279                    "created_at": now,
1280                }
1281                findings.append(current)
1282            else:
1283                for field, value in {
1284                    "url": url,
1285                    "source_url": source_url,
1286                    "category": category.strip(),
1287                    "location": location.strip(),
1288                    "contact": contact.strip(),
1289                    "reason": reason.strip(),
1290                    "status": status.strip(),
1291                    "evidence_artifact": evidence_artifact.strip(),
1292                }.items():
1293                    if value:
1294                        current[field] = value
1295                if score is not None:
1296                    current["score"] = score
1297                if metadata:
1298                    merged_metadata = current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1299                    merged_metadata.update(metadata)
1300                    current["metadata"] = merged_metadata
1301            current["updated_at"] = now
1302            current["created"] = created
1303            event = _insert_event(
1304                conn,
1305                job_id=job_id,
1306                event_type="finding",
1307                title=current.get("name") or name,
1308                body=current.get("reason") or current.get("category") or "",
1309                metadata={
1310                    "created": created,
1311                    "score": current.get("score"),
1312                    "status": current.get("status"),
1313                    "source_url": current.get("source_url"),
1314                    "evidence_artifact": current.get("evidence_artifact"),
1315                    **(current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}),
1316                },
1317                created_at=now,
1318            )
1319            current["event_id"] = event["id"]
1320            job_metadata["finding_ledger"] = findings[-1000:]
1321            job_metadata["last_finding_record"] = current
1322            conn.execute(
1323                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
1324                (now, _json_dumps(job_metadata), job_id),
1325            )
1326            return current
1327
1328        return self._write(op)
1329
1330    def append_roadmap_record(
1331        self,
1332        job_id: str,
1333        *,
1334        title: str,
1335        status: str = "planned",
1336        objective: str = "",
1337        scope: str = "",
1338        current_milestone: str = "",
1339        validation_contract: str = "",
1340        milestones: list[dict[str, Any]] | None = None,
1341        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1342    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1343        now = utc_now()
1344        title = title.strip()
1345        if not title:
1346            raise ValueError("title is required")
1347        status = _clean_status(status, {"planned", "active", "validating", "done", "blocked", "paused"}, "planned")
1348        milestone_items = milestones if isinstance(milestones, list) else []
1349
1350        def merge_feature(existing_features: list[dict[str, Any]], feature: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[dict[str, Any] | None, bool]:
1351            feature_title = str(feature.get("title") or feature.get("name") or "").strip()
1352            if not feature_title:
1353                return None, False
1354            feature_key = _norm_key(str(feature.get("key") or feature_title))
1355            feature_title_key = _norm_key(feature_title)
1356            current = next(
1357                (
1358                    entry for entry in existing_features
1359                    if entry.get("key") == feature_key
1360                    or _norm_key(str(entry.get("title") or "")) == feature_title_key
1361                ),
1362                None,
1363            )
1364            created = current is None
1365            if current is None:
1366                current = {
1367                    "key": feature_key,
1368                    "title": feature_title,
1369                    "status": _clean_status(str(feature.get("status") or "planned"), {"planned", "active", "done", "blocked", "skipped"}, "planned"),
1370                    "goal": str(feature.get("goal") or feature.get("description") or "").strip(),
1371                    "output_contract": str(feature.get("output_contract") or feature.get("contract") or "").strip().lower().replace(" ", "_"),
1372                    "acceptance_criteria": str(feature.get("acceptance_criteria") or "").strip(),
1373                    "evidence_needed": str(feature.get("evidence_needed") or "").strip(),
1374                    "result": str(feature.get("result") or feature.get("outcome") or "").strip(),
1375                    "metadata": feature.get("metadata") if isinstance(feature.get("metadata"), dict) else {},
1376                    "created_at": now,
1377                }
1378                existing_features.append(current)
1379            else:
1380                current["status"] = _clean_status(str(feature.get("status") or current.get("status") or "planned"), {"planned", "active", "done", "blocked", "skipped"}, "planned")
1381                for field, value in {
1382                    "title": feature_title,
1383                    "goal": str(feature.get("goal") or feature.get("description") or "").strip(),
1384                    "output_contract": str(feature.get("output_contract") or feature.get("contract") or "").strip().lower().replace(" ", "_"),
1385                    "acceptance_criteria": str(feature.get("acceptance_criteria") or "").strip(),
1386                    "evidence_needed": str(feature.get("evidence_needed") or "").strip(),
1387                    "result": str(feature.get("result") or feature.get("outcome") or "").strip(),
1388                }.items():
1389                    if value:
1390                        current[field] = value
1391                if isinstance(feature.get("metadata"), dict):
1392                    merged = current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1393                    merged.update(feature["metadata"])
1394                    current["metadata"] = merged
1395            if current.get("output_contract") not in {"research", "artifact", "experiment", "action", "monitor", "decision", "report", "validation"}:
1396                current["output_contract"] = ""
1397            current["updated_at"] = now
1398            current["created"] = created
1399            return current, created
1400
1401        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
1402            row = conn.execute("SELECT objective, metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
1403            if row is None:
1404                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
1405            job_metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
1406            roadmap = job_metadata.get("roadmap")
1407            created = not isinstance(roadmap, dict)
1408            if created:
1409                roadmap = {
1410                    "key": _norm_key(title),
1411                    "title": title,
1412                    "status": status,
1413                    "objective": objective.strip() or str(row["objective"] or "").strip(),
1414                    "scope": scope.strip(),
1415                    "validation_contract": validation_contract.strip(),
1416                    "current_milestone": current_milestone.strip(),
1417                    "milestones": [],
1418                    "metadata": metadata or {},
1419                    "created_at": now,
1420                }
1421            else:
1422                roadmap["title"] = title or roadmap.get("title") or "Roadmap"
1423                roadmap["status"] = status
1424                for field, value in {
1425                    "objective": objective.strip(),
1426                    "scope": scope.strip(),
1427                    "validation_contract": validation_contract.strip(),
1428                    "current_milestone": current_milestone.strip(),
1429                }.items():
1430                    if value:
1431                        roadmap[field] = value
1432                if metadata:
1433                    merged_metadata = roadmap.get("metadata") if isinstance(roadmap.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1434                    merged_metadata.update(metadata)
1435                    roadmap["metadata"] = merged_metadata
1436
1437            stored_milestones = roadmap.get("milestones") if isinstance(roadmap.get("milestones"), list) else []
1438            added_milestones = 0
1439            updated_milestones = 0
1440            added_features = 0
1441            updated_features = 0
1442            touched: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
1443            for milestone in milestone_items[:100]:
1444                if not isinstance(milestone, dict):
1445                    continue
1446                milestone_title = str(milestone.get("title") or milestone.get("name") or "").strip()
1447                if not milestone_title:
1448                    continue
1449                milestone_key = _norm_key(str(milestone.get("key") or milestone_title))
1450                milestone_title_key = _norm_key(milestone_title)
1451                current = next(
1452                    (
1453                        entry for entry in stored_milestones
1454                        if entry.get("key") == milestone_key
1455                        or _norm_key(str(entry.get("title") or "")) == milestone_title_key
1456                    ),
1457                    None,
1458                )
1459                milestone_created = current is None
1460                if current is None:
1461                    current = {
1462                        "key": milestone_key,
1463                        "title": milestone_title,
1464                        "status": _clean_status(str(milestone.get("status") or "planned"), {"planned", "active", "validating", "done", "blocked", "skipped"}, "planned"),
1465                        "priority": int(milestone.get("priority") or 0),
1466                        "goal": str(milestone.get("goal") or milestone.get("description") or "").strip(),
1467                        "acceptance_criteria": str(milestone.get("acceptance_criteria") or "").strip(),
1468                        "evidence_needed": str(milestone.get("evidence_needed") or "").strip(),
1469                        "validation_status": _clean_status(str(milestone.get("validation_status") or "not_started"), {"not_started", "pending", "passed", "failed", "blocked"}, "not_started"),
1470                        "validation_result": str(milestone.get("validation_result") or "").strip(),
1471                        "next_action": str(milestone.get("next_action") or "").strip(),
1472                        "features": [],
1473                        "metadata": milestone.get("metadata") if isinstance(milestone.get("metadata"), dict) else {},
1474                        "created_at": now,
1475                    }
1476                    stored_milestones.append(current)
1477                    added_milestones += 1
1478                else:
1479                    updated_milestones += 1
1480                    current["status"] = _clean_status(str(milestone.get("status") or current.get("status") or "planned"), {"planned", "active", "validating", "done", "blocked", "skipped"}, "planned")
1481                    if "priority" in milestone:
1482                        current["priority"] = int(milestone.get("priority") or 0)
1483                    for field, value in {
1484                        "title": milestone_title,
1485                        "goal": str(milestone.get("goal") or milestone.get("description") or "").strip(),
1486                        "acceptance_criteria": str(milestone.get("acceptance_criteria") or "").strip(),
1487                        "evidence_needed": str(milestone.get("evidence_needed") or "").strip(),
1488                        "validation_status": _clean_status(str(milestone.get("validation_status") or ""), {"not_started", "pending", "passed", "failed", "blocked"}, ""),
1489                        "validation_result": str(milestone.get("validation_result") or "").strip(),
1490                        "next_action": str(milestone.get("next_action") or "").strip(),
1491                    }.items():
1492                        if value:
1493                            current[field] = value
1494                    if isinstance(milestone.get("metadata"), dict):
1495                        merged_metadata = current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1496                        merged_metadata.update(milestone["metadata"])
1497                        current["metadata"] = merged_metadata
1498                feature_items = milestone.get("features") if isinstance(milestone.get("features"), list) else []
1499                features = current.get("features") if isinstance(current.get("features"), list) else []
1500                for feature in feature_items[:100]:
1501                    if not isinstance(feature, dict):
1502                        continue
1503                    stored_feature, feature_created = merge_feature(features, feature)
1504                    if stored_feature is None:
1505                        continue
1506                    if feature_created:
1507                        added_features += 1
1508                    else:
1509                        updated_features += 1
1510                current["features"] = features[-500:]
1511                current["updated_at"] = now
1512                current["created"] = milestone_created
1513                touched.append(current)
1514
1515            roadmap["milestones"] = stored_milestones[-500:]
1516            roadmap["updated_at"] = now
1517            roadmap["created"] = created
1518            roadmap["added_milestones"] = added_milestones
1519            roadmap["updated_milestones"] = updated_milestones
1520            roadmap["added_features"] = added_features
1521            roadmap["updated_features"] = updated_features
1522            event = _insert_event(
1523                conn,
1524                job_id=job_id,
1525                event_type="roadmap",
1526                title=roadmap.get("title") or title,
1527                body=f"{roadmap.get('status')} | milestones +{added_milestones}/~{updated_milestones} | features +{added_features}/~{updated_features}",
1528                metadata={
1529                    "created": created,
1530                    "status": roadmap.get("status"),
1531                    "current_milestone": roadmap.get("current_milestone"),
1532                    "milestone_count": len(roadmap.get("milestones") or []),
1533                    "added_milestones": added_milestones,
1534                    "updated_milestones": updated_milestones,
1535                    "added_features": added_features,
1536                    "updated_features": updated_features,
1537                },
1538                created_at=now,
1539            )
1540            roadmap["event_id"] = event["id"]
1541            job_metadata["roadmap"] = roadmap
1542            job_metadata["last_roadmap_record"] = {
1543                "at": now,
1544                "event_id": event["id"],
1545                "title": roadmap.get("title"),
1546                "status": roadmap.get("status"),
1547                "milestones": touched[-10:],
1548            }
1549            conn.execute(
1550                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
1551                (now, _json_dumps(job_metadata), job_id),
1552            )
1553            return roadmap
1554
1555        return self._write(op)
1556
1557    def append_milestone_validation_record(
1558        self,
1559        job_id: str,
1560        *,
1561        milestone: str,
1562        validation_status: str = "pending",
1563        result: str = "",
1564        evidence: str = "",
1565        issues: list[str] | None = None,
1566        next_action: str = "",
1567        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1568    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1569        now = utc_now()
1570        milestone = milestone.strip()
1571        if not milestone:
1572            raise ValueError("milestone is required")
1573        validation_status = _clean_status(validation_status, {"pending", "passed", "failed", "blocked"}, "pending")
1574        issue_values = [str(issue).strip() for issue in (issues or []) if str(issue).strip()]
1575        milestone_key = _norm_key(milestone)
1576
1577        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
1578            row = conn.execute("SELECT objective, metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
1579            if row is None:
1580                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
1581            job_metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
1582            roadmap = job_metadata.get("roadmap")
1583            if not isinstance(roadmap, dict):
1584                roadmap = {
1585                    "key": _norm_key(str(row["objective"] or "roadmap")),
1586                    "title": "Roadmap",
1587                    "status": "active",
1588                    "objective": str(row["objective"] or ""),
1589                    "scope": "",
1590                    "validation_contract": "",
1591                    "current_milestone": milestone,
1592                    "milestones": [],
1593                    "metadata": {},
1594                    "created_at": now,
1595                }
1596            milestones = roadmap.get("milestones") if isinstance(roadmap.get("milestones"), list) else []
1597            current = next(
1598                (
1599                    entry for entry in milestones
1600                    if entry.get("key") == milestone_key
1601                    or _norm_key(str(entry.get("title") or "")) == milestone_key
1602                ),
1603                None,
1604            )
1605            created = current is None
1606            if current is None:
1607                current = {
1608                    "key": milestone_key,
1609                    "title": milestone,
1610                    "status": "validating" if validation_status == "pending" else ("done" if validation_status == "passed" else "blocked"),
1611                    "priority": 0,
1612                    "goal": "",
1613                    "acceptance_criteria": "",
1614                    "evidence_needed": "",
1615                    "features": [],
1616                    "metadata": {},
1617                    "created_at": now,
1618                }
1619                milestones.append(current)
1620            current["validation_status"] = validation_status
1621            current["validation_result"] = result.strip()
1622            current["validation_evidence"] = evidence.strip()
1623            current["validation_issues"] = issue_values
1624            current["next_action"] = next_action.strip()
1625            if validation_status == "passed":
1626                current["status"] = "done"
1627            elif validation_status == "pending":
1628                current["status"] = "validating"
1629            elif validation_status in {"failed", "blocked"}:
1630                current["status"] = "blocked"
1631            if metadata:
1632                merged_metadata = current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1633                merged_metadata.update(metadata)
1634                current["metadata"] = merged_metadata
1635            current["updated_at"] = now
1636            current["created"] = created
1637            roadmap["milestones"] = milestones[-500:]
1638            roadmap["status"] = "active" if validation_status in {"failed", "blocked"} else ("validating" if validation_status == "pending" else roadmap.get("status") or "active")
1639            roadmap["current_milestone"] = current.get("title") or milestone
1640            roadmap["updated_at"] = now
1641            event = _insert_event(
1642                conn,
1643                job_id=job_id,
1644                event_type="milestone_validation",
1645                title=current.get("title") or milestone,
1646                body=result.strip() or validation_status,
1647                metadata={
1648                    "created": created,
1649                    "validation_status": validation_status,
1650                    "evidence": evidence.strip(),
1651                    "issues": issue_values,
1652                    "next_action": next_action.strip(),
1653                    **(metadata or {}),
1654                },
1655                created_at=now,
1656            )
1657            current["validation_event_id"] = event["id"]
1658            job_metadata["roadmap"] = roadmap
1659            job_metadata["last_milestone_validation"] = {
1660                "at": now,
1661                "event_id": event["id"],
1662                "milestone": current.get("title"),
1663                "validation_status": validation_status,
1664                "result": result.strip(),
1665                "issues": issue_values,
1666                "next_action": next_action.strip(),
1667            }
1668            conn.execute(
1669                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
1670                (now, _json_dumps(job_metadata), job_id),
1671            )
1672            return current
1673
1674        return self._write(op)
1675
1676    def append_task_record(
1677        self,
1678        job_id: str,
1679        *,
1680        title: str,
1681        status: str = "open",
1682        priority: int = 0,
1683        goal: str = "",
1684        source_hint: str = "",
1685        result: str = "",
1686        parent: str = "",
1687        output_contract: str = "",
1688        acceptance_criteria: str = "",
1689        evidence_needed: str = "",
1690        stall_behavior: str = "",
1691        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1692    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1693        now = utc_now()
1694        title = title.strip()
1695        if not title:
1696            raise ValueError("title is required")
1697        status = (status.strip().lower() or "open").replace(" ", "_")
1698        if status not in {"open", "active", "done", "blocked", "skipped"}:
1699            status = "open"
1700        output_contract = output_contract.strip().lower().replace(" ", "_")
1701        if output_contract not in {"research", "artifact", "experiment", "action", "monitor", "decision", "report"}:
1702            output_contract = ""
1703        key = _norm_key(f"{parent}|{title}")
1704
1705        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
1706            row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
1707            if row is None:
1708                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
1709            job_metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
1710            tasks = _metadata_list(job_metadata, "task_queue")
1711            current = next(
1712                (
1713                    entry
1714                    for entry in tasks
1715                    if entry.get("key") == key
1716                    or (
1717                        not entry.get("key")
1718                        and _norm_key(f"{entry.get('parent') or ''}|{entry.get('title') or ''}") == key
1719                    )
1720                ),
1721                None,
1722            )
1723            created = current is None
1724            if current is None:
1725                current = {
1726                    "key": key,
1727                    "title": title,
1728                    "status": status,
1729                    "priority": int(priority),
1730                    "goal": goal.strip(),
1731                    "source_hint": source_hint.strip(),
1732                    "result": result.strip(),
1733                    "parent": parent.strip(),
1734                    "output_contract": output_contract,
1735                    "acceptance_criteria": acceptance_criteria.strip(),
1736                    "evidence_needed": evidence_needed.strip(),
1737                    "stall_behavior": stall_behavior.strip(),
1738                    "metadata": metadata or {},
1739                    "created_at": now,
1740                }
1741                tasks.append(current)
1742            else:
1743                current["status"] = status
1744                current["priority"] = int(priority)
1745                for field, value in {
1746                    "goal": goal.strip(),
1747                    "source_hint": source_hint.strip(),
1748                    "result": result.strip(),
1749                    "parent": parent.strip(),
1750                    "output_contract": output_contract,
1751                    "acceptance_criteria": acceptance_criteria.strip(),
1752                    "evidence_needed": evidence_needed.strip(),
1753                    "stall_behavior": stall_behavior.strip(),
1754                }.items():
1755                    if value:
1756                        current[field] = value
1757                if metadata:
1758                    merged_metadata = current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1759                    merged_metadata.update(metadata)
1760                    current["metadata"] = merged_metadata
1761            current["updated_at"] = now
1762            current["created"] = created
1763            event = _insert_event(
1764                conn,
1765                job_id=job_id,
1766                event_type="task",
1767                title=current.get("title") or title,
1768                body=current.get("result") or current.get("goal") or "",
1769                metadata={
1770                    "created": created,
1771                    "status": current.get("status"),
1772                    "priority": current.get("priority"),
1773                    "parent": current.get("parent"),
1774                    "source_hint": current.get("source_hint"),
1775                    "output_contract": current.get("output_contract"),
1776                    "acceptance_criteria": current.get("acceptance_criteria"),
1777                    "evidence_needed": current.get("evidence_needed"),
1778                    "stall_behavior": current.get("stall_behavior"),
1779                    **(current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}),
1780                },
1781                created_at=now,
1782            )
1783            current["event_id"] = event["id"]
1784            job_metadata["task_queue"] = tasks[-500:]
1785            job_metadata["last_task_record"] = current
1786            conn.execute(
1787                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
1788                (now, _json_dumps(job_metadata), job_id),
1789            )
1790            return current
1791
1792        return self._write(op)
1793
1794    def append_experiment_record(
1795        self,
1796        job_id: str,
1797        *,
1798        title: str,
1799        hypothesis: str = "",
1800        status: str = "planned",
1801        metric_name: str = "",
1802        metric_value: float | None = None,
1803        metric_unit: str = "",
1804        higher_is_better: bool = True,
1805        baseline_value: float | None = None,
1806        config: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1807        result: str = "",
1808        evidence_artifact: str = "",
1809        next_action: str = "",
1810        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1811    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
