1812        now = utc_now()
1813        title = title.strip()
1814        if not title:
1815            raise ValueError("title is required")
1816        status = (status.strip().lower() or "planned").replace(" ", "_")
1817        if status not in {"planned", "running", "measured", "failed", "blocked", "skipped"}:
1818            status = "planned"
1819        config_value = config if isinstance(config, dict) else {}
1820        key = _norm_key(f"{title}|{_json_dumps(config_value)}")
1821
1822        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
1823            row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
1824            if row is None:
1825                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
1826            job_metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
1827            experiments = _metadata_list(job_metadata, "experiment_ledger")
1828            current = next((entry for entry in experiments if entry.get("key") == key), None)
1829            created = current is None
1830            previous_best = _best_experiment_for_metric(
1831                experiments,
1832                metric_name=metric_name,
1833                metric_unit=metric_unit,
1834                higher_is_better=higher_is_better,
1835                exclude_key=key,
1836            )
1837            if current is None:
1838                current = {
1839                    "key": key,
1840                    "title": title,
1841                    "hypothesis": hypothesis.strip(),
1842                    "status": status,
1843                    "metric_name": metric_name.strip(),
1844                    "metric_value": metric_value,
1845                    "metric_unit": metric_unit.strip(),
1846                    "higher_is_better": bool(higher_is_better),
1847                    "baseline_value": baseline_value,
1848                    "config": config_value,
1849                    "result": result.strip(),
1850                    "evidence_artifact": evidence_artifact.strip(),
1851                    "next_action": next_action.strip(),
1852                    "metadata": metadata or {},
1853                    "created_at": now,
1854                }
1855                experiments.append(current)
1856            else:
1857                current["status"] = status
1858                for field, value in {
1859                    "hypothesis": hypothesis.strip(),
1860                    "metric_name": metric_name.strip(),
1861                    "metric_unit": metric_unit.strip(),
1862                    "result": result.strip(),
1863                    "evidence_artifact": evidence_artifact.strip(),
1864                    "next_action": next_action.strip(),
1865                }.items():
1866                    if value:
1867                        current[field] = value
1868                current["higher_is_better"] = bool(higher_is_better)
1869                if metric_value is not None:
1870                    current["metric_value"] = metric_value
1871                if baseline_value is not None:
1872                    current["baseline_value"] = baseline_value
1873                if config_value:
1874                    current["config"] = config_value
1875                if metadata:
1876                    merged_metadata = current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1877                    merged_metadata.update(metadata)
1878                    current["metadata"] = merged_metadata
1879            current["updated_at"] = now
1880            current["created"] = created
1881            current["delta_from_previous_best"] = _metric_delta(
1882                metric_value=current.get("metric_value"),
1883                previous_best=previous_best,
1884                higher_is_better=bool(current.get("higher_is_better", True)),
1885            )
1886            best = _mark_best_experiments(experiments)
1887            event_body = current.get("result") or ""
1888            if current.get("metric_value") is not None:
1889                event_body = format_metric_value(
1890                    current.get("metric_name") or "metric",
1891                    current.get("metric_value"),
1892                    current.get("metric_unit") or "",
1893                )
1894                if current.get("delta_from_previous_best") is not None:
1895                    event_body += f" delta={current.get('delta_from_previous_best')}"
1896                if current.get("result"):
1897                    event_body += f" | {current.get('result')}"
1898            event = _insert_event(
1899                conn,
1900                job_id=job_id,
1901                event_type="experiment",
1902                title=current.get("title") or title,
1903                body=event_body,
1904                metadata={
1905                    "created": created,
1906                    "status": current.get("status"),
1907                    "metric_name": current.get("metric_name"),
1908                    "metric_value": current.get("metric_value"),
1909                    "metric_unit": current.get("metric_unit"),
1910                    "higher_is_better": current.get("higher_is_better"),
1911                    "best_observed": current.get("best_observed"),
1912                    "delta_from_previous_best": current.get("delta_from_previous_best"),
1913                    "evidence_artifact": current.get("evidence_artifact"),
1914                    **(current.get("metadata") if isinstance(current.get("metadata"), dict) else {}),
1915                },
1916                created_at=now,
1917            )
1918            current["event_id"] = event["id"]
1919            job_metadata["experiment_ledger"] = experiments[-1000:]
1920            job_metadata["last_experiment_record"] = current
1921            if best:
1922                job_metadata["best_experiment_record"] = best
1923            conn.execute(
1924                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
1925                (now, _json_dumps(job_metadata), job_id),
1926            )
1927            return current
1928
1929        return self._write(op)
1930
1931    def append_reflection(
1932        self,
1933        job_id: str,
1934        summary: str,
1935        *,
1936        strategy: str = "",
1937        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1938    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1939        now = utc_now()
1940        text = summary.strip()
1941        if not text:
1942            raise ValueError("summary is required")
1943        entry = {
1944            "at": now,
1945            "summary": text,
1946            "strategy": strategy.strip(),
1947            "metadata": metadata or {},
1948        }
1949
1950        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, Any]:
1951            row = conn.execute("SELECT metadata_json FROM jobs WHERE id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
1952            if row is None:
1953                raise KeyError(f"Job not found: {job_id}")
1954            event = _insert_event(
1955                conn,
1956                job_id=job_id,
1957                event_type="reflection",
1958                title="reflection",
1959                body=text,
1960                metadata={"strategy": strategy.strip(), **(metadata or {})},
1961                created_at=now,
1962            )
1963            entry["event_id"] = event["id"]
1964            job_metadata = json.loads(row["metadata_json"] or "{}")
1965            reflections = _metadata_list(job_metadata, "reflections")
1966            reflections.append(entry)
1967            job_metadata["reflections"] = reflections[-100:]
1968            job_metadata["last_reflection"] = entry
1969            conn.execute(
1970                "UPDATE jobs SET updated_at = ?, metadata_json = ? WHERE id = ?",
1971                (now, _json_dumps(job_metadata), job_id),
1972            )
1973            return entry
1974
1975        return self._write(op)
1976
1977    def start_run(self, job_id: str, *, model: str = "", config_hash: str = "") -> str:
1978        run_id = new_id("run")
1979        now = utc_now()
1980
1981        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> str:
1982            conn.execute(
1983                """
1984                INSERT INTO job_runs(id, job_id, status, started_at, model, config_hash)
1985                VALUES (?, ?, 'running', ?, ?, ?)
1986                """,
1987                (run_id, job_id, now, model, config_hash),
1988            )
1989            conn.execute("UPDATE jobs SET status = 'running', updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?", (now, job_id))
1990            _insert_event(
1991                conn,
1992                job_id=job_id,
1993                event_type="daemon",
1994                title="run started",
1995                body=f"model={model}" if model else "",
1996                ref_table="job_runs",
1997                ref_id=run_id,
1998                metadata={"model": model, "config_hash": config_hash},
1999                created_at=now,
2000            )
2001            return run_id
2002
2003        return self._write(op)
2004
2005    def finish_run(self, run_id: str, status: str, *, score: float | None = None, error: str | None = None) -> None:
2006        now = utc_now()
2007
2008        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> None:
2009            conn.execute(
2010                "UPDATE job_runs SET status = ?, ended_at = ?, score = ?, error = ? WHERE id = ?",
2011                (status, now, score, error, run_id),
2012            )
2013
2014        self._write(op)
2015
2016    def mark_interrupted_running(self, *, reason: str = "daemon interrupted active work") -> dict[str, int]:
2017        now = utc_now()
2018        output = {"success": False, "error": reason, "error_type": "Interrupted"}
2019
2020        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> dict[str, int]:
2021            step_result = conn.execute(
2022                """
2023                UPDATE steps
2024                SET status = 'failed',
2025                    ended_at = ?,
2026                    summary = COALESCE(summary, ?),
2027                    output_json = ?,
2028                    error = ?
2029                WHERE status = 'running'
2030                """,
2031                (now, reason, _json_dumps(output), reason),
2032            )
2033            run_result = conn.execute(
2034                """
2035                UPDATE job_runs
2036                SET status = 'failed',
2037                    ended_at = ?,
2038                    error = ?
2039                WHERE status = 'running'
2040                """,
2041                (now, reason),
2042            )
2043            return {"steps": int(step_result.rowcount or 0), "runs": int(run_result.rowcount or 0)}
2044
2045        return self._write(op)
2046
2047    def next_step_no(self, job_id: str) -> int:
2048        row = self._conn.execute("SELECT COALESCE(MAX(step_no), 0) + 1 AS next_step FROM steps WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,)).fetchone()
2049        return int(row["next_step"])
2050
2051    def add_step(
2052        self,
2053        *,
2054        job_id: str,
2055        run_id: str,
2056        kind: str,
2057        status: str = "running",
2058        tool_name: str | None = None,
2059        summary: str | None = None,
2060        input_data: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
2061    ) -> str:
2062        step_id = new_id("step")
2063        step_no = self.next_step_no(job_id)
2064        now = utc_now()
2065
2066        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> str:
2067            conn.execute(
2068                """
2069                INSERT INTO steps(id, job_id, run_id, step_no, kind, status, tool_name, started_at, summary, input_json)
2070                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2071                """,
2072                (step_id, job_id, run_id, step_no, kind, status, tool_name, now, summary, _json_dumps(input_data)),
2073            )
2074            _insert_event(
2075                conn,
2076                job_id=job_id,
2077                event_type="tool_call" if tool_name else kind,
2078                title=tool_name or kind,
2079                body=summary or "",
2080                ref_table="steps",
2081                ref_id=step_id,
2082                metadata={"run_id": run_id, "step_no": step_no, "kind": kind, "status": status, "input": input_data or {}},
2083                created_at=now,
2084            )
2085            return step_id
2086
2087        return self._write(op)
2088
2089    def finish_step(
2090        self,
2091        step_id: str,
2092        *,
2093        status: str,
2094        summary: str | None = None,
2095        output_data: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
2096        error: str | None = None,
2097    ) -> None:
2098        now = utc_now()
2099
2100        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> None:
2101            row = conn.execute("SELECT job_id, run_id, step_no, kind, tool_name FROM steps WHERE id = ?", (step_id,)).fetchone()
2102            conn.execute(
2103                """
2104                UPDATE steps
2105                SET status = ?, ended_at = ?, summary = COALESCE(?, summary), output_json = ?, error = ?
2106                WHERE id = ?
2107                """,
2108                (status, now, summary, _json_dumps(output_data), error, step_id),
2109            )
2110            if row is not None:
2111                event_type = "error" if status == "failed" or error else "tool_result"
2112                if row["kind"] == "reflection" and not error:
2113                    event_type = "reflection"
2114                _insert_event(
2115                    conn,
2116                    job_id=row["job_id"],
2117                    event_type=event_type,
2118                    title=row["tool_name"] or row["kind"],
2119                    body=summary or error or "",
2120                    ref_table="steps",
2121                    ref_id=step_id,
2122                    metadata={
2123                        "run_id": row["run_id"],
2124                        "step_no": row["step_no"],
2125                        "kind": row["kind"],
2126                        "status": status,
2127                        "output": output_data or {},
2128                        "error": error,
2129                    },
2130                    created_at=now,
2131                )
2132
2133        self._write(op)
2134
2135    def list_steps(self, *, job_id: str | None = None, run_id: str | None = None, limit: int | None = None) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
2136        if run_id:
2137            if limit:
2138                rows = self._conn.execute(
2139                    """
2140                    SELECT * FROM (
2141                        SELECT * FROM steps WHERE run_id = ? ORDER BY step_no DESC LIMIT ?
2142                    ) ORDER BY step_no
2143                    """,
2144                    (run_id, int(limit)),
2145                ).fetchall()
2146            else:
2147                rows = self._conn.execute("SELECT * FROM steps WHERE run_id = ? ORDER BY step_no", (run_id,)).fetchall()
2148        elif job_id:
2149            if limit:
2150                rows = self._conn.execute(
2151                    """
2152                    SELECT * FROM (
2153                        SELECT * FROM steps WHERE job_id = ? ORDER BY step_no DESC LIMIT ?
2154                    ) ORDER BY step_no
2155                    """,
2156                    (job_id, int(limit)),
2157                ).fetchall()
2158            else:
2159                rows = self._conn.execute("SELECT * FROM steps WHERE job_id = ? ORDER BY started_at", (job_id,)).fetchall()
2160        else:
2161            if limit:
2162                rows = self._conn.execute(
2163                    """
2164                    SELECT * FROM (
2165                        SELECT * FROM steps ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT ?
2166                    ) ORDER BY started_at
2167                    """,
2168                    (int(limit),),
2169                ).fetchall()
2170            else:
2171                rows = self._conn.execute("SELECT * FROM steps ORDER BY started_at").fetchall()
2172        return [_row_to_dict(row) for row in rows]
2173
2174    def job_record_counts(self, job_id: str) -> dict[str, int]:
2175        row = self._conn.execute(
2176            """
2177            SELECT
2178                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM steps WHERE job_id = ?) AS steps,
2179                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artifacts WHERE job_id = ?) AS artifacts,
2180                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_index WHERE job_id = ?) AS memory,
2181                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE job_id = ?) AS events
2182            """,
2183            (job_id, job_id, job_id, job_id),
2184        ).fetchone()
2185        return {
2186            "steps": int(row["steps"] or 0),
2187            "artifacts": int(row["artifacts"] or 0),
2188            "memory": int(row["memory"] or 0),
2189            "events": int(row["events"] or 0),
2190        }
2191
2192    def job_token_usage(self, job_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
2193        rows = self._conn.execute(
2194            """
2195            SELECT created_at, metadata_json
2196            FROM events
2197            WHERE job_id = ? AND event_type = 'loop' AND title = 'message_end'
2198            ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
2199            """,
2200            (job_id,),
2201        ).fetchall()
2202        totals: dict[str, Any] = {
2203            "prompt_tokens": 0,
2204            "completion_tokens": 0,
2205            "total_tokens": 0,
2206            "reasoning_tokens": 0,
2207            "cached_tokens": 0,
2208            "cost": 0.0,
2209            "calls": 0,
2210            "estimated_calls": 0,
2211            "latest_prompt_tokens": 0,
2212            "latest_completion_tokens": 0,
2213            "latest_total_tokens": 0,
2214            "latest_at": "",
2215            "has_cost": False,
2216        }
2217        for row in rows:
2218            metadata = _json_loads(row["metadata_json"])
2219            usage = metadata.get("usage")
2220            if not isinstance(usage, dict):
2221                continue
2222            prompt = _as_int(usage.get("prompt_tokens"))
2223            completion = _as_int(usage.get("completion_tokens"))
2224            total = _as_int(usage.get("total_tokens")) or prompt + completion
2225            totals["prompt_tokens"] += prompt
2226            totals["completion_tokens"] += completion
2227            totals["total_tokens"] += total
2228            totals["reasoning_tokens"] += _as_int(_nested_value(usage, "completion_tokens_details", "reasoning_tokens"))
2229            totals["cached_tokens"] += _as_int(_nested_value(usage, "prompt_tokens_details", "cached_tokens"))
2230            cost = _as_float(usage.get("cost"))
2231            if cost is not None:
2232                totals["cost"] += cost
2233                totals["has_cost"] = True
2234            totals["calls"] += 1
2235            if bool(usage.get("estimated")):
2236                totals["estimated_calls"] += 1
2237            totals["latest_prompt_tokens"] = prompt
2238            totals["latest_completion_tokens"] = completion
2239            totals["latest_total_tokens"] = total
2240            totals["latest_at"] = str(row["created_at"] or "")
2241        return totals
2242
2243    def list_runs(self, job_id: str, *, limit: int = 50) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
2244        rows = self._conn.execute(
2245            "SELECT * FROM job_runs WHERE job_id = ? ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT ?",
2246            (job_id, limit),
2247        ).fetchall()
2248        return [_row_to_dict(row) for row in rows]
2249
2250    def add_artifact(
2251        self,
2252        *,
2253        job_id: str,
2254        path: str | Path,
2255        sha256: str,
2256        artifact_type: str,
2257        run_id: str | None = None,
2258        step_id: str | None = None,
2259        title: str | None = None,
2260        summary: str | None = None,
2261        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
2262    ) -> str:
2263        artifact_id = new_id("art")
2264        now = utc_now()
2265
2266        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> str:
2267            conn.execute(
2268                """
2269                INSERT INTO artifacts(id, job_id, run_id, step_id, type, path, sha256, title, summary, metadata_json, created_at)
2270                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2271                """,
2272                (
2273                    artifact_id,
2274                    job_id,
2275                    run_id,
2276                    step_id,
2277                    artifact_type,
2278                    str(path),
2279                    sha256,
2280                    title,
2281                    summary,
2282                    _json_dumps(metadata),
2283                    now,
2284                ),
2285            )
2286            _insert_event(
2287                conn,
2288                job_id=job_id,
2289                event_type="artifact",
2290                title=title or artifact_id,
2291                body=summary or str(path),
2292                ref_table="artifacts",
2293                ref_id=artifact_id,
2294                metadata={"type": artifact_type, "path": str(path), "sha256": sha256, **(metadata or {})},
2295                created_at=now,
2296            )
2297            return artifact_id
2298
2299        return self._write(op)
2300
2301    def get_artifact(self, artifact_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
2302        row = self._conn.execute("SELECT * FROM artifacts WHERE id = ?", (artifact_id,)).fetchone()
2303        artifact = _row_to_dict(row)
2304        if artifact is None:
2305            raise KeyError(f"Artifact not found: {artifact_id}")
2306        return artifact
2307
2308    def list_artifacts(self, job_id: str, *, limit: int = 100) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
2309        rows = self._conn.execute(
2310            "SELECT * FROM artifacts WHERE job_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ?",
2311            (job_id, limit),
2312        ).fetchall()
2313        return [_row_to_dict(row) for row in rows]
2314
2315    def upsert_memory(
2316        self,
2317        *,
2318        job_id: str,
2319        key: str,
2320        summary: str,
2321        artifact_refs: list[str] | None = None,
2322    ) -> str:
2323        memory_id = new_id("mem")
2324        now = utc_now()
2325
2326        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> str:
2327            conn.execute(
2328                """
2329                INSERT INTO memory_index(id, job_id, key, summary, artifact_refs_json, updated_at)
2330                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2331                ON CONFLICT(job_id, key) DO UPDATE SET
2332                    summary = excluded.summary,
2333                    artifact_refs_json = excluded.artifact_refs_json,
2334                    updated_at = excluded.updated_at
2335                """,
2336                (memory_id, job_id, key, summary, _json_dumps(artifact_refs or []), now),
2337            )
2338            row = conn.execute("SELECT id FROM memory_index WHERE job_id = ? AND key = ?", (job_id, key)).fetchone()
2339            current_id = str(row["id"])
2340            _insert_event(
2341                conn,
2342                job_id=job_id,
2343                event_type="compaction",
2344                title=key,
2345                body=summary,
2346                ref_table="memory_index",
2347                ref_id=current_id,
2348                metadata={"artifact_refs": artifact_refs or []},
2349                created_at=now,
2350            )
2351            return current_id
2352
2353        return self._write(op)
2354
2355    def list_memory(self, job_id: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
2356        rows = self._conn.execute(
2357            "SELECT * FROM memory_index WHERE job_id = ? ORDER BY updated_at DESC",
2358            (job_id,),
2359        ).fetchall()
2360        return [_row_to_dict(row) for row in rows]
2361
2362    def digest_exists(self, *, day: str, target: str) -> bool:
2363        row = self._conn.execute(
2364            "SELECT 1 FROM digests WHERE day = ? AND target = ? AND status IN ('sent', 'dry_run') LIMIT 1",
2365            (day, target),
2366        ).fetchone()
2367        return row is not None
2368
2369    def record_digest(
2370        self,
2371        *,
2372        day: str,
2373        target: str,
2374        subject: str,
2375        body_path: str | Path,
2376        status: str,
2377        error: str | None = None,
2378    ) -> str:
2379        digest_id = new_id("dig")
2380        sent_at = utc_now() if status in {"sent", "dry_run"} else None
2381
2382        def op(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> str:
2383            conn.execute(
2384                """
2385                INSERT INTO digests(id, day, target, subject, body_path, sent_at, status, error)
2386                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2387                """,
2388                (digest_id, day, target, subject, str(body_path), sent_at, status, error),
2389            )
2390            _insert_event(
2391                conn,
2392                job_id=None,
2393                event_type="digest",
2394                title=subject,
2395                body=str(body_path),
2396                ref_table="digests",
2397                ref_id=digest_id,
2398                metadata={"day": day, "target": target, "status": status, "error": error},
2399                created_at=sent_at or utc_now(),
2400            )
2401            return digest_id
2402
2403        return self._write(op)
nipux_cli/digest.py 380 lines 
   1"""Digest rendering and optional email delivery."""
   2
   3from __future__ import annotations
   4
   5import smtplib
   6from datetime import date
   7from email.message import EmailMessage
   8from pathlib import Path
   9from typing import Any
  10
  11from nipux_cli.config import AppConfig, EmailConfig
  12from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
  13from nipux_cli.operator_context import active_prompt_operator_entries
  14from nipux_cli.tui_layout import _format_compact_count, _format_usage_cost
  15
  16
  17def _metadata_list(job: dict, key: str) -> list[dict]:
  18    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
  19    values = metadata.get(key)
  20    return [value for value in values if isinstance(value, dict)] if isinstance(values, list) else []
  21
  22
  23def _active_operator_messages(messages: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
  24    prompt_entries = active_prompt_operator_entries(messages)
  25    return [
  26        entry for entry in messages
  27        if str(entry.get("mode") or "steer") in {"steer", "follow_up"}
  28        and entry in prompt_entries
  29    ]
  30
  31
  32def _safe_int(value: Any) -> int:
  33    try:
  34        return int(float(value))
  35    except (TypeError, ValueError):
  36        return 0
  37
  38
  39def _latest_run_model(db: AgentDB, job_id: str) -> str:
  40    runs = db.list_runs(job_id, limit=1)
  41    if runs:
  42        return str(runs[0].get("model") or "unknown")
  43    return "unknown"
  44
  45
  46def _usage_lines(
  47    db: AgentDB,
  48    job_id: str,
  49    *,
  50    model: str | None = None,
  51    base_url: str = "",
  52    context_length: int = 0,
  53    input_cost_per_million: float | None = None,
  54    output_cost_per_million: float | None = None,
  55) -> list[str]:
  56    usage = db.job_token_usage(job_id)
  57    usage["input_cost_per_million"] = input_cost_per_million
  58    usage["output_cost_per_million"] = output_cost_per_million
  59    calls = _safe_int(usage.get("calls"))
  60    if calls <= 0:
  61        return ["- No model usage recorded yet."]
  62    model_name = model or _latest_run_model(db, job_id)
  63    prompt = _safe_int(usage.get("prompt_tokens"))
  64    completion = _safe_int(usage.get("completion_tokens"))
  65    total = _safe_int(usage.get("total_tokens")) or prompt + completion
  66    latest_prompt = _safe_int(usage.get("latest_prompt_tokens"))
  67    latest_completion = _safe_int(usage.get("latest_completion_tokens"))
  68    context_text = _format_compact_count(latest_prompt)
  69    if context_length > 0:
  70        context_text = f"{context_text}/{_format_compact_count(context_length)}"
  71    cost_text = _format_usage_cost(usage, model=model_name, base_url=base_url)
  72    lines = [
  73        (
  74            f"- {model_name}: {calls} calls, {_format_compact_count(total)} tokens "
  75            f"({_format_compact_count(prompt)} prompt, {_format_compact_count(completion)} output), "
  76            f"latest ctx={context_text}, latest output={_format_compact_count(latest_completion)}, cost={cost_text}"
  77        )
  78    ]
  79    if _safe_int(usage.get("estimated_calls")):
  80        lines.append("- Some token/cost values are estimated because the provider did not return complete usage metadata.")
  81    elif not bool(usage.get("has_cost")) and cost_text == "pending":
  82        lines.append("- Cost is pending until the provider returns cost metadata or the model is configured as local/free.")
  83    return lines
  84
  85
  86def render_job_digest(
  87    db: AgentDB,
  88    job_id: str,
  89    *,
  90    model: str | None = None,
  91    base_url: str = "",
  92    context_length: int = 0,
  93    input_cost_per_million: float | None = None,
  94    output_cost_per_million: float | None = None,
  95) -> str:
  96    job = db.get_job(job_id)
  97    artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job_id, limit=50)
  98    steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
  99    findings = _metadata_list(job, "finding_ledger")
 100    sources = _metadata_list(job, "source_ledger")
 101    tasks = _metadata_list(job, "task_queue")
 102    experiments = _metadata_list(job, "experiment_ledger")
 103    lessons = _metadata_list(job, "lessons")
 104    reflections = _metadata_list(job, "reflections")
 105    operator_messages = _metadata_list(job, "operator_messages")
 106    active_operator = _active_operator_messages(operator_messages)
 107    lines = [
 108        f"# {job['title']}",
 109        "",
 110        f"Status: {job['status']}",
 111        f"Findings: {len(findings)}",
 112        f"Sources: {len(sources)}",
 113        f"Tasks: {len(tasks)}",
 114        f"Experiments: {len(experiments)}",
 115        f"Lessons: {len(lessons)}",
 116        "",
 117        "## Model Usage",
 118        "",
 119        *_usage_lines(
 120            db,
 121            job_id,
 122            model=model,
 123            base_url=base_url,
 124            context_length=context_length,
 125            input_cost_per_million=input_cost_per_million,
 126            output_cost_per_million=output_cost_per_million,
 127        ),
 128        "",
 129        "## Objective",
 130        "",
 131        job["objective"],
 132        "",
 133        "## Active Operator Context",
 134        "",
 135    ]
 136    if not active_operator:
 137        lines.append("- none")
 138    for entry in active_operator[-8:]:
 139        lines.append(f"- {entry.get('mode') or 'steer'}: {entry.get('message') or ''}")
 140    lines.extend([
 141        "",
 142        "## Recent Steps",
 143        "",
 144    ])
 145    if not steps:
 146        lines.append("- No steps have run yet.")
 147    for step in steps[-20:]:
 148        tool = f" `{step['tool_name']}`" if step.get("tool_name") else ""
 149        lines.append(f"- #{step['step_no']} {step['kind']}{tool}: {step['status']} - {step.get('summary') or ''}")
 150    lines.extend(["", "## Best Findings", ""])
 151    if not findings:
 152        lines.append("- No findings recorded yet.")
 153    for finding in sorted(findings, key=lambda item: float(item.get("score") or 0), reverse=True)[:15]:
 154        details = " | ".join(str(finding.get(key) or "") for key in ("category", "location", "contact") if finding.get(key))
 155        suffix = f" - {details}" if details else ""
 156        lines.append(f"- {finding.get('name') or 'unknown'} (score={finding.get('score')}){suffix}")
 157        if finding.get("reason"):
 158            lines.append(f"  - {finding['reason']}")
 159    lines.extend(["", "## Source Learning", ""])
 160    if not sources:
 161        lines.append("- No sources scored yet.")
 162    for source in sorted(sources, key=lambda item: float(item.get("usefulness_score") or 0), reverse=True)[:12]:
 163        lines.append(
 164            f"- {source.get('source')} score={source.get('usefulness_score')} "
 165            f"findings={source.get('yield_count') or 0} fails={source.get('fail_count') or 0}: {source.get('last_outcome') or ''}"
 166        )
 167    lines.extend(["", "## Task Queue", ""])
 168    if not tasks:
 169        lines.append("- No tasks recorded yet.")
 170    status_order = {"active": 0, "open": 1, "blocked": 2, "done": 3, "skipped": 4}
 171    for task in sorted(tasks, key=lambda item: (status_order.get(str(item.get("status") or "open"), 9), -int(item.get("priority") or 0)))[:15]:
 172        contract = f" [{task.get('output_contract')}]" if task.get("output_contract") else ""
 173        lines.append(f"- {task.get('status') or 'open'} p={task.get('priority') or 0}{contract}: {task.get('title') or 'untitled'}")
 174        for key, label in (("acceptance_criteria", "accept"), ("evidence_needed", "evidence"), ("stall_behavior", "stall")):
 175            if task.get(key):
 176                lines.append(f"  - {label}: {task[key]}")
 177        if task.get("result"):
 178            lines.append(f"  - {task['result']}")
 179    lines.extend(["", "## Experiments", ""])
 180    if not experiments:
 181        lines.append("- No experiments recorded yet.")
 182    measured = [experiment for experiment in experiments if experiment.get("metric_value") is not None]
 183    for experiment in sorted(measured or experiments, key=lambda item: (not bool(item.get("best_observed")), str(item.get("updated_at") or item.get("created_at") or "")))[:15]:
 184        metric = ""
 185        if experiment.get("metric_value") is not None:
 186            metric = f" {experiment.get('metric_name') or 'metric'}={experiment.get('metric_value')}{experiment.get('metric_unit') or ''}"
 187        best = " best" if experiment.get("best_observed") else ""
 188        lines.append(f"- {experiment.get('status') or 'planned'}: {experiment.get('title') or 'experiment'}{metric}{best}")
 189        if experiment.get("result"):
 190            lines.append(f"  - {experiment['result']}")
 191    lines.extend(["", "## Lessons", ""])
 192    if not lessons:
 193        lines.append("- No lessons recorded yet.")
 194    for lesson in lessons[-12:]:
 195        lines.append(f"- {lesson.get('category') or 'memory'}: {lesson.get('lesson') or ''}")
 196    if reflections:
 197        lines.extend(["", "## Current Strategy", ""])
 198        reflection = reflections[-1]
 199        lines.append(reflection.get("summary") or "")
 200        if reflection.get("strategy"):
 201            lines.append("")
 202            lines.append(reflection["strategy"])
 203    lines.extend(["", "## Artifacts", ""])
 204    if not artifacts:
 205        lines.append("- No artifacts yet.")
 206    for artifact in artifacts[:20]:
 207        title = artifact.get("title") or artifact["id"]
 208        lines.append(f"- {title} ({artifact['type']}): {artifact['path']}")
 209    return "\n".join(lines).rstrip() + "\n"
 210
 211
 212def send_digest_email(config: EmailConfig, *, subject: str, body: str, to_addr: str | None = None) -> dict:
 213    if not config.enabled:
 214        return {"sent": False, "dry_run": True, "reason": "email.disabled", "subject": subject, "body": body}
 215    target = to_addr or config.to_addr
 216    if not all([config.smtp_host, config.from_addr, target]):
 217        raise ValueError("Email is enabled but smtp_host/from_addr/to_addr is incomplete")
 218    message = EmailMessage()
 219    message["Subject"] = subject
 220    message["From"] = config.from_addr
 221    message["To"] = target
 222    message.set_content(body)
 223    with smtplib.SMTP(config.smtp_host, config.smtp_port, timeout=30) as smtp:
 224        if config.use_tls:
 225            smtp.starttls()
 226        if config.username:
 227            smtp.login(config.username, config.password)
 228        smtp.send_message(message)
 229    return {"sent": True, "target": target, "subject": subject}
 230
 231
 232def render_daily_digest(
 233    db: AgentDB,
 234    *,
 235    model: str | None = None,
 236    base_url: str = "",
 237    context_length: int = 0,
 238    input_cost_per_million: float | None = None,
 239    output_cost_per_million: float | None = None,
 240) -> str:
 241    jobs = [job for job in db.list_jobs() if job["status"] not in {"cancelled"}]
 242    lines = ["# Nipux CLI Daily Digest", ""]
 243    if not jobs:
 244        lines.append("No jobs are currently tracked.")
 245        return "\n".join(lines).rstrip() + "\n"
 246
 247    for job in jobs:
 248        artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job["id"], limit=10)
 249        steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job["id"])[-5:]
 250        findings = _metadata_list(job, "finding_ledger")
 251        sources = _metadata_list(job, "source_ledger")
 252        tasks = _metadata_list(job, "task_queue")
 253        experiments = _metadata_list(job, "experiment_ledger")
 254        lessons = _metadata_list(job, "lessons")
 255        reflections = _metadata_list(job, "reflections")
 256        operator_messages = _metadata_list(job, "operator_messages")
 257        active_operator = _active_operator_messages(operator_messages)
 258        finding_batches = [artifact for artifact in artifacts if "finding" in str(artifact.get("title") or artifact.get("summary") or "").lower()]
 259        lines.extend([
 260            f"## {job['title']}",
 261            "",
 262            f"Status: {job['status']}",
 263            f"Kind: {job['kind']}",
 264            f"Counts: {len(findings)} findings, {len(sources)} sources, {len(tasks)} tasks, {len(experiments)} experiments, {len(lessons)} lessons, {len(finding_batches)} recent finding artifacts",
 265            "",
 266            "Model usage:",
 267        ])
 268        lines.extend(
 269            _usage_lines(
 270                db,
 271                job["id"],
 272                model=model,
 273                base_url=base_url,
 274                context_length=context_length,
 275                input_cost_per_million=input_cost_per_million,
 276                output_cost_per_million=output_cost_per_million,
 277            )
 278        )
 279        lines.extend([
 280            "",
 281            "Recent steps:",
 282        ])
 283        if not steps:
 284            lines.append("- none")
 285        for step in steps:
 286            tool = f" `{step['tool_name']}`" if step.get("tool_name") else ""
 287            lines.append(f"- #{step['step_no']} {step['kind']}{tool}: {step['status']} - {step.get('summary') or ''}")
 288        lines.extend(["", "Active operator context:"])
 289        if not active_operator:
 290            lines.append("- none")
 291        for entry in active_operator[-5:]:
 292            lines.append(f"- {entry.get('mode') or 'steer'}: {entry.get('message') or ''}")
 293        lines.extend(["", "Best findings:"])
 294        if not findings:
 295            lines.append("- none")
 296        for finding in sorted(findings, key=lambda item: float(item.get("score") or 0), reverse=True)[:8]:
 297            lines.append(f"- {finding.get('name') or 'unknown'} (score={finding.get('score')}) - {finding.get('reason') or finding.get('category') or ''}")
 298        lines.extend(["", "Task queue:"])
 299        if not tasks:
 300            lines.append("- none")
 301        status_order = {"active": 0, "open": 1, "blocked": 2, "done": 3, "skipped": 4}
 302        for task in sorted(tasks, key=lambda item: (status_order.get(str(item.get("status") or "open"), 9), -int(item.get("priority") or 0)))[:8]:
 303            contract = f" [{task.get('output_contract')}]" if task.get("output_contract") else ""
 304            lines.append(f"- {task.get('status') or 'open'} p={task.get('priority') or 0}{contract}: {task.get('title') or 'untitled'}")
 305        lines.extend(["", "Experiments:"])
 306        if not experiments:
 307            lines.append("- none")
 308        measured = [experiment for experiment in experiments if experiment.get("metric_value") is not None]
 309        for experiment in (measured or experiments)[-8:]:
 310            metric = ""
 311            if experiment.get("metric_value") is not None:
 312                metric = f" {experiment.get('metric_name') or 'metric'}={experiment.get('metric_value')}{experiment.get('metric_unit') or ''}"
 313            best = " best" if experiment.get("best_observed") else ""
 314            lines.append(f"- {experiment.get('status') or 'planned'}: {experiment.get('title') or 'experiment'}{metric}{best}")
 315        lines.extend(["", "Lessons learned:"])
 316        if not lessons:
 317            lines.append("- none")
 318        for lesson in lessons[-8:]:
 319            lines.append(f"- {lesson.get('category') or 'memory'}: {lesson.get('lesson') or ''}")
 320        lines.extend(["", "Source quality:"])
 321        if not sources:
 322            lines.append("- none")
 323        for source in sorted(sources, key=lambda item: float(item.get("usefulness_score") or 0), reverse=True)[:8]:
 324            lines.append(f"- {source.get('source')} score={source.get('usefulness_score')} findings={source.get('yield_count') or 0}: {source.get('last_outcome') or ''}")
 325        if reflections:
 326            reflection = reflections[-1]
 327            lines.extend(["", "Current strategy:", f"- {reflection.get('strategy') or reflection.get('summary') or ''}"])
 328        lines.extend(["", "Next branches:"])
 329        lines.append("- Continue with high-yield source types, avoid low-yield paths, and save durable findings as artifacts.")
 330        lines.extend(["", "Recent artifacts:"])
 331        if not artifacts:
 332            lines.append("- none")
 333        for artifact in artifacts:
 334            title = artifact.get("title") or artifact["id"]
 335            lines.append(f"- {title} ({artifact['type']}): {artifact['path']}")
 336        lines.append("")
 337    return "\n".join(lines).rstrip() + "\n"
 338
 339
 340def write_daily_digest(config: AppConfig, db: AgentDB, *, day: str | None = None) -> dict:
 341    day = day or date.today().isoformat()
 342    target = config.email.to_addr or "dry-run"
 343    subject = f"Nipux CLI daily digest - {day}"
 344    if db.digest_exists(day=day, target=target):
 345        return {"sent": False, "skipped": True, "reason": "already_recorded", "day": day, "target": target}
 346
 347    body = render_daily_digest(
 348        db,
 349        model=config.model.model,
 350        base_url=config.model.base_url,
 351        context_length=config.model.context_length,
 352        input_cost_per_million=config.model.input_cost_per_million,
 353        output_cost_per_million=config.model.output_cost_per_million,
 354    )
 355    config.runtime.digests_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 356    body_path = Path(config.runtime.digests_dir) / f"{day}-daily.md"
 357    body_path.write_text(body, encoding="utf-8")
 358
 359    try:
 360        email_result = send_digest_email(config.email, subject=subject, body=body)
 361        status = "sent" if email_result.get("sent") else "dry_run"
 362        digest_id = db.record_digest(day=day, target=target, subject=subject, body_path=body_path, status=status)
 363        return {
 364            "digest_id": digest_id,
 365            "status": status,
 366            "day": day,
 367            "target": target,
 368            "path": str(body_path),
 369            "email": email_result,
 370        }
 371    except Exception as exc:
 372        digest_id = db.record_digest(
 373            day=day,
 374            target=target,
 375            subject=subject,
 376            body_path=body_path,
 377            status="failed",
 378            error=str(exc),
 379        )
 380        return {"digest_id": digest_id, "status": "failed", "day": day, "target": target, "path": str(body_path), "error": str(exc)}
nipux_cli/doctor.py 211 lines 
   1"""Runtime checks for the Nipux agent."""
   2
   3from __future__ import annotations
   4
   5import json
   6import shutil
   7import urllib.error
   8import urllib.request
   9from dataclasses import dataclass
  10from pathlib import Path
  11from typing import Any
  12from urllib.parse import urlparse
  13
  14from nipux_cli.config import AppConfig, load_config
  15from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
  16from nipux_cli.tools import DEFAULT_REGISTRY
  17
  18
  19@dataclass(frozen=True)
  20class Check:
  21    name: str
  22    ok: bool
  23    detail: str
  24
  25    def as_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
  26        return {"name": self.name, "ok": self.ok, "detail": self.detail}
  27
  28
  29def _check_writable_dir(path: Path) -> Check:
  30    try:
  31        path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  32        probe = path / ".write-test"
  33        probe.write_text("ok", encoding="utf-8")
  34        probe.unlink()
  35        return Check("state_dir_writable", True, str(path))
  36    except OSError as exc:
  37        return Check("state_dir_writable", False, f"{path}: {exc}")
  38
  39
  40def _check_db(config: AppConfig) -> Check:
  41    try:
  42        db = AgentDB(config.runtime.state_db_path)
  43        db.close()
  44        return Check("sqlite", True, str(config.runtime.state_db_path))
  45    except Exception as exc:
  46        return Check("sqlite", False, str(exc))
  47
  48
  49def _check_tool_surface() -> Check:
  50    names = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  51    forbidden = sorted({"terminal", "delegate_task", "skill_manage", "image_generate"} & set(names))
  52    if forbidden:
  53        return Check("tool_surface", False, f"forbidden tools exposed: {', '.join(forbidden)}")
  54    return Check("tool_surface", True, f"{len(names)} tools: {', '.join(names)}")
  55
  56
  57def _check_model_config(config: AppConfig) -> Check:
  58    base_url = config.model.base_url
  59    host = (urlparse(base_url).hostname or "").lower()
  60    local_hosts = {"", "localhost", "127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0"}
  61    if host in local_hosts or host.endswith(".local"):
  62        return Check("model_config", True, f"{config.model.model} at {base_url}")
  63    if config.model.api_key:
  64        return Check("model_config", True, f"{config.model.model} at {base_url}; key read from {config.model.api_key_env}")
  65    return Check(
  66        "model_config",
  67        False,
  68        f"{config.model.api_key_env} is not set for remote endpoint {base_url}; put it in the shell or ~/.nipux/.env",
  69    )
  70
  71
  72def _check_browser_runtime() -> Check:
  73    direct = shutil.which("agent-browser")
  74    if direct:
  75        return Check("browser_runtime", True, f"agent-browser: {direct}")
  76    npx = shutil.which("npx")
  77    if npx:
  78        return Check("browser_runtime", True, f"agent-browser available through npx fallback: {npx}")
  79    return Check(
  80        "browser_runtime",
  81        False,
  82        "agent-browser not found and npx is unavailable; install with: npm install -g agent-browser && agent-browser install",
  83    )
  84
  85
  86def _check_model_endpoint(config: AppConfig) -> Check:
  87    if "openrouter.ai" in config.model.base_url and not config.model.api_key:
  88        return Check("model_endpoint", False, "API key is not set")
  89    auth = _check_openrouter_auth(config)
  90    if auth is not None and not auth.ok:
  91        return auth
  92    url = config.model.base_url.rstrip("/") + "/models"
  93    request = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {config.model.api_key or 'local-no-key'}"})
  94    try:
  95        with urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5) as response:
  96            payload = response.read(512_000).decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
  97        try:
  98            data = json.loads(payload)
  99            count = len(data.get("data", [])) if isinstance(data, dict) else "unknown"
 100            available = _model_available(data, config.model.model)
 101            if available is False:
 102                return Check("model_endpoint", False, f"{config.model.model} not found at {url}; models={count}")
 103            generation = _check_model_generation(config)
 104            if not generation.ok:
 105                return generation
 106            return Check("model_endpoint", True, f"{url} returned models={count}; {config.model.model} available; generation accepted")
 107        except json.JSONDecodeError:
 108            generation = _check_model_generation(config)
 109            if not generation.ok:
 110                return generation
 111            return Check("model_endpoint", True, f"{url} responded; generation accepted")
 112    except (urllib.error.URLError, TimeoutError, OSError) as exc:
 113        return Check("model_endpoint", False, f"{url}: {exc}")
 114
 115
 116def _check_model_generation(config: AppConfig) -> Check:
 117    url = config.model.base_url.rstrip("/") + "/chat/completions"
 118    payload = {
 119        "model": config.model.model,
 120        "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Reply with exactly: ok"}],
 121        "max_tokens": 8,
 122        "temperature": 0,
 123        "tools": [
 124            {
 125                "type": "function",
 126                "function": {
 127                    "name": "noop",
 128                    "description": "No-op model readiness probe.",
 129                    "parameters": {
 130                        "type": "object",
 131                        "properties": {"reason": {"type": "string"}},
 132                        "required": ["reason"],
 133                    },
 134                },
 135            }
 136        ],
 137    }
 138    request = urllib.request.Request(
 139        url,
 140        data=json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8"),
 141        headers={
 142            "Authorization": f"Bearer {config.model.api_key or 'local-no-key'}",
 143            "Content-Type": "application/json",
 144        },
 145        method="POST",
 146    )
 147    try:
 148        with urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=15) as response:
 149            body = response.read(64_000).decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
 150        data = json.loads(body)
 151        choices = data.get("choices") if isinstance(data, dict) else None
 152        if isinstance(choices, list) and choices:
 153            return Check("model_generation", True, f"{url} accepted chat/tool request")
 154        return Check("model_generation", False, f"{url} returned no choices")
 155    except urllib.error.HTTPError as exc:
 156        body = exc.read(2048).decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
 157        detail = _extract_error_message(body) or str(exc)
 158        return Check("model_generation", False, f"{url}: {detail}")
 159    except (json.JSONDecodeError, urllib.error.URLError, TimeoutError, OSError) as exc:
 160        return Check("model_generation", False, f"{url}: {exc}")
 161
 162
 163def _check_openrouter_auth(config: AppConfig) -> Check | None:
 164    if "openrouter.ai" not in config.model.base_url:
 165        return None
 166    if not config.model.api_key:
 167        return Check("model_auth", False, "OpenRouter API key is not set")
 168    url = "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/key"
 169    request = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {config.model.api_key}"})
 170    try:
 171        with urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5) as response:
 172            response.read(2048)
 173        return Check("model_auth", True, "OpenRouter API key accepted")
 174    except urllib.error.HTTPError as exc:
 175        body = exc.read(512).decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
 176        detail = _extract_error_message(body) or str(exc)
 177        return Check("model_auth", False, f"OpenRouter rejected API key: {detail}")
 178    except (urllib.error.URLError, TimeoutError, OSError) as exc:
 179        return Check("model_auth", False, f"{url}: {exc}")
 180
 181
 182def _extract_error_message(body: str) -> str:
 183    try:
 184        data = json.loads(body)
 185    except json.JSONDecodeError:
 186        return body.strip()
 187    error = data.get("error") if isinstance(data, dict) else None
 188    if isinstance(error, dict):
 189        return str(error.get("message") or error.get("code") or "").strip()
 190    return ""
 191
 192
 193def _model_available(data: Any, model: str) -> bool | None:
 194    if not isinstance(data, dict) or not isinstance(data.get("data"), list):
 195        return None
 196    ids = {str(item.get("id") or "") for item in data["data"] if isinstance(item, dict)}
 197    return model in ids
 198
 199
 200def run_doctor(*, config: AppConfig | None = None, check_model: bool = False) -> list[Check]:
 201    config = config or load_config()
 202    checks = [
 203        _check_writable_dir(config.runtime.home),
 204        _check_db(config),
 205        _check_model_config(config),
 206        _check_tool_surface(),
 207        _check_browser_runtime(),
 208    ]
 209    if check_model:
 210        checks.append(_check_model_endpoint(config))
 211    return checks
nipux_cli/event_render.py 118 lines 
   1"""Readable event rendering shared by CLI history and chat context."""
   2
   3from __future__ import annotations
   4
   5import shlex
   6from typing import Any
   7
   8from nipux_cli.metric_format import format_metric_value
   9from nipux_cli.tui_events import clean_step_summary, generic_display_text
  10from nipux_cli.tui_style import _one_line
  11
  12
  13def event_line(event: dict[str, Any], *, chars: int, full: bool = False) -> str:
  14    when, label, detail, access = event_display_parts(event, chars=chars, full=full)
  15    suffix = f" | {access}" if access and full else ""
  16    return f"{when:<16} {label:<8} {_one_line(detail + suffix, chars)}"
  17
  18
  19def event_display_parts(event: dict[str, Any], *, chars: int, full: bool = False) -> tuple[str, str, str, str]:
  20    when = compact_time(str(event.get("created_at") or "?"))
  21    kind = str(event.get("event_type") or "event")
  22    title = str(event.get("title") or "").strip()
  23    body = generic_display_text(event.get("body") or "")
  24    ref_table = str(event.get("ref_table") or "")
  25    ref_id = str(event.get("ref_id") or "")
  26    metadata = event.get("metadata") if isinstance(event.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
  27    label = event_label(kind, metadata)
  28    access = ""
  29    if kind == "tool_result" and metadata.get("status"):
  30        label = event_label(f"{kind}:{metadata.get('status')}", metadata)
  31    if kind == "error":
  32        label = "ERROR"
  33    if kind.startswith("tool_result") or kind == "error":
  34        body = clean_step_summary(body)
  35    if kind == "artifact":
  36        title = title or ref_id
  37        if body.startswith("/") or "/.nipux/jobs/" in body or "/jobs/job_" in body:
  38            body = generic_display_text(metadata.get("summary") or "saved output")
  39        if title:
  40            access = f"open: /artifact {shlex.quote(title)}"
  41    if kind == "operator_message" and metadata.get("mode"):
  42        title = f"{title or 'operator'} {metadata.get('mode')}"
  43    if kind == "operator_context":
  44        body = body or f"{metadata.get('count') or 0} message(s)"
  45    if kind in {"tool_call", "tool_result", "error"} and metadata.get("step_no"):
  46        title = f"#{metadata.get('step_no')} {title}".strip()
  47    if not body and kind == "artifact" and metadata.get("path"):
  48        body = str(metadata.get("type") or "saved artifact")
  49    if not body and kind == "finding" and metadata.get("category"):
  50        body = str(metadata.get("category") or "")
  51    if not body and kind == "task" and metadata.get("status"):
  52        body = str(metadata.get("status") or "")
  53    if not body and kind == "roadmap" and metadata.get("status"):
  54        body = str(metadata.get("status") or "")
  55    if not body and kind == "milestone_validation" and metadata.get("validation_status"):
  56        body = str(metadata.get("validation_status") or "")
  57    if not body and kind == "experiment":
  58        metric_value = metadata.get("metric_value")
  59        if metric_value is not None:
  60            body = format_metric_value(
  61                metadata.get("metric_name") or "metric",
  62                metric_value,
  63                metadata.get("metric_unit") or "",
  64            )
  65    if kind == "compaction":
  66        body = _one_line(body, min(chars, 140))
  67    if kind == "daemon" and title == "run started":
  68        body = body or str(metadata.get("model") or "")
  69    detail = title if title else kind
  70    if body:
  71        detail = f"{detail} - {body}"
  72    if ref_table and ref_id and full:
  73        detail = f"{detail} [{ref_table}:{ref_id}]"
  74    return when, label, detail, access
  75
  76
  77def event_label(kind: str, metadata: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
  78    if kind == "operator_message":
  79        mode = str(metadata.get("mode") or "")
  80        return "FOLLOW" if mode == "follow_up" else "USER"
  81    if kind == "operator_context":
  82        return "ACK"
  83    if kind == "agent_message":
  84        return "AGENT"
  85    if kind == "roadmap":
  86        return "ROAD"
  87    if kind == "milestone_validation":
  88        return "VALID"
  89    if kind == "tool_call":
  90        return "TOOL"
  91    if kind.startswith("tool_result"):
  92        status = str(metadata.get("status") or "")
  93        if status == "blocked":
  94            return "BLOCK"
  95        if status == "failed" or kind.endswith(":failed"):
  96            return "ERROR"
  97        return "DONE"
  98    labels = {
  99        "artifact": "OUTPUT",
 100        "compaction": "MEMORY",
 101        "daemon": "SYSTEM",
 102        "digest": "DIGEST",
 103        "error": "ERROR",
 104        "experiment": "TEST",
 105        "finding": "FIND",
 106        "lesson": "LEARN",
 107        "reflection": "PLAN",
 108        "source": "SOURCE",
 109        "task": "TASK",
 110    }
 111    return labels.get(kind, kind.upper()[:8])
 112
 113
 114def compact_time(value: str) -> str:
 115    text = value.replace("T", " ")
 116    if len(text) >= 16 and text[4:5] == "-" and text[13:14] == ":":
 117        return text[:16]
 118    return _one_line(text, 16)
nipux_cli/first_run_tui.py 223 lines 
   1"""First-run terminal UI rendering for Nipux."""
   2
   3from __future__ import annotations
   4
   5import textwrap
   6from typing import Any
   7
   8from nipux_cli.config import AppConfig, load_config
   9from nipux_cli.settings import (
  10    config_field_value,
  11    edit_target_hint,
  12    edit_target_label,
  13    edit_target_masks_input,
  14)
  15from nipux_cli.tui_commands import FIRST_RUN_ACTIONS, FIRST_RUN_SLASH_COMMANDS, slash_suggestion_lines
  16from nipux_cli.tui_events import NIPUX_HERO
  17from nipux_cli.tui_layout import _compose_bar, _top_bar, _two_col_line, _two_col_title
  18from nipux_cli.tui_status import frame_jobs_lines
  19from nipux_cli.tui_style import (
  20    _accent,
  21    _bold,
  22    _center_ansi,
  23    _fit_ansi,
  24    _muted,
  25    _one_line,
  26    _style,
  27    _themed_lines,
  28)
  29
  30
  31def build_first_run_frame(
  32    input_buffer: str,
  33    notices: list[str],
  34    *,
  35    width: int,
  36    height: int,
  37    selected: int = 0,
  38    view: str = "start",
  39    editing_field: str | None = None,
  40    config: AppConfig,
  41    daemon_text: str,
  42    jobs: list[dict[str, Any]],
  43    home: str,
  44    config_path: str,
  45) -> str:
  46    width = max(92, width)
  47    height = max(22, height)
  48    header = _top_bar(width, state="setup", daemon=daemon_text, model=config.model.model)
  49    if editing_field:
  50        hint = edit_target_hint(editing_field, config)
  51        prompt_label = edit_target_label(editing_field)
  52    else:
  53        hint = "Type a goal to create a job. / opens commands. ↑↓ moves. Click selects."
  54        prompt_label = "❯"
  55    suggestions = [] if editing_field else slash_suggestion_lines(input_buffer, FIRST_RUN_SLASH_COMMANDS, width=width)
  56    compose_lines = _compose_bar(
  57        input_buffer,
  58        width=width,
  59        hint=hint,
  60        suggestions=suggestions,
  61        prompt_label=prompt_label,
  62        mask_input=edit_target_masks_input(editing_field),
  63    )
  64    footer_rows = len(compose_lines)
  65    body_rows = max(10, height - len(header) - 1 - footer_rows)
  66    left_width, right_width = first_run_columns(width)
  67    left_lines = _first_run_left_lines(
  68        notices,
  69        width=left_width,
  70        rows=body_rows,
  71        view=view,
  72        selected=selected,
  73    )
  74    right_lines = _first_run_right_lines(
  75        jobs=jobs,
  76        daemon_text=daemon_text,
  77        model=config.model.model,
  78        home=home,
  79        config_path=config_path,
  80        selected=selected,
  81        view=view,
  82        width=right_width,
  83        rows=body_rows,
  84    )
  85    lines = [*header, _two_col_title(left_width, right_width, "Nipux Chat", "Workspace")]
  86    for index in range(body_rows):
  87        left = left_lines[index] if index < len(left_lines) else ""
  88        right = right_lines[index] if index < len(right_lines) else ""
  89        lines.append(_two_col_line(left, right, left_width=left_width, right_width=right_width))
  90    lines.extend(compose_lines)
  91    return "\n".join(first_run_themed_lines(lines[:height], width=width))
  92
  93
  94def first_run_columns(width: int) -> tuple[int, int]:
  95    left_width = max(56, int(width * 0.60))
  96    right_width = max(34, width - left_width - 3)
  97    if right_width < 34:
  98        right_width = 34
  99        left_width = max(56, width - right_width - 3)
 100    return left_width, right_width
 101
 102
 103def first_run_themed_lines(lines: list[str], *, width: int) -> list[str]:
 104    return _themed_lines(lines, width=width)
 105
 106
 107def _first_run_left_lines(
 108    notices: list[str],
 109    *,
 110    width: int,
 111    rows: int,
 112    view: str,
 113    selected: int,
 114) -> list[str]:
 115    selected_label = _first_run_actions(view)[_clamp_first_run_selection(selected, view)][1]
 116    if not notices:
 117        content = [
 118            *[_center_ansi(_style(line, "37;1"), width) for line in NIPUX_HERO],
 119            "",
 120            _center_ansi(_muted("A long-running agent harness."), width),
 121            _center_ansi(_muted("Type an objective, or use slash commands for setup."), width),
 122            "",
 123            _center_ansi(f"{_muted('Selected')} {_accent(selected_label)}", width),
 124        ]
 125        top_pad = max(0, (rows - len(content)) // 2 - 1)
 126        return ([""] * top_pad + content)[:rows]
 127    lines = [
 128        _bold("No agent output yet."),
 129        _muted("Create a job from the control pane or type a goal in the input line."),
 130        "",
 131        f"{_muted('Selected')} {_accent(selected_label)}",
 132        "",
 133        f"{_muted('Mode')} {_accent('Start')}",
 134        "",
 135        _muted("After a job exists, this side becomes the agent conversation and output stream."),
 136        "",
 137        _muted("Use arrows, Enter, click, or / commands. The right pane shows jobs and setup."),
 138        "",
 139        _muted("Recent"),
 140    ]
 141    for notice in notices[-6:]:
 142        for wrapped in textwrap.wrap(" ".join(str(notice).split()), width=max(20, width - 4))[:3]:
 143            lines.append(f"{_accent('›')} {wrapped}")
 144    return [_fit_ansi(line, width) for line in lines[:rows]]
 145
 146
 147def _first_run_right_lines(
 148    *,
 149    jobs: list[dict[str, Any]],
 150    daemon_text: str,
 151    model: str,
 152    home: str,
 153    config_path: str,
 154    selected: int,
 155    view: str,
 156    width: int,
 157    rows: int,
 158) -> list[str]:
 159    profile_lines = _first_run_profile_lines(
 160        model=model,
 161        daemon_text=daemon_text,
 162        home=home,
 163        config_path=config_path,
 164        width=width,
 165    )
 166    lines = [
 167        *profile_lines,
 168        _bold("Commands"),
 169        *_first_run_action_lines(_first_run_actions(view), selected, width=width),
 170        "",
 171        _bold("Jobs"),
 172    ]
 173    if jobs:
 174        lines.extend(frame_jobs_lines(jobs, focused_job_id="", daemon_running=False, width=width)[:5])
 175    else:
 176        lines.append(_muted("No saved jobs in this profile."))
 177    return [_fit_ansi(line, width) for line in lines[:rows]]
 178
 179
 180def _first_run_profile_lines(
 181    *,
 182    model: str,
 183    daemon_text: str,
 184    home: str,
 185    config_path: str,
 186    width: int,
 187) -> list[str]:
 188    return [
 189        f"{_muted('Mode')}   {_accent('Start')}",
 190        f"{_muted('Model')}  {_one_line(model, width - 8)}",
 191        f"{_muted('Daemon')} {_one_line(daemon_text, width - 8)}",
 192        f"{_muted('Home')}   {_one_line(home, width - 8)}",
 193        f"{_muted('Config')} {_one_line(config_path, width - 8)}",
 194        "",
 195    ]
 196
 197
 198def _first_run_action_lines(actions: list[tuple[str, str, str]], selected: int, *, width: int) -> list[str]:
 199    lines: list[str] = []
 200    selected = max(0, min(selected, len(actions) - 1)) if actions else 0
 201    for index, (key, label, detail) in enumerate(actions):
 202        marker = _accent("›") if index == selected else _muted(" ")
 203        name = _bold(label) if index == selected else label
 204        if key.startswith("edit:"):
 205            field = key.split(":", 1)[1]
 206            detail = _one_line(str(config_field_value(field)), max(10, width - 18))
 207        elif key == "secret:model.api_key":
 208            config = load_config()
 209            detail = "set" if config.model.api_key else "missing"
 210        lines.append(_fit_ansi(f"{marker} {_fit_ansi(name, 14)} {_muted(detail)}", width))
 211    return lines
 212
 213
 214def _first_run_actions(view: str) -> list[tuple[str, str, str]]:
 215    del view
 216    return FIRST_RUN_ACTIONS
 217
 218
 219def _clamp_first_run_selection(selected: int, view: str) -> int:
 220    actions = _first_run_actions(view)
 221    if not actions:
 222        return 0
 223    return max(0, min(selected, len(actions) - 1))
nipux_cli/frame_snapshot.py 53 lines 
   1"""Data loading contract for the interactive Nipux terminal frame."""
   2
   3from __future__ import annotations
   4
   5from typing import Any
   6
   7from nipux_cli.config import AppConfig
   8from nipux_cli.daemon import daemon_lock_status
   9from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
  10from nipux_cli.tui_events import SUMMARY_EVENT_TYPES
  11
  12
  13def load_frame_snapshot(
  14    db: AgentDB,
  15    config: AppConfig,
  16    job_id: str,
  17    *,
  18    default_job_id: str | None = None,
  19    history_limit: int = 12,
  20) -> dict[str, Any]:
  21    """Return the compact state bundle rendered by the chat TUI."""
  22
  23    resolved_job_id = job_id or default_job_id
  24    job = db.get_job(resolved_job_id)
  25    jobs = db.list_jobs()
  26    token_usage = db.job_token_usage(resolved_job_id)
  27    token_usage["input_cost_per_million"] = config.model.input_cost_per_million
  28    token_usage["output_cost_per_million"] = config.model.output_cost_per_million
  29    return {
  30        "job_id": resolved_job_id,
  31        "job": job,
  32        "jobs": jobs,
  33        "steps": db.list_steps(job_id=resolved_job_id, limit=80),
  34        "artifacts": db.list_artifacts(resolved_job_id, limit=8),
  35        "job_artifacts": {
  36            str(item["id"]): db.list_artifacts(str(item["id"]), limit=3)
  37            for item in jobs[:6]
  38            if item.get("id")
  39        },
  40        "memory_entries": db.list_memory(resolved_job_id)[:8],
  41        "events": db.list_events(job_id=resolved_job_id, limit=max(history_limit * 16, 240)),
  42        "summary_events": db.list_events(
  43            job_id=resolved_job_id,
  44            limit=max(history_limit * 24, 360),
  45            event_types=SUMMARY_EVENT_TYPES,
  46        ),
  47        "daemon": daemon_lock_status(config.runtime.home / "agentd.lock"),
  48        "model": config.model.model,
  49        "base_url": config.model.base_url,
  50        "context_length": config.model.context_length,
  51        "token_usage": token_usage,
  52        "counts": db.job_record_counts(resolved_job_id),
  53    }
nipux_cli/llm.py 260 lines 
   1"""LLM provider adapters for one bounded worker step."""
   2
   3from __future__ import annotations
   4
   5import json
   6import urllib.error
   7import urllib.parse
   8import urllib.request
   9from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  10from typing import Any, Protocol
  11
  12from openai import OpenAI
  13
  14from nipux_cli.config import ModelConfig
  15
  16
  17@dataclass(frozen=True)
  18class ToolCall:
  19    name: str
  20    arguments: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
  21    id: str = ""
  22
  23
  24@dataclass(frozen=True)
  25class LLMResponse:
  26    content: str = ""
  27    tool_calls: list[ToolCall] = field(default_factory=list)
  28    usage: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
  29    model: str = ""
  30    response_id: str = ""
  31
  32
  33class LLMResponseError(RuntimeError):
  34    """Raised when a provider returns an OpenAI-shaped response without choices."""
  35
  36    def __init__(self, message: str, *, payload: dict[str, Any] | None = None):
  37        super().__init__(message)
  38        self.payload = payload or {}
  39
  40
  41class StepLLM(Protocol):
  42    def next_action(self, *, messages: list[dict[str, Any]], tools: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> LLMResponse:
  43        ...
  44
  45
  46class OpenAIChatLLM:
  47    """OpenAI-compatible chat-completions adapter."""
  48
  49    def __init__(self, config: ModelConfig):
  50        self.config = config
  51        headers = {}
  52        if "openrouter.ai" in config.base_url:
  53            headers = {
  54                "HTTP-Referer": "https://github.com/nipuxx/agent-cli",
  55                "X-Title": "Nipux CLI",
  56            }
  57        self._openai = OpenAI(
  58            api_key=config.api_key or "local-no-key",
  59            base_url=config.base_url,
  60            timeout=config.request_timeout_seconds,
  61            default_headers=headers or None,
  62        )
  63
  64    def next_action(self, *, messages: list[dict[str, Any]], tools: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> LLMResponse:
  65        response = self._openai.chat.completions.create(
  66            model=self.config.model,
  67            messages=messages,
  68            tools=tools,
  69        )
  70        choices = response.choices or []
  71        if not choices:
  72            payload = _response_payload(response)
  73            error = payload.get("error") if isinstance(payload.get("error"), dict) else {}
  74            detail = error.get("message") or payload.get("message") or "provider returned no choices"
  75            raise LLMResponseError(str(detail), payload=payload)
  76        message = choices[0].message
  77        calls: list[ToolCall] = []
  78        for call in message.tool_calls or []:
  79            raw_args = call.function.arguments or "{}"
  80            try:
  81                parsed = json.loads(raw_args)
  82            except json.JSONDecodeError:
  83                parsed = {}
  84            calls.append(ToolCall(name=call.function.name, arguments=parsed, id=call.id or ""))
  85        content = message.content or ""
  86        response_id = _response_id(response)
  87        usage = _response_usage(response, messages=messages, content=content, tool_calls=calls)
  88        usage = _enrich_openrouter_generation_usage(
  89            usage,
  90            response_id=response_id,
  91            base_url=self.config.base_url,
  92            api_key=self.config.api_key,
  93        )
  94        return LLMResponse(
  95            content=content,
  96            tool_calls=calls,
  97            usage=usage,
  98            model=_response_model(response),
  99            response_id=response_id,
 100        )
 101
 102    def complete(self, *, messages: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> str:
 103        return self.complete_response(messages=messages).content
 104
 105    def complete_response(self, *, messages: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> LLMResponse:
 106        response = self._openai.chat.completions.create(
 107            model=self.config.model,
 108            messages=messages,
 109        )
 110        choices = response.choices or []
 111        if not choices:
 112            payload = _response_payload(response)
 113            error = payload.get("error") if isinstance(payload.get("error"), dict) else {}
 114            detail = error.get("message") or payload.get("message") or "provider returned no choices"
 115            raise LLMResponseError(str(detail), payload=payload)
 116        content = choices[0].message.content or ""
 117        response_id = _response_id(response)
 118        usage = _response_usage(response, messages=messages, content=content, tool_calls=[])
 119        usage = _enrich_openrouter_generation_usage(
 120            usage,
 121            response_id=response_id,
 122            base_url=self.config.base_url,
 123            api_key=self.config.api_key,
 124        )
 125        return LLMResponse(
 126            content=content,
 127            usage=usage,
 128            model=_response_model(response),
 129            response_id=response_id,
 130        )
 131
 132
 133class ScriptedLLM:
 134    """Tiny deterministic LLM used by smoke tests and CLI dry runs."""
 135
 136    def __init__(self, responses: list[LLMResponse]):
 137        self.responses = list(responses)
 138
 139    def next_action(self, *, messages: list[dict[str, Any]], tools: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> LLMResponse:
 140        del messages, tools
 141        if not self.responses:
 142            return LLMResponse(content="No scripted response left.")
 143        return self.responses.pop(0)
 144
 145
 146def _response_payload(response: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
 147    if hasattr(response, "model_dump"):
 148        dumped = response.model_dump()
 149        return dumped if isinstance(dumped, dict) else {"response": dumped}
 150    if hasattr(response, "to_dict"):
 151        dumped = response.to_dict()
 152        return dumped if isinstance(dumped, dict) else {"response": dumped}
 153    return {"response": repr(response)}
 154
 155
 156def _response_usage(
 157    response: Any,
 158    *,
 159    messages: list[dict[str, Any]],
 160    content: str,
 161    tool_calls: list[ToolCall],
 162) -> dict[str, Any]:
 163    payload = _response_payload(response)
 164    usage = payload.get("usage")
 165    if isinstance(usage, dict):
 166        normalized = dict(usage)
 167        normalized["estimated"] = False
 168        return normalized
 169    usage_obj = getattr(response, "usage", None)
 170    if usage_obj is not None:
 171        dumped = usage_obj.model_dump() if hasattr(usage_obj, "model_dump") else getattr(usage_obj, "__dict__", {})
 172        if isinstance(dumped, dict) and dumped:
 173            normalized = dict(dumped)
 174            normalized["estimated"] = False
 175            return normalized
 176    prompt_tokens = _estimate_token_count(json.dumps(messages, ensure_ascii=False, default=str))
 177    tool_text = json.dumps([{"name": call.name, "arguments": call.arguments} for call in tool_calls], ensure_ascii=False, default=str)
 178    completion_tokens = _estimate_token_count(content + tool_text)
 179    return {
 180        "prompt_tokens": prompt_tokens,
 181        "completion_tokens": completion_tokens,
 182        "total_tokens": prompt_tokens + completion_tokens,
 183        "estimated": True,
 184    }
 185
 186
 187def _enrich_openrouter_generation_usage(
 188    usage: dict[str, Any],
 189    *,
 190    response_id: str,
 191    base_url: str,
 192    api_key: str,
 193) -> dict[str, Any]:
 194    if usage.get("cost") is not None or not response_id or not api_key:
 195        return usage
 196    if "openrouter.ai" not in base_url:
 197        return usage
 198    parsed = urllib.parse.urlparse(base_url)
 199    root = f"{parsed.scheme or 'https'}://{parsed.netloc or 'openrouter.ai'}"
 200    url = f"{root}/api/v1/generation?id={urllib.parse.quote(response_id)}"
 201    request = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}"})
 202    try:
 203        with urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=5) as response:
 204            payload = json.loads(response.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace"))
 205    except (OSError, urllib.error.URLError, urllib.error.HTTPError, json.JSONDecodeError):
 206        return usage
 207    data = payload.get("data") if isinstance(payload, dict) else None
 208    if not isinstance(data, dict):
 209        return usage
 210    enriched = dict(usage)
 211    cost = _safe_float(data.get("total_cost") or data.get("cost"))
 212    if cost is not None:
 213        enriched["cost"] = cost
 214    prompt = _safe_int(data.get("native_tokens_prompt") or data.get("tokens_prompt"))
 215    completion = _safe_int(data.get("native_tokens_completion") or data.get("tokens_completion"))
 216    total = _safe_int(data.get("native_tokens_total") or data.get("tokens_total"))
 217    if prompt is not None:
 218        enriched["prompt_tokens"] = prompt
 219    if completion is not None:
 220        enriched["completion_tokens"] = completion
 221    if total is not None:
 222        enriched["total_tokens"] = total
 223    elif prompt is not None or completion is not None:
 224        enriched["total_tokens"] = int(enriched.get("prompt_tokens") or 0) + int(enriched.get("completion_tokens") or 0)
 225    enriched["estimated"] = bool(enriched.get("estimated")) and cost is None
 226    return enriched
 227
 228
 229def _safe_float(value: Any) -> float | None:
 230    try:
 231        if value in (None, ""):
 232            return None
 233        return float(value)
 234    except (TypeError, ValueError):
 235        return None
 236
 237
 238def _safe_int(value: Any) -> int | None:
 239    try:
 240        if value in (None, ""):
 241            return None
 242        return int(float(value))
 243    except (TypeError, ValueError):
 244        return None
 245
 246
 247def _estimate_token_count(text: str) -> int:
 248    if not text:
 249        return 0
 250    return max(1, (len(text) + 3) // 4)
 251
 252
 253def _response_model(response: Any) -> str:
 254    payload = _response_payload(response)
 255    return str(payload.get("model") or getattr(response, "model", "") or "")
 256
 257
 258def _response_id(response: Any) -> str:
 259    payload = _response_payload(response)
