 924    }, _browser_handler("browser_type")),
 925    ToolSpec("browser_scroll", "Scroll the current page up or down.", {
 926        "type": "object",
 927        "properties": {"direction": {"type": "string", "enum": ["up", "down"]}},
 928        "required": ["direction"],
 929    }, _browser_handler("browser_scroll")),
 930    ToolSpec("browser_back", "Navigate back in browser history.", {"type": "object", "properties": {}, "required": []}, _browser_handler("browser_back")),
 931    ToolSpec("browser_press", "Press a keyboard key in the browser.", {
 932        "type": "object",
 933        "properties": {"key": {"type": "string"}},
 934        "required": ["key"],
 935    }, _browser_handler("browser_press")),
 936    ToolSpec("browser_console", "Read console errors or evaluate JavaScript in the current page.", {
 937        "type": "object",
 938        "properties": {"clear": {"type": "boolean", "default": False}, "expression": {"type": "string"}},
 939        "required": [],
 940    }, _browser_handler("browser_console")),
 941]

 944SUPPORT_SCHEMAS: list[ToolSpec] = [
 945    ToolSpec("web_search", "Search the web for candidate sources.", {
 946        "type": "object",
 947        "properties": {"query": {"type": "string"}, "limit": {"type": "integer", "default": 5}},
 948        "required": ["query"],
 949    }, _web_handler("web_search")),
 950    ToolSpec("web_extract", "Extract markdown text from up to five URLs.", {
 951        "type": "object",
 952        "properties": {"urls": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}, "maxItems": 5}},
 953        "required": ["urls"],
 954    }, _web_handler("web_extract")),
 955    ToolSpec("shell_exec", "Run a local shell command for CLI work. Use small read-only probes first, set timeouts for long commands, and do not run destructive or high-risk cyber commands.", {
 956        "type": "object",
 957        "properties": {
 958            "command": {"type": "string"},
 959            "cwd": {"type": "string"},
 960            "timeout_seconds": {"type": "number", "default": 60},
 961            "max_output_chars": {"type": "integer", "default": 12000},
 962        },
 963        "required": ["command"],
 964    }, _shell_exec),
 965    ToolSpec("write_file", "Create, overwrite, or append a concrete workspace/local file for deliverables, code, documents, configs, or other file outputs.", {
 966        "type": "object",
 967        "properties": {
 968            "path": {"type": "string"},
 969            "content": {"type": "string"},
 970            "mode": {"type": "string", "enum": ["overwrite", "append"], "default": "overwrite"},
 971            "create_parents": {"type": "boolean", "default": True},
 972        },
 973        "required": ["path", "content"],
 974    }, _write_file),
 975    ToolSpec("write_artifact", "Persist important findings, evidence, reports, or checkpoints to the job artifact store.", {

 977        "properties": {
 978            "title": {"type": "string"},

 980            "summary": {"type": "string"},

 982            "metadata": {"type": "object"},

 984        "required": ["content"],

 992            "ref": {"type": "string"},
 993        },
 994        "required": [],
 995    }, _read_artifact),
 996    ToolSpec("search_artifacts", "Search stored artifacts for exact evidence from prior steps.", {
 997        "type": "object",

 999        "required": ["query"],
1000    }, _search_artifacts),
1001    ToolSpec("update_job_state", "Keep the current job runnable. Completion, failure, pausing, and cancellation are operator-only; workers should report checkpoints and continue.", {
1002        "type": "object",

1004            "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["queued", "running"]},
1005            "note": {"type": "string"},
1006        },
1007        "required": ["status"],
1008    }, _update_job_state),
1009    ToolSpec("defer_job", "Wait before the next worker turn for this job. Use for long external processes, monitor/check-later tasks, cooldowns, or scheduled follow-up without completing or pausing the job.", {
1010        "type": "object",
1011        "properties": {
1012            "seconds": {"type": "number", "description": "Delay in seconds before this job is runnable again.", "default": 300},
1013            "until": {"type": "string", "description": "Optional ISO timestamp to resume after."},
1014            "reason": {"type": "string"},
1015            "next_action": {"type": "string"},
1016        },
1017        "required": [],
1018    }, _defer_job),
1019    ToolSpec("report_update", "Leave a short operator-readable progress note. Do not use this instead of write_artifact for durable evidence.", {
1020        "type": "object",
1021        "properties": {
1022            "message": {"type": "string"},
1023            "category": {"type": "string", "enum": ["progress", "finding", "blocked", "plan"], "default": "progress"},
1024            "metadata": {"type": "object"},
1025        },
1026        "required": ["message"],
1027    }, _report_update),

1031            "lesson": {"type": "string"},
1032            "category": {
1033                "type": "string",
1034                "enum": [

1092                        "evidence_artifact": {"type": "string"},

1096                },
1097            },
1098        },
1099        "required": ["findings"],

1101    ToolSpec("record_tasks", "Create or update a durable queue of objective-neutral work branches. Use this to split long jobs into next actions, mark blocked branches, and keep the agent from cycling on one path.", {
1102        "type": "object",
1103        "properties": {
1104            "tasks": {
1105                "type": "array",
1106                "maxItems": 50,
1107                "items": {
1108                    "type": "object",

1111                        "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["open", "active", "done", "blocked", "skipped"], "default": "open"},

1113                        "goal": {"type": "string"},
1114                        "source_hint": {"type": "string"},
1115                        "result": {"type": "string"},
1116                        "parent": {"type": "string"},
1117                        "output_contract": {
1118                            "type": "string",
1119                            "enum": ["research", "artifact", "experiment", "action", "monitor", "decision", "report"],
1120                        },
1121                        "acceptance_criteria": {"type": "string"},
1122                        "evidence_needed": {"type": "string"},
1123                        "stall_behavior": {"type": "string"},
1124                        "metadata": {"type": "object"},
1125                    },
1126                    "required": ["title"],
1127                },
1128            },
1129        },
1130        "required": ["tasks"],
1131    }, _record_tasks),
1132    ToolSpec("record_roadmap", "Create or update a generic roadmap for broad work: milestones, features, success criteria, validation contract, scope, and current roadmap state. Use this before or during long-running work when task lists need higher-level structure.", {
1133        "type": "object",
1134        "properties": {
1135            "title": {"type": "string"},
1136            "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["planned", "active", "validating", "done", "blocked", "paused"], "default": "planned"},
1137            "objective": {"type": "string"},

1139            "current_milestone": {"type": "string"},

1141            "milestones": {
1142                "type": "array",
1143                "maxItems": 100,
1144                "items": {
1145                    "type": "object",

1147                        "key": {"type": "string"},
1148                        "title": {"type": "string"},
1149                        "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["planned", "active", "validating", "done", "blocked", "skipped"], "default": "planned"},
1150                        "priority": {"type": "integer", "default": 0},
1151                        "goal": {"type": "string"},
1152                        "acceptance_criteria": {"type": "string"},
1153                        "evidence_needed": {"type": "string"},
1154                        "validation_status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["not_started", "pending", "passed", "failed", "blocked"], "default": "not_started"},
1155                        "validation_result": {"type": "string"},
1156                        "next_action": {"type": "string"},
1157                        "features": {
1158                            "type": "array",
1159                            "maxItems": 100,
1160                            "items": {
1161                                "type": "object",
1162                                "properties": {
1163                                    "key": {"type": "string"},
1164                                    "title": {"type": "string"},
1165                                    "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["planned", "active", "done", "blocked", "skipped"], "default": "planned"},
1166                                    "goal": {"type": "string"},
1167                                    "output_contract": {"type": "string", "enum": ["research", "artifact", "experiment", "action", "monitor", "decision", "report", "validation"]},
1168                                    "acceptance_criteria": {"type": "string"},
1169                                    "evidence_needed": {"type": "string"},
1170                                    "result": {"type": "string"},
1171                                    "metadata": {"type": "object"},
1172                                },
1173                                "required": ["title"],
1174                            },
1175                        },
1176                        "metadata": {"type": "object"},
1177                    },
1178                    "required": ["title"],
1179                },
1180            },
1181            "metadata": {"type": "object"},
1182        },
1183        "required": ["title"],
1184    }, _record_roadmap),
1185    ToolSpec("record_milestone_validation", "Record validation for a roadmap milestone and optionally create follow-up tasks for gaps. Use fresh evidence, acceptance criteria, and clear pass/fail/blocker reasons.", {
1186        "type": "object",
1187        "properties": {
1188            "milestone": {"type": "string"},
1189            "validation_status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["pending", "passed", "failed", "blocked"], "default": "pending"},
1190            "result": {"type": "string"},
1191            "evidence": {"type": "string"},
1192            "issues": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
1193            "next_action": {"type": "string"},
1194            "follow_up_tasks": {
1195                "type": "array",
1196                "maxItems": 25,
1197                "items": {
1198                    "type": "object",
1199                    "properties": {
1200                        "title": {"type": "string"},
1201                        "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["open", "active", "done", "blocked", "skipped"], "default": "open"},
1202                        "priority": {"type": "integer", "default": 0},
1203                        "goal": {"type": "string"},
1204                        "source_hint": {"type": "string"},
1205                        "result": {"type": "string"},
1206                        "parent": {"type": "string"},
1207                        "output_contract": {"type": "string", "enum": ["research", "artifact", "experiment", "action", "monitor", "decision", "report"]},
1208                        "acceptance_criteria": {"type": "string"},
1209                        "evidence_needed": {"type": "string"},
1210                        "stall_behavior": {"type": "string"},
1211                        "metadata": {"type": "object"},
1212                    },
1213                    "required": ["title"],
1214                },
1215            },
1216            "metadata": {"type": "object"},
1217        },
1218        "required": ["milestone", "validation_status"],
1219    }, _record_milestone_validation),
1220    ToolSpec("record_experiment", "Track a measurable trial, benchmark, comparison, hypothesis test, or optimization attempt. Use this after any command or source produces a concrete result so future steps compare against the best observed result instead of treating notes as progress.", {
1221        "type": "object",
1222        "properties": {
1223            "title": {"type": "string"},
1224            "hypothesis": {"type": "string"},
1225            "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["planned", "running", "measured", "failed", "blocked", "skipped"], "default": "planned"},
1226            "metric_name": {"type": "string"},
1227            "metric_value": {"type": "number"},
1228            "metric_unit": {"type": "string"},
1229            "higher_is_better": {"type": "boolean", "default": True},
1230            "baseline_value": {"type": "number"},
1231            "config": {"type": "object"},
1232            "result": {"type": "string"},
1233            "evidence_artifact": {"type": "string"},
1234            "next_action": {"type": "string"},
1235            "metadata": {"type": "object"},
1236        },
1237        "required": ["title"],
1238    }, _record_experiment),
1239    ToolSpec("send_digest_email", "Send or dry-run a digest email and save the body as an artifact.", {
1240        "type": "object",
1241        "properties": {"subject": {"type": "string"}, "body": {"type": "string"}, "to_addr": {"type": "string"}},
1242        "required": ["body"],
1243    }, _send_digest_email),
1244]
1245
1246
1247APPROVED_TOOL_NAMES = tuple(spec.name for spec in [*BROWSER_SCHEMAS, *SUPPORT_SCHEMAS])
1248
1249
1250class ToolRegistry:
1251    def __init__(self, specs: list[ToolSpec] | None = None):
1252        self._specs = {spec.name: spec for spec in (specs or [*BROWSER_SCHEMAS, *SUPPORT_SCHEMAS])}
1253
1254    def names(self) -> list[str]:
1255        return sorted(self._specs)
1256
1257    def openai_tools(self) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
1258        return [self._specs[name].as_openai_tool() for name in self.names()]
1259
1260    def handle(self, name: str, args: dict[str, Any], ctx: ToolContext) -> str:
1261        if name not in self._specs:
1262            return _json({"success": False, "error": f"unknown tool: {name}"})
1263        return self._specs[name].handler(args, ctx)
1264
1265
1266DEFAULT_REGISTRY = ToolRegistry()

   8FIRST_RUN_SLASH_COMMANDS = [

 102
 103SLASH_ARGUMENT_HINTS = {
 104    "new": "OBJECTIVE",
 105    "focus": "JOB_TITLE",
 106    "switch": "JOB_TITLE",
 107    "delete": "JOB_TITLE",
 108    "history": "LIMIT",
 109    "events": "LIMIT",
 110    "outputs": "LIMIT",
 111    "artifact": "QUERY_OR_ID",
 112    "work": "N",
 113    "work-verbose": "N",
 114    "learn": "LESSON",
 115    "note": "MESSAGE",
 116    "follow": "MESSAGE",
 117    **{command: placeholder for command, (_field, placeholder) in CHAT_SETTING_COMMANDS.items()},
 118    "api-key": "KEY",
 119    "key": "KEY",
 120}
 121
 122
 123def slash_suggestion_lines(
 124    input_buffer: str,
 125    commands: list[tuple[str, str]],
 126    *,
 127    width: int,
 128    limit: int = 5,
 129) -> list[str]:
 130    if not input_buffer.startswith("/"):
 131        return []
 132    parts = input_buffer[1:].split(maxsplit=1)
 133    token = parts[0].lower() if parts else ""
 134    if " " in input_buffer[1:]:
 135        hint = SLASH_ARGUMENT_HINTS.get(token)
 136        description = next((desc for cmd, desc in commands if cmd == f"/{token}"), "")
 137        if not hint:
 138            return []
 139        body = f"{_accent('/' + token)} {_muted(hint)}"
 140        if description:
 141            body += f"  {_muted(description)}"
 142        return [
 143            _fit_ansi(_muted("╭─ command"), width),
 144            _fit_ansi(_muted("│ ") + body, width),
 145            _fit_ansi(_muted("╰─ enter sends"), width),
 146        ]
 147    matches = [(cmd, desc) for cmd, desc in commands if cmd[1:].startswith(token)]
 148    if not matches and token:
 149        matches = [(cmd, desc) for cmd, desc in commands if token in cmd[1:]]
 150    matches = matches[:limit]
 151    if not matches:
 152        return [
 153            _fit_ansi(_muted("╭─ commands"), width),
 154            _fit_ansi(_muted("│ no matches"), width),
 155            _fit_ansi(_muted("╰"), width),
 156        ]
 157    cmd_width = min(14, max(len(cmd) for cmd, _ in matches) + 2)
 158    lines = [_fit_ansi(_muted("╭─ commands"), width)]
 159    for index, (cmd, desc) in enumerate(matches):
 160        marker = _accent("›") if index == 0 else _muted(" ")
 161        hint = SLASH_ARGUMENT_HINTS.get(cmd[1:])
 162        command_text = cmd if not hint else f"{cmd} {hint}"
 163        command_width = cmd_width + (len(hint) + 1 if hint else 0)
 164        body = f"{marker} {_fit_ansi(_accent(command_text), command_width)} {_muted(desc)}"
 165        lines.append(_fit_ansi(_muted("│ ") + body, width))
 166    lines.append(_fit_ansi(_muted("╰─ tab completes first match"), width))
 167    return lines
 168
 169
 170def autocomplete_slash(input_buffer: str, commands: list[tuple[str, str]]) -> str:
 171    if not input_buffer.startswith("/") or " " in input_buffer.strip():
 172        return input_buffer
 173    token = input_buffer[1:].lower()
 174    matches = [cmd for cmd, _desc in commands if cmd[1:].startswith(token)]
 175    if not matches:
 176        matches = [cmd for cmd, _desc in commands if token in cmd[1:]]
 177    if not matches:
 178        return input_buffer
 179    return matches[0] + " "
nipux_cli/tui_events.py 742 lines 
   1"""Compact event rendering helpers for the Nipux terminal UI."""
   2
   3from __future__ import annotations

   5import os
   6import re
   7import shlex
   8import textwrap
   9from pathlib import Path
  10from typing import Any

  13from nipux_cli.tui_style import (
  14    _accent,
  15    _bold,
  16    _center_ansi,
  17    _event_badge,
  18    _fit_ansi,
  19    _muted,
  20    _one_line,
  21    _page_indicator,
  22    _strip_ansi,
  23    _style,
  24)

  27CHAT_RIGHT_PAGES = [("status", "Status"), ("updates", "Outcomes"), ("work", "Work")]

  31    "| \\ | |_ _|  _ \\| | | \\ \\/ /",
  32    "|  \\| || || |_) | | | |>  < ",
  33    "| |\\  || ||  __/| |_| /_/\\_\\",
  34    "|_| \\_|___|_|    \\___/      ",
