 504            base_budget = PROMPT_SECTION_BUDGETS.get(title, SECTION_ITEM_CHARS)
 505            budget = max(260, int(base_budget * scale))
 506            parts.append(f"{title}:\n{_clip_text(body, budget)}")
 507        parts.append(instruction)
 508        content = "\n\n".join(parts)
 509        if len(content) <= MAX_WORKER_PROMPT_CHARS or scale <= 0.45:
 510            break
 511        scale -= 0.12
 512    if len(content) <= MAX_WORKER_PROMPT_CHARS:
 513        return content
 514    suffix_sections: list[str] = []
 515    for title, body in sections:
 516        if title == "Operator context":
 517            suffix_sections.append(f"Operator context:\n{_clip_text(body, 900)}")
 518        elif title == "Next-action constraint":
 519            suffix_sections.append(f"Next-action constraint:\n{_clip_text(body, 900)}")
 520    suffix = "\n\n".join(suffix_sections + [instruction])
 521    marker = "\n\n...[middle context clipped; operator context and next action repeated below]...\n"
 522    head_budget = max(0, MAX_WORKER_PROMPT_CHARS - len(suffix) - len(marker))
 523    return _clip_text(content, head_budget) + marker + suffix
 524
 525
 526def _operator_messages_for_prompt(
 527    job: dict[str, Any],
 528    *,
 529    active_messages: list[dict[str, Any]] | None = None,
 530    include_unclaimed: bool = True,
 531) -> str:
 532    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
 533    messages = metadata.get("operator_messages") if isinstance(metadata.get("operator_messages"), list) else []
 534    lines = []
 535    active_messages = active_prompt_operator_entries(active_messages or [])
 536    active_ids = {active.get("event_id") for active in active_messages if isinstance(active, dict)}
 537    if active_messages:
 538        lines.append("Newly delivered operator messages for this turn:")
 539    for entry in active_messages:
 540        line = _operator_message_line(entry)
 541        if line:
 542            lines.append(line)
 543    active_context = [
 544        entry
 545        for entry in messages
 546        if isinstance(entry, dict)
 547        and operator_entry_is_prompt_relevant(entry)
 548        and (include_unclaimed or entry.get("claimed_at") or str(entry.get("mode") or "steer") == "note")
 549        and entry.get("event_id") not in active_ids
 550    ]
 551    if active_context:
 552        if lines:
 553            lines.append("Still-active durable operator context:")
 554        for entry in active_context[-6:]:
 555            line = _operator_message_line(entry)
 556            if line:
 557                lines.append(line)
 558    return "\n".join(lines) if lines else "No active operator context."
 559
 560
 561def _acknowledge_non_prompt_operator_context(db: AgentDB, job_id: str) -> int:
 562    job = db.get_job(job_id)
 563    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
 564    messages = metadata.get("operator_messages") if isinstance(metadata.get("operator_messages"), list) else []
 565    message_ids = inactive_prompt_operator_ids(messages)
 566    if not message_ids:
 567        return 0
 568    result = db.acknowledge_operator_messages(
 569        job_id,
 570        message_ids=message_ids,
 571        summary="conversation-only message retained in history, not used as worker constraint",
 572    )
 573    return int(result.get("count") or 0)
 574
 575
 576def _operator_message_line(entry: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 577    if not isinstance(entry, dict):
 578        return ""
 579    at = str(entry.get("at") or "")
 580    source = str(entry.get("source") or "operator")
 581    mode = str(entry.get("mode") or "steer")
 582    event_id = str(entry.get("event_id") or "")
 583    message = " ".join(str(entry.get("message") or "").split())
 584    if message:
 585        states = []
 586        if entry.get("claimed_at"):
 587            states.append("delivered")
 588        if entry.get("acknowledged_at"):
 589            states.append("acknowledged")
 590        if entry.get("superseded_at"):
 591            states.append("superseded")
 592        state_text = f" ({', '.join(states)})" if states else ""
 593        id_text = f" id={event_id}" if event_id else ""
 594        return f"-{id_text} {at} {source} {mode}{state_text}: {_clip_text(message, 420)}"
 595    return ""
 596
 597
 598def _lessons_for_prompt(job: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 599    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
 600    lessons = metadata.get("lessons") if isinstance(metadata.get("lessons"), list) else []
 601    if not lessons:
 602        return "No durable lessons yet."
 603    lines = []
 604    for entry in lessons[-5:]:
 605        if not isinstance(entry, dict):
 606            continue
 607        category = str(entry.get("category") or "memory")
 608        lesson = " ".join(str(entry.get("lesson") or "").split())
 609        if lesson:
 610            lines.append(f"- {category}: {_clip_text(lesson, SECTION_ITEM_CHARS)}")
 611    return "\n".join(lines) if lines else "No durable lessons yet."
 612
 613
 614def _roadmap_for_prompt(job: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 615    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
 616    roadmap = metadata.get("roadmap") if isinstance(metadata.get("roadmap"), dict) else {}
 617    if not roadmap:
 618        return (
 619            "No roadmap yet. If the objective is broad, multi-phase, or needs validation checkpoints, "
 620            "use record_roadmap to define compact milestones, features, acceptance criteria, and validation evidence."
 621        )
 622    milestones = roadmap.get("milestones") if isinstance(roadmap.get("milestones"), list) else []
 623    status_counts: dict[str, int] = {}
 624    validation_counts: dict[str, int] = {}
 625    for milestone in milestones:
 626        if not isinstance(milestone, dict):
 627            continue
 628        status = str(milestone.get("status") or "planned")
 629        validation_status = str(milestone.get("validation_status") or "not_started")
 630        status_counts[status] = status_counts.get(status, 0) + 1
 631        validation_counts[validation_status] = validation_counts.get(validation_status, 0) + 1
 632    lines = [
 633        _clip_text(
 634            f"{roadmap.get('status') or 'planned'}: {roadmap.get('title') or 'Roadmap'}"
 635            + (f" | current={roadmap.get('current_milestone')}" if roadmap.get("current_milestone") else ""),
 636            520,
 637        ),
 638        "Milestone counts: " + (", ".join(f"{key}={value}" for key, value in sorted(status_counts.items())) or "none"),
 639        "Validation counts: " + (", ".join(f"{key}={value}" for key, value in sorted(validation_counts.items())) or "none"),
 640    ]
 641    if roadmap.get("scope"):
 642        lines.append("Scope: " + _clip_text(str(roadmap.get("scope") or ""), 420))
 643    if roadmap.get("validation_contract"):
 644        lines.append("Validation contract: " + _clip_text(str(roadmap.get("validation_contract") or ""), 520))
 645    selected = [
 646        milestone for milestone in milestones
 647        if isinstance(milestone, dict)
 648        and str(milestone.get("status") or "planned") in {"active", "validating", "planned", "blocked"}
 649    ][:6]
 650    if not selected:
 651        selected = [milestone for milestone in milestones if isinstance(milestone, dict)][-4:]
 652    for milestone in selected[:6]:
 653        features = milestone.get("features") if isinstance(milestone.get("features"), list) else []
 654        open_features = sum(1 for feature in features if isinstance(feature, dict) and str(feature.get("status") or "planned") in {"planned", "active"})
 655        detail = " | ".join(
 656            bit
 657            for bit in [
 658                str(milestone.get("status") or "planned"),
 659                f"validation={milestone.get('validation_status') or 'not_started'}",
 660                f"p={milestone.get('priority') or 0}",
 661                str(milestone.get("title") or "milestone"),
 662                f"features={len(features)}/{open_features} open" if features else "",
 663            ]
 664            if bit
 665        )
 666        if milestone.get("acceptance_criteria"):
 667            detail += f" | accept={milestone.get('acceptance_criteria')}"
 668        if milestone.get("evidence_needed"):
 669            detail += f" | evidence={milestone.get('evidence_needed')}"
 670        if milestone.get("validation_result"):
 671            detail += f" | validation_result={milestone.get('validation_result')}"
 672        if milestone.get("next_action"):
 673            detail += f" | next={milestone.get('next_action')}"
 674        lines.append("- " + _clip_text(detail, 620))
 675    return "\n".join(lines)
 676
 677
 678def _metadata_list(job: dict[str, Any], key: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 679    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
 680    values = metadata.get(key)
 681    if not isinstance(values, list):
 682        return []
 683    return [value for value in values if isinstance(value, dict)]
 684
 685
 686def _tasks_for_prompt(job: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 687    tasks = _metadata_list(job, "task_queue")
 688    if not tasks:
 689        return (
 690            "No durable task queue yet. If the objective is broad, use record_tasks "
 691            "to create a few concrete open branches with output contracts and acceptance criteria before continuing."
 692        )
 693    status_rank = {"active": 0, "open": 1, "blocked": 2, "done": 3, "skipped": 4}
 694    ranked = sorted(
 695        tasks,
 696        key=lambda task: (status_rank.get(str(task.get("status") or "open"), 9), -_as_int(task.get("priority"))),
 697    )
 698    counts: dict[str, int] = {}
 699    for task in tasks:
 700        status = str(task.get("status") or "open")
 701        counts[status] = counts.get(status, 0) + 1
 702    lines = ["Task counts: " + ", ".join(f"{key}={value}" for key, value in sorted(counts.items()))]
 703    selected = [task for task in ranked if str(task.get("status") or "open") in {"active", "open"}][:6]
 704    if len(selected) < 6:
 705        selected.extend([task for task in ranked if str(task.get("status") or "open") == "blocked"][: 6 - len(selected)])
 706    if len(selected) < 6:
 707        selected.extend([task for task in ranked if task not in selected][: 6 - len(selected)])
 708    for task in selected[:6]:
 709        bits = [
 710            str(task.get("status") or "open"),
 711            f"priority={task.get('priority') or 0}",
 712            str(task.get("title") or "untitled"),
 713        ]
 714        if task.get("output_contract"):
 715            bits.append(f"contract={task.get('output_contract')}")
 716        detail = " | ".join(bit for bit in bits if bit)
 717        if task.get("goal"):
 718            detail += f" | goal={task.get('goal')}"
 719        if task.get("acceptance_criteria"):
 720            detail += f" | accept={task.get('acceptance_criteria')}"
 721        if task.get("evidence_needed"):
 722            detail += f" | evidence={task.get('evidence_needed')}"
 723        if task.get("stall_behavior"):
 724            detail += f" | stall={task.get('stall_behavior')}"
 725        if task.get("source_hint"):
 726            detail += f" | source_hint={task.get('source_hint')}"
 727        if task.get("result"):
 728            detail += f" | result={task.get('result')}"
 729        lines.append("- " + _clip_text(detail, 520))
 730    return "\n".join(lines)
 731
 732
 733def _timeline_for_prompt(events: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> str:
 734    if not events:
 735        return "No timeline events yet."
 736    selected: list[tuple[str, str, str]] = []
 737    counts: dict[str, int] = {}
 738    for event in events:
 739        rendered = _timeline_event_for_prompt(event)
 740        if not rendered:
 741            continue
 742        at, event_type, detail = rendered
 743        counts[event_type] = counts.get(event_type, 0) + 1
 744        selected.append((at, event_type, detail))
 745    if not selected:
 746        return "No high-signal timeline events yet. Recent state covers raw tool activity."
 747    summary = ", ".join(f"{key}={value}" for key, value in sorted(counts.items()))
 748    lines = [f"High-signal timeline counts: {summary}"]
 749    for at, event_type, detail in selected[-TIMELINE_PROMPT_EVENTS:]:
 750        prefix = f"- {at} {event_type}: " if at else f"- {event_type}: "
 751        lines.append(prefix + _clip_text(detail, SECTION_ITEM_CHARS))
 752    return "\n".join(lines)
 753
 754
 755def _timeline_event_for_prompt(event: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[str, str, str] | None:
 756    event_type = str(event.get("event_type") or "event")
 757    if event_type == "operator_message":
 758        return None
 759    title = " ".join(str(event.get("title") or "").split())
 760    body = " ".join(str(event.get("body") or "").split())
 761    metadata = event.get("metadata") if isinstance(event.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
 762    title_lower = title.lower()
 763    if event_type == "tool_result":
 764        status = str(metadata.get("status") or "").lower()
 765        if status not in TIMELINE_PROMPT_TOOL_STATUSES:
 766            return None
 767    elif event_type == "agent_message":
 768        if title_lower not in TIMELINE_PROMPT_AGENT_TITLES:
 769            return None
 770    elif event_type not in TIMELINE_PROMPT_EVENT_TYPES:
 771        return None
 772    at = str(event.get("created_at") or "")
 773    detail = title if title else event_type
 774    if body:
 775        detail = f"{detail}: {body}"
 776    if event_type == "tool_result":
 777        status = str(metadata.get("status") or "").lower()
 778        detail = f"{status} {detail}".strip()
 779    return at, event_type, detail
 780
 781
 782def _as_float(value: Any, default: float = 0.0) -> float:
 783    try:
 784        return float(value)
 785    except (TypeError, ValueError):
 786        return default
 787
 788
 789def _as_int(value: Any, default: int = 0) -> int:
 790    try:
 791        return int(value)
 792    except (TypeError, ValueError):
 793        return default
 794
 795
 796def _ledgers_for_prompt(job: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 797    findings = _metadata_list(job, "finding_ledger")
 798    sources = _metadata_list(job, "source_ledger")
 799    lines = [
 800        f"Finding ledger: {len(findings)} unique candidates.",
 801        f"Source ledger: {len(sources)} scored sources.",
 802    ]
 803    if findings:
 804        lines.append("Recent findings:")
 805        for finding in findings[-5:]:
 806            bits = [
 807                str(finding.get("name") or "unknown"),
 808                str(finding.get("category") or "").strip(),
 809                str(finding.get("location") or "").strip(),
 810                f"score={finding.get('score')}" if finding.get("score") is not None else "",
 811            ]
 812            lines.append("- " + _clip_text(" | ".join(bit for bit in bits if bit), 360))
 813    if sources:
 814        usable_sources = [
 815            source
 816            for source in sources
 817            if _as_float(source.get("usefulness_score")) >= 0.2
 818            or _as_int(source.get("yield_count")) > 0
 819        ]
 820        low_quality_sources = [
 821            source
 822            for source in sources
 823            if _as_float(source.get("usefulness_score")) < 0.2
 824            and _as_int(source.get("yield_count")) <= 0
 825            and (_as_int(source.get("fail_count")) > 0 or source.get("warnings"))
 826        ]
 827        ranked = sorted(
 828            usable_sources,
 829            key=lambda item: (_as_float(item.get("usefulness_score")), _as_int(item.get("yield_count"))),
 830            reverse=True,
 831        )
 832        if ranked:
 833            lines.append("High-yield/current sources:")
 834            for source in ranked[:4]:
 835                lines.append(
 836                    "- "
 837                    + _clip_text(
 838                        f"{source.get('source')} type={source.get('source_type') or 'unknown'} "
 839                        f"score={source.get('usefulness_score')} findings={source.get('yield_count') or 0} "
 840                        f"fails={source.get('fail_count') or 0} outcome={source.get('last_outcome') or ''}",
 841                        420,
 842                    )
 843                )
 844        if low_quality_sources:
 845            lines.append("Low-yield/blocked source patterns to avoid:")
 846            for source in low_quality_sources[-3:]:
 847                lines.append(
 848                    "- "
 849                    + _clip_text(
 850                        f"{source.get('source')} type={source.get('source_type') or 'unknown'} "
 851                        f"score={source.get('usefulness_score')} fails={source.get('fail_count') or 0} "
 852                        f"warnings={', '.join(source.get('warnings') or [])} outcome={source.get('last_outcome') or ''}",
 853                        420,
 854                    )
 855                )
 856    return "\n".join(lines)
 857
 858
 859def _experiments_for_prompt(job: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 860    experiments = _metadata_list(job, "experiment_ledger")
 861    if not experiments:
 862        return (
 863            "No experiments tracked yet. If this objective involves improving, "
 864            "comparing, benchmarking, reducing, increasing, or otherwise measuring something, "
 865            "turn candidate ideas into record_experiment entries with exact config, metric, result, and next action."
 866        )
 867    measured = [experiment for experiment in experiments if experiment.get("metric_value") is not None]
 868    best = [
 869        experiment
 870        for experiment in measured
 871        if bool(experiment.get("best_observed"))
 872    ]
 873    status_counts: dict[str, int] = {}
 874    for experiment in experiments:
 875        status = str(experiment.get("status") or "planned")
 876        status_counts[status] = status_counts.get(status, 0) + 1
 877    lines = [
 878        f"Experiment counts: {', '.join(f'{key}={value}' for key, value in sorted(status_counts.items()))}.",
 879        f"Measured results: {len(measured)}.",
 880    ]
 881    if best:
 882        lines.append("Best observed results:")
 883        for experiment in best[-3:]:
 884            metric = format_metric_value(
 885                experiment.get("metric_name") or "metric",
 886                experiment.get("metric_value"),
 887                experiment.get("metric_unit") or "",
 888            )
 889            lines.append(
 890                "- "
 891                + _clip_text(" | ".join(
 892                    bit
 893                    for bit in [
 894                        str(experiment.get("title") or "experiment"),
 895                        metric,
 896                        f"result={experiment.get('result')}" if experiment.get("result") else "",
 897                        f"next={experiment.get('next_action')}" if experiment.get("next_action") else "",
 898                    ]
 899                    if bit
 900                ), 520)
 901            )
 902    recent = experiments[-4:]
 903    if recent:
 904        lines.append("Recent experiments:")
 905        for experiment in recent:
 906            metric = ""
 907            if experiment.get("metric_value") is not None:
 908                metric = format_metric_value(
 909                    experiment.get("metric_name") or "metric",
 910                    experiment.get("metric_value"),
 911                    experiment.get("metric_unit") or "",
 912                )
 913            delta = ""
 914            if experiment.get("delta_from_previous_best") is not None:
 915                delta = f"delta={experiment.get('delta_from_previous_best')}"
 916            lines.append(
 917                "- "
 918                + _clip_text(" | ".join(
 919                    bit
 920                    for bit in [
 921                        str(experiment.get("status") or "planned"),
 922                        str(experiment.get("title") or "experiment"),
 923                        metric,
 924                        delta,
 925                        f"next={experiment.get('next_action')}" if experiment.get("next_action") else "",
 926                    ]
 927                    if bit
 928                ), 520)
 929            )
 930    return "\n".join(lines)
 931
 932
 933def _measured_progress_guard_for_prompt(job: dict[str, Any], recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> str:
 934    context = _measured_progress_guard_context(job, recent_steps)
 935    if not context:
 936        return "None."
 937    if _as_int(context.get("shell_actions_since_last_experiment")) >= _as_int(context.get("shell_action_budget")):
 938        return (
 939            "This objective or active task is measurably framed, and the shell/action budget since the last experiment "
 940            f"is exhausted. completed_since_last_experiment={context.get('completed_since_last_experiment')} "
 941            f"shell_actions={context.get('shell_actions_since_last_experiment')} shell_budget={context.get('shell_action_budget')} "
 942            f"reason={context.get('reason')}. Do not call shell_exec or do more research next. Use record_experiment "
 943            "for a known result, record_tasks to create a missing experiment/monitor branch, or record_lesson if the "
 944            "branch is blocked or the recent outputs were not valid measurements."
 945        )
 946    return (
 947        "This objective or active task is measurably framed, but recent work has not produced "
 948        f"new experiment records. completed_since_last_experiment={context.get('completed_since_last_experiment')} "
 949        f"research_budget={context.get('research_budget')} shell_actions={context.get('shell_actions_since_last_experiment')} "
 950        f"shell_budget={context.get('shell_action_budget')} reason={context.get('reason')}. "
 951        "Next useful actions: run a small measuring action, call record_experiment for a known result, "
 952        "or use record_tasks to create an experiment/action/monitor task with acceptance criteria and evidence."
 953    )
 954
 955
 956def _measurement_obligation_for_prompt(job: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 957    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
 958    obligation = metadata.get("pending_measurement_obligation")
 959    if not isinstance(obligation, dict) or not obligation or obligation.get("resolved_at"):
 960        return "None."
 961    candidates = obligation.get("metric_candidates") if isinstance(obligation.get("metric_candidates"), list) else []
 962    lines = [
 963        f"source_step=#{obligation.get('source_step_no') or '?'} tool={obligation.get('tool') or ''}",
 964        f"summary={obligation.get('summary') or ''}",
 965    ]
 966    command = str(obligation.get("command") or "")
 967    if command:
 968        lines.append(f"command={_clip_text(command, 360)}")
 969    if candidates:
 970        lines.append("metric_candidates=" + "; ".join(str(item) for item in candidates[:6]))
 971    lines.append(
 972        "Before more research or artifact churn, call record_experiment with the measured result, "
 973        "record_lesson explaining why it is not a valid measurement, or record_tasks to create the missing measurement branch."
 974    )
 975    return "\n".join(lines)
 976
 977
 978def _progress_accounting_for_prompt(recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> str:
 979    context = _artifact_accounting_context(recent_steps)
 980    if not context:
 981        return "None."
 982    return (
 983        "Recent saved outputs need accounting before more output/research. "
 984        f"artifact_count={context.get('artifact_count')} since_step={context.get('since_step')} "
 985        f"artifact_titles={'; '.join(str(title) for title in context.get('artifact_titles', [])[:4])}. "
 986        "Next use record_tasks or record_roadmap to mark progress/reopen branches, "
 987        "record_findings or record_source for reusable evidence, record_experiment for measured results, "
 988        "record_milestone_validation for milestone checks, or record_lesson if these outputs are not useful."
 989    )
 990
 991
 992def _activity_stagnation_for_prompt(job: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 993    context = _activity_stagnation_context(job)
 994    if not context:
 995        return "None."
 996    return (
 997        "Recent checkpoints have reported activity without durable progress. "
 998        f"activity_checkpoint_streak={context.get('streak')} threshold={context.get('threshold')} "
 999        f"last_counts={context.get('counts')}. "
1000        "Next classify the branch with record_findings, record_source, record_experiment, record_tasks, "
1001        "record_roadmap, record_milestone_validation, or record_lesson. If the branch is low-yield, mark it "
1002        "blocked/skipped and pivot before doing more read-only work or saving more outputs."
1003    )
1004
1005
1006def _reflections_for_prompt(job: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
1007    reflections = _metadata_list(job, "reflections")
1008    if not reflections:
1009        return "No reflection checkpoints yet."
1010    lines = []
1011    for reflection in reflections[-2:]:
1012        strategy = f" strategy={reflection.get('strategy')}" if reflection.get("strategy") else ""
1013        lines.append("- " + _clip_text(f"{reflection.get('summary')}{strategy}", 520))
1014    return "\n".join(lines)
1015
1016
1017def _next_action_constraint(job: dict[str, Any], recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> str:
1018    measurement_obligation = _pending_measurement_obligation(job)
1019    if measurement_obligation:
1020        return (
1021            "A pending measurement obligation is active from "
1022            f"step #{measurement_obligation.get('source_step_no') or '?'}. "
1023            "Resolve it with record_experiment, record_lesson explaining why it is invalid, "
1024            "or record_tasks creating the missing measurement branch before more research/artifact churn."
1025        )
1026    artifact_accounting = _artifact_accounting_context(recent_steps)
1027    if artifact_accounting:
1028        return (
1029            "Recent saved outputs need durable accounting. Before more artifact writing, reading, research, browsing, "
1030            "or shell work, use record_tasks, record_roadmap, record_milestone_validation, record_findings, record_source, record_experiment, or record_lesson "
1031            "to explain what changed and what branch is next."
1032        )
1033    measured_guard = _measured_progress_guard_context(job, recent_steps)
1034    if measured_guard:
1035        return (
1036            "This job needs measured progress, not more research-only activity. "
1037            "Do one of: run a small measuring command/action, call record_experiment for a known measurement, "
1038            "record_tasks with an experiment/action/monitor contract, or record_lesson if measurement is blocked."
1039        )
1040    activity_stagnation = _activity_stagnation_context(job)
1041    if activity_stagnation:
1042        return (
1043            "Recent checkpoints show activity without durable progress. "
1044            "Use a ledger or planning tool to classify what changed, reject the low-yield branch, or open a better branch "
1045            "before more read-only work or output churn."
1046        )
1047    experiment_next_action = _latest_experiment_next_action_context(job)
1048    if experiment_next_action:
1049        return (
1050            "The latest measured experiment selected a concrete next action. "
1051            f"Next action: {_clip_text(experiment_next_action.get('next_action') or '', 520)}. "
1052            "Act on it with the appropriate tool, or use record_tasks/record_lesson if it is invalid or blocked. "
1053            "Do not bury it under more checkpoints or unrelated research."
1054        )
1055    milestone_validation = _milestone_validation_needed(job)
1056    if milestone_validation:
1057        return (
1058            f"Roadmap milestone '{milestone_validation.get('title')}' is ready for validation or is marked validating. "
1059            "Use record_milestone_validation with evidence and pass/fail/blocker status, then create follow-up tasks for gaps."
1060        )
1061    roadmap_staleness = _roadmap_staleness_context(job, recent_steps)
1062    if roadmap_staleness:
1063        return (
1064            "The roadmap has not advanced despite durable task/artifact activity. "
1065            "Use record_roadmap to mark the current milestone active/done/blocked, or record_milestone_validation "
1066            "if acceptance criteria can be judged from existing evidence, before more branch work."
1067        )
1068    if _roadmap_missing_for_broad_job(job):
1069        return (
1070            "The objective is broad enough to benefit from roadmap control. Use record_roadmap to define compact milestones, "
1071            "features, acceptance criteria, and validation checkpoints before expanding the task queue further."
1072        )
1073    evidence_step = _unpersisted_evidence_step(recent_steps)
1074    if evidence_step:
1075        return (
1076            f"You have unsaved evidence from step #{evidence_step['step_no']} "
1077            f"({evidence_step.get('tool_name') or evidence_step['kind']}). "
1078            "Your next tool call should usually be write_artifact. If this evidence taught a durable rule, record_lesson after saving it."
1079        )
1080    if _task_queue_exhausted(job):
1081        return (
1082            "All durable task branches are done, skipped, or blocked. Before more research or execution, "
1083            "use record_tasks to open the next concrete branch, or report_update if the operator needs a checkpoint."
1084        )
1085    for step in reversed(recent_steps[-5:]):
1086        error = str(step.get("error") or "")
1087        if error == "artifact required before more research":
1088            return "The last blocked action needs write_artifact, not another search or browser action."
1089        if error == "task branch required before more work":
1090            return "Create or reopen a task branch with record_tasks before doing more research or execution."
1091        if error in {"duplicate tool call blocked", "similar search query blocked", "search loop blocked"}:
1092            output = step.get("output") if isinstance(step.get("output"), dict) else {}
1093            blocked_tool = str(output.get("blocked_tool") or "")
1094            if blocked_tool == "read_artifact":
1095                return "Do not read the same artifact again. Use its content to choose a concrete next action: inspect a specific item, record findings/tasks, or write a report artifact."
1096            if blocked_tool == "shell_exec":
1097                return "Do not rerun the same shell discovery command. Use the prior output to inspect a specific file/item, save it, or update findings/tasks."
1098            return "Change source, extract an existing result, save an artifact, or record a lesson about the failed strategy."
1099    return "No special constraint beyond taking one bounded useful action."
1100
1101
1102def _milestone_validation_needed(job: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1103    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1104    roadmap = metadata.get("roadmap") if isinstance(metadata.get("roadmap"), dict) else {}
1105    milestones = roadmap.get("milestones") if isinstance(roadmap.get("milestones"), list) else []
1106    for milestone in milestones:
1107        if not isinstance(milestone, dict):
1108            continue
1109        status = str(milestone.get("status") or "planned")
1110        validation_status = str(milestone.get("validation_status") or "not_started")
1111        if status == "validating" or validation_status == "pending":
1112            return milestone
1113        features = milestone.get("features") if isinstance(milestone.get("features"), list) else []
1114        if status == "active" and features and all(
1115            isinstance(feature, dict) and str(feature.get("status") or "planned") in {"done", "skipped"}
1116            for feature in features
1117        ):
1118            return milestone
1119    return None
1120
1121
1122def _latest_experiment_next_action_context(job: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1123    experiments = _metadata_list(job, "experiment_ledger")
1124    for experiment in reversed(experiments):
1125        if not isinstance(experiment, dict):
1126            continue
1127        status = str(experiment.get("status") or "").strip().lower()
1128        next_action = str(experiment.get("next_action") or "").strip()
1129        if not next_action:
1130            continue
1131        if status in {"measured", "failed", "blocked"} or experiment.get("metric_value") is not None:
1132            return {
1133                "title": experiment.get("title"),
1134                "status": status,
1135                "metric_name": experiment.get("metric_name"),
1136                "metric_value": experiment.get("metric_value"),
1137                "next_action": next_action,
1138            }
1139    return None
1140
1141
1142def _experiment_next_action_requires_delivery(context: dict[str, Any] | None) -> bool:
1143    if not context:
1144        return False
1145    next_action = str(context.get("next_action") or "").lower()
1146    if not next_action:
1147        return False
1148    tokens = set(re.findall(r"[a-z][a-z0-9_-]+", next_action))
1149    if not tokens & EXPERIMENT_DELIVERY_ACTION_TERMS:
1150        return False
1151    return not bool(tokens & EXPERIMENT_INFORMATION_ACTION_TERMS)
1152
1153
1154def _shell_command_looks_like_write(command: str) -> bool:
1155    text = command.strip()
1156    if not text:
1157        return False
1158    write_patterns = [
1159        r"(?<!\d)>>?\s*[^&]",
1160        r"\b1>>?\s*[^&]",
1161        r"\btee\b",
1162        r"\bcat\s+>\b",
1163        r"\bpython[0-9.]*\b.*\bwrite_text\b",
1164        r"\bpython[0-9.]*\b.*\bopen\([^)]*,\s*['\"]w",
1165        r"\bsed\s+-i\b",
1166    ]
1167    return any(re.search(pattern, text, flags=re.IGNORECASE | re.DOTALL) for pattern in write_patterns)
1168
1169
1170def _shell_command_looks_read_only(command: str) -> bool:
1171    if not command.strip():
1172        return False
1173    if _shell_command_looks_like_write(command):
1174        return False
1175    return bool(READ_ONLY_SHELL_COMMAND_PATTERN.search(command))
1176
1177
1178def _roadmap_staleness_context(job: dict[str, Any], recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1179    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1180    roadmap = metadata.get("roadmap") if isinstance(metadata.get("roadmap"), dict) else {}
1181    milestones = roadmap.get("milestones") if isinstance(roadmap.get("milestones"), list) else []
1182    if not milestones:
1183        return None
1184    if any(step.get("tool_name") in {"record_roadmap", "record_milestone_validation"} for step in recent_steps):
1185        return None
1186    if any(
1187        isinstance(milestone, dict)
1188        and (
1189            str(milestone.get("status") or "planned") != "planned"
1190            or str(milestone.get("validation_status") or "not_started") != "not_started"
1191        )
1192        for milestone in milestones
1193    ):
1194        return None
1195    tasks = metadata.get("task_queue") if isinstance(metadata.get("task_queue"), list) else []
1196    completed_artifacts = [
1197        step for step in recent_steps
1198        if step.get("status") == "completed" and step.get("tool_name") == "write_artifact"
1199    ]
1200    task_updates = [
1201        step for step in recent_steps
1202        if step.get("status") == "completed" and step.get("tool_name") == "record_tasks"
1203    ]
1204    if len(completed_artifacts) < 2 and len(task_updates) < 2 and len(tasks) < 8:
1205        return None
1206    return {
1207        "title": roadmap.get("title") or "Roadmap",
1208        "status": roadmap.get("status") or "planned",
1209        "milestone_count": len(milestones),
1210        "task_count": len(tasks),
1211        "artifact_count": len(completed_artifacts),
1212        "task_update_count": len(task_updates),
1213    }
1214
1215
1216def _roadmap_missing_for_broad_job(job: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
1217    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1218    if isinstance(metadata.get("roadmap"), dict):
1219        return False
1220    objective = str(job.get("objective") or "")
1221    tasks = metadata.get("task_queue") if isinstance(metadata.get("task_queue"), list) else []
1222    if len(tasks) >= 6:
1223        return True
1224    words = re.findall(r"[A-Za-z0-9_]+", objective)
1225    broad_terms = {"build", "create", "develop", "implement", "research", "improve", "optimize", "migrate", "write", "analyze"}
1226    return len(words) >= 14 and any(term in objective.lower() for term in broad_terms)
1227
1228
1229def _task_queue_exhausted(job: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
1230    tasks = _metadata_list(job, "task_queue")
1231    if not tasks:
1232        return False
1233    runnable = {"open", "active"}
1234    return not any(str(task.get("status") or "open").strip().lower() in runnable for task in tasks)
1235
1236
1237def _task_queue_saturation_context(job: dict[str, Any], args: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1238    tasks = _metadata_list(job, "task_queue")
1239    open_tasks = [task for task in tasks if str(task.get("status") or "open").strip().lower() in {"open", "active"}]
1240    if len(open_tasks) < TASK_QUEUE_SATURATION_OPEN_TASKS:
1241        return None
1242    incoming = args.get("tasks") if isinstance(args.get("tasks"), list) else []
1243    if not incoming:
1244        return None
1245    existing_keys = {
1246        _norm_task_key(str(task.get("parent") or ""), str(task.get("title") or ""))
1247        for task in tasks
1248    }
1249    new_open_titles = []
1250    for task in incoming:
1251        if not isinstance(task, dict):
1252            continue
1253        status = str(task.get("status") or "open").strip().lower().replace(" ", "_")
1254        if status not in {"open", "active"}:
1255            continue
1256        key = _norm_task_key(str(task.get("parent") or ""), str(task.get("title") or ""))
1257        if key not in existing_keys:
1258            new_open_titles.append(str(task.get("title") or "").strip())
1259    if not new_open_titles:
1260        return None
1261    return {
1262        "open_count": len(open_tasks),
1263        "threshold": TASK_QUEUE_SATURATION_OPEN_TASKS,
1264        "new_open_count": len(new_open_titles),
1265        "new_open_titles": new_open_titles[:8],
1266    }
1267
1268
1269def _norm_task_key(parent: str, title: str) -> str:
1270    return re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", f"{parent}|{title}".lower()).strip("-")
1271
1272
1273def _parse_tool_result(raw: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
1274    try:
1275        parsed = json.loads(raw)
1276        return parsed if isinstance(parsed, dict) else {"result": parsed}
1277    except json.JSONDecodeError:
1278        return {"result": raw}
1279
1280
1281def _load_program_text(config: AppConfig, job_id: str) -> str:
1282    path = config.runtime.jobs_dir / job_id / "program.md"
1283    if not path.exists():
1284        return ""
1285    return path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
1286
1287
1288def _compact(value: Any, limit: int = 500) -> str:
1289    text = json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True) if not isinstance(value, str) else value
1290    text = " ".join(text.split())
1291    return text if len(text) <= limit else text[:limit] + "..."
1292
1293
1294def _clip_text(value: Any, limit: int) -> str:
1295    text = " ".join(str(value or "").split())
1296    if len(text) <= limit:
1297        return text
1298    return text[: max(0, limit - 3)].rstrip() + "..."
1299
1300
1301def _format_step_for_prompt(step: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
1302    tool = f" tool={step['tool_name']}" if step.get("tool_name") else ""
1303    summary = step.get("summary") or step.get("error") or ""
1304    pieces = [f"- #{step['step_no']} {step['kind']} {step['status']}{tool}: {summary}"]
1305    input_data = step.get("input") or {}
1306    args = input_data.get("arguments") if isinstance(input_data, dict) else None
1307    if args:
1308        pieces.append(f"  args: {_compact(args, 320)}")
1309    output = step.get("output") or {}
1310    observation = _observation_for_prompt(step.get("tool_name"), output)
1311    if observation:
1312        pieces.append(f"  observed: {observation}")
1313    return "\n".join(pieces)
1314
1315
1316def _observation_for_prompt(tool_name: str | None, output: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
1317    if not output:
1318        return ""
1319    if tool_name == "web_search":
1320        results = output.get("results") if isinstance(output.get("results"), list) else []
1321        titles = []
1322        for result in results[:5]:
1323            title = result.get("title") or "untitled"
1324            url = result.get("url") or ""
1325            titles.append(f"{title} <{url}>")
1326        return _clip_text(f"query={output.get('query')!r}; results={'; '.join(titles)}", 650)
1327    if tool_name == "web_extract":
1328        pages = output.get("pages") if isinstance(output.get("pages"), list) else []
1329        parts = []
1330        for page in pages[:3]:
1331            if page.get("error"):
1332                parts.append(f"{page.get('url')}: ERROR {page.get('error')}")
1333            else:
1334                text = str(page.get("text") or "")
1335                parts.append(f"{page.get('url')}: {_clip_text(text, 160)}")
1336        return _clip_text("; ".join(parts), 650)
1337    if tool_name == "shell_exec":
1338        stdout = str(output.get("stdout") or "")
1339        stderr = str(output.get("stderr") or "")
1340        excerpt = stdout.strip() or stderr.strip()
1341        return (
1342            f"command={output.get('command')!r}; rc={output.get('returncode')}; "
1343            f"duration={output.get('duration_seconds')}s; output={_clip_text(excerpt, 360)}"
1344        )[:650]
1345    if tool_name == "write_artifact":
1346        return f"saved artifact={output.get('artifact_id')} path={output.get('path')}"
1347    if tool_name == "report_update":
1348        update = output.get("update") if isinstance(output.get("update"), dict) else {}
1349        return _clip_text(f"agent_update={update.get('message') or ''}", 420)
1350    if tool_name == "record_lesson":
1351        lesson = output.get("lesson") if isinstance(output.get("lesson"), dict) else {}
1352        return _clip_text(f"lesson={lesson.get('category') or 'memory'}: {lesson.get('lesson') or ''}", 420)
1353    if tool_name == "record_source":
1354        source = output.get("source") if isinstance(output.get("source"), dict) else {}
1355        return (
1356            f"source={source.get('source')} score={source.get('usefulness_score')} "
1357            f"findings={source.get('yield_count')} fails={source.get('fail_count')} outcome={source.get('last_outcome')}"
1358        )[:420]
1359    if tool_name == "record_findings":
1360        return f"finding ledger updated added={output.get('added')} updated={output.get('updated')}"[:700]
1361    if tool_name == "record_experiment":
1362        experiment = output.get("experiment") if isinstance(output.get("experiment"), dict) else {}
1363        metric = ""
1364        if experiment.get("metric_value") is not None:
1365            metric = format_metric_value(
1366                experiment.get("metric_name") or "metric",
1367                experiment.get("metric_value"),
1368                experiment.get("metric_unit") or "",
1369            )
1370        delta = f" delta={experiment.get('delta_from_previous_best')}" if experiment.get("delta_from_previous_best") is not None else ""
1371        best = " best_observed" if experiment.get("best_observed") else ""
1372        return _clip_text(f"experiment={experiment.get('title')} status={experiment.get('status')} {metric}{delta}{best}", 520)
1373    if tool_name == "acknowledge_operator_context":
1374        return f"operator_context {output.get('status')} count={output.get('count')}"[:700]
1375    if tool_name in {"browser_click", "browser_type"} and output.get("error"):
1376        recovery = output.get("recovery_snapshot") if isinstance(output.get("recovery_snapshot"), dict) else {}
1377        candidates = _browser_candidates_for_prompt(recovery)
1378        suffix = f"; recovery_candidates={candidates}" if candidates else ""
1379        return _clip_text(f"error={output.get('error')}; guidance={output.get('recovery_guidance', '')}{suffix}", 700)
1380    if tool_name == "browser_navigate":
1381        data = output.get("data") if isinstance(output.get("data"), dict) else {}
1382        title = data.get("title") or ""
1383        url = data.get("url") or ""
1384        snapshot = str(output.get("snapshot") or "")
1385        warning = anti_bot_reason(title, url, snapshot)
1386        suffix = f"; source_warning={warning}" if warning else ""
1387        candidates = _browser_candidates_for_prompt(output)
1388        candidate_suffix = f"; candidates={candidates}" if candidates else ""
1389        return _clip_text(f"opened {title} <{url}>; snapshot_chars={len(snapshot)}{suffix}{candidate_suffix}", 700)
1390    if tool_name == "browser_snapshot":
1391        data = output.get("data") if isinstance(output.get("data"), dict) else {}
1392        snapshot = str(output.get("snapshot") or data.get("snapshot") or output.get("data") or "")
1393        warning = anti_bot_reason(snapshot)
1394        suffix = f"; source_warning={warning}" if warning else ""
1395        candidates = _browser_candidates_for_prompt(output)
1396        candidate_suffix = f"; candidates={candidates}" if candidates else ""
1397        return _clip_text(f"snapshot_chars={len(snapshot)}{suffix}{candidate_suffix}", 700)
1398    if output.get("error"):
1399        return f"error={output.get('error')}"
1400    return _compact(output, 700)
1401
1402
1403def _browser_warning_context(output: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, str] | None:
1404    data = output.get("data") if isinstance(output.get("data"), dict) else {}
1405    title = str(data.get("title") or "")
1406    url = str(data.get("url") or data.get("origin") or output.get("url") or "")
1407    snapshot = str(output.get("snapshot") or data.get("snapshot") or output.get("data") or "")
1408    reason = anti_bot_reason(title, url, snapshot)
1409    if not reason:
1410        return None
1411    return {"reason": reason, "url": url, "title": title}
1412
1413
1414def _recent_anti_bot_context(recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]], *, window: int = 8) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1415    for step in reversed(recent_steps[-window:]):
1416        if step.get("status") != "completed" or step.get("tool_name") not in {"browser_navigate", "browser_snapshot"}:
1417            continue
1418        output = step.get("output") if isinstance(step.get("output"), dict) else {}
1419        warning = _browser_warning_context(output)
1420        if warning:
1421            return {**warning, "step_id": step.get("id"), "step_no": step.get("step_no")}
1422    return None
1423
1424
1425def _artifact_args_acknowledge_block(args: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
1426    text = " ".join(str(args.get(key) or "") for key in ("title", "summary", "content")).lower()
1427    return any(term in text for term in ANTI_BOT_ACK_TERMS)
1428
1429
1430def _same_source_url(left: str, right: str) -> bool:
1431    if not left or not right:
1432        return False
1433    return left.split("#", 1)[0].rstrip("/") == right.split("#", 1)[0].rstrip("/")
1434
1435
1436def _normalized_source_url(value: str) -> str:
1437    value = str(value or "").strip()
1438    if not value:
1439        return ""
1440    if "://" not in value:
1441        return f"https://{value}"
1442    return value
1443
1444
1445def _source_host(value: str) -> str:
1446    parsed = urlparse(_normalized_source_url(value))
1447    return parsed.netloc.lower().removeprefix("www.")
1448
1449
1450def _source_matches(left: str, right: str) -> bool:
1451    if _same_source_url(left, right):
1452        return True
1453    left_host = _source_host(left)
1454    right_host = _source_host(right)
1455    return bool(left_host and right_host and left_host == right_host)
1456
1457
1458def _known_bad_sources(job: dict[str, Any]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
1459    bad_sources = []
1460    for source in _metadata_list(job, "source_ledger"):
1461        if (
1462            _as_float(source.get("usefulness_score")) < 0.2
1463            and _as_int(source.get("yield_count")) <= 0
1464            and (_as_int(source.get("fail_count")) > 0 or source.get("warnings"))
1465        ):
1466            bad_sources.append(source)
1467    return bad_sources
1468
1469
1470def _known_bad_source_for_call(name: str, args: dict[str, Any], job: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1471    if name not in {"browser_navigate", "web_extract"}:
1472        return None
1473    bad_sources = _known_bad_sources(job)
1474    if not bad_sources:
1475        return None
1476    urls: list[str] = []
1477    if name == "browser_navigate":
1478        urls = [str(args.get("url") or "")]
1479    elif isinstance(args.get("urls"), list):
1480        urls = [str(url) for url in args["urls"]]
1481    for url in [url for url in urls if url.strip()]:
1482        for source in bad_sources:
1483            source_value = str(source.get("source") or "")
1484            if source_value and _source_matches(url, source_value):
1485                return source
1486    return None
1487
1488
1489def _tool_signature(name: str, args: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
1490    return f"{name}:{json.dumps(args, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)}"
1491
1492
1493def _browser_candidates_for_prompt(output: dict[str, Any], *, limit: int = 18) -> str:
1494    refs = output.get("refs") if isinstance(output.get("refs"), dict) else None
1495    if refs is None:
1496        data = output.get("data") if isinstance(output.get("data"), dict) else {}
1497        refs = data.get("refs") if isinstance(data.get("refs"), dict) else {}
1498    candidates = []
1499    seen = set()
1500    for ref, item in refs.items():
1501        if not isinstance(item, dict):
1502            continue
1503        role = str(item.get("role") or "")
1504        if role not in {"link", "heading", "cell"}:
1505            continue
1506        name = " ".join(str(item.get("name") or "").split())
1507        key = name.lower().strip()
1508        if not name or key in BROWSER_REF_IGNORE_NAMES:
1509            continue
1510        if len(name) < 3 or len(name) > 90 or key in seen:
1511            continue
1512        if role == "cell" and (_looks_like_metric_cell(name) or _looks_like_service_description(name)):
1513            continue
1514        seen.add(key)
1515        candidates.append(f"{name} (@{ref})")
1516        if len(candidates) >= limit:
1517            break
1518    return "; ".join(candidates)
1519
1520
1521def _looks_like_metric_cell(name: str) -> bool:
1522    text = name.strip()
1523    return bool(re.fullmatch(r"(?:n/?a|na|[-+]?\d+(?:\.\d+)?(?:/5)?|[$€£]?\d[\d,]*(?:\.\d+)?%?)", text, re.I))
1524
1525
1526def _looks_like_service_description(name: str) -> bool:
1527    text = name.lower()
1528    if "," in text and len(text.split()) >= 6:
1529        return True
1530    service_terms = ("custom ecommerce", "ux/ui", "payment integration", "mobile responsiveness", "headless commerce")
1531    return any(term in text for term in service_terms) and len(text.split()) >= 5
1532
1533
1534def _duplicate_recent_tool_call(
1535    name: str,
1536    args: dict[str, Any],
1537    recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]],
1538    *,
1539    window: int = 24,
1540) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1541    if name in {"browser_snapshot", "defer_job"}:
1542        return None
1543    signature = _tool_signature(name, args)
1544    for step in reversed(recent_steps[-window:]):
1545        if step.get("status") != "completed" or step.get("tool_name") != name:
1546            continue
1547        input_data = step.get("input") or {}
1548        previous_args = input_data.get("arguments") if isinstance(input_data, dict) else None
1549        if isinstance(previous_args, dict) and _tool_signature(name, previous_args) == signature:
1550            return step
1551    return None
1552
1553
1554def _completed_recent_steps(recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
1555    return [step for step in recent_steps if step.get("status") == "completed"]
1556
1557
1558def _step_has_evidence(step: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
1559    tool_name = step.get("tool_name")
1560    output = step.get("output") if isinstance(step.get("output"), dict) else {}
1561    if tool_name == "web_extract":
1562        pages = output.get("pages") if isinstance(output.get("pages"), list) else []
1563        for page in pages:
1564            if page.get("error"):
1565                continue
1566            if str(page.get("text") or "").strip():
1567                return True
1568    if tool_name in {"browser_navigate", "browser_snapshot"}:
1569        data = output.get("data") if isinstance(output.get("data"), dict) else {}
1570        snapshot = str(output.get("snapshot") or data.get("snapshot") or "")
1571        if anti_bot_reason(str(data.get("title") or ""), str(data.get("url") or data.get("origin") or ""), snapshot):
1572            return False
1573        return len(snapshot.strip()) >= 500
1574    if tool_name == "shell_exec":
1575        text = "\n".join(str(output.get(key) or "") for key in ("stdout", "stderr"))
1576        return len(text.strip()) >= 1000
1577    return False
1578
1579
1580def _unpersisted_evidence_step(recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1581    for step in reversed(recent_steps):
1582        if step.get("status") not in {"completed", "blocked"}:
1583            continue
1584        output = step.get("output") if isinstance(step.get("output"), dict) else {}
1585        if step.get("tool_name") == "write_artifact":
1586            return None
1587        if isinstance(output.get("auto_checkpoint"), dict):
1588            return None
1589        if step.get("status") == "completed" and _step_has_evidence(step):
1590            return step
1591    return None
1592
1593
1594def _recent_search_streak(recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> int:
1595    return _recent_tool_streak(recent_steps, "web_search")
1596
1597
1598def _pending_measurement_obligation(job: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1599    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1600    obligation = metadata.get("pending_measurement_obligation")
1601    if isinstance(obligation, dict) and obligation and not obligation.get("resolved_at"):
1602        return obligation
1603    return None
1604
1605
1606def _clear_invalid_measurement_obligation(db: AgentDB, job_id: str) -> bool:
1607    job = db.get_job(job_id)
1608    obligation = _pending_measurement_obligation(job)
1609    if not obligation:
1610        return False
1611    candidates = obligation.get("metric_candidates") if isinstance(obligation.get("metric_candidates"), list) else []
1612    if not candidates:
1613        return False
1614    command = str(obligation.get("command") or "")
1615    has_intent = bool(MEASUREMENT_INTENT_PATTERN.search(command))
1616    if not all(_candidate_is_diagnostic_only(str(candidate), has_intent) for candidate in candidates):
1617        return False
1618    db.update_job_metadata(job_id, {"pending_measurement_obligation": {}})
1619    db.append_agent_update(
1620        job_id,
1621        "Cleared measurement obligation because the output was diagnostic context, not a trial result.",
1622        category="progress",
1623        metadata={"cleared_measurement_obligation": obligation},
1624    )
1625    return True
1626
1627
1628def _progress_churn_context(recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]], *, window: int = 10) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1629    completed = [step for step in recent_steps if step.get("status") == "completed"]
1630    tail = completed[-window:]
1631    if len(tail) < 8:
1632        return None
1633    if any(step.get("tool_name") in LEDGER_PROGRESS_TOOLS for step in tail):
1634        return None
1635    churn_count = sum(1 for step in tail if step.get("tool_name") in CHURN_TOOLS)
1636    if churn_count < 7:
1637        return None
1638    return {
1639        "window": len(tail),
1640        "churn_count": churn_count,
1641        "since_step": tail[0].get("step_no"),
1642        "tools": [step.get("tool_name") or step.get("kind") for step in tail],
1643    }
1644
1645
1646def _activity_stagnation_context(job: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1647    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
1648    streak = _as_int(metadata.get("activity_checkpoint_streak"))
1649    if streak < ACTIVITY_STAGNATION_CHECKPOINTS:
1650        return None
1651    counts = metadata.get("last_checkpoint_counts") if isinstance(metadata.get("last_checkpoint_counts"), dict) else {}
1652    return {
1653        "streak": streak,
1654        "threshold": ACTIVITY_STAGNATION_CHECKPOINTS,
1655        "counts": {key: _as_int(counts.get(key)) for key in ("findings", "sources", "tasks", "experiments", "lessons", "milestones")},
1656    }
1657
1658
1659def _artifact_accounting_context(
1660    recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]],
1661    *,
1662    threshold: int = 3,
1663    window: int = 12,
1664) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1665    completed = [step for step in recent_steps if step.get("status") == "completed"]
1666    tail: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
1667    for step in reversed(completed[-window:]):
1668        if step.get("tool_name") in LEDGER_PROGRESS_TOOLS:
1669            break
1670        tail.append(step)
1671    tail.reverse()
1672    artifact_steps = [step for step in tail if step.get("tool_name") == "write_artifact"]
1673    if len(artifact_steps) < threshold:
1674        return None
1675    titles = []
1676    for step in artifact_steps[-5:]:
1677        input_data = step.get("input") if isinstance(step.get("input"), dict) else {}
1678        args = input_data.get("arguments") if isinstance(input_data.get("arguments"), dict) else {}
1679        title = str(args.get("title") or step.get("summary") or f"step #{step.get('step_no')}")
1680        titles.append(_clip_text(title, 120))
1681    return {
1682        "artifact_count": len(artifact_steps),
1683        "since_step": tail[0].get("step_no") if tail else None,
1684        "artifact_steps": [step.get("step_no") for step in artifact_steps],
1685        "artifact_titles": titles,
1686        "tools": [step.get("tool_name") or step.get("kind") for step in tail],
1687    }
1688
1689
1690def _job_requires_measured_progress(job: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
1691    text_parts = [
1692        str(job.get("title") or ""),
1693        str(job.get("objective") or ""),
1694        str(job.get("kind") or ""),
1695    ]
1696    tasks = _metadata_list(job, "task_queue")
1697    for task in tasks:
1698        status = str(task.get("status") or "open")
1699        if status in {"done", "skipped"}:
1700            continue
1701        contract = str(task.get("output_contract") or "")
1702        if contract in {"experiment", "monitor"}:
1703            return True
1704        if contract == "action" and _task_text_requires_measurement(task):
1705            return True
1706        text_parts.extend(
1707            str(task.get(key) or "")
1708            for key in ("title", "goal", "acceptance_criteria", "evidence_needed", "stall_behavior")
1709        )
1710    return any(MEASURABLE_PROGRESS_PATTERN.search(part) for part in text_parts if part)
1711
1712
1713def _task_text_requires_measurement(task: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
1714    return any(
1715        MEASURABLE_PROGRESS_PATTERN.search(str(task.get(key) or ""))
1716        for key in ("title", "goal", "acceptance_criteria", "evidence_needed", "stall_behavior")
1717    )
1718
1719
1720def _measured_progress_guard_context(
1721    job: dict[str, Any],
1722    recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]],
1723    *,
1724    budget: int = MEASURABLE_RESEARCH_BUDGET_STEPS,
1725) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1726    if not _job_requires_measured_progress(job):
1727        return None
1728    if _pending_measurement_obligation(job):
1729        return None
1730    completed = [step for step in recent_steps if step.get("status") == "completed"]
1731    if not completed:
1732        return None
1733    last_experiment_index = -1
1734    for index, step in enumerate(completed):
1735        if step.get("tool_name") == "record_experiment":
1736            last_experiment_index = index
1737    tail = completed[last_experiment_index + 1 :]
1738    branch_activity = [step for step in tail if step.get("tool_name") in BRANCH_WORK_TOOLS | {"write_artifact"}]
1739    shell_actions = [step for step in tail if step.get("tool_name") == "shell_exec"]
1740    if len(branch_activity) < budget and len(shell_actions) < MEASURABLE_ACTION_BUDGET_STEPS:
1741        return None
1742    if any(step.get("tool_name") in {"record_tasks", "record_lesson"} for step in tail[-6:]):
1743        return None
1744    experiments = _metadata_list(job, "experiment_ledger")
1745    reason = "no experiment records yet" if not experiments else "no recent experiment update"
1746    return {
1747        "reason": reason,
1748        "research_budget": budget,
1749        "shell_action_budget": MEASURABLE_ACTION_BUDGET_STEPS,
1750        "completed_since_last_experiment": len(tail),
1751        "branch_activity": len(branch_activity),
1752        "shell_actions_since_last_experiment": len(shell_actions),
1753        "since_step": branch_activity[0].get("step_no") if branch_activity else None,
1754        "tools": [step.get("tool_name") or step.get("kind") for step in branch_activity[-10:]],
1755    }
1756
1757
1758MEASUREMENT_PATTERN = re.compile(
1759    r"(?i)(?:"
1760    r"\b\d+(?:\.\d+)?\s*(?:%|ms|s|sec|secs|seconds|msec|us|hz|khz|mhz|ghz|kb/s|mb/s|gb/s|tb/s|"
1761    r"it/s|ops/s|req/s|qps|rps|samples/s|items/s|units/s|tokens/s|tok/s|t/s)\b"
1762    r"|(?:score|rate|speed|throughput|latency|accuracy|loss|error|duration|runtime|time|memory|cpu|gpu|ram)\D{0,40}\d+(?:\.\d+)?"
1763    r")"
1764)
1765MEASUREMENT_INTENT_PATTERN = re.compile(
1766    r"(?i)\b(bench(?:mark)?|compare|duration|eval(?:uate)?|experiment|hyperfine|latency|measure|metric|perf|"
1767    r"profile|rate|runtime|speed|test|throughput|time|trial)\b"
1768)
1769DIAGNOSTIC_MEASUREMENT_PATTERN = re.compile(r"(?i)^\s*(?:cpu|gpu|memory|mem|ram)\b")
1770ACTION_MEASUREMENT_PATTERN = re.compile(
1771    r"(?i)^\s*(?:score|rate|speed|throughput|latency|accuracy|loss|error|duration|runtime|time)\b"
1772)
1773LABELED_MEASUREMENT_PATTERN = re.compile(
1774    r"(?i)^\s*(?:score|rate|speed|throughput|latency|accuracy|loss|error|duration|runtime|time)\s*(?:=|:)\s*[-+]?\d"
1775)
1776EXPLICIT_RESULT_UNIT_PATTERN = re.compile(
1777    r"(?i)\b\d+(?:\.\d+)?\s*(?:ms|msec|sec|secs|seconds|it/s|ops/s|req/s|qps|rps|samples/s|items/s|units/s|"
1778    r"tokens/s|tok/s|t/s|kb/s|mb/s|gb/s|tb/s)\b"
1779)
1780
1781
1782def _measurement_candidates(output: dict[str, Any], *, command: str = "", limit: int = 8) -> list[str]:
1783    text = "\n".join(
1784        str(output.get(key) or "")
1785        for key in ("stdout", "stderr", "result", "content")
1786        if output.get(key) is not None
1787    )
1788    if not text.strip():
1789        return []
1790    command_has_measurement_intent = bool(MEASUREMENT_INTENT_PATTERN.search(command))
1791    candidates: list[str] = []
1792    for match in MEASUREMENT_PATTERN.finditer(text[:20000]):
1793        candidate = " ".join(match.group(0).split())
1794        if _candidate_is_diagnostic_only(candidate, command_has_measurement_intent):
1795            continue
1796        if candidate not in candidates:
1797            candidates.append(candidate[:140])
1798        if len(candidates) >= limit:
1799            break
1800    return candidates
1801
1802
1803def _candidate_is_diagnostic_only(candidate: str, command_has_measurement_intent: bool) -> bool:
1804    if command_has_measurement_intent:
1805        return False
1806    if DIAGNOSTIC_MEASUREMENT_PATTERN.search(candidate):
1807        return True
1808    if EXPLICIT_RESULT_UNIT_PATTERN.search(candidate) and not re.search(r"(?i)\b(?:cpu|gpu|ram|mem|memory)\b", candidate):
1809        return False
1810    if ACTION_MEASUREMENT_PATTERN.search(candidate):
1811        return not bool(LABELED_MEASUREMENT_PATTERN.search(candidate))
1812    return True
1813
1814
1815def _maybe_create_measurement_obligation(
1816    *,
1817    db: AgentDB,
1818    job_id: str,
1819    step: dict[str, Any] | None,
1820    tool_name: str,
1821    args: dict[str, Any],
1822    result: dict[str, Any],
1823) -> None:
1824    if tool_name != "shell_exec":
1825        return
1826    command = str(args.get("command") or result.get("command") or "")
1827    candidates = _measurement_candidates(result, command=command)
1828    if not candidates:
1829        return
1830    metadata = db.get_job(job_id).get("metadata")
1831    if isinstance(metadata, dict):
1832        existing = metadata.get("pending_measurement_obligation")
1833        if isinstance(existing, dict) and existing and not existing.get("resolved_at"):
1834            return
1835    obligation = {
1836        "created_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
1837        "source_step_id": step.get("id") if step else "",
1838        "source_step_no": step.get("step_no") if step else None,
1839        "tool": tool_name,
1840        "summary": "Tool output contains measurable-looking results that need experiment accounting.",
1841        "metric_candidates": candidates,
1842        "command": command[:1000],
1843    }
1844    db.update_job_metadata(job_id, {"pending_measurement_obligation": obligation})
1845    db.append_agent_update(
1846        job_id,
1847        f"Measured output needs accounting: {', '.join(candidates[:3])}.",
1848        category="blocked",
1849        metadata={"pending_measurement_obligation": obligation},
1850    )
1851
1852
1853def _step_by_id(db: AgentDB, job_id: str, step_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1854    for step in db.list_steps(job_id=job_id):
1855        if str(step.get("id") or "") == step_id:
1856            return step
1857    return None
1858
1859
1860def _search_query(args: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
1861    return str(args.get("query") or "").strip()
1862
1863
1864def _query_tokens(query: str) -> set[str]:
1865    return {
1866        token
1867        for token in re.findall(r"[a-z0-9]+", query.lower())
1868        if len(token) > 2 and token not in QUERY_STOPWORDS
1869    }
1870
1871
1872def _text_tokens(value: str) -> set[str]:
1873    return {
1874        token
1875        for token in re.findall(r"[a-z0-9]+", str(value or "").lower())
1876        if len(token) > 2 and token not in TEXT_TOKEN_STOPWORDS
1877    }
1878
1879
1880def _similar_recent_search(
1881    args: dict[str, Any],
1882    recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]],
1883    *,
1884    window: int = 12,
1885) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1886    return _similar_recent_query_tool("web_search", args, recent_steps, window=window)
1887
1888
1889def _similar_recent_query_tool(
1890    tool_name: str,
1891    args: dict[str, Any],
1892    recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]],
1893    *,
1894    window: int = 12,
1895) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1896    query = _search_query(args)
1897    tokens = _query_tokens(query)
1898    if len(tokens) < 2:
1899        return None
1900    for step in reversed(_completed_recent_steps(recent_steps)[-window:]):
1901        if step.get("tool_name") != tool_name:
1902            continue
1903        input_data = step.get("input") or {}
1904        previous_args = input_data.get("arguments") if isinstance(input_data, dict) else None
1905        if not isinstance(previous_args, dict):
1906            continue
1907        previous_query = _search_query(previous_args)
1908        previous_tokens = _query_tokens(previous_query)
1909        if len(previous_tokens) < 2:
1910            continue
1911        overlap = len(tokens & previous_tokens) / max(len(tokens), len(previous_tokens))
1912        if overlap >= 0.72:
1913            return step
1914    return None
1915
1916
1917def _recent_tool_streak(recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]], tool_name: str) -> int:
1918    streak = 0
1919    for step in reversed(_completed_recent_steps(recent_steps)):
1920        current_tool = step.get("tool_name")
1921        if current_tool == tool_name:
1922            streak += 1
1923            continue
1924        if current_tool:
1925            break
1926    return streak
1927
1928
1929def _repeated_guard_block_context(
1930    recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]],
1931    *,
1932    threshold: int = 3,
1933    window: int = 12,
1934) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1935    last_recovery_no = max(
1936        (
1937            int(step.get("step_no") or 0)
1938            for step in recent_steps
1939            if step.get("tool_name") == "guard_recovery" and step.get("status") == "completed"
1940        ),
1941        default=0,
1942    )
1943    operational_steps = [
1944        step
1945        for step in recent_steps
1946        if int(step.get("step_no") or 0) > last_recovery_no
1947        if step.get("kind") in {"tool", "recovery"} and step.get("tool_name") != "guard_recovery"
1948    ]
1949    tail = operational_steps[-window:]
1950    latest_blocked = next((step for step in reversed(tail) if step.get("status") == "blocked"), None)
1951    if not latest_blocked:
1952        return None
1953    output = latest_blocked.get("output") if isinstance(latest_blocked.get("output"), dict) else {}
1954    error = str(output.get("error") or latest_blocked.get("error") or "")
1955    if error not in RECOVERABLE_GUARD_ERRORS:
1956        return None
1957    count = 0
1958    blocked_tools = []
1959    first_step_no = None
1960    for step in tail:
1961        step_output = step.get("output") if isinstance(step.get("output"), dict) else {}
1962        step_error = str(step_output.get("error") or step.get("error") or "")
1963        if step.get("status") == "blocked" and step_error == error:
1964            count += 1
1965            first_step_no = first_step_no or step.get("step_no")
1966            blocked_tools.append(str(step.get("tool_name") or step.get("kind") or "tool"))
1967    if count < threshold:
1968        return None
1969    return {
1970        "error": error,
1971        "count": count,
1972        "first_step_no": first_step_no,
1973        "latest_step_no": latest_blocked.get("step_no"),
1974        "blocked_tools": blocked_tools[-8:],
1975    }
1976
1977
1978def _blocked_tool_call_result(
1979    name: str,
1980    args: dict[str, Any],
1981    recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]],
1982    job: dict[str, Any],
1983) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], str] | None:
1984    if name == "record_tasks":
1985        saturated = _task_queue_saturation_context(job, args)
1986        if saturated:
1987            result = {
1988                "success": False,
1989                "error": "task queue saturated",
1990                "blocked_tool": name,
1991                "blocked_arguments": args,
1992                "task_queue": saturated,
1993                "guidance": (
1994                    "The durable task queue already has many open branches. Do not create more open tasks. "
1995                    "Choose an existing high-priority task and execute it, or update existing tasks to active, "
1996                    "done, blocked, or skipped."
1997                ),
1998            }
1999            return result, f"blocked record_tasks; {saturated['open_count']} open tasks already"
2000
2001    duplicate_step = _duplicate_recent_tool_call(name, args, recent_steps)
2002    if duplicate_step:
2003        guidance = "Use a different query, extract one of the prior result URLs, open a result in the browser, or write an artifact."
2004        if name == "read_artifact":
2005            guidance = (
2006                "This artifact was already read. Do not read it again; use its content to inspect a concrete item, "
2007                "record findings/tasks, or write a report artifact."
2008            )
2009        elif name == "shell_exec":
2010            guidance = (
2011                "This shell command was already run. Do not rerun discovery; use the previous output to inspect a "
2012                "specific file/item, write an artifact, or update findings/tasks."
2013            )
2014        result = {
2015            "success": False,
2016            "error": "duplicate tool call blocked",
2017            "blocked_tool": name,
2018            "blocked_arguments": args,
2019            "previous_step": duplicate_step["id"],
2020            "guidance": guidance,
2021        }
2022        return result, f"blocked duplicate {name}; previous step #{duplicate_step['step_no']}"
2023
2024    measurement_obligation = _pending_measurement_obligation(job)
2025    if measurement_obligation and name in MEASUREMENT_BLOCKED_TOOLS and name not in MEASUREMENT_RESOLUTION_TOOLS:
2026        result = {
2027            "success": False,
2028            "error": "measurement obligation pending",
2029            "blocked_tool": name,
2030            "blocked_arguments": args,
2031            "pending_measurement_obligation": measurement_obligation,
2032            "guidance": (
2033                "A recent action produced measurable output. Record it with record_experiment, "
2034                "explain why it is invalid with record_lesson, or create the missing measurement branch with record_tasks "
2035                "before doing more research, artifact writing, or finding/source updates."
2036            ),
2037        }
2038        return result, f"blocked {name}; record_experiment required after measured output"
2039
2040    measured_progress_guard = _measured_progress_guard_context(job, recent_steps)
2041    progress_churn = _progress_churn_context(recent_steps)
2042    artifact_accounting = _artifact_accounting_context(recent_steps)
2043    activity_stagnation = _activity_stagnation_context(job)
2044    if (
2045        artifact_accounting
2046        and name in ARTIFACT_ACCOUNTING_BLOCKED_TOOLS
2047        and name not in ARTIFACT_ACCOUNTING_RESOLUTION_TOOLS
2048    ):
2049        result = {
2050            "success": False,
2051            "error": "progress accounting required",
2052            "blocked_tool": name,
2053            "blocked_arguments": args,
2054            "artifact_accounting": artifact_accounting,
2055            "guidance": (
2056                "Recent saved outputs have not been reflected in durable progress state. "
2057                "Use record_tasks or record_roadmap to mark completed/open branches, "
2058                "record_milestone_validation for milestone checks, record_findings or record_source "
2059                "for reusable evidence, record_experiment for measurements, or record_lesson "
2060                "if the outputs were low-value before continuing."
2061            ),
2062        }
2063        return result, f"blocked {name}; progress accounting required after saved outputs"
2064
2065    if progress_churn and not measured_progress_guard and name in CHURN_TOOLS:
2066        result = {
2067            "success": False,
2068            "error": "progress ledger update required",
2069            "blocked_tool": name,
2070            "blocked_arguments": args,
2071            "progress_churn": progress_churn,
2072            "guidance": (
2073                "Recent activity has not changed findings, experiments, tasks, lessons, or sources. "
2074                "Use a ledger tool to record progress, reject the branch, or create a pivot task before continuing."
2075            ),
2076        }
2077        return result, f"blocked {name}; progress ledger update required"
2078
2079    if activity_stagnation and name in ACTIVITY_STAGNATION_BLOCKED_TOOLS:
2080        result = {
2081            "success": False,
2082            "error": "durable progress required",
2083            "blocked_tool": name,
2084            "blocked_arguments": args,
2085            "activity_stagnation": activity_stagnation,
2086            "guidance": (
2087                "Several checkpoints have produced no durable ledger delta. "
2088                "Use record_findings, record_source, record_experiment, record_tasks, record_roadmap, "
2089                "record_milestone_validation, or record_lesson to classify the branch, mark it blocked/skipped, "
2090                "or open a better branch before more research, shell, file, report, or artifact work."
2091            ),
2092        }
2093        return result, f"blocked {name}; durable progress required after activity-only checkpoints"
2094
2095    roadmap_staleness = _roadmap_staleness_context(job, recent_steps)
2096    if roadmap_staleness and name in ROADMAP_STALENESS_BLOCKED_TOOLS:
2097        result = {
2098            "success": False,
2099            "error": "roadmap update required",
2100            "blocked_tool": name,
2101            "blocked_arguments": args,
2102            "roadmap_staleness": roadmap_staleness,
2103            "guidance": (
2104                "The roadmap has not advanced despite durable task/artifact activity. "
2105                "Use record_roadmap to mark milestone progress, record_milestone_validation "
2106                "to judge an evidence-backed checkpoint, or record_lesson if the roadmap is wrong."
2107            ),
2108        }
2109        return result, f"blocked {name}; roadmap update required"
2110
2111    milestone_validation = _milestone_validation_needed(job)
2112    if milestone_validation and name in MILESTONE_VALIDATION_BLOCKED_TOOLS:
2113        result = {
2114            "success": False,
2115            "error": "milestone validation required",
2116            "blocked_tool": name,
2117            "blocked_arguments": args,
2118            "milestone": {
2119                "title": milestone_validation.get("title"),
2120                "status": milestone_validation.get("status"),
2121                "validation_status": milestone_validation.get("validation_status"),
2122                "acceptance_criteria": milestone_validation.get("acceptance_criteria"),
2123                "evidence_needed": milestone_validation.get("evidence_needed"),
2124            },
2125            "guidance": (
2126                "The current milestone is ready for validation. Use record_milestone_validation "
2127                "with evidence and pass/fail/blocker status, read an existing artifact if needed, "
2128                "or create follow-up tasks for validation gaps before starting more branch work."
2129            ),
2130        }
2131        return result, f"blocked {name}; milestone validation required"
2132
2133    anti_bot_context = _recent_anti_bot_context(recent_steps)
