2134    if anti_bot_context:
2135        blocked_browser_followups = {"browser_click", "browser_console", "browser_press", "browser_scroll", "browser_snapshot", "browser_type"}
2136        if name in blocked_browser_followups:
2137            result = {
2138                "success": False,
2139                "error": "anti-bot source loop blocked",
2140                "blocked_tool": name,
2141                "blocked_arguments": args,
2142                "anti_bot_source": anti_bot_context,
2143                "guidance": "This page is blocked by anti-bot/CAPTCHA. Record the source as blocked and pivot to a different public source.",
2144            }
2145            return result, f"blocked {name}; anti-bot source at step #{anti_bot_context.get('step_no')}"
2146        if name == "browser_navigate" and _same_source_url(str(args.get("url") or ""), str(anti_bot_context.get("url") or "")):
2147            result = {
2148                "success": False,
2149                "error": "anti-bot source loop blocked",
2150                "blocked_tool": name,
2151                "blocked_arguments": args,
2152                "anti_bot_source": anti_bot_context,
2153                "guidance": "Do not reopen the same blocked source. Pivot to another source.",
2154            }
2155            return result, f"blocked {name}; repeated blocked source from step #{anti_bot_context.get('step_no')}"
2156        if name == "web_extract":
2157            urls = args.get("urls") if isinstance(args.get("urls"), list) else []
2158            if any(_same_source_url(str(url), str(anti_bot_context.get("url") or "")) for url in urls):
2159                result = {
2160                    "success": False,
2161                    "error": "anti-bot source loop blocked",
2162                    "blocked_tool": name,
2163                    "blocked_arguments": args,
2164                    "anti_bot_source": anti_bot_context,
2165                    "guidance": "Do not extract the same blocked source. Record it as low-yield and pivot.",
2166                }
2167                return result, f"blocked {name}; blocked source from step #{anti_bot_context.get('step_no')}"
2168        if name == "write_artifact" and not _artifact_args_acknowledge_block(args):
2169            result = {
2170                "success": False,
2171                "error": "misleading blocked-source artifact blocked",
2172                "blocked_tool": name,
2173                "blocked_arguments": args,
2174                "anti_bot_source": anti_bot_context,
2175                "guidance": "The latest browser evidence is an anti-bot/CAPTCHA block. Write only a blocked-source note or pivot.",
2176            }
2177            return result, f"blocked misleading write_artifact; anti-bot source at step #{anti_bot_context.get('step_no')}"
2178
2179    unpersisted_evidence = _unpersisted_evidence_step(recent_steps)
2180    if unpersisted_evidence and name in BRANCH_WORK_TOOLS:
2181        result = {
2182            "success": False,
2183            "error": "artifact required before more research",
2184            "blocked_tool": name,
2185            "blocked_arguments": args,
2186            "previous_step": unpersisted_evidence["id"],
2187            "guidance": "Write an artifact summarizing the browser, extracted, or shell evidence before doing more search, browsing, or shell work.",
2188        }
2189        return result, f"blocked {name}; write_artifact required after evidence step #{unpersisted_evidence['step_no']}"
2190
2191    experiment_next_action = _latest_experiment_next_action_context(job)
2192    if (
2193        _experiment_next_action_requires_delivery(experiment_next_action)
2194        and (
2195            name in EXPERIMENT_NEXT_ACTION_BLOCKED_TOOLS
2196            or (
2197                name == "shell_exec"
2198                and _shell_command_looks_read_only(str(args.get("command") or ""))
2199            )
2200        )
2201    ):
2202        result = {
2203            "success": False,
2204            "error": "experiment next action pending",
2205            "blocked_tool": name,
2206            "blocked_arguments": args,
2207            "experiment_next_action": experiment_next_action,
2208            "guidance": (
2209                "The latest measured experiment selected a delivery/action next step. "
2210                "Act on that next action with an execution or ledger tool, or use record_tasks/record_lesson "
2211                "to explain why it is invalid or blocked before doing more research or artifact review."
2212            ),
2213        }
2214        return result, f"blocked {name}; experiment next action pending"
2215
2216    shell_budget_exhausted = (
2217        name == "shell_exec"
2218        and _as_int(measured_progress_guard.get("shell_actions_since_last_experiment")) >= MEASURABLE_ACTION_BUDGET_STEPS
2219    ) if measured_progress_guard else False
2220    if measured_progress_guard and (name in MEASURABLE_RESEARCH_BLOCKED_TOOLS or shell_budget_exhausted):
2221        result = {
2222            "success": False,
2223            "error": "measured progress required",
2224            "blocked_tool": name,
2225            "blocked_arguments": args,
2226            "measured_progress_guard": measured_progress_guard,
2227            "guidance": (
2228                "This job is measurably framed and has exhausted its research budget without new experiment records. "
2229                "If the shell/action budget is exhausted, do not call shell_exec again; call record_experiment for a "
2230                "known measurement, record_tasks with an experiment/action/monitor contract, or record_lesson if "
2231                "measurement is blocked."
2232            ),
2233        }
2234        return result, f"blocked {name}; measured progress required"
2235
2236    if name in BRANCH_WORK_TOOLS and _task_queue_exhausted(job):
2237        result = {
2238            "success": False,
2239            "error": "task branch required before more work",
2240            "blocked_tool": name,
2241            "blocked_arguments": args,
2242            "guidance": (
2243                "The durable task queue has no open or active branch. Use record_tasks to open the next concrete "
2244                "branch before doing more research or execution, or report_update if the operator needs a checkpoint."
2245            ),
2246        }
2247        return result, f"blocked {name}; no open task branch"
2248
2249    known_bad_source = _known_bad_source_for_call(name, args, job)
2250    if known_bad_source:
2251        result = {
2252            "success": False,
2253            "error": "known bad source blocked",
2254            "blocked_tool": name,
2255            "blocked_arguments": args,
2256            "known_bad_source": known_bad_source,
2257            "guidance": (
2258                "The source ledger marks this source as blocked or low-yield for this job. "
2259                "Choose a different source, or record a fresh operator reason before retrying it."
2260            ),
2261        }
2262        return result, f"blocked {name}; known bad source {known_bad_source.get('source')}"
2263
2264    if name == "web_search":
2265        similar_step = _similar_recent_search(args, recent_steps)
2266        if similar_step:
2267            result = {
2268                "success": False,
2269                "error": "similar search query blocked",
2270                "blocked_tool": name,
2271                "blocked_arguments": args,
2272                "previous_step": similar_step["id"],
2273                "guidance": "Use an existing result URL, extract a page, or search a clearly different topic/location/source.",
2274            }
2275            return result, f"blocked similar web_search; previous step #{similar_step['step_no']}"
2276        streak = _recent_search_streak(recent_steps)
2277        if streak >= 3:
2278            result = {
2279                "success": False,
2280                "error": "search loop blocked",
2281                "blocked_tool": name,
2282                "blocked_arguments": args,
2283                "recent_search_streak": streak,
2284                "guidance": "Stop searching. Extract or open one of the prior results, then write an artifact.",
2285            }
2286            return result, f"blocked web_search after {streak} consecutive searches"
2287
2288    if name == "search_artifacts":
2289        similar_step = _similar_recent_query_tool("search_artifacts", args, recent_steps)
2290        if similar_step:
2291            result = {
2292                "success": False,
2293                "error": "similar artifact search blocked",
2294                "blocked_tool": name,
2295                "blocked_arguments": args,
2296                "previous_step": similar_step["id"],
2297                "guidance": (
2298                    "Use a returned artifact, record what the prior artifact searches proved, "
2299                    "or create the next concrete task instead of searching saved outputs again."
2300                ),
2301            }
2302            return result, f"blocked similar search_artifacts; previous step #{similar_step['step_no']}"
2303        streak = _recent_tool_streak(recent_steps, "search_artifacts")
2304        if streak >= 3:
2305            result = {
2306                "success": False,
2307                "error": "artifact search loop blocked",
2308                "blocked_tool": name,
2309                "blocked_arguments": args,
2310                "recent_artifact_search_streak": streak,
2311                "guidance": (
2312                    "Stop searching saved outputs. Read a specific returned artifact, update tasks/findings/lessons, "
2313                    "or write the next report artifact from already-read evidence."
2314                ),
2315            }
2316            return result, f"blocked search_artifacts after {streak} consecutive artifact searches"
2317
2318    return None
2319
2320
2321def _summarize_tool_result(name: str, args: dict[str, Any], result: dict[str, Any], *, ok: bool) -> str:
2322    if not ok:
2323        return f"{name} failed: {result.get('error') or 'unknown error'}"
2324    if name == "web_search":
2325        results = result.get("results") if isinstance(result.get("results"), list) else []
2326        top = "; ".join((item.get("title") or "untitled") for item in results[:3])
2327        return f"web_search query={args.get('query')!r} returned {len(results)} results: {top}"
2328    if name == "web_extract":
2329        pages = result.get("pages") if isinstance(result.get("pages"), list) else []
2330        ok_pages = [page for page in pages if not page.get("error")]
2331        return f"web_extract fetched {len(ok_pages)}/{len(pages)} pages"
2332    if name == "shell_exec":
2333        command = str(result.get("command") or args.get("command") or "")
2334        return (
2335            f"shell_exec rc={result.get('returncode')} "
2336            f"duration={result.get('duration_seconds')}s cmd={command!r}"
2337        )
2338    if name == "write_artifact":
2339        return f"write_artifact saved {result.get('artifact_id')} at {result.get('path')}"
2340    if name == "write_file":
2341        return f"write_file {result.get('mode') or 'overwrite'} {result.get('path')} bytes={result.get('bytes')}"
2342    if name == "defer_job":
2343        return f"defer_job until {result.get('defer_until')}"
2344    if name == "report_update":
2345        update = result.get("update") if isinstance(result.get("update"), dict) else {}
2346        return f"report_update saved: {str(update.get('message') or '')[:160]}"
2347    if name == "record_lesson":
2348        lesson = result.get("lesson") if isinstance(result.get("lesson"), dict) else {}
2349        category = lesson.get("category") or "memory"
2350        text = str(lesson.get("lesson") or "")[:160]
2351        return f"record_lesson saved {category}: {text}"
2352    if name == "record_source":
2353        source = result.get("source") if isinstance(result.get("source"), dict) else {}
2354        return f"record_source updated {source.get('source')} score={source.get('usefulness_score')} yield={source.get('yield_count')}"
2355    if name == "record_findings":
2356        return (
2357            f"record_findings updated ledger: {result.get('added', 0)} new, "
2358            f"{result.get('updated', 0)} updated, {result.get('sources_updated', 0)} sources"
2359        )
2360    if name == "record_tasks":
2361        return f"record_tasks updated queue: {result.get('added', 0)} new, {result.get('updated', 0)} updated"
2362    if name == "record_roadmap":
2363        roadmap = result.get("roadmap") if isinstance(result.get("roadmap"), dict) else {}
2364        return (
2365            f"record_roadmap {roadmap.get('status')}: {roadmap.get('title')} "
2366            f"milestones={len(roadmap.get('milestones') or [])}"
2367        )
2368    if name == "record_milestone_validation":
2369        validation = result.get("validation") if isinstance(result.get("validation"), dict) else {}
2370        return (
2371            f"record_milestone_validation {validation.get('validation_status')}: "
2372            f"{validation.get('title')} followups={len(result.get('follow_up_tasks') or [])}"
2373        )
2374    if name == "record_experiment":
2375        experiment = result.get("experiment") if isinstance(result.get("experiment"), dict) else {}
2376        metric = ""
2377        if experiment.get("metric_value") is not None:
2378            metric = " " + format_metric_value(
2379                experiment.get("metric_name") or "metric",
2380                experiment.get("metric_value"),
2381                experiment.get("metric_unit") or "",
2382            )
2383        best = " best" if experiment.get("best_observed") else ""
2384        return f"record_experiment {experiment.get('status')}: {experiment.get('title')}{metric}{best}"
2385    if name == "acknowledge_operator_context":
2386        return f"acknowledge_operator_context {result.get('status')} count={result.get('count', 0)}"
2387    if name == "browser_navigate":
2388        data = result.get("data") if isinstance(result.get("data"), dict) else {}
2389        title = data.get("title") or ""
2390        url = data.get("url") or ""
2391        warning = f" | warning={result.get('source_warning')}" if result.get("source_warning") else ""
2392        return f"browser_navigate opened {title} <{url}>{warning}"
2393    if name == "browser_snapshot":
2394        snapshot = str(result.get("snapshot") or result.get("data") or "")
2395        warning = f" | warning={result.get('source_warning')}" if result.get("source_warning") else ""
2396        return f"browser_snapshot returned {len(snapshot)} chars{warning}"
2397    if name == "read_artifact":
2398        return f"read_artifact read {result.get('artifact_id')}"
2399    if name == "search_artifacts":
2400        results = result.get("results") if isinstance(result.get("results"), list) else []
2401        return f"search_artifacts returned {len(results)} results for {args.get('query')!r}"
2402    return f"{name} completed"
2403
2404
2405def _error_result(exc: Exception) -> dict[str, Any]:
2406    result: dict[str, Any] = {
2407        "success": False,
2408        "error": str(exc),
2409        "error_type": type(exc).__name__,
2410    }
2411    if isinstance(exc, LLMResponseError) and exc.payload:
2412        result["provider_payload"] = exc.payload
2413    return result
2414
2415
2416def _hard_llm_provider_failure_note(exc: Exception) -> str:
2417    text = _provider_error_text(exc)
2418    hard_markers = {
2419        "authenticationerror",
2420        "permissiondeniederror",
2421        "authentication failed",
2422        "permission denied",
2423        "invalid api key",
2424        "incorrect api key",
2425        "user not found",
2426        "key limit exceeded",
2427        "insufficient_quota",
2428        "insufficient quota",
2429        "insufficient credits",
2430        "billing",
2431        "payment required",
2432        "credit limit",
2433        "quota exceeded",
2434        "401",
2435        "403",
2436    }
2437    if not any(marker in text for marker in hard_markers):
2438        return ""
2439    return (
2440        "Model provider requires operator action: authentication, permission, billing, or quota is blocking calls. "
2441        "Paused this job so the daemon does not repeat failing model requests. Update credentials/model access, then resume."
2442    )
2443
2444
2445def _provider_error_text(exc: Exception) -> str:
2446    parts = [type(exc).__name__, str(exc)]
2447    if isinstance(exc, LLMResponseError) and exc.payload:
2448        parts.append(json.dumps(exc.payload, ensure_ascii=False, default=str))
2449    return " ".join(parts).lower()
2450
2451
2452def _max_step_no(steps: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> int:
2453    return max((int(step.get("step_no") or 0) for step in steps), default=0)
2454
2455
2456def _should_reflect(job: dict[str, Any], recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> bool:
2457    if not recent_steps:
2458        return False
2459    if recent_steps[-1].get("kind") == "reflection":
2460        return False
2461    step_no = _max_step_no(recent_steps)
2462    if step_no == 0 or step_no % REFLECTION_INTERVAL_STEPS != 0:
2463        return False
2464    reflections = _metadata_list(job, "reflections")
2465    if not reflections:
2466        return True
2467    last_reflected = 0
2468    metadata = reflections[-1].get("metadata") if isinstance(reflections[-1].get("metadata"), dict) else {}
2469    if isinstance(metadata.get("through_step"), int):
2470        last_reflected = metadata["through_step"]
2471    return step_no > last_reflected
2472
2473
2474def _claim_operator_queue(db: AgentDB, job_id: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
2475    steering = db.claim_operator_messages(job_id, modes=("steer",), limit=1)
2476    if steering:
2477        return steering
2478    return db.claim_operator_messages(job_id, modes=("follow_up",), limit=1)
2479
2480
2481def _emit_loop_start(db: AgentDB, job_id: str, run_id: str) -> None:
2482    db.append_event(
2483        job_id,
2484        event_type="loop",
2485        title="agent_start",
2486        ref_table="job_runs",
2487        ref_id=run_id,
2488        metadata={"run_id": run_id},
2489    )
2490    db.append_event(
2491        job_id,
2492        event_type="loop",
2493        title="turn_start",
2494        ref_table="job_runs",
2495        ref_id=run_id,
2496        metadata={"run_id": run_id},
2497    )
2498
2499
2500def _emit_assistant_message_event(
2501    db: AgentDB,
2502    job_id: str,
2503    run_id: str,
2504    response: LLMResponse,
2505    *,
2506    messages: list[dict[str, Any]],
2507    context_length: int,
2508) -> None:
2509    if response.tool_calls:
2510        body = ", ".join(call.name for call in response.tool_calls)
2511        metadata = {"run_id": run_id, "tool_calls": [call.name for call in response.tool_calls]}
2512    else:
2513        body = response.content[:1000]
2514        metadata = {"run_id": run_id, "tool_calls": []}
2515    metadata["usage"] = _turn_usage_metadata(response, messages=messages, context_length=context_length)
2516    if response.model:
2517        metadata["model"] = response.model
2518    if response.response_id:
2519        metadata["response_id"] = response.response_id
2520    db.append_event(
2521        job_id,
2522        event_type="loop",
2523        title="message_end",
2524        body=body,
2525        ref_table="job_runs",
2526        ref_id=run_id,
2527        metadata=metadata,
2528    )
2529
2530
2531def _emit_loop_end(
2532    db: AgentDB,
2533    job_id: str,
2534    run_id: str,
2535    *,
2536    status: str,
2537    step_id: str | None = None,
2538    tool_name: str | None = None,
2539    detail: str = "",
2540) -> None:
2541    metadata = {"run_id": run_id, "status": status, "step_id": step_id or "", "tool": tool_name or ""}
2542    db.append_event(
2543        job_id,
2544        event_type="loop",
2545        title="turn_end",
2546        body=detail[:1000],
2547        ref_table="job_runs",
2548        ref_id=run_id,
2549        metadata=metadata,
2550    )
2551    db.append_event(
2552        job_id,
2553        event_type="loop",
2554        title="agent_end",
2555        body=status,
2556        ref_table="job_runs",
2557        ref_id=run_id,
2558        metadata=metadata,
2559    )
2560
2561
2562def _turn_usage_metadata(
2563    response: LLMResponse,
2564    *,
2565    messages: list[dict[str, Any]],
2566    context_length: int,
2567) -> dict[str, Any]:
2568    prompt_text = json.dumps(messages, ensure_ascii=False, default=str)
2569    completion_text = response.content + json.dumps(
2570        [{"name": call.name, "arguments": call.arguments} for call in response.tool_calls],
2571        ensure_ascii=False,
2572        default=str,
2573    )
2574    usage = dict(response.usage) if isinstance(response.usage, dict) else {}
2575    prompt_tokens = _as_int(usage.get("prompt_tokens")) or _estimate_token_count(prompt_text)
2576    completion_tokens = _as_int(usage.get("completion_tokens")) or _estimate_token_count(completion_text)
2577    usage.setdefault("prompt_tokens", prompt_tokens)
2578    usage.setdefault("completion_tokens", completion_tokens)
2579    usage.setdefault("total_tokens", prompt_tokens + completion_tokens)
2580    usage.setdefault("estimated", not bool(response.usage))
2581    usage["prompt_chars"] = len(prompt_text)
2582    usage["completion_chars"] = len(completion_text)
2583    if context_length > 0:
2584        usage["context_length"] = context_length
2585        usage["context_fraction"] = round(prompt_tokens / max(1, context_length), 6)
2586    return usage
2587
2588
2589def _estimate_token_count(text: str) -> int:
2590    if not text:
2591        return 0
2592    return max(1, (len(text) + 3) // 4)
2593
2594
2595def _run_reflection_step(
2596    job: dict[str, Any],
2597    recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]],
2598    *,
2599    db: AgentDB,
2600    job_id: str,
2601    run_id: str,
2602) -> StepExecution:
2603    step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="reflection", tool_name="reflect")
2604    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
2605    findings = metadata.get("finding_ledger") if isinstance(metadata.get("finding_ledger"), list) else []
2606    sources = metadata.get("source_ledger") if isinstance(metadata.get("source_ledger"), list) else []
2607    tasks = metadata.get("task_queue") if isinstance(metadata.get("task_queue"), list) else []
2608    experiments = metadata.get("experiment_ledger") if isinstance(metadata.get("experiment_ledger"), list) else []
2609    lessons = metadata.get("lessons") if isinstance(metadata.get("lessons"), list) else []
2610    roadmap = metadata.get("roadmap") if isinstance(metadata.get("roadmap"), dict) else {}
2611    milestones = roadmap.get("milestones") if isinstance(roadmap.get("milestones"), list) else []
2612    validating_milestones = [
2613        milestone for milestone in milestones
2614        if isinstance(milestone, dict)
2615        and (
2616            str(milestone.get("status") or "planned") == "validating"
2617            or str(milestone.get("validation_status") or "not_started") == "pending"
2618        )
2619    ]
2620    operator_messages = metadata.get("operator_messages") if isinstance(metadata.get("operator_messages"), list) else []
2621    active_operator_messages = [
2622        entry for entry in operator_messages
2623        if isinstance(entry, dict)
2624        and str(entry.get("mode") or "steer") in {"steer", "follow_up"}
2625        and not entry.get("acknowledged_at")
2626        and not entry.get("superseded_at")
2627    ]
2628    pending_measurement = _pending_measurement_obligation(job)
2629    artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job_id, limit=12)
2630    failures = [step for step in recent_steps[-REFLECTION_INTERVAL_STEPS:] if step.get("status") == "failed" or step.get("status") == "blocked"]
2631    step_no = _max_step_no(recent_steps)
2632    finding_batches = [artifact for artifact in artifacts if "finding" in str(artifact.get("title") or artifact.get("summary") or "").lower()]
2633    best_sources = sorted(
2634        [
2635            source for source in sources
2636            if isinstance(source, dict)
2637            and (
2638                _as_int(source.get("yield_count")) > 0
2639                or _as_float(source.get("usefulness_score")) >= 0.2
2640            )
2641            and _as_int(source.get("fail_count")) <= max(0, _as_int(source.get("yield_count")))
2642        ],
2643        key=lambda source: (_as_float(source.get("usefulness_score")), _as_int(source.get("yield_count"))),
2644        reverse=True,
2645    )[:3]
2646    source_text = ", ".join(str(source.get("source") or "") for source in best_sources) or "no high-yield source yet"
2647    measured_experiments = [experiment for experiment in experiments if isinstance(experiment, dict) and experiment.get("metric_value") is not None]
2648    best_experiments = [experiment for experiment in measured_experiments if experiment.get("best_observed")]
2649    best_experiment_text = "no measured experiment yet"
2650    if best_experiments:
2651        best_experiment_text = "; ".join(
2652            f"{experiment.get('title')} " + format_metric_value(
2653                experiment.get("metric_name") or "metric",
2654                experiment.get("metric_value"),
2655                experiment.get("metric_unit") or "",
2656            )
2657            for experiment in best_experiments[-3:]
2658        )
2659    summary = (
2660        f"Reflection through step #{step_no}: {len(findings)} findings, {len(sources)} sources, "
2661        f"{len(tasks)} tasks, {len(experiments)} experiments, {len(milestones)} roadmap milestones, "
2662        f"{len(lessons)} lessons, "
2663        f"{len(active_operator_messages)} active operator messages, "
2664        f"{len(finding_batches)} recent finding artifacts, {len(failures)} recent blocked/failed steps. "
2665        f"Best source direction: {source_text}. Best measured result: {best_experiment_text}."
2666        + (f" Roadmap '{roadmap.get('title')}' has {len(validating_milestones)} milestone(s) needing validation." if roadmap else "")
2667        + (" Pending measurement obligation needs resolution." if pending_measurement else "")
2668    )
2669    strategy = (
2670        "Prioritize source types that have yielded durable findings or artifacts; "
2671        "downgrade repetitive, blocked, or low-evidence paths that do not advance the objective. "
2672        "For measurable work, convert ideas into record_experiment trials and choose the next branch from the best observed result. "
2673        "For broad work, keep roadmap milestones compact and validate milestones from evidence before expanding scope."
2674    )
2675    reflection = db.append_reflection(
2676        job_id,
2677        summary,
2678        strategy=strategy,
2679        metadata={
2680            "through_step": step_no,
2681            "finding_count": len(findings),
2682            "source_count": len(sources),
2683            "task_count": len(tasks),
2684            "experiment_count": len(experiments),
2685            "roadmap_milestone_count": len(milestones),
2686            "roadmap_validation_needed_count": len(validating_milestones),
2687            "measured_experiment_count": len(measured_experiments),
2688            "active_operator_message_count": len(active_operator_messages),
2689            "pending_measurement_obligation": bool(pending_measurement),
2690        },
2691    )
2692    db.append_lesson(job_id, strategy, category="strategy", confidence=0.75, metadata={"source": "reflection", "through_step": step_no})
2693    db.append_agent_update(job_id, summary, category="plan", metadata={"reflection": reflection})
2694    result = {"success": True, "reflection": reflection}
2695    db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", summary=summary, output_data=result)
2696    db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
2697    _emit_loop_end(db, job_id, run_id, status="completed", step_id=step_id, tool_name="reflect", detail=summary)
2698    refresh_memory_index(db, job_id)
2699    return StepExecution(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id, tool_name="reflect", status="completed", result=result)
2700
2701
2702def _run_guard_recovery_step(
2703    context: dict[str, Any],
2704    *,
2705    db: AgentDB,
2706    job_id: str,
2707    run_id: str,
2708) -> StepExecution:
2709    error = str(context.get("error") or "recoverable guard")
2710    step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="recovery", tool_name="guard_recovery")
2711    lesson = db.append_lesson(
2712        job_id,
2713        (
2714            f"Repeated guard block '{error}' occurred {context.get('count')} times. "
2715            "Do not retry the same blocked tool pattern; update durable progress state, create a new branch, "
2716            "or explicitly reject the branch before continuing."
2717        ),
2718        category="strategy",
2719        confidence=0.75,
2720        metadata={"guard_recovery": context},
2721    )
2722    task = db.append_task_record(
2723        job_id,
2724        title=f"Resolve guard: {error}",
2725        status="open",
2726        priority=9,
2727        goal="Convert the repeated guard block into durable progress before retrying the blocked action.",
2728        output_contract="decision",
2729        acceptance_criteria=(
2730            "Use record_tasks, record_findings, record_source, record_experiment, or record_lesson to state what "
2731            "changed, what branch is rejected, or what concrete branch should run next."
2732        ),
2733        evidence_needed=f"Recent blocked tools: {', '.join(context.get('blocked_tools') or [])}",
2734        stall_behavior="If the same guard appears again, pivot to a different branch or record the branch as blocked.",
2735        metadata={"guard_recovery": context},
2736    )
2737    message = (
2738        f"Guard recovery opened a task after repeated '{error}' blocks "
2739        f"from step #{context.get('first_step_no')} to #{context.get('latest_step_no')}."
2740    )
2741    update = db.append_agent_update(
2742        job_id,
2743        message,
2744        category="blocked",
2745        metadata={"guard_recovery": context, "task_key": task.get("key"), "lesson_key": lesson.get("key")},
2746    )
2747    result = {
2748        "success": True,
2749        "guard_recovery": context,
2750        "lesson": lesson,
2751        "task": task,
2752        "update": update,
2753    }
2754    db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", summary=message, output_data=result)
2755    db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
2756    _emit_loop_end(db, job_id, run_id, status="completed", step_id=step_id, tool_name="guard_recovery", detail=message)
2757    refresh_memory_index(db, job_id)
2758    return StepExecution(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id, tool_name="guard_recovery", status="completed", result=result)
2759
2760
2761def _evidence_checkpoint_content(evidence_step: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
2762    output = evidence_step.get("output") if isinstance(evidence_step.get("output"), dict) else {}
2763    input_data = evidence_step.get("input") if isinstance(evidence_step.get("input"), dict) else {}
2764    observation = _observation_for_prompt(evidence_step.get("tool_name"), output)
2765    return "\n\n".join([
2766        "# Auto Evidence Checkpoint",
2767        f"Source step: #{evidence_step.get('step_no')} {evidence_step.get('tool_name') or evidence_step.get('kind')}",
2768        f"Summary: {evidence_step.get('summary') or ''}",
2769        f"Arguments:\n```json\n{json.dumps(input_data.get('arguments') or {}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)[:3000]}\n```",
2770        f"Observed:\n{observation or 'No compact observation available.'}",
2771        f"Raw output excerpt:\n```json\n{json.dumps(output, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)[:9000]}\n```",
2772    ])
2773
2774
2775def _auto_persist_evidence(
2776    *,
2777    db: AgentDB,
2778    artifacts: ArtifactStore,
2779    job_id: str,
2780    run_id: str,
2781    step_id: str,
2782    blocked_tool: str,
2783    evidence_step: dict[str, Any],
2784) -> dict[str, Any]:
2785    stored = artifacts.write_text(
2786        job_id=job_id,
2787        run_id=run_id,
2788        step_id=step_id,
2789        title=f"Auto Evidence Checkpoint after step {evidence_step.get('step_no')}",
2790        summary=f"Auto-saved evidence before allowing more research; blocked tool was {blocked_tool}.",
2791        content=_evidence_checkpoint_content(evidence_step),
2792        artifact_type="text",
2793        metadata={"auto_checkpoint": True, "evidence_step": evidence_step.get("id"), "blocked_tool": blocked_tool},
2794    )
2795    lesson = db.append_lesson(
2796        job_id,
2797        (
2798            f"Evidence from step #{evidence_step.get('step_no')} must be persisted before more research; "
2799            f"auto-saved checkpoint {stored.id} after blocked {blocked_tool}."
2800        ),
2801        category="mistake",
2802        confidence=0.8,
2803        metadata={"artifact_id": stored.id, "blocked_tool": blocked_tool},
2804    )
2805    db.append_agent_update(
2806        job_id,
2807        f"Auto-saved evidence checkpoint {stored.id} after the model tried {blocked_tool} before persisting evidence.",
2808        category="blocked",
2809        metadata={"artifact_id": stored.id, "blocked_tool": blocked_tool},
2810    )
2811    return {"artifact_id": stored.id, "path": str(stored.path), "lesson": lesson}
2812
2813
2814def _auto_record_blocked_source(
2815    *,
2816    db: AgentDB,
2817    job_id: str,
2818    context: dict[str, Any],
2819    blocked_tool: str,
2820) -> dict[str, Any]:
2821    source = str(context.get("url") or context.get("title") or "unknown blocked browser source")
2822    reason = str(context.get("reason") or "anti-bot challenge")
2823    record = db.append_source_record(
2824        job_id,
2825        source,
2826        source_type="blocked_browser_source",
2827        usefulness_score=0.02,
2828        fail_count_delta=1,
2829        warnings=[reason],
2830        outcome=f"blocked by {reason}; pivot to an alternate source for the current objective",
2831        metadata={"blocked_tool": blocked_tool, "source_step": context.get("step_id")},
2832    )
2833    lesson = None
2834    if int(record.get("fail_count") or 0) <= 2:
2835        lesson = db.append_lesson(
2836            job_id,
2837            "Blocked, CAPTCHA, login, paywall, or anti-bot pages are not usable evidence for any long-running task; record the source outcome and pivot instead of repeating browser actions.",
2838            category="source_quality",
2839            confidence=0.9,
2840            metadata={"source": source, "blocked_tool": blocked_tool},
2841        )
2842    db.append_agent_update(
2843        job_id,
2844        f"Blocked source guard: current source is {reason}; pivoting away instead of looping.",
2845        category="blocked",
2846        metadata={"source": source, "blocked_tool": blocked_tool, "reason": reason},
2847    )
2848    return {"source": record, "lesson": lesson}
2849
2850
2851def _auto_record_tool_source_quality(
2852    *,
2853    db: AgentDB,
2854    job_id: str,
2855    tool_name: str | None,
2856    result: dict[str, Any],
2857) -> None:
2858    if tool_name == "web_extract":
2859        pages = result.get("pages") if isinstance(result.get("pages"), list) else []
2860        for page in pages[:12]:
2861            if not isinstance(page, dict):
2862                continue
2863            url = str(page.get("url") or "").strip()
2864            if not url:
2865                continue
2866            text = str(page.get("text") or "")
2867            error = str(page.get("error") or "")
2868            if error:
2869                db.append_source_record(
2870                    job_id,
2871                    url,
2872                    source_type="web_extract",
2873                    usefulness_score=0.1,
2874                    fail_count_delta=1,
2875                    warnings=[error[:180]],
2876                    outcome=f"extract failed: {error[:180]}",
2877                    metadata={"auto_from_tool": "web_extract"},
2878                )
2879                continue
2880            score = 0.35
2881            if len(text.strip()) >= 500:
2882                score = 0.55
2883            if len(text.strip()) >= 3000:
2884                score = 0.7
2885            db.append_source_record(
2886                job_id,
2887                url,
2888                source_type="web_extract",
2889                usefulness_score=score,
2890                yield_count=0,
2891                outcome=f"extracted {len(text.strip())} chars for possible use",
2892                metadata={"auto_from_tool": "web_extract"},
2893            )
2894        return
2895    if tool_name in {"browser_navigate", "browser_snapshot"}:
2896        context = _browser_warning_context(result)
2897        if not context:
2898            return
2899        result["source_warning"] = context["reason"]
2900        result["source_url"] = context.get("url") or ""
2901        _auto_record_blocked_source(db=db, job_id=job_id, context=context, blocked_tool=tool_name or "browser")
2902
2903
2904def _auto_reconcile_artifact_tasks(
2905    *,
2906    db: AgentDB,
2907    job_id: str,
2908    args: dict[str, Any],
2909    result: dict[str, Any],
2910) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
2911    artifact_id = str(result.get("artifact_id") or "")
2912    if not artifact_id:
2913        return []
2914    artifact_title = str(args.get("title") or "")
2915    artifact_summary = str(args.get("summary") or "")
2916    artifact_content = str(args.get("content") or "")
2917    artifact_text = " ".join([artifact_title, artifact_summary, artifact_content[:4000]])
2918    artifact_tokens = _text_tokens(artifact_text)
2919    if len(artifact_tokens) < 2:
2920        return []
2921    job = db.get_job(job_id)
2922    reconciled = []
2923    for task in _metadata_list(job, "task_queue"):
2924        status = str(task.get("status") or "open").strip().lower()
2925        if status not in {"open", "active"}:
2926            continue
2927        contract = str(task.get("output_contract") or "").strip().lower()
2928        if contract in {"experiment", "action", "monitor"}:
2929            continue
2930        task_text = " ".join(
2931            str(task.get(key) or "")
2932            for key in ("title", "goal", "acceptance_criteria", "evidence_needed", "source_hint")
2933        )
2934        if not _artifact_can_reconcile_task(
2935            contract=contract,
2936            task_text=task_text,
2937            artifact_title=artifact_title,
2938            artifact_summary=artifact_summary,
2939        ):
2940            continue
2941        task_tokens = _text_tokens(task_text)
2942        if len(task_tokens) < 2:
2943            continue
2944        overlap = task_tokens & artifact_tokens
2945        needed = max(2, min(4, (len(task_tokens) + 1) // 2))
2946        if len(overlap) < needed:
2947            continue
2948        updated = db.append_task_record(
2949            job_id,
2950            title=str(task.get("title") or ""),
2951            status="done",
2952            priority=_as_int(task.get("priority")),
2953            goal=str(task.get("goal") or ""),
2954            source_hint=str(task.get("source_hint") or ""),
2955            result=f"Saved output {artifact_id}: {_clip_text(artifact_title or artifact_summary, 180)}",
2956            parent=str(task.get("parent") or ""),
2957            output_contract=contract,
2958            acceptance_criteria=str(task.get("acceptance_criteria") or ""),
2959            evidence_needed=str(task.get("evidence_needed") or ""),
2960            stall_behavior=str(task.get("stall_behavior") or ""),
2961            metadata={
2962                **(task.get("metadata") if isinstance(task.get("metadata"), dict) else {}),
2963                "auto_reconciled_from_artifact": artifact_id,
2964                "matched_tokens": sorted(overlap)[:12],
2965            },
2966        )
2967        reconciled.append(updated)
2968    if reconciled:
2969        titles = ", ".join(str(task.get("title") or "") for task in reconciled[:4])
2970        db.append_agent_update(
2971            job_id,
2972            f"Task progress reconciled from saved output {artifact_id}: {titles}.",
2973            category="plan",
2974            metadata={"artifact_id": artifact_id, "task_count": len(reconciled)},
2975        )
2976    return reconciled
2977
2978
2979def _artifact_can_reconcile_task(
2980    *,
2981    contract: str,
2982    task_text: str,
2983    artifact_title: str,
2984    artifact_summary: str,
2985) -> bool:
2986    contract = contract.strip().lower()
2987    if contract in {"experiment", "action", "monitor"}:
2988        return False
2989    if contract == "research":
2990        return True
2991    artifact_text = f"{artifact_title} {artifact_summary}".lower()
2992    task_lower = task_text.lower()
2993    evidence_like = any(term in artifact_text for term in EVIDENCE_ARTIFACT_TERMS)
2994    deliverable_like = any(term in artifact_text for term in DELIVERABLE_ARTIFACT_TERMS)
2995    task_needs_deliverable_action = any(term in task_lower for term in TASK_DELIVERABLE_ACTION_TERMS)
2996    if evidence_like:
2997        return False
2998    if task_needs_deliverable_action and not deliverable_like:
2999        return False
3000    return True
3001
3002
3003def _auto_checkpoint_update(
3004    *,
3005    db: AgentDB,
3006    job_id: str,
3007    step_no: int,
3008    tool_name: str | None,
3009    args: dict[str, Any],
3010    result: dict[str, Any],
3011) -> None:
3012    title_text = " ".join(str(args.get(key) or "") for key in ("title", "summary", "type")).lower()
3013    is_finding_batch = tool_name == "write_artifact" and "finding" in title_text
3014    if not is_finding_batch and step_no % 10 != 0:
3015        return
3016    job = db.get_job(job_id)
3017    metadata = job.get("metadata") if isinstance(job.get("metadata"), dict) else {}
3018    previous = metadata.get("last_checkpoint_counts") if isinstance(metadata.get("last_checkpoint_counts"), dict) else {}
3019    checkpoint = build_progress_checkpoint(
3020        metadata,
3021        previous_counts=previous,
3022        step_no=step_no,
3023        tool_name=tool_name,
3024        artifact_id=str(result.get("artifact_id") or ""),
3025        is_finding_output=is_finding_batch,
3026    )
3027    db.append_agent_update(
3028        job_id,
3029        checkpoint.message,
3030        category=checkpoint.category,
3031        metadata={"step_no": step_no, "tool": tool_name, "deltas": checkpoint.deltas},
3032    )
3033    streak = _as_int(metadata.get("activity_checkpoint_streak"))
3034    streak = streak + 1 if checkpoint.category == "activity" else 0
3035    db.update_job_metadata(
3036        job_id,
3037        {
3038            "last_checkpoint_counts": checkpoint.counts,
3039            "activity_checkpoint_streak": streak,
3040        },
3041    )
3042
3043
3044def _execute_tool_call(
3045    call: Any,
3046    *,
3047    job: dict[str, Any],
3048    recent_steps: list[dict[str, Any]],
3049    config: AppConfig,
3050    db: AgentDB,
3051    artifacts: ArtifactStore,
3052    registry: ToolRegistry,
3053    job_id: str,
3054    run_id: str,
3055) -> tuple[StepExecution, bool, str, str | None]:
3056    step_id = db.add_step(
3057        job_id=job_id,
3058        run_id=run_id,
3059        kind="tool",
3060        tool_name=call.name,
3061        input_data={"tool_call_id": call.id, "arguments": call.arguments},
3062    )
3063    blocked = _blocked_tool_call_result(call.name, call.arguments, recent_steps, job)
3064    if blocked:
3065        result, summary = blocked
3066        result = {**result, "success": True, "recoverable": True}
3067        evidence_checkpoint = None
3068        if result.get("error") == "artifact required before more research":
3069            evidence_step = next(
3070                (step for step in recent_steps if step.get("id") == result.get("previous_step")),
3071                None,
3072            )
3073            if evidence_step:
3074                evidence_checkpoint = _auto_persist_evidence(
3075                    db=db,
3076                    artifacts=artifacts,
3077                    job_id=job_id,
3078                    run_id=run_id,
3079                    step_id=step_id,
3080                    blocked_tool=call.name,
3081                    evidence_step=evidence_step,
3082                )
3083                result["auto_checkpoint"] = evidence_checkpoint
3084                summary = f"blocked {call.name}; auto-saved evidence checkpoint {evidence_checkpoint['artifact_id']}"
3085        anti_bot_source = result.get("anti_bot_source") if isinstance(result.get("anti_bot_source"), dict) else None
3086        if anti_bot_source:
3087            result["auto_source_record"] = _auto_record_blocked_source(
3088                db=db,
3089                job_id=job_id,
3090                context=anti_bot_source,
3091                blocked_tool=call.name,
3092            )
3093        known_bad_source = result.get("known_bad_source") if isinstance(result.get("known_bad_source"), dict) else None
3094        if known_bad_source:
3095            db.append_agent_update(
3096                job_id,
3097                f"Source ledger blocked retry of {known_bad_source.get('source')}; choosing a different route next.",
3098                category="blocked",
3099                metadata={"source": known_bad_source, "blocked_tool": call.name},
3100            )
3101        db.finish_step(
3102            step_id,
3103            status="blocked",
3104            summary=summary,
3105            output_data=result,
3106            error=None,
3107        )
3108        return (
3109            StepExecution(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id, tool_name=call.name, status="blocked", result=result),
3110            True,
3111            summary,
3112            None,
3113        )
3114
3115    ctx = ToolContext(
3116        config=config,
3117        db=db,
3118        artifacts=artifacts,
3119        job_id=job_id,
3120        run_id=run_id,
3121        step_id=step_id,
3122        task_id=job_id,
3123    )
3124    try:
3125        raw_result = registry.handle(call.name, call.arguments, ctx)
3126        result = _parse_tool_result(raw_result)
3127        ok = bool(result.get("success", True)) and not result.get("error")
3128        status = "completed" if ok else "failed"
3129        if ok:
3130            _auto_record_tool_source_quality(db=db, job_id=job_id, tool_name=call.name, result=result)
3131        summary = _summarize_tool_result(call.name, call.arguments, result, ok=ok)
3132        db.finish_step(step_id, status=status, summary=summary, output_data=result, error=result.get("error"))
3133        if ok:
3134            finished_step = _step_by_id(db, job_id, step_id)
3135            _maybe_create_measurement_obligation(
3136                db=db,
3137                job_id=job_id,
3138                step=finished_step,
3139                tool_name=call.name,
3140                args=call.arguments,
3141                result=result,
3142            )
3143            _auto_checkpoint_update(
3144                db=db,
3145                job_id=job_id,
3146                step_no=(finished_step or db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)[-1])["step_no"],
3147                tool_name=call.name,
3148                args=call.arguments,
3149                result=result,
3150            )
3151            if call.name == "write_artifact":
3152                reconciled_tasks = _auto_reconcile_artifact_tasks(
3153                    db=db,
3154                    job_id=job_id,
3155                    args=call.arguments,
3156                    result=result,
3157                )
3158                if reconciled_tasks:
3159                    result["auto_reconciled_tasks"] = [
3160                        {"title": task.get("title"), "status": task.get("status")}
3161                        for task in reconciled_tasks[:8]
3162                    ]
3163        return (
3164            StepExecution(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id, tool_name=call.name, status=status, result=result),
3165            status != "completed",
3166            summary,
3167            result.get("error") if status == "failed" else None,
3168        )
3169    except Exception as exc:
3170        result = _error_result(exc)
3171        db.finish_step(step_id, status="failed", summary=f"{call.name} raised", output_data=result, error=str(exc))
3172        return (
3173            StepExecution(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id, tool_name=call.name, status="failed", result=result),
3174            True,
3175            str(exc),
3176            str(exc),
3177        )
3178
3179
3180def run_one_step(
3181    job_id: str,
3182    *,
3183    config: AppConfig | None = None,
3184    db: AgentDB | None = None,
3185    llm: StepLLM | None = None,
3186    registry: ToolRegistry = DEFAULT_REGISTRY,
3187) -> StepExecution:
3188    config = config or load_config()
3189    config.ensure_dirs()
3190    owns_db = db is None
3191    db = db or AgentDB(config.runtime.state_db_path)
3192    try:
3193        artifacts = ArtifactStore(config.runtime.home, db=db)
3194        job = db.get_job(job_id)
3195        if _acknowledge_non_prompt_operator_context(db, job_id):
3196            job = db.get_job(job_id)
3197        if _clear_invalid_measurement_obligation(db, job_id):
3198            job = db.get_job(job_id)
3199        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model=config.model.model)
3200        _emit_loop_start(db, job_id, run_id)
3201        recent_steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
3202        if _should_reflect(job, recent_steps):
3203            return _run_reflection_step(job, recent_steps, db=db, job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id)
3204        guard_recovery = _repeated_guard_block_context(recent_steps)
3205        if guard_recovery:
3206            return _run_guard_recovery_step(guard_recovery, db=db, job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id)
3207        active_operator_messages = _claim_operator_queue(db, job_id)
3208        if active_operator_messages:
3209            job = db.get_job(job_id)
3210        messages = build_messages(
3211            job,
3212            recent_steps,
3213            memory_entries=db.list_memory(job_id),
3214            program_text=_load_program_text(config, job_id),
3215            timeline_events=db.list_timeline_events(job_id, limit=30),
3216            active_operator_messages=active_operator_messages,
3217            include_unclaimed_operator_messages=False,
3218        )
3219        llm = llm or OpenAIChatLLM(config.model)
3220        try:
3221            response: LLMResponse = llm.next_action(messages=messages, tools=registry.openai_tools())
3222        except Exception as exc:
3223            step_id = db.add_step(
3224                job_id=job_id,
3225                run_id=run_id,
3226                kind="llm",
3227                status="failed",
3228                summary=f"model call failed: {type(exc).__name__}",
3229                input_data={"model": config.model.model},
3230            )
3231            result = _error_result(exc)
3232            hard_failure_note = _hard_llm_provider_failure_note(exc)
3233            if hard_failure_note:
3234                result["provider_action_required"] = True
3235                result["pause_reason"] = "llm_provider_blocked"
3236                db.update_job_status(
3237                    job_id,
3238                    "paused",
3239                    metadata_patch={
3240                        "last_note": hard_failure_note,
3241                        "provider_blocked_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
3242                    },
3243                )
3244                db.append_agent_update(
3245                    job_id,
3246                    hard_failure_note,
3247                    category="error",
3248                    metadata={"reason": "llm_provider_blocked", "error_type": type(exc).__name__},
3249                )
3250            db.finish_step(step_id, status="failed", output_data=result, error=str(exc))
3251            db.finish_run(run_id, "failed", error=str(exc))
3252            _emit_loop_end(db, job_id, run_id, status="failed", step_id=step_id, detail=str(exc))
3253            refresh_memory_index(db, job_id)
3254            return StepExecution(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id, tool_name=None, status="failed", result=result)
3255
3256        _emit_assistant_message_event(
3257            db,
3258            job_id,
3259            run_id,
3260            response,
3261            messages=messages,
3262            context_length=config.model.context_length,
3263        )
3264
3265        if response.tool_calls:
3266            executions: list[StepExecution] = []
3267            details: list[str] = []
3268            run_error: str | None = None
3269            for call in response.tool_calls:
3270                current_job = db.get_job(job_id)
3271                current_recent_steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
3272                execution, stop_batch, detail, error = _execute_tool_call(
3273                    call,
3274                    job=current_job,
3275                    recent_steps=current_recent_steps,
3276                    config=config,
3277                    db=db,
3278                    artifacts=artifacts,
3279                    registry=registry,
3280                    job_id=job_id,
3281                    run_id=run_id,
3282                )
3283                executions.append(execution)
3284                details.append(detail)
3285                if error:
3286                    run_error = error
3287                if stop_batch:
3288                    break
3289
3290            final_execution = executions[-1]
3291            run_status = "failed" if any(item.status == "failed" for item in executions) else "completed"
3292            db.finish_run(run_id, run_status, error=run_error)
3293            detail = f"executed {len(executions)}/{len(response.tool_calls)} tool calls"
3294            if details:
3295                detail = f"{detail}; last: {details[-1]}"
3296            _emit_loop_end(
3297                db,
3298                job_id,
3299                run_id,
3300                status=final_execution.status,
3301                step_id=final_execution.step_id,
3302                tool_name=final_execution.tool_name,
3303                detail=detail,
3304            )
3305            refresh_memory_index(db, job_id)
3306            return final_execution
3307
3308        step_id = db.add_step(
3309            job_id=job_id,
3310            run_id=run_id,
3311            kind="assistant",
3312            status="completed",
3313            summary=response.content[:500],
3314            input_data={},
3315        )
3316        result = {"success": True, "content": response.content}
3317        db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", output_data=result)
3318        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
3319        _emit_loop_end(db, job_id, run_id, status="completed", step_id=step_id, detail=response.content[:1000])
3320        refresh_memory_index(db, job_id)
3321        return StepExecution(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id, tool_name=None, status="completed", result=result)
3322    finally:
3323        if owns_db:
3324            db.close()
plans/nipux-runtime-notes.md 50 lines 
   1# Nipux Runtime Notes
   2
   3Nipux is a narrow, restartable worker for long-running browser, web research,
   4and command-line jobs. The active implementation is intentionally small and
   5centered on `nipux_cli/`, `tests/nipux_cli/`, and the `nipux` console script.
   6
   7## Runtime Shape
   8
   9- Package: `nipux_cli/`
  10- CLI entry point: `nipux`
  11- State home: `~/.nipux` or `NIPUX_HOME`
  12- Config file: `~/.nipux/config.yaml`
  13- Database: SQLite with WAL
  14- Artifacts: per-job files under the configured state home
  15- Browser profiles: per-job `agent-browser` profiles
  16- Model API: OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint
  17
  18## Design Constraints
  19
  20- Keep every worker step bounded and restartable.
  21- Persist useful evidence as artifacts before summarizing it.
  22- Keep summaries compact and point back to artifacts.
  23- Maintain source, finding, task, experiment, and lesson ledgers.
  24- Keep jobs runnable until the operator pauses or cancels them.
  25- Keep the tool registry explicit and small.
  26- Keep runtime behavior domain-neutral.
  27
  28## Active Tools
  29
  30- Browser: `browser_navigate`, `browser_snapshot`, `browser_click`,
  31  `browser_type`, `browser_scroll`, `browser_back`, `browser_press`,
  32  `browser_console`
  33- Web: `web_search`, `web_extract`
  34- Local command work: `shell_exec`
  35- Artifacts: `write_artifact`, `read_artifact`, `search_artifacts`
  36- Job state and visibility: `update_job_state`, `report_update`,
  37  `send_digest_email`
  38- Learning ledgers: `record_lesson`, `record_source`, `record_findings`,
  39  `record_tasks`, `record_experiment`
  40
  41## Validation
  42
  43```bash
  44PYTEST_ADDOPTS='' uv run --extra dev python -m pytest -q
  45uv run --extra dev ruff check --isolated nipux_cli tests/nipux_cli
  46uv run nipux doctor
  47```
  48
  49Use `uv run nipux daemon --once --fake` for a deterministic no-model smoke
  50test after CLI or daemon changes.
pyproject.toml 51 lines 
   1[build-system]
   2requires = ["setuptools>=61.0"]
   3build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"
   4
   5[project]
   6name = "nipux"
   7version = "0.1.0"
   8description = "A restartable CLI worker for long-running agent jobs"
   9readme = "README.md"
  10requires-python = ">=3.11"
  11authors = [{ name = "Nipux" }]
  12license = "MIT"
  13keywords = ["agent", "cli", "automation", "daemon", "openai-compatible"]
  14classifiers = [
  15  "Development Status :: 3 - Alpha",
  16  "Environment :: Console",
  17  "Intended Audience :: Developers",
  18  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
  19  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
  20  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
  21  "Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Application Frameworks",
  22]
  23dependencies = [
  24  "openai>=2.21.0,<3",
  25  "pyyaml>=6.0.2,<7",
  26]
  27
  28[project.urls]
  29Homepage = "https://nipux.com"
  30Source = "https://github.com/nipuxx/agent-cli"
  31Issues = "https://github.com/nipuxx/agent-cli/issues"
  32
  33[project.optional-dependencies]
  34dev = ["pytest>=9.0.2,<10", "ruff"]
  35
  36[project.scripts]
  37nipux = "nipux_cli.cli:main"
  38
  39[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
  40include = ["nipux_cli", "nipux_cli.*"]
  41
  42[tool.pytest.ini_options]
  43testpaths = ["tests/nipux_cli"]
  44addopts = "-q"
  45
  46[tool.ruff]
  47line-length = 120
  48target-version = "py311"
  49
  50[tool.uv]
  51exclude-newer = "7 days"
scripts/generate_project_atlas.py 619 lines 
   1#!/usr/bin/env python3
   2"""Generate docs/project-atlas.html from the tracked Nipux source tree."""
   3
   4from __future__ import annotations
   5
   6import ast
   7import html
   8import re
   9import subprocess
  10from dataclasses import dataclass
  11from pathlib import Path
  12from typing import Any
  13
  14
  15ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
  16OUT = ROOT / "docs" / "project-atlas.html"
  17SOURCE_SUFFIXES = {".py", ".md", ".toml", ".yaml", ".yml"}
  18EXCLUDED = {
  19    "docs/project-atlas.html",
  20    "uv.lock",
  21}
  22SENSITIVE_ASSIGNMENT_RE = re.compile(
  23    r"^(\s*)([A-Z0-9_]*(?:API_KEY|TOKEN|SECRET|PASSWORD)[A-Z0-9_]*)(\s*)=(.*)$"
  24)
  25
  26
  27@dataclass
  28class SourceFile:
  29    path: str
  30    text: str
  31    lines: list[str]
  32    tree: ast.AST | None
  33    error: str = ""
  34
  35
  36@dataclass
  37class Symbol:
  38    path: str
  39    kind: str
  40    name: str
  41    line: int
  42    end_line: int
  43    doc: str
  44    calls: list[str]
  45
  46
  47@dataclass
  48class Prompt:
  49    path: str
  50    name: str
  51    line: int
  52    text: str
  53    context: str
  54
  55
  56def main() -> None:
  57    files = load_source_files()
  58    symbols = extract_symbols(files)
  59    prompts = extract_prompts(files)
  60    tools = extract_tools(files)
  61    tables = extract_tables(files)
  62    commit = git(["rev-parse", "--short", "HEAD"]) or "working-tree"
  63    html_text = render(files, symbols, prompts, tools, tables, commit=commit)
  64    OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  65    OUT.write_text(html_text, encoding="utf-8")
  66    print(f"wrote {OUT.relative_to(ROOT)} ({len(html_text):,} chars)")
  67
  68
  69def load_source_files() -> list[SourceFile]:
  70    paths = tracked_paths()
  71    files: list[SourceFile] = []
  72    for path in paths:
  73        if path in EXCLUDED:
  74            continue
  75        full = ROOT / path
  76        if full.suffix not in SOURCE_SUFFIXES or not full.is_file():
  77            continue
  78        text = full.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
  79        tree = None
  80        error = ""
  81        if full.suffix == ".py":
  82            try:
  83                tree = ast.parse(text, filename=path)
  84            except SyntaxError as exc:
  85                error = str(exc)
  86        files.append(SourceFile(path=path, text=text, lines=text.splitlines(), tree=tree, error=error))
  87    return files
  88
  89
  90def tracked_paths() -> list[str]:
  91    output = git(["ls-files"])
  92    if not output:
  93        return []
  94    return sorted(line.strip() for line in output.splitlines() if line.strip())
  95
  96
  97def git(args: list[str]) -> str:
  98    try:
  99        result = subprocess.run(["git", *args], cwd=ROOT, check=False, capture_output=True, text=True)
 100    except OSError:
 101        return ""
 102    return result.stdout.strip() if result.returncode == 0 else ""
 103
 104
 105def extract_symbols(files: list[SourceFile]) -> list[Symbol]:
 106    symbols: list[Symbol] = []
 107    for source in files:
 108        if source.tree is None:
 109            continue
 110        for node in ast.walk(source.tree):
 111            if isinstance(node, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef, ast.ClassDef)):
 112                calls = sorted(call_names(node))[:16]
 113                symbols.append(
 114                    Symbol(
 115                        path=source.path,
 116                        kind="class" if isinstance(node, ast.ClassDef) else "function",
 117                        name=node.name,
 118                        line=getattr(node, "lineno", 0),
 119                        end_line=getattr(node, "end_lineno", getattr(node, "lineno", 0)),
 120                        doc=ast.get_docstring(node) or "",
 121                        calls=calls,
 122                    )
 123                )
 124    return sorted(symbols, key=lambda item: (item.path, item.line, item.name))
 125
 126
 127def call_names(node: ast.AST) -> set[str]:
 128    names: set[str] = set()
 129    for child in ast.walk(node):
 130        if not isinstance(child, ast.Call):
 131            continue
 132        name = dotted_name(child.func)
 133        if name:
 134            names.add(name)
 135    return names
 136
 137
 138def dotted_name(node: ast.AST) -> str:
 139    if isinstance(node, ast.Name):
 140        return node.id
 141    if isinstance(node, ast.Attribute):
 142        base = dotted_name(node.value)
 143        return f"{base}.{node.attr}" if base else node.attr
 144    return ""
 145
 146
 147def extract_prompts(files: list[SourceFile]) -> list[Prompt]:
 148    prompts: list[Prompt] = []
 149    for source in files:
 150        if source.tree is None:
 151            continue
 152        for node in ast.walk(source.tree):
 153            if isinstance(node, (ast.Assign, ast.AnnAssign)):
 154                names = assignment_names(node)
 155                value = getattr(node, "value", None)
 156                text = literal_string(value)
 157                if not text:
 158                    continue
 159                if any(is_prompt_name(name) for name in names) or is_prompt_text(text):
 160                    prompts.append(
 161                        Prompt(
 162                            path=source.path,
 163                            name=", ".join(names) or "string",
 164                            line=getattr(node, "lineno", 0),
 165                            text=text,
 166                            context="assignment",
 167                        )
 168                    )
 169            elif isinstance(node, ast.Constant) and isinstance(node.value, str) and is_prompt_text(node.value):
 170                prompts.append(
 171                    Prompt(
 172                        path=source.path,
 173                        name="inline string",
 174                        line=getattr(node, "lineno", 0),
 175                        text=node.value,
 176                        context="inline",
 177                    )
 178                )
 179    deduped: dict[tuple[str, int, str], Prompt] = {}
 180    for prompt in prompts:
 181        key = (prompt.path, prompt.line, prompt.text[:120])
 182        existing = deduped.get(key)
 183        if existing is None or (existing.context == "inline" and prompt.context != "inline"):
 184            deduped[key] = prompt
 185    return sorted(deduped.values(), key=lambda item: (item.path, item.line))
 186
 187
 188def assignment_names(node: ast.Assign | ast.AnnAssign) -> list[str]:
 189    targets = node.targets if isinstance(node, ast.Assign) else [node.target]
 190    names: list[str] = []
 191    for target in targets:
 192        if isinstance(target, ast.Name):
 193            names.append(target.id)
 194        elif isinstance(target, ast.Attribute):
 195            names.append(target.attr)
 196    return names
 197
 198
 199def literal_string(node: ast.AST | None) -> str:
 200    if isinstance(node, ast.Constant) and isinstance(node.value, str):
 201        return node.value
 202    if isinstance(node, ast.JoinedStr):
 203        return "".join(part.value for part in node.values if isinstance(part, ast.Constant) and isinstance(part.value, str))
 204    return ""
 205
 206
 207def is_prompt_name(name: str) -> bool:
 208    upper = name.upper()
 209    return any(term in upper for term in ("PROMPT", "SYSTEM", "INSTRUCTION", "GUIDANCE")) and not upper.endswith("_PATH")
 210
 211
 212def is_prompt_text(text: str) -> bool:
 213    clean = " ".join(text.split())
 214    if len(clean) < 240:
 215        return False
 216    lowered = clean.lower()
 217    return (
 218        "you are" in lowered
 219        or "do not" in lowered and "use " in lowered
 220        or "operator" in lowered and "context" in lowered and "prompt" in lowered
 221        or "next-action" in lowered
 222    )
 223
 224
 225def extract_tools(files: list[SourceFile]) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
 226    tools_text = next((source.text for source in files if source.path == "nipux_cli/tools.py"), "")
 227    tools: list[dict[str, str]] = []
 228    pattern = re.compile(r"ToolSpec\(\s*['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]\s*,\s*['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]", re.S)
 229    for match in pattern.finditer(tools_text):
 230        line = tools_text[: match.start()].count("\n") + 1
 231        tools.append({"name": match.group(1), "description": " ".join(match.group(2).split()), "line": str(line)})
 232    return tools
 233
 234
 235def extract_tables(files: list[SourceFile]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 236    db_text = next((source.text for source in files if source.path == "nipux_cli/db.py"), "")
 237    tables: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
 238    for match in re.finditer(r"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\s*\((.*?)\)", db_text, re.S):
 239        raw_columns = [line.strip().rstrip(",") for line in match.group(2).splitlines()]
 240        columns = [line for line in raw_columns if line and not line.upper().startswith(("FOREIGN", "UNIQUE", "PRIMARY KEY"))]
 241        tables.append({"name": match.group(1), "columns": columns, "line": db_text[: match.start()].count("\n") + 1})
 242    return tables
 243
 244
 245def render(
 246    files: list[SourceFile],
 247    symbols: list[Symbol],
 248    prompts: list[Prompt],
 249    tools: list[dict[str, str]],
 250    tables: list[dict[str, Any]],
 251    *,
 252    commit: str,
 253) -> str:
 254    python_files = [source for source in files if source.path.endswith(".py")]
 255    total_lines = sum(len(source.lines) for source in files)
 256    file_cards = "\n".join(render_file_card(source, symbols) for source in files)
 257    source_browser = "\n".join(render_source_file(source) for source in files)
 258    symbol_cards = "\n".join(render_symbol(symbol) for symbol in symbols)
 259    prompt_cards = "\n".join(render_prompt(prompt) for prompt in prompts[:80])
 260    tool_rows = "\n".join(
 261        f"<tr><td><code>{esc(tool['name'])}</code></td><td>{esc(tool['description'])}</td><td>{tool['line']}</td></tr>"
 262        for tool in tools
 263    )
 264    table_cards = "\n".join(render_table(table) for table in tables)
 265    risk_cards = render_review_points(files, symbols, prompts, tools)
 266    return f"""<!doctype html>
 267<html lang="en">
 268<head>
 269<meta charset="utf-8">
 270<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
 271<title>Nipux Project Atlas</title>
 272<style>
 273:root {{
 274  color-scheme: dark;
 275  --bg: #080909; --panel: #101112; --panel-2: #151717; --text: #ecebe6;
 276  --muted: #9b9b96; --faint: #5f615e; --line: #303332; --accent: #9ad6d1;
 277  --accent-2: #d8d06d; --warn: #ee9b66; --bad: #e36d78; --green: #9fca7f;
 278  --mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace;
 279  --sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
 280}}
 281* {{ box-sizing: border-box; }}
 282body {{ margin: 0; background: radial-gradient(circle at 70% 0%, rgba(154,214,209,.10), transparent 36%), var(--bg); color: var(--text); font: 15px/1.55 var(--sans); }}
 283a {{ color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; }}
 284a:hover {{ text-decoration: underline; }}
 285.shell {{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: 292px minmax(0, 1fr); min-height: 100vh; }}
 286.sidebar {{ position: sticky; top: 0; height: 100vh; overflow: auto; border-right: 1px solid var(--line); padding: 24px 22px; background: rgba(8,9,9,.94); }}
 287.logo {{ font: 750 22px var(--mono); letter-spacing: .08em; color: var(--accent); }}
 288.subtitle {{ color: var(--muted); margin: 6px 0 22px; }}
 289.search {{ width: 100%; background: #050606; border: 1px solid var(--line); color: var(--text); border-radius: 8px; padding: 11px 12px; font: 14px var(--mono); outline: none; }}
 290.search:focus {{ border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(154,214,209,.12); }}
 291.nav {{ margin: 22px 0; display: grid; gap: 7px; }}
 292.nav a {{ color: var(--muted); padding: 6px 0; font: 13px var(--mono); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .12em; }}
 293.stats {{ margin-top: 24px; display: grid; gap: 10px; }}
 294.stat {{ border: 1px solid var(--line); background: var(--panel); border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px; }}
 295.stat b {{ display: block; font: 650 24px/1 var(--mono); }}
 296.stat span {{ color: var(--muted); font: 12px var(--mono); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .12em; }}
 297main {{ min-width: 0; padding: 34px 38px 80px; }}
 298.hero {{ border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); padding-bottom: 28px; margin-bottom: 28px; }}
 299.eyebrow {{ color: var(--accent); font: 12px var(--mono); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .22em; }}
 300h1 {{ font-size: clamp(38px, 6vw, 86px); line-height: .9; margin: 14px 0 18px; letter-spacing: -.04em; }}
 301h2 {{ margin: 0; font-size: 28px; letter-spacing: -.02em; }}
 302h3 {{ margin: 0 0 6px; font-size: 16px; }}
 303.lede {{ max-width: 980px; color: #c7c6bf; font-size: 19px; }}
 304.section {{ margin: 44px 0; scroll-margin-top: 20px; }}
 305.section > header {{ display: flex; align-items: end; justify-content: space-between; gap: 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); margin-bottom: 18px; padding-bottom: 10px; }}
 306.kicker {{ color: var(--muted); font: 12px var(--mono); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .16em; }}
 307.grid {{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 14px; }}
 308.card, .file-card, .prompt, .tool, .db-card, .symbol {{ border: 1px solid var(--line); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.035), rgba(255,255,255,.012)); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; overflow: hidden; }}
 309.file-card header, .prompt header, .tool header {{ display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; align-items: baseline; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06); margin: -2px 0 10px; padding-bottom: 8px; }}
 310.muted, .file-card header span, .prompt header span, .tool header span {{ color: var(--muted); }}
 311.meta {{ display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin: 10px 0; }}
 312.meta span, .pill {{ border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 999px; padding: 2px 8px; color: var(--muted); font: 12px var(--mono); }}
 313.arch {{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(210px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }}
 314.node {{ text-align: left; min-height: 126px; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid var(--line); color: var(--text); background: var(--panel); border-radius: 14px; padding: 15px; font: inherit; transition: .15s ease; }}
 315.node:hover {{ transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: var(--accent); background: var(--panel-2); }}
 316.node strong {{ display: block; font-size: 17px; }}
 317.node span {{ display: block; color: var(--accent); font: 12px var(--mono); margin: 4px 0 8px; }}
 318.node em {{ display: block; color: var(--muted); font-style: normal; }}
 319.flow {{ counter-reset: flow; display: grid; gap: 10px; padding: 0; list-style: none; }}
 320.flow li {{ counter-increment: flow; border-left: 2px solid var(--accent); background: var(--panel); padding: 12px 14px 12px 48px; position: relative; border-radius: 8px; }}
 321.flow li:before {{ content: counter(flow); position: absolute; left: 14px; top: 12px; color: var(--accent-2); font: 700 16px var(--mono); }}
 322.flow li span {{ display: block; color: var(--muted); }}
 323details {{ margin-top: 10px; }}
 324summary {{ cursor: pointer; color: var(--accent); font: 13px var(--mono); }}
 325table {{ width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 10px; font-size: 13px; }}
 326th, td {{ text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); padding: 7px 8px; vertical-align: top; }}
 327th {{ color: var(--muted); font: 12px var(--mono); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .08em; }}
 328code, pre {{ font-family: var(--mono); }}
 329pre {{ max-height: 540px; overflow: auto; background: #050606; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px; color: #dad8cf; white-space: pre-wrap; }}
 330.mini-grid {{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }}
 331.symbol p {{ margin: 8px 0; }}
 332.calls {{ color: var(--muted); }}
 333.warning {{ border-color: rgba(238,155,102,.45); background: rgba(238,155,102,.08); }}
 334.hidden {{ display: none !important; }}
 335.source-list {{ display: grid; gap: 10px; }}
 336.source-file {{ border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--panel); padding: 0 12px 10px; }}
 337.source-file summary {{ padding: 12px 0; color: var(--text); }}
 338.source-file summary span {{ color: var(--muted); margin-left: 8px; }}
 339.source-code {{ max-height: 620px; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.45; white-space: pre; }}
 340.src-line {{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: 52px minmax(0, 1fr); min-height: 17px; }}
 341.src-line b {{ color: var(--faint); user-select: none; font-weight: 500; }}
 342.src-line code {{ color: #d6d3ca; }}
 343@media (max-width: 980px) {{ .shell {{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; }} .sidebar {{ position: relative; height: auto; }} main {{ padding: 24px 18px 60px; }} .arch {{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; }} }}
 344</style>
 345</head>
 346<body>
 347<div class="shell">
 348  <aside class="sidebar">
 349    <div class="logo">NIPUX ATLAS</div>
 350    <div class="subtitle">Generated from tracked source on {esc(commit)}.</div>
 351    <input id="search" class="search" placeholder="filter files, prompts, tools..." autocomplete="off">
 352    <nav class="nav">
 353      <a href="#architecture">Architecture</a>
 354      <a href="#runtime-flow">Runtime Flow</a>
 355      <a href="#prompts">Prompt Surfaces</a>
 356      <a href="#tools">Tool Registry</a>
 357      <a href="#database">Database</a>
 358      <a href="#files">Files</a>
 359      <a href="#symbols">Symbols</a>
 360      <a href="#source-browser">Source Browser</a>
 361      <a href="#tests">Tests</a>
 362      <a href="#risks">Review Points</a>
 363    </nav>
 364    <div class="stats">
 365      <div class="stat"><b>{len(files)}</b><span>tracked files</span></div>
 366      <div class="stat"><b>{total_lines:,}</b><span>tracked lines mapped</span></div>
 367      <div class="stat"><b>{len(symbols)}</b><span>python symbols</span></div>
 368      <div class="stat"><b>{len(tools)}</b><span>runtime tools</span></div>
 369    </div>
 370  </aside>
 371  <main>
 372    <section class="hero">
 373      <div class="eyebrow">Backend map / prompt audit / source index</div>
 374      <h1>Nipux Project Atlas</h1>
 375      <p class="lede">A self-contained visual map of the current backend: entrypoints, daemon loop, worker prompt assembly, durable memory, tools, SQLite schema, UI control plane, tests, and every tracked source file with parsed functions/classes and line references.</p>
 376    </section>
 377
 378    <section id="architecture" class="section">
 379      <header><div><div class="kicker">Mind map</div><h2>Architecture</h2></div><span class="muted">Click a node to jump into related detail.</span></header>
 380      <div class="arch">{architecture_nodes()}</div>
 381    </section>
 382
 383    <section id="runtime-flow" class="section">
 384      <header><div><div class="kicker">Lifecycle</div><h2>Runtime Flow</h2></div><span class="muted">What happens from terminal input to durable progress.</span></header>
 385      <ol class="flow">{runtime_flow()}</ol>
 386    </section>
 387
 388    <section id="prompts" class="section">
 389      <header><div><div class="kicker">Exact text</div><h2>Prompt Surfaces</h2></div><span class="muted">System/program prompts and instruction-like strings extracted from source.</span></header>
 390      <div class="grid">{prompt_cards}</div>
 391    </section>
 392
 393    <section id="tools" class="section">
 394      <header><div><div class="kicker">Tools</div><h2>Tool Registry</h2></div><span class="muted">Static ToolSpec definitions from nipux_cli/tools.py.</span></header>
 395      <table><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Description</th><th>Line</th></tr></thead><tbody>{tool_rows}</tbody></table>
 396    </section>
 397
