 398    <section id="database" class="section">
 399      <header><div><div class="kicker">Persistence</div><h2>SQLite Tables</h2></div><span class="muted">CREATE TABLE blocks found in nipux_cli/db.py.</span></header>
 400      <div class="grid">{table_cards}</div>
 401    </section>
 402
 403    <section id="files" class="section">
 404      <header><div><div class="kicker">Source index</div><h2>Important Files</h2></div><span class="muted">{len(python_files)} Python modules plus docs/config files.</span></header>
 405      <div class="grid">{file_cards}</div>
 406    </section>
 407
 408    <section id="symbols" class="section">
 409      <header><div><div class="kicker">Functions and classes</div><h2>Symbol Map</h2></div><span class="muted">Parsed with Python AST.</span></header>
 410      <div class="mini-grid">{symbol_cards}</div>
 411    </section>
 412
 413    <section id="source-browser" class="section">
 414      <header><div><div class="kicker">Line-by-line</div><h2>Source Browser</h2></div><span class="muted">Collapsed raw tracked source so the backend can be inspected directly in this page.</span></header>
 415      <div class="source-list">{source_browser}</div>
 416    </section>
 417
 418    <section id="tests" class="section">
 419      <header><div><div class="kicker">Verification</div><h2>Test Coverage Map</h2></div><span class="muted">Test files included in the source index.</span></header>
 420      <div class="grid">{test_cards(files)}</div>
 421    </section>
 422
 423    <section id="risks" class="section">
 424      <header><div><div class="kicker">Audit cues</div><h2>Review Points</h2></div><span class="muted">Generated signals for where to inspect next.</span></header>
 425      <div class="grid">{risk_cards}</div>
 426    </section>
 427  </main>
 428</div>
 429<script>
 430const search = document.getElementById('search');
 431search?.addEventListener('input', () => {{
 432  const term = search.value.toLowerCase().trim();
 433  document.querySelectorAll('.searchable').forEach((node) => {{
 434    const hay = (node.getAttribute('data-search') || node.textContent || '').toLowerCase();
 435    node.classList.toggle('hidden', term && !hay.includes(term));
 436  }});
 437}});
 438document.querySelectorAll('.node[data-target]').forEach((node) => {{
 439  node.addEventListener('click', () => {{
 440    const target = document.getElementById(node.getAttribute('data-target'));
 441    if (target) target.scrollIntoView({{ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }});
 442  }});
 443}});
 444</script>
 445</body>
 446</html>
 447"""
 448
 449
 450def architecture_nodes() -> str:
 451    nodes = [
 452        ("cli-tui", "CLI / TUI", "nipux_cli/cli.py", "Chat-first terminal UI, first-run menu, slash commands, job switching, event panes."),
 453        ("sqlite-state", "SQLite state", "nipux_cli/db.py", "Jobs, runs, steps, artifacts, events, ledgers, usage, and memory index."),
 454        ("daemon", "Daemon", "nipux_cli/daemon.py", "Single-instance forever loop, stale runtime fingerprint, heartbeat, work scheduling."),
 455        ("worker-loop", "Worker loop", "nipux_cli/worker.py", "Builds prompts, chooses one tool step, guards loops, records durable progress."),
 456        ("llm-adapter", "LLM adapter", "nipux_cli/llm.py", "OpenAI-compatible chat calls, usage/cost tracking, tool call parsing."),
 457        ("tool-registry", "Tool registry", "nipux_cli/tools.py", "Browser, web, shell, artifact, ledger, task, experiment, digest tools."),
 458        ("browser-web", "Browser/web", "nipux_cli/browser.py / web.py", "Visible browsing, snapshots, search/extract helpers, anti-bot source scoring."),
 459        ("artifacts-files", "Artifacts/files", "nipux_cli/artifacts.py", "Saved outputs and concrete workspace file writing."),
 460        ("memory", "Memory", "compression.py / operator_context.py", "Compact rolling memory and durable operator context."),
 461    ]
 462    return "".join(
 463        f"<button id='{esc(anchor)}' class='node searchable' data-target='source-browser' data-search='{esc(title + ' ' + path + ' ' + desc)}'>"
 464        f"<strong>{esc(title)}</strong><span>{esc(path)}</span><em>{esc(desc)}</em></button>"
 465        for anchor, title, path, desc in nodes
 466    )
 467
 468
 469def runtime_flow() -> str:
 470    steps = [
 471        ("Startup", "pyproject entrypoint calls nipux_cli.cli:main. With no args, the chat/TUI opens on the focused job or first-run workspace."),
 472        ("Operator input", "Plain chat is stored as visible events and, when relevant, durable operator context for future worker prompts."),
 473        ("Daemon scheduling", "The daemon claims runnable jobs, keeps a lock/heartbeat, starts runs, and calls one bounded worker step repeatedly."),
 474        ("Prompt assembly", "worker.build_messages layers system prompt, program template, operator context, roadmaps, tasks, ledgers, experiments, memory, timeline, and recent steps."),
 475        ("Tool call", "The LLM selects one OpenAI-style tool. The registry executes it with ToolContext and stores input/output in steps/events."),
 476        ("Progress accounting", "Guards require artifacts, findings, tasks, experiments, or milestone validation when evidence or measurements appear."),
 477        ("Persistence", "Artifacts go to the job output directory. SQLite stores steps, events, ledgers, runtime state, and usage/cost metadata."),
 478        ("UI refresh", "The TUI reads timeline/events and compact job metrics, splitting chat from worker activity and status."),
 479    ]
 480    return "".join(f"<li><strong>{esc(title)}</strong><span>{esc(body)}</span></li>" for title, body in steps)
 481
 482
 483def render_file_card(source: SourceFile, symbols: list[Symbol]) -> str:
 484    local_symbols = [symbol for symbol in symbols if symbol.path == source.path]
 485    top_names = ", ".join(symbol.name for symbol in local_symbols[:10]) or "none"
 486    doc = module_doc(source) or source.error or "No module docstring."
 487    imports = ", ".join(module_imports(source)[:12]) or "none"
 488    return f"""<article class="file-card searchable" data-search="{esc(source.path + ' ' + doc + ' ' + top_names)}">
 489<header><h3>{esc(source.path)}</h3><span>{len(source.lines)} lines</span></header>
 490<p>{esc(short(doc, 260))}</p>
 491<div class="meta"><span>{len(local_symbols)} symbols</span><span>{source.text.count('TODO')} TODOs</span></div>
 492<details><summary>Imports and top symbols</summary><p><strong>Imports:</strong> {esc(imports)}</p><p><strong>Symbols:</strong> {esc(top_names)}</p></details>
 493</article>"""
 494
 495
 496def module_doc(source: SourceFile) -> str:
 497    if source.tree is None:
 498        for line in source.lines:
 499            stripped = line.strip()
 500            if stripped and not stripped.startswith("#"):
 501                return stripped
 502        return ""
 503    return ast.get_docstring(source.tree) or ""
 504
 505
 506def module_imports(source: SourceFile) -> list[str]:
 507    if source.tree is None:
 508        return []
 509    names: list[str] = []
 510    for node in source.tree.body:
 511        if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
 512            names.extend(alias.name for alias in node.names)
 513        elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom):
 514            module = "." * node.level + (node.module or "")
 515            names.append(module)
 516    return names
 517
 518
 519def render_source_file(source: SourceFile) -> str:
 520    rendered_lines = [redact_source_line(line) for line in source.lines]
 521    search_text = "\n".join(rendered_lines)
 522    code = "\n".join(
 523        f"<span class='src-line'><b>{index:>4}</b><code>{esc(line)}</code></span>"
 524        for index, line in enumerate(rendered_lines, start=1)
 525    )
 526    return f"""<details class="source-file searchable" data-search="{esc(source.path + ' ' + search_text[:4000])}">
 527<summary>{esc(source.path)} <span>{len(source.lines)} lines</span></summary>
 528<pre class="source-code">{code}</pre>
 529</details>"""
 530
 531
 532def redact_source_line(line: str) -> str:
 533    match = SENSITIVE_ASSIGNMENT_RE.match(line)
 534    if not match:
 535        return line
 536    indent, name, _space, _value = match.groups()
 537    return f"{indent}{name} = <redacted>"
 538
 539
 540def render_symbol(symbol: Symbol) -> str:
 541    doc = short(symbol.doc or "No docstring.", 180)
 542    calls = ", ".join(symbol.calls) or "none"
 543    return f"""<article class="symbol searchable" data-search="{esc(symbol.path + ' ' + symbol.name + ' ' + doc + ' ' + calls)}">
 544<h3>{esc(symbol.name)}</h3>
 545<p><span class="pill">{esc(symbol.kind)}</span> <span class="pill">{esc(symbol.path)}:{symbol.line}</span></p>
 546<p>{esc(doc)}</p>
 547<p class="calls"><strong>Calls:</strong> {esc(short(calls, 280))}</p>
 548</article>"""
 549
 550
 551def render_prompt(prompt: Prompt) -> str:
 552    title = prompt.name or "prompt"
 553    return f"""<article class="prompt searchable" data-search="{esc(prompt.path + ' ' + title + ' ' + prompt.text)}">
 554<header><h3>{esc(title)}</h3><span>{esc(prompt.path)}:{prompt.line}</span></header>
 555<p class="muted">Context: <code>{esc(prompt.context)}</code> · {len(prompt.text):,} chars</p>
 556<pre><code>{esc(prompt.text)}</code></pre>
 557</article>"""
 558
 559
 560def render_table(table: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
 561    columns = "".join(f"<li><code>{esc(column)}</code></li>" for column in table["columns"][:40])
 562    return f"""<article class="db-card searchable" data-search="{esc(table['name'] + ' ' + ' '.join(table['columns']))}">
 563<h3>{esc(table['name'])}</h3>
 564<p class="muted">nipux_cli/db.py:{table['line']}</p>
 565<ul>{columns}</ul>
 566</article>"""
 567
 568
 569def test_cards(files: list[SourceFile]) -> str:
 570    tests = [source for source in files if source.path.startswith("tests/")]
 571    cards = []
 572    for source in tests:
 573        names = []
 574        if source.tree:
 575            names = [node.name for node in ast.walk(source.tree) if isinstance(node, ast.FunctionDef) and node.name.startswith("test_")]
 576        cards.append(
 577            f"""<article class="test-card searchable" data-search="{esc(source.path + ' ' + ' '.join(names))}">
 578<h3>{esc(source.path)}</h3><p><strong>{len(names)}</strong> tests · {len(source.lines)} lines</p>
 579<p class="muted">{esc(short(', '.join(names), 320))}</p></article>"""
 580        )
 581    return "\n".join(cards)
 582
 583
 584def render_review_points(
 585    files: list[SourceFile],
 586    symbols: list[Symbol],
 587    prompts: list[Prompt],
 588    tools: list[dict[str, str]],
 589) -> str:
 590    largest = sorted(files, key=lambda source: len(source.lines), reverse=True)[:5]
 591    large_text = ", ".join(f"{source.path} ({len(source.lines)} lines)" for source in largest)
 592    prompt_text = f"{len(prompts)} prompt/instruction-like strings were extracted. Inspect this section after any agent-behavior change."
 593    tool_text = f"{len(tools)} tools are exposed to the worker. Review descriptions whenever generic behavior changes."
 594    symbol_text = f"{len(symbols)} symbols were parsed. Large modules are candidates for refactoring once behavior stabilizes."
 595    cards = [
 596        ("Large modules", large_text),
 597        ("Prompt surfaces", prompt_text),
 598        ("Tool surface", tool_text),
 599        ("Symbol map", symbol_text),
 600    ]
 601    return "\n".join(
 602        f"<article class='card warning searchable' data-search='{esc(title + ' ' + body)}'><h3>{esc(title)}</h3><p>{esc(body)}</p></article>"
 603        for title, body in cards
 604    )
 605
 606
 607def short(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
 608    clean = " ".join(str(text).split())
 609    if len(clean) <= limit:
 610        return clean
 611    return clean[: max(0, limit - 3)] + "..."
 612
 613
 614def esc(value: Any) -> str:
 615    return html.escape(str(value), quote=True)
 616
 617
 618if __name__ == "__main__":
 619    main()
tests/nipux_cli/test_artifacts.py 34 lines 
   1import pytest
   2
   3from nipux_cli.artifacts import ArtifactStore
   4from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
   5
   6
   7def test_artifact_store_writes_reads_and_searches(tmp_path):
   8    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
   9    try:
  10        job_id = db.create_job("Collect findings")
  11        store = ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db=db)
  12
  13        stored = store.write_text(
  14            job_id=job_id,
  15            title="Findings list",
  16            summary="contains acme finding",
  17            content="Acme Corp\ncontact: founder@example.com\n",
  18        )
  19
  20        assert store.read_text(stored.id).startswith("Acme Corp")
  21        results = store.search_text(job_id=job_id, query="founder", limit=5)
  22        assert results[0]["id"] == stored.id
  23        assert "founder@example.com" in results[0]["excerpt"]
  24    finally:
  25        db.close()
  26
  27
  28def test_artifact_store_rejects_paths_outside_home(tmp_path):
  29    store = ArtifactStore(tmp_path)
  30    outside = tmp_path.parent / "outside.txt"
  31    outside.write_text("nope", encoding="utf-8")
  32
  33    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
  34        store.read_text(str(outside))
tests/nipux_cli/test_browser_web.py 118 lines 
   1import json
   2
   3from nipux_cli.browser import _annotate_source_quality, _session_name, _socket_dir
   4from nipux_cli.tools import DEFAULT_REGISTRY, ToolContext
   5from nipux_cli.web import _strip_html
   6from nipux_cli.artifacts import ArtifactStore
   7from nipux_cli.config import AppConfig, RuntimeConfig
   8from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
   9
  10
  11def test_session_name_is_stable_and_safe():
  12    assert _session_name("job_abc/def") == "nipux_job_abc_def"
  13
  14
  15def test_long_session_name_is_short_and_hashed():
  16    task_id = "research-a-very-long-objective-title-that-needs-a-short-browser-session-name"
  17    name = _session_name(task_id)
  18    socket_dir = _socket_dir(task_id)
  19
  20    assert name.startswith("nipux_research-a-very-long")
  21    assert len(name) <= 37
  22    assert len(str(socket_dir)) < 80
  23
  24
  25def test_strip_html_removes_scripts_and_keeps_text():
  26    text = _strip_html("<html><script>bad()</script><h1>Hello</h1><p>World</p></html>")
  27    assert "bad" not in text
  28    assert "Hello" in text
  29    assert "World" in text
  30
  31
  32def test_browser_marks_anti_bot_interstitial_as_warning():
  33    result = _annotate_source_quality({
  34        "success": True,
  35        "data": {"title": "Just a moment...", "url": "https://clutch.co/example"},
  36        "snapshot": "Performing security verification. Cloudflare security challenge.",
  37    })
  38
  39    assert result["success"] is True
  40    assert "error" not in result
  41    assert result["source_warning"] == "cloudflare anti-bot challenge"
  42    assert result["warnings"][0]["type"] == "anti_bot"
  43
  44
  45def test_browser_marks_captcha_block_as_warning():
  46    result = _annotate_source_quality({
  47        "success": True,
  48        "data": {"title": "Source search", "url": "https://source.example/search"},
  49        "snapshot": 'Iframe "Security CAPTCHA" You have been blocked. You are browsing and clicking at a speed much faster than expected.',
  50    })
  51
  52    assert result["source_warning"] == "captcha/anti-bot block"
  53    assert result["warnings"][0]["type"] == "anti_bot"
  54
  55
  56def test_web_extract_marks_anti_bot_pages_as_warning(monkeypatch):
  57    from nipux_cli import web
  58
  59    def fake_request(url):
  60        del url
  61        return "<h1>Performing security verification</h1><p>Cloudflare security challenge</p>", "text/html"
  62
  63    monkeypatch.setattr(web, "_request", fake_request)
  64    result = web.web_extract(["https://clutch.co/example"])
  65
  66    page = result["pages"][0]
  67    assert "error" not in page
  68    assert page["source_warning"] == "cloudflare anti-bot challenge"
  69    assert page["warnings"][0]["type"] == "anti_bot"
  70    assert "Cloudflare security challenge" in page["text"]
  71
  72
  73def test_browser_tool_uses_native_wrapper(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
  74    from nipux_cli import browser
  75
  76    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
  77    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
  78    try:
  79        job_id = db.create_job("Browse")
  80        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id)
  81
  82        def fake_navigate(cfg, *, task_id, url):
  83            return {"success": True, "task_id": task_id, "url": url}
  84
  85        monkeypatch.setattr(browser, "navigate", fake_navigate)
  86        result = json.loads(DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("browser_navigate", {"url": "https://example.com"}, ctx))
  87
  88        assert result == {"success": True, "task_id": job_id, "url": "https://example.com"}
  89    finally:
  90        db.close()
  91
  92
  93def test_browser_click_adds_recovery_snapshot_for_stale_ref(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
  94    from nipux_cli import browser
  95
  96    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
  97    calls = []
  98
  99    def fake_command(cfg, *, task_id, command, args=None, timeout=60):
 100        del cfg, task_id, args, timeout
 101        calls.append(command)
 102        if command == "click":
 103            return {"success": False, "error": "Unknown ref: e102"}
 104        return {
 105            "success": True,
 106            "data": {
 107                "snapshot": "Directory",
 108                "refs": {"e1": {"role": "link", "name": "New Result"}},
 109            },
 110        }
 111
 112    monkeypatch.setattr(browser, "run_browser_command", fake_command)
 113    result = browser.click(config, task_id="job_abc", ref="@e102")
 114
 115    assert calls == ["click", "snapshot"]
 116    assert result["success"] is False
 117    assert result["recovery_snapshot"]["data"]["refs"]["e1"]["name"] == "New Result"
 118    assert "stale" in result["recovery_guidance"]

   1import json
   2
   3from nipux_cli.artifacts import ArtifactStore
   4from nipux_cli import __version__
   5from nipux_cli.cli import (
   6    CHAT_SLASH_COMMANDS,
   7    FIRST_RUN_SLASH_COMMANDS,
   8    _autocomplete_slash,
   9    _build_first_run_frame,
  10    _build_chat_frame,
  11    _build_chat_messages,
  12    _chat_handle_line,
  13    _chat_control_command,
  14    _config_field_value,
  15    _decode_terminal_escape,
  16    _emit_frame_if_changed,
  17    _first_run_click_action,

  33)
  34from nipux_cli.config import load_config
  35from nipux_cli.daemon import append_daemon_event
  36from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
  37from nipux_cli.llm import LLMResponse

  39
  40
  41def test_cli_has_operator_commands():
  42    parser = build_parser()
  43
  44    assert parser.parse_args(["shell", "--status"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_shell"
  45    assert parser.parse_args(["status", "--full"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_status"
  46    assert parser.parse_args(["health"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_health"
  47    assert parser.parse_args(["history"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_history"
  48    assert parser.parse_args(["events", "--follow"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_events"
  49    assert parser.parse_args(["activity", "--follow"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_activity"
  50    assert parser.parse_args(["feed"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_activity"
  51    assert parser.parse_args(["updates"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_updates"
  52    assert parser.parse_args(["update"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_updates"
  53    assert parser.parse_args(["outcomes"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_updates"
  54    assert parser.parse_args(["steer", "focus", "sources"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_steer"
  55    assert parser.parse_args(["say", "focus", "sources"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_steer"
  56    assert parser.parse_args(["pause"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_pause"
  57    assert parser.parse_args(["resume"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_resume"
  58    assert parser.parse_args(["resume", "research", "finder"]).job_id == ["research", "finder"]
  59    assert parser.parse_args(["cancel"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_cancel"
  60    assert parser.parse_args(["dashboard", "--no-follow"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_dashboard"
  61    assert parser.parse_args(["dash", "--no-follow"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_dashboard"
  62    assert parser.parse_args(["focus", "research"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_focus"
  63    assert parser.parse_args(["rename", "research", "--title", "new research"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_rename"
  64    assert parser.parse_args(["delete", "research"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_delete"
  65    assert parser.parse_args(["rm", "research"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_delete"
  66    assert parser.parse_args(["chat", "research", "finder"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_chat"
  67    assert parser.parse_args(["start", "--poll-seconds", "1"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_start"
  68    assert parser.parse_args(["stop"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_stop"
  69    assert parser.parse_args(["restart"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_restart"
  70    assert parser.parse_args(["stop", "research", "finder"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_stop"
  71    assert parser.parse_args(["stop", "research", "finder"]).job_id == ["research", "finder"]
  72    assert parser.parse_args(["ls"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_jobs"
  73    assert parser.parse_args(["autostart", "status"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_autostart"
  74    assert parser.parse_args(["browser-dashboard", "--port", "4848"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_browser_dashboard"
  75    assert parser.parse_args(["artifacts"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_artifacts"
  76    assert parser.parse_args(["artifact", "art_123"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_artifact"
  77    assert parser.parse_args(["artifact", "Findings", "Batch"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_artifact"
  78    assert parser.parse_args(["lessons"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_lessons"
  79    assert parser.parse_args(["learn", "low-evidence", "pages", "are", "bad"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_learn"
  80    assert parser.parse_args(["findings"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_findings"
  81    assert parser.parse_args(["tasks"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_tasks"
  82    assert parser.parse_args(["roadmap"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_roadmap"
  83    assert parser.parse_args(["experiments"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_experiments"
  84    assert parser.parse_args(["sources"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_sources"
  85    assert parser.parse_args(["memory"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_memory"
  86    assert parser.parse_args(["metrics"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_metrics"
  87    assert parser.parse_args(["usage"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_usage"
  88    assert parser.parse_args(["outputs", "research", "finder"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_logs"
  89    assert parser.parse_args(["outputs"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_logs"
  90    assert parser.parse_args(["service", "status"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_service"
  91    assert parser.parse_args(["work", "--steps", "2", "--fake"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_work"
  92    assert parser.parse_args(["run", "--no-follow"]).func.__name__ == "cmd_run"
  93
  94
  95def test_cli_version_flag(capsys):
  96    try:
  97        main(["--version"])
  98    except SystemExit as exc:
  99        assert exc.code == 0
 100
 101    assert f"nipux {__version__}" in capsys.readouterr().out
 102
 103
 104def test_init_openrouter_writes_secret_free_config_and_env_template(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 105    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 106
 107    main(["init", "--openrouter", "--model", "provider/model"])
 108
 109    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 110    config_text = (tmp_path / "config.yaml").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 111    env_text = (tmp_path / ".env").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 112    assert "Wrote" in out
 113    assert "name: provider/model" in config_text
 114    assert "base_url: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1" in config_text
 115    assert "api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY" in config_text
 116    assert "sk-" not in config_text
 117    assert env_text.strip().endswith("OPENROUTER_API_KEY" + "=")
 118    assert "sk-" not in env_text
 119
 120
 121def test_init_defaults_to_qwen_openrouter(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
 122    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 123
 124    main(["init"])
 125
 126    config_text = (tmp_path / "config.yaml").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 127    env_text = (tmp_path / ".env").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 128    assert "name: qwen/qwen3.6-27b" in config_text
 129    assert "base_url: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1" in config_text
 130    assert "api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY" in config_text
 131    assert env_text.strip().endswith("OPENROUTER_API_KEY" + "=")
 132

 134def test_init_openrouter_defaults_to_qwen36(monkeypatch, tmp_path):

 136
 137    main(["init", "--openrouter"])

 141    assert "base_url: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1" in config_text
 142    assert "api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY" in config_text

 145def test_shell_freeform_text_adds_operator_message(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 146    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 147    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 148    try:
 149        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
 150    finally:
 151        db.close()
 152
 153    assert _run_shell_line("focus on real evidence sources, not irrelevant sources") is True
 154
 155    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 156    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 157    try:
 158        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 159        assert "waiting for research" in out
 160        assert (
 161            job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][-1]["message"]
 162            == "focus on real evidence sources, not irrelevant sources"
 163        )
 164    finally:
 165        db.close()
 166
 167
 168def test_main_no_args_enters_chat_first_home(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 169    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 170    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 171    try:
 172        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
 173        db.append_operator_message(job_id, "remember this visible note", source="test")
 174        db.append_agent_update(job_id, "visible agent update", category="chat")
 175    finally:
 176        db.close()
 177
 178    def eof_input(_prompt):
 179        raise EOFError
 180
 181    monkeypatch.setattr("builtins.input", eof_input)
 182
 183    main([])
 184
 185    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 186    assert "WORKSPACE" in out
 187    assert "RECENT ACTIVITY - research" in out
 188    assert "remember this visible note" in out
 189    assert "visible agent update" in out
 190
 191
 192def test_main_no_args_with_no_jobs_shows_first_run_menu(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 193    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 194
 195    def eof_input(_prompt):
 196        raise EOFError
 197
 198    monkeypatch.setattr("builtins.input", eof_input)
 199
 200    main([])
 201
 202    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 203    assert "Start" in out
 204    assert "FIRST RUN" not in out
 205    assert "new       create a long-running job" in out
 206    assert "Create or manage jobs" not in out
 207    assert "settings" not in out.lower()
 208    assert "shell     open the full command console" not in out
 209    assert "doctor    check local setup" in out
 210    assert "init      write config/env template" in out
 211    assert "_   _" not in out
 212    assert "nipux menu >" not in out
 213
 214
 215def test_first_run_menu_can_create_job_and_open_workspace(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 216    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 217    opened = {}
 218
 219    def fake_input(_prompt):
 220        return "new Build a durable workflow"
 221
 222    def fake_enter_chat(job_id, *, show_history, history_limit):
 223        opened["job_id"] = job_id
 224        opened["show_history"] = show_history
 225        opened["history_limit"] = history_limit
 226        print(f"opened {job_id}")
 227
 228    monkeypatch.setattr("builtins.input", fake_input)
 229    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.cli._enter_chat", fake_enter_chat)
 230
 231    main([])
 232
 233    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 234    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 235    try:
 236        jobs = db.list_jobs()
 237        assert len(jobs) == 1
 238        assert jobs[0]["title"] == "Build a durable workflow"
 239        assert opened["job_id"] == jobs[0]["id"]
 240        assert opened["show_history"] is True
 241        assert opened["history_limit"] == 12
 242    finally:
 243        db.close()
 244    assert "created Build a durable workflow" in out
 245    assert "Opening workspace" in out
 246    assert "opened" in out
 247
 248
 249def test_first_run_plain_greeting_does_not_create_job(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 250    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 251
 252    assert _handle_first_run_menu_line("Hello") is True
 253
 254    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 255    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 256    try:
 257        assert db.list_jobs() == []
 258    finally:
 259        db.close()
 260    assert "long-running work" in out

 263def test_first_run_frame_uses_full_screen_ui_not_banner(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
 264    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 265
 266    frame = _build_first_run_frame("", [], width=100, height=24)
 267
 268    assert "Nipux" in frame
 269    assert "Nipux Chat" in frame
 270    assert "Workspace" in frame
 271    assert "Compose" in frame
 272    assert "New job" in frame
 273    assert "slash commands for setup" in frame
 274    assert "controls on the right" not in frame
 275    assert "Control" not in frame
 276    assert "_   _" in frame
 277    assert "FIRST RUN" not in frame
 278    assert "nipux menu >" not in frame
 279    assert "/shell" not in frame

 282def test_first_run_frame_has_slash_command_popup(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
 283    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 284
 285    frame = _build_first_run_frame("/", [], width=100, height=26)
 286
 287    assert "commands" in frame
 288    assert "/new" in frame
 289    assert "/jobs" in frame
 290    assert "/model" in frame
 291    assert "/settings" not in frame
 292    assert "/shell" not in frame

 296def test_first_run_frame_has_no_settings_page(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
 297    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 298
 299    frame = _build_first_run_frame("", [], width=100, height=26, view="settings", selected=1)
 300
 301    assert "Settings" not in frame
 302    assert "/base-url URL" not in frame
 303    assert "/api-key KEY" not in frame
 304    assert "/timeout SECONDS" not in frame
 305    assert "Mode" in frame
 306    assert "Start" in frame
 307    assert "/shell" not in frame
 308
 309
 310def test_first_run_frame_uses_command_palette_for_config(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
 311    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 312
 313    frame = _build_first_run_frame("/model", [], width=100, height=26)
 314
 315    assert "/model" in frame
 316    assert "set model" in frame
 317    assert "Settings" not in frame
 318
 319
 320def test_settings_editor_persists_model_config(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
 321    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 322
 323    assert _save_config_field("model.name", "demo/model") == "demo/model"
 324    assert _save_config_field("model.context_length", "4096") == 4096
 325    assert _save_config_field("runtime.daily_digest_enabled", "false") is False
 326
 327    assert _config_field_value("model.name") == "demo/model"
 328    assert _config_field_value("model.context_length") == 4096
 329    assert _config_field_value("runtime.daily_digest_enabled") is False
 330    text = (tmp_path / "config.yaml").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 331    assert "demo/model" in text
 332    assert _inline_setting_notice("model.name", "") == "kept model.name"
 333
 334
 335def test_slash_autocomplete_filters_commands():
 336    assert _autocomplete_slash("/do", FIRST_RUN_SLASH_COMMANDS) == "/doctor "
 337    assert _autocomplete_slash("/mo", FIRST_RUN_SLASH_COMMANDS) == "/model "
 338    assert _autocomplete_slash("/sta", CHAT_SLASH_COMMANDS) == "/status "
 339    assert _autocomplete_slash("/step", CHAT_SLASH_COMMANDS) == "/step-limit "
 340    assert _autocomplete_slash("/out", FIRST_RUN_SLASH_COMMANDS) == "/output-chars "
 341    assert _autocomplete_slash("plain text", CHAT_SLASH_COMMANDS) == "plain text"
 342    lines = _slash_suggestion_lines("/art", CHAT_SLASH_COMMANDS, width=80)
 343    text = "\n".join(lines)
 344    assert "/artifacts" in text
 345    assert "/artifact" in text
 346    assert "/run" not in text
 347    hint_text = "\n".join(_slash_suggestion_lines("/model ", CHAT_SLASH_COMMANDS, width=80))
 348    assert "/model" in hint_text
 349    assert "MODEL" in hint_text
 350    partial_hint_text = "\n".join(_slash_suggestion_lines("/mo", CHAT_SLASH_COMMANDS, width=80))
 351    assert "/model MODEL" in partial_hint_text
 352    assert "/shell" not in "\n".join(_slash_suggestion_lines("/", CHAT_SLASH_COMMANDS, width=80, limit=20))
 353
 354
 355def test_terminal_escape_decodes_arrows_and_mouse_click():
 356    assert _decode_terminal_escape("\x1b[A") == ("up", None)
 357    assert _decode_terminal_escape("\x1b[B") == ("down", None)
 358    assert _decode_terminal_escape("\x1b[C") == ("right", None)
 359    assert _decode_terminal_escape("\x1b[D") == ("left", None)
 360    assert _decode_terminal_escape("\x1bOB") == ("down", None)
 361    assert _decode_terminal_escape("\x1b[1;2B") == ("down", None)
 362    assert _decode_terminal_escape("\x1b[<0;88;12M") == ("click", (88, 12))
 363    assert _decode_terminal_escape("\x1b[M !!") == ("click", (1, 1))
 364
 365
 366def test_first_run_click_maps_right_pane_actions(monkeypatch):
 367    monkeypatch.setattr("shutil.get_terminal_size", lambda fallback=(100, 30): (100, 30))
 368
 369    assert _first_run_click_action(70, 11, view="start") == 0
 370    assert _first_run_click_action(70, 13, view="start") == 2
 371    assert _first_run_click_action(10, 12, view="start") is None
 372
 373
 374def test_frame_next_job_cycles_jobs():
 375    snapshot = {"jobs": [{"id": "one"}, {"id": "two"}, {"id": "three"}]}
 376
 377    assert _frame_next_job_id(snapshot, "one", direction=1) == "two"
 378    assert _frame_next_job_id(snapshot, "one", direction=-1) == "three"
 379    assert _frame_next_job_id(snapshot, "missing", direction=1) == "two"
 380
 381
 382def test_chat_help_has_config_slash_commands_without_settings_page(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 383    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 384    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 385    try:
 386        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
 387    finally:
 388        db.close()
 389
 390    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/help") is True
 391
 392    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 393    assert "/settings" not in out
 394    assert "/usage" in out
 395    assert "/outcomes" in out
 396    assert "/model MODEL" in out
 397    assert "/api-key KEY" in out
 398    assert "/timeout SECONDS" in out
 399    assert "/home PATH" in out
 400    assert "/digest-time HH:MM" in out
 401    assert "/shell" not in out
 402
 403
 404def test_chat_settings_slash_commands_persist_config(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 405    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 406    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_TEST_KEY", "")
 407    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 408    try:
 409        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
 410    finally:
 411        db.close()
 412
 413    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/model provider/model") is True
 414    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/base-url https://example.com/v1") is True
 415    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/context 8192") is True
 416    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/input-cost 0.10") is True
 417    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/output-cost 0.20") is True
 418    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/timeout 45") is True
 419    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/step-limit 90") is True
 420    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/output-chars 4096") is True
 421    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/daily-digest false") is True
 422    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/digest-time 08:30") is True
 423    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/api-key-env NIPUX_TEST_KEY") is True
 424    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/api-key sk-test-value") is True
 425    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 426
 427    assert "saved model.name = provider/model" in out
 428    assert "saved model.base_url = https://example.com/v1" in out
 429    assert "saved model.context_length = 8192" in out
 430    assert "saved model.input_cost_per_million = 0.1" in out
 431    assert "saved model.output_cost_per_million = 0.2" in out
 432    assert "saved model.request_timeout_seconds = 45.0" in out
 433    assert "saved runtime.max_step_seconds = 90" in out
 434    assert "saved runtime.artifact_inline_char_limit = 4096" in out
 435    assert "saved runtime.daily_digest_enabled = False" in out
 436    assert "saved runtime.daily_digest_time = 08:30" in out
 437    assert "saved model.api_key_env = NIPUX_TEST_KEY" in out
 438    assert "saved NIPUX_TEST_KEY" in out
 439    assert "sk-test-value" not in out
 440    assert _config_field_value("model.name") == "provider/model"
 441    assert _config_field_value("model.base_url") == "https://example.com/v1"
 442    assert _config_field_value("model.context_length") == 8192
 443    assert _config_field_value("model.input_cost_per_million") == 0.1
 444    assert _config_field_value("model.output_cost_per_million") == 0.2
 445    assert _config_field_value("model.request_timeout_seconds") == 45.0
 446    assert _config_field_value("runtime.max_step_seconds") == 90
 447    assert _config_field_value("runtime.artifact_inline_char_limit") == 4096
 448    assert _config_field_value("runtime.daily_digest_enabled") is False
 449    assert _config_field_value("runtime.daily_digest_time") == "08:30"
 450    assert "NIPUX_TEST_KEY=sk-test-value" in (tmp_path / ".env").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 451
 452
 453def test_chat_usage_slash_command_reports_tokens(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 454    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 455    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 456    try:
 457        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
 458        db.append_event(
 459            job_id,
 460            event_type="loop",
 461            title="message_end",
 462            metadata={
 463                "usage": {
 464                    "prompt_tokens": 1000,
 465                    "completion_tokens": 250,
 466                    "total_tokens": 1250,
 467                    "cost": 0.0042,
 468                }
 469            },
 470        )
 471    finally:
 472        db.close()
 473
 474    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/usage") is True
 475
 476    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 477    assert "usage research" in out
 478    assert "tokens: total=1.2K prompt=1.0K output=250" in out
 479    assert "cost=$0.0042" in out
 480
 481
 482def test_chat_usage_estimates_cost_from_configured_rates(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 483    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 484    (tmp_path / "config.yaml").write_text(
 485        """
 486model:
 487  name: provider/model
 488  base_url: https://example.com/v1
 489  input_cost_per_million: 1.0
 490  output_cost_per_million: 2.0
 491""",
 492        encoding="utf-8",
 493    )
 494    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 495    try:
 496        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
 497        db.append_event(
 498            job_id,
 499            event_type="loop",
 500            title="message_end",
 501            metadata={
 502                "usage": {
 503                    "prompt_tokens": 1000,
 504                    "completion_tokens": 500,
 505                    "total_tokens": 1500,
 506                    "estimated": True,
 507                }
 508            },
 509        )
 510    finally:
 511        db.close()
 512
 513    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/usage") is True
 514
 515    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 516    assert "cost=~$0.0020" in out
 517
 518
 519def test_first_run_settings_slash_commands_persist_config(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
 520    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 521
 522    action, payload = _handle_first_run_frame_line("/model provider/model")
 523
 524    assert action == "notice"
 525    assert isinstance(payload, list)
 526    assert any("saved model.name = provider/model" in line for line in payload)
 527    assert _config_field_value("model.name") == "provider/model"

 530def test_shell_ls_alias_lists_jobs_instead_of_steering(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 531    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 532    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 533    try:
 534        db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
 535    finally:
 536        db.close()
 537
 538    assert _run_shell_line("ls") is True
 539
 540    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 541    assert "research" in out
 542    assert "queued for" not in out

 545def test_roadmap_command_renders_roadmap(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 546    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 547    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 548    try:
 549        job_id = db.create_job("Broad work", title="broad")
 550        db.append_roadmap_record(
 551            job_id,
 552            title="Broad Roadmap",
 553            status="active",
 554            current_milestone="Foundation",
 555            milestones=[{
 556                "title": "Foundation",
 557                "status": "validating",
 558                "validation_status": "pending",
 559                "features": [{"title": "First feature", "status": "done"}],
 560            }],
 561        )
 562    finally:
 563        db.close()
 564
 565    main(["roadmap", "broad"])
 566
 567    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 568    assert "roadmap broad" in out
 569    assert "Broad Roadmap" in out
 570    assert "Foundation" in out
 571    assert "validation=pending" in out
 572
 573
 574def test_shell_focus_controls_default_steering_job(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 575    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 576    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 577    try:
 578        first = db.create_job("Research topic", title="first research")
 579        second = db.create_job("Find investors", title="investor search")
 580    finally:
 581        db.close()
 582
 583    assert _run_shell_line("focus investor") is True
 584    assert _run_shell_line("prioritize Toronto findings") is True
 585
 586    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 587    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 588    try:
 589        first_job = db.get_job(first)
 590        second_job = db.get_job(second)
 591        assert "focus set:" in out
 592        assert first_job["metadata"].get("operator_messages") is None
 593        assert second_job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][-1]["message"] == "prioritize Toronto findings"
 594    finally:
 595        db.close()
 596
 597
 598def test_shell_rename_updates_job_title_and_program(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 599    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 600    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 601    try:
 602        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="old title")
 603        program = tmp_path / "jobs" / job_id / "program.md"
 604        program.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 605        program.write_text("# old title\n\nBody\n", encoding="utf-8")
 606    finally:
 607        db.close()
 608
 609    assert _run_shell_line("rename old title --title new title") is True
 610
 611    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 612    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 613    try:
 614        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 615        assert "renamed old title -> new title" in out
 616        assert job["title"] == "new title"
 617        assert program.read_text(encoding="utf-8").startswith("# new title\n")
 618    finally:
 619        db.close()
 620
 621
 622def test_shell_delete_removes_job_and_artifact_dir(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 623    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 624    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 625    try:
 626        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="delete me")
 627        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 628        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="write_artifact")
 629        store = ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db=db)
 630        stored = store.write_text(
 631            job_id=job_id,
 632            run_id=run_id,
 633            step_id=step_id,
 634            title="Artifact",
 635            summary="saved",
 636            content="content",
 637        )
 638        artifact_path = stored.path
 639    finally:
 640        db.close()
 641
 642    assert artifact_path.exists()
 643    assert _run_shell_line("delete delete me") is True
 644
 645    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 646    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 647    try:
 648        assert "deleted delete me" in out
 649        try:
 650            db.get_job(job_id)
 651        except KeyError:
 652            pass
 653        else:
 654            raise AssertionError("job still exists after shell delete")
 655        assert not artifact_path.exists()
 656        assert not (tmp_path / "jobs" / job_id).exists()
 657    finally:
 658        db.close()
 659
 660
 661def test_shell_help_has_no_examples_or_control_run_sections(capsys):
 662    _print_shell_help()
 663
 664    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 665    assert "Examples:" not in out
 666    assert "\nControl\n" not in out
 667    assert "\nRun\n" not in out
 668    assert "delete JOB_TITLE" in out
 669    assert "usage [JOB_TITLE]" in out
 670    assert "Jobs" in out
 671    assert "Worker" in out
 672
 673
 674def test_chat_clear_does_not_queue_operator_message(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
 675    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 676    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 677    try:
 678        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
 679    finally:
 680        db.close()
 681
 682    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "clear") is True
 683
 684    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 685    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 686    try:
 687        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 688        assert "\033[2J\033[H" in out
 689        assert job["metadata"].get("operator_messages") is None
 690    finally:
 691        db.close()
 692
 693
 694def test_minimal_live_event_line_summarizes_tool_steps():
 695    line = _minimal_live_event_line(
 696        {
 697            "event_type": "tool_call",
 698            "title": "shell_exec",
 699            "body": "",
 700            "metadata": {"input": {"arguments": {"command": "ssh server nvidia-smi"}}},
 701        }
 702    )
 703
 704    assert line == "start shell ssh server nvidia-smi"
 705
 706
 707def test_chat_frame_is_bounded_and_has_composer():
 708    snapshot = {
 709        "job_id": "job_demo",
 710        "job": {
 711            "id": "job_demo",
 712            "title": "demo job",
 713            "objective": "keep a generic long-running job visible",
 714            "status": "running",
 715            "kind": "generic",
 716            "metadata": {"task_queue": [{"status": "active", "title": "Draft next deliverable", "priority": 7}]},
 717        },
 718        "jobs": [{"id": "job_demo", "title": "demo job", "status": "running", "kind": "generic", "metadata": {}}],
 719        "steps": [
 720            {
 721                "step_no": 3,
 722                "status": "completed",
 723                "kind": "tool",
 724                "tool_name": "web_search",
 725                "summary": "web_search returned sources",
 726            }
 727        ],
 728        "artifacts": [{"id": "art_demo"}],
 729        "memory_entries": [{}],
 730        "events": [
 731            {
 732                "event_type": "agent_message",
 733                "title": "plan",
 734                "body": "I will plan this.\nPlan:\n- one\n- two\nQuestions:\n- answer?",
 735                "metadata": {},
 736            },
 737            {
 738                "event_type": "task",
 739                "title": "internal task",
 740                "body": "internal task body",
 741                "metadata": {},
 742            },
 743            {
 744                "event_type": "tool_result",
 745                "title": "web_search",
 746                "body": "web_search query='demo' returned 1 results",
 747                "metadata": {"status": "completed", "input": {"arguments": {"query": "demo"}}},
 748            }
 749        ],
 750        "daemon": {"running": True, "metadata": {"pid": 123}},
 751        "model": "model/demo",
 752        "base_url": "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
 753        "context_length": 8192,
 754        "token_usage": {
 755            "calls": 2,
 756            "latest_prompt_tokens": 4096,
 757            "completion_tokens": 1234,
 758            "total_tokens": 5330,
 759            "cost": 0.0123,
 760            "has_cost": True,
 761        },
 762    }
 763
 764    frame = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "hello", [], width=100, height=22)
 765
 766    assert len(frame.splitlines()) <= 22
 767    assert "Nipux CLI" in frame
 768    assert "Chat" in frame
 769    assert "Status" in frame
 770    assert "Latest" in frame
 771    assert "Jobs" in frame
 772    assert "Recent outcomes" in frame
 773    assert "ctx" in frame
 774    assert "4.1K/8.2K" in frame
 775    assert "out" in frame
 776    assert "1.2K" in frame
 777    assert "tok" in frame
 778    assert "5.3K" in frame
 779    assert "$0.0123" in frame
 780    assert "Compose" in frame
 781    assert "❯ hello" in frame
 782    task_frame = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=100, height=26)
 783    assert "Draft next deli" in task_frame
 784
 785    work = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=100, height=24, right_view="work")
 786    assert "Work" in work
 787    assert "Tool / console" in work
 788    assert "search demo" in work
 789
 790    updates = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=100, height=24, right_view="updates")
 791    assert "Outcomes" in updates
 792    assert "Outcomes by hour" in updates
 793
 794    secret = _build_chat_frame(
 795        snapshot,
 796        "secret-value",
 797        [],
 798        width=100,
 799        height=24,
 800        editing_field="secret:model.api_key",
 801    )
 802    assert "Editing API key" in secret
 803    assert "secret-value" not in secret
 804    assert "••••" in secret
 805
 806
 807def test_chat_frame_separates_chat_from_worker_activity():
 808    snapshot = {
 809        "job_id": "job_demo",
 810        "job": {
 811            "id": "job_demo",
 812            "title": "demo job",
 813            "objective": "keep chat separate",
 814            "status": "running",
 815            "kind": "generic",
 816            "metadata": {},
 817        },
 818        "jobs": [{"id": "job_demo", "title": "demo job", "status": "running", "kind": "generic", "metadata": {}}],
 819        "steps": [],
 820        "artifacts": [],
 821        "memory_entries": [],
 822        "events": [
 823            {"event_type": "operator_message", "body": "start a benchmark job", "metadata": {}},
 824            {"event_type": "agent_message", "title": "chat", "body": "I created the job and started it.", "metadata": {}},
 825            {"event_type": "tool_call", "title": "shell_exec", "body": "", "metadata": {"input": {"arguments": {"command": "python bench.py"}}}},
 826            {"event_type": "tool_result", "title": "shell_exec", "body": "shell_exec rc=0", "metadata": {"status": "completed", "input": {"arguments": {"command": "python bench.py"}}}},
 827        ],
 828        "daemon": {"running": True, "metadata": {"pid": 123}},
 829        "model": "model/demo",
 830    }
 831
 832    frame = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=130, height=24, right_view="work")
 833    chat_side = frame.split(" │ ", 1)[0]
 834
 835    assert "start a benchmark job" in frame
 836    assert "I created the job" in frame
 837    assert "Tool / console" in frame
 838    assert "python bench.py" in frame
 839    assert "python bench.py" not in chat_side
 840
 841
 842def test_chat_frame_empty_state_uses_sleek_hero():
 843    snapshot = {
 844        "job_id": "job_demo",
 845        "job": {
 846            "id": "job_demo",
 847            "title": "demo job",
 848            "objective": "keep chat visible",
 849            "status": "running",
 850            "kind": "generic",
 851            "metadata": {},
 852        },
 853        "jobs": [{"id": "job_demo", "title": "demo job", "status": "running", "kind": "generic", "metadata": {}}],
 854        "steps": [],
 855        "artifacts": [],
 856        "memory_entries": [],
 857        "events": [],
 858        "daemon": {"running": True, "metadata": {"pid": 123}},
 859        "model": "model/demo",
 860    }
 861
 862    frame = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=120, height=28)
 863
 864    assert "_   _ ___" in frame
 865    assert "A persistent agent workspace." in frame
 866    assert "No chat yet." not in frame
 867
 868
 869def test_frame_emit_skips_unchanged_render(capsys):
 870    first = _emit_frame_if_changed("frame")
 871    second = _emit_frame_if_changed("frame", first)
 872    third = _emit_frame_if_changed("next", second)
 873
 874    out = capsys.readouterr().out
 875    assert first == "frame"
 876    assert second == "frame"
 877    assert third == "next"
 878    assert out.count("\033[H") == 2
 879    assert "\033[J" not in out
 880
 881
 882def test_chat_frame_does_not_cap_long_agent_messages():
 883    long_reply = (
 884        "**Completed Work:** "
 885        "1. Test suite analysis finished. "
 886        "2. Code analysis findings documented. "
 887        "3. Market readiness gaps identified. "
 888        "4. Packaging risks summarized. "
 889        "5. Daemon reliability checked. "
 890        "6. UI ergonomics reviewed. "
 891        "7. Final recommendation included."
 892    )
 893    snapshot = {
 894        "job_id": "job_demo",
 895        "job": {
 896            "id": "job_demo",
 897            "title": "demo job",
 898            "objective": "keep chat readable",
 899            "status": "running",
 900            "kind": "generic",
 901            "metadata": {},
 902        },
 903        "jobs": [{"id": "job_demo", "title": "demo job", "status": "running", "kind": "generic", "metadata": {}}],
 904        "steps": [],
 905        "artifacts": [],
 906        "memory_entries": [],
 907        "events": [
 908            {"event_type": "operator_message", "body": "what have you done so far", "metadata": {}},
 909            {"event_type": "agent_message", "title": "chat", "body": long_reply, "metadata": {}},
 910        ],
 911        "daemon": {"running": True, "metadata": {"pid": 123}},
 912        "model": "model/demo",
 913    }
 914
 915    frame = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=118, height=32)
 916
 917    assert "Completed Work:" in frame
 918    assert "Final recommendation included" in frame
 919    assert "…" not in frame
 920
 921
 922def test_plain_chat_control_intents_map_to_commands():
 923    assert _chat_control_command("how is it going?") == "/status"
 924    assert _chat_control_command("start working") == "/run"
 925    assert _chat_control_command("pause this job") == "/pause"
 926    assert _chat_control_command("show jobs") == "/jobs"
 927    assert _chat_control_command("change model") == "/model"
 928    assert _chat_control_command("how much did it cost") == "/usage"
 929    assert _chat_control_command("what has it done") == "/outcomes"
 930
 931
 932def test_plain_chat_control_intent_does_not_queue_operator_context(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
 933    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 934    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 935    try:
 936        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
 937    finally:
 938        db.close()
 939
 940    captured = {}
 941
 942    def fake_capture(job_id_arg, command):
 943        captured["job_id"] = job_id_arg
 944        captured["command"] = command
 945        return True, "status output\n"
 946
 947    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.cli._capture_chat_command", fake_capture)
 948
 949    keep_running, message = _handle_chat_message(job_id, "how is it going?", quiet=True)
 950
 951    assert keep_running is True
 952    assert message == "status output"
 953    assert captured == {"job_id": job_id, "command": "/status"}
 954    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 955    try:
 956        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 957        assert job["metadata"].get("operator_messages") is None
 958    finally:
 959        db.close()
 960
 961
 962def test_plain_chat_reply_usage_is_recorded(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
 963    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
 964    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 965    try:
 966        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
 967    finally:
 968        db.close()
 969
 970    keep_running, message = _handle_chat_message(
 971        job_id,
 972        "hello",
 973        quiet=True,
 974        reply_fn=lambda _job_id, _line: LLMResponse(
 975            content="reply",
 976            usage={"prompt_tokens": 120, "completion_tokens": 20, "total_tokens": 140, "cost": 0.001},
 977            model="provider/model",
 978            response_id="gen_chat",
 979        ),
 980    )
 981
 982    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 983    try:
 984        usage = db.job_token_usage(job_id)
 985        events = db.list_events(job_id=job_id, event_types=["loop"], limit=5)
 986    finally:
 987        db.close()
 988    assert keep_running is True
 989    assert message == ""
 990    assert usage["calls"] == 1
 991    assert usage["prompt_tokens"] == 120
 992    assert usage["completion_tokens"] == 20
 993    assert usage["cost"] == 0.001
 994    assert events[-1]["metadata"]["source"] == "chat"
 995    assert events[-1]["metadata"]["response_id"] == "gen_chat"
 996
 997
 998def test_chat_frame_surfaces_actual_work_events():
 999    snapshot = {
1000        "job_id": "job_demo",
1001        "job": {
1002            "id": "job_demo",
1003            "title": "demo job",
1004            "objective": "produce visible work",
1005            "status": "running",
1006            "kind": "generic",
1007            "metadata": {
1008                "task_queue": [{"status": "open"}],
1009                "roadmap": {"milestones": [{"title": "Draft", "status": "active"}]},
1010            },
1011        },
1012        "jobs": [{"id": "job_demo", "title": "demo job", "status": "running", "kind": "generic", "metadata": {}}],
1013        "steps": [],
1014        "artifacts": [{"id": "art_demo"}],
1015        "memory_entries": [{}],
1016        "events": [
1017            {"event_type": "operator_message", "body": "please keep improving", "metadata": {"mode": "steer"}},
1018            {"event_type": "tool_call", "title": "web_search", "body": "", "metadata": {"input": {"arguments": {"query": "agent harness distillation"}}}},
1019            {"event_type": "tool_result", "title": "web_search", "body": "web_search query='agent harness distillation' returned 5 results", "metadata": {"status": "completed", "input": {"arguments": {"query": "agent harness distillation"}}}},
1020            {"event_type": "artifact", "title": "Research Paper Draft", "body": "", "metadata": {"summary": "saved first complete draft"}},
1021            {"event_type": "finding", "title": "Distillation finding", "body": "tool traces improve student behavior", "metadata": {}},
1022            {"event_type": "task", "title": "Compare methods", "body": "", "metadata": {"status": "open"}},
1023            {"event_type": "roadmap", "title": "Paper roadmap", "body": "", "metadata": {"status": "active"}},
1024            {"event_type": "milestone_validation", "title": "Draft", "body": "", "metadata": {"validation_status": "passed"}},
1025            {"event_type": "experiment", "title": "Citation coverage check", "body": "", "metadata": {"metric_name": "sources", "metric_value": 18, "metric_unit": ""}},
1026            {"event_type": "lesson", "title": "strategy", "body": "prefer measured updates", "metadata": {}},
1027            {"event_type": "reflection", "title": "reflection", "body": "Reflection through step #10: next branch is evaluation.", "metadata": {}},
1028        ],
1029        "daemon": {"running": True, "metadata": {"pid": 123}},
1030        "model": "model/demo",
1031        "counts": {"steps": 10, "artifacts": 1, "memory": 1},
1032    }
1033
1034    updates = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=150, height=34, right_view="updates")
1035    work = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=150, height=34, right_view="work")
1036    frame = updates + "\n" + work
1037
1038    assert "Research Paper Draft" in frame
1039    assert "Distillation finding" in frame
1040    assert "Compare methods" in frame
1041    assert "Paper roadmap" in frame
1042    assert "passed Draft" in frame
1043    assert "Citation coverage check" in frame
1044    assert "LEARN" in frame
1045    assert "strategy" in frame
1046    assert "reflected #10" in frame
1047
1048
1049def test_chat_frame_has_model_updates_page():
1050    snapshot = {
1051        "job_id": "job_demo",
1052        "job": {
1053            "id": "job_demo",
1054            "title": "paper job",
1055            "objective": "write a paper",
1056            "status": "running",
1057            "kind": "generic",
1058            "metadata": {},
1059        },
1060        "jobs": [{"id": "job_demo", "title": "paper job", "status": "running", "kind": "generic", "metadata": {}}],
1061        "steps": [],
1062        "artifacts": [],
1063        "memory_entries": [],
1064        "events": [
1065            {"event_type": "tool_result", "title": "web_search", "body": "web_search query='distillation agents' returned 5 results", "metadata": {"status": "completed", "input": {"arguments": {"query": "distillation agents"}}}},
1066            {"event_type": "artifact", "title": "Literature Review Draft", "body": "saved draft", "metadata": {}},
1067            {"event_type": "finding", "title": "Trajectory distillation", "body": "teacher traces improve tool use", "metadata": {}},
1068            {"event_type": "experiment", "title": "Citation density check", "body": "", "metadata": {"metric_name": "citations", "metric_value": 12, "metric_unit": "count"}},
1069            {"event_type": "tool_result", "title": "write_file", "body": "write_file overwrite /tmp/paper.md", "metadata": {"status": "completed", "input": {"arguments": {"path": "/tmp/paper.md"}}, "output": {"path": "/tmp/paper.md"}}},
1070            {"event_type": "tool_result", "title": "shell_exec", "body": "shell_exec rc=0", "metadata": {"status": "completed", "input": {"arguments": {"command": "printf draft | tee /tmp/outline.md"}}}},
1071        ],
1072        "daemon": {"running": True, "metadata": {"pid": 123}},
1073        "model": "model/demo",
1074    }
1075
1076    frame = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=132, height=28, right_view="updates")
1077
1078    assert "Outcomes" in frame
1079    assert "Outcomes by hour" in frame
1080    assert "1 research" in frame
1081    assert "Literature Review Draft" in frame
1082    assert "Trajectory distillation" in frame
1083    assert "Citation density check" in frame
1084    assert "paper.md" in frame
1085    assert "outline.md" in frame
1086
1087
1088def test_recent_outcome_lines_wrap_long_updates():
1089    lines = recent_model_update_lines(
1090        [
1091            {
1092                "event_type": "finding",
1093                "title": "Trajectory distillation improves agentic tool selection when teacher traces include failures and recovery actions",
1094                "body": "",
1095                "metadata": {},
1096                "created_at": "2026-05-01T12:34:00+00:00",
1097            }
1098        ],
1099        width=62,
1100        limit=4,
1101    )
1102
1103    rendered = "\n".join(lines)
1104    assert len(lines) >= 2
1105    assert "Trajectory distillation improves" in rendered
1106    assert "teacher traces include failures" in rendered
1107
1108
1109def test_chat_pane_marks_hidden_overflow():
1110    events = [
1111        {
1112            "event_type": "agent_message",
1113            "title": "chat",
1114            "body": " ".join(f"word{i}" for i in range(80)),
1115            "metadata": {},
1116            "created_at": "2026-04-25T12:00:00Z",
1117        }
1118    ]
1119
1120    lines = chat_pane_lines(events, [], width=48, rows=4)
1121
1122    assert "chat lines hidden" in lines[0]
1123    assert len(lines) == 4
1124
1125

1158def test_hourly_outcomes_prioritize_durable_work_over_research_noise():
1159    events = [
1160        {
1161            "event_type": "tool_result",
1162            "title": "web_search",
1163            "body": "web_search query='generic harness patterns' returned 5 results",
1164            "metadata": {"status": "completed", "input": {"arguments": {"query": "generic harness patterns"}}},
1165            "created_at": "2026-05-01T12:05:00+00:00",
1166        },
1167        {
1168            "event_type": "tool_result",
1169            "title": "web_extract",
1170            "body": "web_extract fetched 3/3 pages",
1171            "metadata": {"status": "completed"},
1172            "created_at": "2026-05-01T12:08:00+00:00",
1173        },
1174        {
1175            "event_type": "artifact",
1176            "title": "Harness Architecture Notes",
1177            "body": "saved design notes",
1178            "metadata": {},
1179            "created_at": "2026-05-01T12:20:00+00:00",
1180        },
1181        {
1182            "event_type": "experiment",
1183            "title": "Context budget check",
1184            "body": "",
1185            "metadata": {"metric_name": "prompt_tokens", "metric_value": 4200, "metric_unit": "tokens"},
1186            "created_at": "2026-05-01T12:30:00+00:00",
1187        },
1188    ]
1189
1190    rendered = "\n".join(hourly_update_lines(events, width=96, limit=8))
1191
1192    assert "2 research" in rendered
1193    assert "1 outputs" in rendered
1194    assert "1 measurements" in rendered
1195    assert "Harness Architecture Notes" in rendered
1196    assert "Context budget check" in rendered
1197    assert "generic harness patterns" not in rendered
1198
1199
1200def test_status_recent_outcomes_hide_research_noise():
1201    events = [

1205            "body": "web_search query='generic harness patterns' returned 5 results",

1207            "created_at": "2026-05-01T12:05:00+00:00",
1208        },
1209        {
1210            "event_type": "artifact",
1211            "title": "Harness Architecture Notes",
1212            "body": "saved design notes",
1213            "metadata": {},
1214            "created_at": "2026-05-01T12:20:00+00:00",
1215        },
1216    ]
1217
1218    rendered = "\n".join(recent_model_update_lines(events, width=96, limit=4))
1219
1220    assert "Harness Architecture Notes" in rendered
1221    assert "generic harness patterns" not in rendered

1223
1224def test_hourly_outcomes_wrap_long_durable_updates_without_pre_truncation():
1225    events = [
1226        {
1227            "event_type": "finding",
1228            "title": (
1229                "Distillation survey breakthrough: teacher trajectories should include failed tool calls, "
1230                "operator corrections, recovery steps, and measured validation so the student learns the "
1231                "whole harness loop instead of only final answers"
1232            ),
1233            "body": "",
1234            "metadata": {},
1235            "created_at": "2026-05-01T12:05:00+00:00",
1236        },
1237    ]
1238
1239    rendered = "\n".join(hourly_update_lines(events, width=82, limit=6))
1240
1241    assert "operator corrections" in rendered
1242    assert "measured" in rendered
1243    assert "validation" in rendered
1244    assert "only" in rendered
1245    assert "final answers" in rendered
1246    assert "..." not in rendered
1247
1248
1249def test_chat_updates_page_includes_agent_error_updates():
1250    snapshot = {

1252        "job": {
1253            "id": "job_demo",
1254            "title": "provider job",
1255            "objective": "keep provider state visible",
1256            "status": "paused",
1257            "kind": "generic",
1258            "metadata": {},
1259        },
1260        "jobs": [{"id": "job_demo", "title": "provider job", "status": "paused", "kind": "generic", "metadata": {}}],
1261        "steps": [],
1262        "artifacts": [],
1263        "memory_entries": [],
1264        "events": [],
1265        "summary_events": [
1266            {
1267                "event_type": "agent_message",
1268                "title": "error",
1269                "body": "Model provider requires operator action.",
1270                "metadata": {"reason": "llm_provider_blocked"},
1271            },
1272        ],
1273        "daemon": {"running": True, "metadata": {"pid": 123}},
1274        "model": "model/demo",
1275    }
1276

1278    status = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=132, height=34)
1279
1280    assert "Model provider requires" in updates
1281    assert "operator action" in updates
1282    assert "Outcome" in status
1283    assert "Model provider re" in status

1286def test_chat_status_page_shows_job_outputs():
1287    snapshot = {
1288        "job_id": "job_demo",
1289        "job": {
1290            "id": "job_demo",
1291            "title": "demo job",
1292            "objective": "show created outputs per job",
1293            "status": "running",
1294            "kind": "generic",
1295            "metadata": {},
1296        },
1297        "jobs": [
1298            {"id": "job_demo", "title": "demo job", "status": "running", "kind": "generic", "metadata": {}},
1299            {"id": "job_other", "title": "other job", "status": "queued", "kind": "generic", "metadata": {}},
1300        ],
1301        "steps": [],
1302        "artifacts": [{"id": "art_demo", "title": "Primary Saved Draft"}],
1303        "job_artifacts": {
1304            "job_demo": [{"id": "art_demo", "title": "Primary Saved Draft"}],
1305            "job_other": [{"id": "art_other", "title": "Other Job Deliverable"}],
1306        },
1307        "memory_entries": [],
1308        "events": [],
1309        "summary_events": [
1310            {"event_type": "finding", "title": "Latest durable milestone", "body": "", "metadata": {}},
1311        ],
1312        "daemon": {"running": True, "metadata": {"pid": 123}},
1313        "model": "model/demo",
1314        "counts": {"steps": 0, "artifacts": 1, "memory": 0},
1315    }
1316
1317    frame = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=132, height=34)
1318
1319    assert "Jobs" in frame
1320    assert "Outcome" in frame
1321    assert "Latest durable milestone" in frame
1322    assert "Primary Saved Draft" in frame
1323    assert "Other Job Deliverable" in frame
