1326def test_frame_snapshot_keeps_summary_events_durable(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
1327    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1328    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1329    try:
1330        job_id = db.create_job("keep frame refresh focused", title="focused")
1331        for index in range(30):
1332            db.append_event(
1333                job_id=job_id,
1334                event_type="tool_result",
1335                title="web_search",
1336                body=f"search noise {index}",
1337                metadata={"status": "completed"},
1338            )
1339        db.append_event(job_id=job_id, event_type="artifact", title="Durable Paper Draft", body="", metadata={})
1340        db.append_event(job_id=job_id, event_type="finding", title="Actual finding", body="", metadata={})
1341    finally:
1342        db.close()
1343
1344    snapshot = _load_frame_snapshot(job_id, history_limit=4)
1345    summary_text = "\n".join(str(event.get("title") or event.get("body") or "") for event in snapshot["summary_events"])
1346
1347    assert "Durable Paper Draft" in summary_text
1348    assert "Actual finding" in summary_text
1349    assert "web_search" not in summary_text
1350    assert "search noise" not in summary_text
1351
1352
1353def test_frame_snapshot_respects_explicit_job_over_saved_focus(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
1354    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1355    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1356    try:
1357        focused_id = db.create_job("saved focus", title="saved focus")
1358        requested_id = db.create_job("requested focus", title="requested focus")
1359        (tmp_path / "shell_state.json").write_text(json.dumps({"focus_job_id": focused_id}), encoding="utf-8")
1360    finally:
1361        db.close()
1362
1363    snapshot = _load_frame_snapshot(requested_id, history_limit=4)
1364
1365    assert snapshot["job_id"] == requested_id
1366    assert snapshot["job"]["title"] == "requested focus"
1367
1368
1369def test_chat_status_page_marks_deferred_jobs_waiting():
1370    snapshot = {
1371        "job_id": "job_demo",
1372        "job": {
1373            "id": "job_demo",
1374            "title": "deferred job",
1375            "objective": "check a long-running process later",
1376            "status": "running",
1377            "kind": "generic",
1378            "metadata": {"defer_until": "2999-01-01T00:00:00+00:00", "defer_reason": "external process running"},
1379        },
1380        "jobs": [
1381            {
1382                "id": "job_demo",
1383                "title": "deferred job",
1384                "status": "running",
1385                "kind": "generic",
1386                "metadata": {"defer_until": "2999-01-01T00:00:00+00:00", "defer_reason": "external process running"},
1387            }
1388        ],
1389        "steps": [],
1390        "artifacts": [],
1391        "job_artifacts": {},
1392        "memory_entries": [],
1393        "events": [],
1394        "daemon": {"running": True, "metadata": {"pid": 123}},
1395        "model": "model/demo",
1396    }
1397
1398    frame = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=132, height=28)
1399
1400    assert "waiting" in frame
1401    assert "Wait" in frame
1402    assert "next check" in frame
1403    assert "external" in frame
1404    assert "active" not in frame
1405
1406
1407def test_chat_frame_collapses_repeated_failures_and_hides_memory_noise():
1408    repeated_error = {
1409        "event_type": "error",
1410        "title": "llm",
1411        "body": "Error code: 403 - {'error': {'message': 'Key limit exceeded (total limit).'}}",
1412        "metadata": {},
1413    }
1414    snapshot = {
1415        "job_id": "job_demo",
1416        "job": {
1417            "id": "job_demo",
1418            "title": "demo job",
1419            "objective": "stay readable",
1420            "status": "running",
1421            "kind": "generic",
1422            "metadata": {"task_queue": []},
1423        },
1424        "jobs": [{"id": "job_demo", "title": "demo job", "status": "running", "kind": "generic", "metadata": {}}],
1425        "steps": [],
1426        "artifacts": [],
1427        "memory_entries": [{}],
1428        "events": [
1429            repeated_error,
1430            {
1431                "event_type": "compaction",
1432                "title": "rolling_state",
1433                "body": "very long compact memory " * 80,
1434                "metadata": {},
1435            },
1436            repeated_error,
1437            repeated_error,
1438        ],
1439        "daemon": {"running": True, "metadata": {"pid": 123}},
1440        "model": "model/demo",
1441        "counts": {"steps": 3, "artifacts": 0, "memory": 1},
1442    }
1443
1444    frame = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=120, height=24, right_view="work")
1445
1446    assert "FAIL x3" in frame
1447    assert "very long compact memory" not in frame
1448
1449
1450def test_work_pane_uses_badges_without_duplicate_action_verbs():
1451    snapshot = {
1452        "job_id": "job_demo",
1453        "job": {
1454            "id": "job_demo",
1455            "title": "demo job",
1456            "objective": "stay readable",
1457            "status": "running",
1458            "kind": "generic",
1459            "metadata": {"task_queue": []},
1460        },
1461        "jobs": [{"id": "job_demo", "title": "demo job", "status": "running", "kind": "generic", "metadata": {}}],
1462        "steps": [],
1463        "artifacts": [],
1464        "memory_entries": [],
1465        "events": [
1466            {"event_type": "artifact", "title": "Demo Output", "body": "", "metadata": {}},
1467            {"event_type": "finding", "title": "Demo Finding", "body": "", "metadata": {}},
1468            {"event_type": "experiment", "title": "Demo Measurement", "body": "", "metadata": {}},
1469        ],
1470        "daemon": {"running": True, "metadata": {"pid": 123}},
1471        "model": "model/demo",
1472    }
1473
1474    frame = _build_chat_frame(snapshot, "", [], width=120, height=24, right_view="work")
1475
1476    assert "save Demo Output" in frame
1477    assert "find Demo Finding" in frame
1478    assert "test Demo Measurement" in frame
1479    assert "save saved" not in frame
1480    assert "find finding" not in frame
1481    assert "test experiment" not in frame
1482
1483
1484def test_run_reopens_completed_focused_job(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1485    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1486    parser = build_parser()
1487    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1488    try:
1489        job_id = db.create_job("Keep improving", title="perpetual")
1490        db.update_job_status(job_id, "completed")
1491    finally:
1492        db.close()
1493    started = {}
1494
1495    def fake_start(**kwargs):
1496        started.update(kwargs)
1497
1498    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.cli._start_daemon_if_needed", fake_start)
1499    args = parser.parse_args(["run", "perpetual", "--no-follow"])
1500
1501    args.func(args)
1502
1503    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1504    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1505    try:
1506        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1507        assert "focus set: perpetual" in out
1508        assert job["status"] == "queued"
1509        assert job["metadata"]["last_note"] == "reopened from completed by operator run command"
1510        assert started["poll_seconds"] == 0.0
1511    finally:
1512        db.close()
1513
1514
1515def test_create_sets_new_job_as_shell_focus(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1516    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1517    parser = build_parser()
1518    args = parser.parse_args(["create", "Research new topic", "--title", "new research", "--kind", "generic"])
1519
1520    args.func(args)
1521    created = capsys.readouterr().out.strip()
1522    assert _run_shell_line("focus") is True
1523
1524    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1525    assert created == "created new research"
1526    assert "new research" in out
1527    assert (tmp_path / "jobs" / "new-research" / "program.md").exists()
1528    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1529    try:
1530        job = db.get_job("new-research")
1531        assert job["status"] == "queued"
1532        assert job["metadata"]["planning_status"] == "auto_accepted"
1533        assert job["metadata"]["planning"]["questions"]
1534        tasks = job["metadata"]["task_queue"]
1535        assert tasks
1536        assert all(task["output_contract"] for task in tasks)
1537        assert all(task["acceptance_criteria"] for task in tasks)
1538        assert all(task["evidence_needed"] for task in tasks)
1539        assert all(task["stall_behavior"] for task in tasks)
1540    finally:
1541        db.close()
1542
1543
1544def test_commands_accept_unquoted_job_titles_in_shell(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1545    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1546    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1547    try:
1548        db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1549    finally:
1550        db.close()
1551
1552    assert _run_shell_line("status nightly research") is True
1553
1554    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1555    assert "focus: nightly research" in out
1556    assert "state: open" in out
1557    assert "job_" not in out
1558
1559
1560def test_shell_stop_job_title_pauses_job_instead_of_stopping_daemon(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1561    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1562    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1563    try:
1564        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1565        db.update_job_status(job_id, "running")
1566    finally:
1567        db.close()
1568
1569    assert _run_shell_line("stop nightly research") is True
1570
1571    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1572    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1573    try:
1574        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1575        assert "stopped nightly research" in out
1576        assert job["status"] == "paused"
1577        assert job["metadata"]["last_note"] == "stopped by operator"
1578    finally:
1579        db.close()
1580
1581
1582def test_shell_cancel_prefers_multiword_job_title_over_note(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1583    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1584    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1585    try:
1586        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1587        db.update_job_status(job_id, "running")
1588    finally:
1589        db.close()
1590
1591    assert _run_shell_line("cancel nightly research") is True
1592
1593    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1594    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1595    try:
1596        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1597        assert "cancelled nightly research" in out
1598        assert ": finder" not in out
1599        assert job["status"] == "cancelled"
1600        assert "last_note" not in job["metadata"]
1601    finally:
1602        db.close()
1603
1604
1605def test_shell_pause_splits_note_after_longest_matching_job_title(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1606    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1607    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1608    try:
1609        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1610        db.update_job_status(job_id, "running")
1611    finally:
1612        db.close()
1613
1614    assert _run_shell_line("pause nightly research checking costs") is True
1615
1616    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1617    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1618    try:
1619        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1620        assert "paused nightly research: checking costs" in out
1621        assert job["status"] == "paused"
1622        assert job["metadata"]["last_note"] == "checking costs"
1623    finally:
1624        db.close()
1625
1626
1627def test_chat_handle_line_adds_operator_message(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1628    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1629    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1630    try:
1631        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1632    finally:
1633        db.close()
1634
1635    assert (
1636        _chat_handle_line(
1637            job_id, "prefer artifact-backed findings", reply_fn=lambda _job_id, _message: "Okay, I will focus there."
1638        )
1639        is True
1640    )
1641
1642    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1643    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1644    try:
1645        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1646        assert "waiting:" in out
1647        assert "Okay, I will focus there." in out
1648        assert job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][-1]["source"] == "chat"
1649        assert job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][-1]["message"] == "prefer artifact-backed findings"
1650        assert job["metadata"]["last_agent_update"]["category"] == "chat"
1651    finally:
1652        db.close()
1653
1654
1655def test_chat_can_spawn_new_job_from_plain_message(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1656    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1657    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1658    try:
1659        original_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1660    finally:
1661        db.close()
1662
1663    assert (
1664        _chat_handle_line(
1665            original_id,
1666            "create a job to monitor nightly benchmarks and report regressions",
1667            reply_fn=lambda _job_id, _message: "should not call model",
1668        )
1669        is True
1670    )
1671
1672    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1673    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1674    try:
1675        jobs = db.list_jobs()
1676        assert len(jobs) == 2
1677        created = [job for job in jobs if job["id"] != original_id][0]
1678        assert "monitor nightly benchmarks" in created["objective"]
1679        assert created["status"] == "queued"
1680        assert created["metadata"]["planning_status"] == "auto_accepted"
1681        assert "should not call model" not in out
1682        assert "Created job" in out
1683    finally:
1684        db.close()
1685
1686
1687def test_chat_start_job_message_starts_daemon(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1688    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1689    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1690    try:
1691        original_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1692    finally:
1693        db.close()
1694    started = {}
1695
1696    def fake_start(**kwargs):
1697        started.update(kwargs)
1698
1699    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.cli._start_daemon_if_needed", fake_start)
1700
1701    assert (
1702        _chat_handle_line(
1703            original_id,
1704            "start a job to monitor nightly benchmarks and report regressions",
1705            reply_fn=lambda _job_id, _message: "should not call model",
1706        )
1707        is True
1708    )
1709
1710    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1711    assert started["poll_seconds"] == 0.0
1712    assert started["quiet"] is True
1713    assert "Started worker" in out
1714
1715
1716def test_chat_jobs_command_lists_jobs_instead_of_steering(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1717    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1718    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1719    try:
1720        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1721    finally:
1722        db.close()
1723
1724    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/jobs", reply_fn=lambda _job_id, _message: "should not run") is True
1725
1726    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1727    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1728    try:
1729        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1730        assert "nightly research" in out
1731        assert "should not run" not in out
1732        assert job["metadata"].get("operator_messages") is None
1733    finally:
1734        db.close()
1735
1736
1737def test_chat_command_inside_chat_is_not_queued(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1738    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1739    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1740    try:
1741        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1742    finally:
1743        db.close()
1744
1745    assert (
1746        _chat_handle_line(job_id, 'chat "nightly research"', reply_fn=lambda _job_id, _message: "should not run")
1747        is True
1748    )
1749
1750    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1751    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1752    try:
1753        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1754        assert "already chatting with nightly research" in out
1755        assert "should not run" not in out
1756        assert job["metadata"].get("operator_messages") is None
1757    finally:
1758        db.close()
1759
1760
1761def test_chat_run_accepts_initial_plan_before_starting(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
1762    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1763    parser = build_parser()
1764    args = parser.parse_args(["create", "Research new topic", "--title", "new research", "--kind", "generic"])
1765    args.func(args)
1766    job_id = "new-research"
1767    captured = {}
1768
1769    def fake_run(run_args):
1770        captured["job_id"] = run_args.job_id
1771
1772    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.cli.cmd_run", fake_run)
1773
1774    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/run") is True
1775
1776    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1777    try:
1778        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1779        assert job["status"] == "queued"
1780        assert captured["job_id"] == job_id
1781    finally:
1782        db.close()
1783
1784
1785def test_build_chat_messages_includes_recent_job_state(tmp_path):
1786    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1787    try:
1788        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research", kind="generic")
1789        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
1790        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="web_search")
1791        db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", summary="web_search returned useful sources")
1792        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1793
1794        messages = _build_chat_messages(db, job, "what is going on?")
1795
1796        content = messages[-1]["content"]
1797        assert "Job title: nightly research" in content
1798        assert "web_search returned useful sources" in content
1799        assert "what is going on?" in content
1800    finally:
1801        db.close()
1802
1803
1804def test_build_chat_messages_does_not_include_local_machine_context(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
1805    monkeypatch.setenv("HOME", str(tmp_path))
1806    ssh_dir = tmp_path / ".ssh"
1807    ssh_dir.mkdir()
1808    (ssh_dir / "config").write_text("Host private-box\n  HostName 10.9.8.7\n  User private\n", encoding="utf-8")
1809    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1810    try:
1811        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research", kind="generic")
1812        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1813
1814        messages = _build_chat_messages(db, job, "what is going on?")
1815
1816        content = messages[-1]["content"]
1817        assert "Local CLI context" not in content
1818        assert "private-box" not in content
1819        assert "10.9.8.7" not in content
1820    finally:
1821        db.close()
1822
1823
1824def test_build_chat_messages_points_to_artifact_and_lessons(tmp_path):
1825    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1826    try:
1827        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research", kind="generic")
1828        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
1829        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="write_artifact")
1830        ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db=db).write_text(
1831            job_id=job_id,
1832            run_id=run_id,
1833            step_id=step_id,
1834            title="Findings Batch",
1835            summary="15 reusable findings",
1836            content="Acme",
1837        )
1838        db.append_lesson(job_id, "Prefer actual evidence sources over low-evidence pages.", category="strategy")
1839        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1840
1841        messages = _build_chat_messages(db, job, "where are the findings?")
1842
1843        content = messages[-1]["content"]
1844        assert "/artifact 1" in content
1845        assert "Prefer actual evidence sources over low-evidence pages" in content
1846    finally:
1847        db.close()
1848
1849
1850def test_build_chat_messages_clip_large_visible_state(tmp_path):
1851    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1852    try:
1853        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research", kind="generic")
1854        for index in range(30):
1855            db.append_event(
1856                job_id=job_id,
1857                event_type="finding",
1858                title=f"large finding {index}",
1859                body="evidence " * 400,
1860                metadata={},
1861            )
1862        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1863
1864        messages = _build_chat_messages(db, job, "keep this exact operator question visible")
1865
1866        content = messages[-1]["content"]
1867        assert len(content) < 14_000
1868        assert "clipped" in content
1869        assert "keep this exact operator question visible" in content
1870    finally:
1871        db.close()
1872
1873
1874def test_artifact_command_resolves_title_query(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1875    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1876    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1877    try:
1878        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1879        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
1880        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="write_artifact")
1881        ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db=db).write_text(
1882            job_id=job_id,
1883            run_id=run_id,
1884            step_id=step_id,
1885            title="Findings Batch",
1886            summary="saved findings",
1887            content="Acme Corp\n",
1888        )
1889    finally:
1890        db.close()
1891
1892    parser = build_parser()
1893    args = parser.parse_args(["artifact", "Findings", "Batch"])
1894    args.func(args)
1895
1896    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1897    assert "artifact: Findings Batch" in out
1898    assert "Acme Corp" in out

1956def test_chat_work_defaults_to_compact_output(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
1957    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1958    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1959    try:
1960        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1961    finally:
1962        db.close()
1963    captured = {}
1964
1965    def fake_work(args):
1966        captured["verbose"] = args.verbose
1967        captured["chars"] = args.chars
1968

1970
1971    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/work") is True
1972

1976def test_chat_learn_adds_lesson(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):

1978    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")

1980        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
1981    finally:
1982        db.close()
1983
1984    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/learn low-evidence pages are not research findings") is True
1985
1986    out = capsys.readouterr().out
1987    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1988    try:
1989        job = db.get_job(job_id)

1996def test_chat_follow_queues_follow_up_message(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
1997    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
1998    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1999    try:
2000        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
2001    finally:
2002        db.close()
2003
2004    assert _chat_handle_line(job_id, "/follow after this branch, check another source") is True
2005
2006    out = capsys.readouterr().out
2007    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2008    try:
2009        job = db.get_job(job_id)
2010        message = job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][-1]
2011        assert "waiting after current branch" in out
2012        assert message["mode"] == "follow_up"
2013        assert message["message"] == "after this branch, check another source"
2014    finally:
2015        db.close()
2016
2017
2018def test_findings_sources_memory_metrics_commands(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
2019    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
2020    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2021    try:
2022        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="nightly research")
2023        db.append_finding_record(job_id, name="Acme Finding", category="example category", score=0.8)
2024        db.append_task_record(job_id, title="Explore primary sources", status="open", priority=5)
2025        db.append_experiment_record(job_id, title="Variant A", status="measured", metric_name="score", metric_value=1.5)
2026        db.append_source_record(job_id, "https://example.com", usefulness_score=0.9, yield_count=1)
2027        db.append_lesson(job_id, "Directories work.", category="strategy")
2028        db.append_reflection(job_id, "Keep using directories.", strategy="Try chambers.")
2029    finally:
2030        db.close()
2031
2032    parser = build_parser()
2033    for command in (["findings"], ["tasks"], ["experiments"], ["sources"], ["memory"], ["metrics"]):
2034        args = parser.parse_args(command)
2035        args.func(args)
2036
2037    out = capsys.readouterr().out
2038    assert "Acme Finding" in out
2039    assert "Explore primary sources" in out
2040    assert "Variant A" in out
2041    assert "https://example.com" in out
2042    assert "Keep using directories" in out
2043    assert "tasks: 1" in out
2044    assert "experiments: 1" in out
2045    assert "findings: 1" in out
2046
2047
2048def test_shell_natural_update_phrase_shows_updates(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
2049    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
2050    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2051    try:
2052        db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
2053    finally:
2054        db.close()
2055
2056    assert _run_shell_line("tell me updates") is True
2057    assert _run_shell_line("show outcomes") is True
2058
2059    out = capsys.readouterr().out
2060    assert "updates" in out
2061    assert "queued for" not in out
2062
2063
2064def test_updates_command_summarizes_durable_outcomes(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
2065    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
2066    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2067    try:
2068        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
2069        artifact_path = tmp_path / "artifact.md"
2070        artifact_path.write_text("saved", encoding="utf-8")
2071        db.append_event(
2072            job_id,
2073            event_type="tool_call",
2074            title="web_search",
2075            metadata={"input": {"arguments": {"query": "raw search"}}},
2076        )
2077        db.append_finding_record(job_id, name="Durable Result", category="evidence", reason="real outcome", score=0.7)
2078        db.add_artifact(
2079            job_id=job_id,
2080            path=artifact_path,
2081            sha256="abc",
2082            artifact_type="text",
2083            title="Saved Report",
2084            summary="durable output",
2085        )
2086    finally:
2087        db.close()
2088
2089    args = build_parser().parse_args(["updates", "research", "--limit", "3", "--chars", "120"])
2090    args.func(args)
2091
2092    out = capsys.readouterr().out
2093    assert "outcomes by hour:" in out
2094    assert "Durable Result" in out
2095    assert "Saved Report" in out
2096    assert "latest saved outputs:" in out
2097    assert "raw tool stream: activity" in out
2098    assert "recent tool calls:" not in out
2099
2100
2101def test_history_and_events_commands_render_visible_timeline(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
2102    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
2103    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2104    try:
2105        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
2106        db.append_operator_message(job_id, "operator timeline note", source="test")
2107        db.append_agent_update(job_id, "agent timeline note", category="chat")
2108    finally:
2109        db.close()
2110
2111    parser = build_parser()
2112    parser.parse_args(["history", "research"]).func(parser.parse_args(["history", "research"]))
2113    parser.parse_args(["events", "research"]).func(parser.parse_args(["events", "research"]))
2114
2115    out = capsys.readouterr().out
2116    assert "history research" in out
2117    assert "events research" in out
2118    assert "operator timeline note" in out
2119    assert "agent timeline note" in out
2120
2121
2122def test_shell_natural_health_phrase_shows_health(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):

2137def test_health_prints_recent_daemon_events(monkeypatch, tmp_path, capsys):
2138    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
2139
2140    config = load_config()
2141    append_daemon_event(config, "daemon_error", error_type="RuntimeError", error="provider fell over")
2142

2144    args = parser.parse_args(["health", "--limit", "3"])
2145    args.func(args)
2146
2147    out = capsys.readouterr().out
2148    assert "Nipux Health" in out
2149    assert "daemon_error" in out
2150    assert "RuntimeError" in out

2153def test_launch_agent_plist_contains_daemon_command(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
2154    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
2155
2156    plist = _launch_agent_plist(poll_seconds=7, quiet=True)
2157
2158    assert "com.nipux.agent" in plist
2159    assert "<string>daemon</string>" in plist
2160    assert "<string>--poll-seconds</string>" in plist
2161    assert "<string>7</string>" in plist
2162    assert str(tmp_path) in plist

2164
2165def test_systemd_service_text_contains_daemon_command(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
2166    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
2167
2168    service = _systemd_service_text(poll_seconds=0, quiet=True)
2169
2170    assert "[Service]" in service
2171    assert "ExecStart=" in service
2172    assert "daemon --poll-seconds 0" in service
2173    assert f"Environment=NIPUX_HOME={tmp_path}" in service
2174    assert "Restart=always" in service
tests/nipux_cli/test_cli_model_preflight.py 61 lines 
   1from types import SimpleNamespace
   2
   3from nipux_cli.cli import _ensure_remote_model_ready_for_worker, build_parser
   4from nipux_cli.doctor import Check
   5
   6
   7def _config(base_url: str):
   8    return SimpleNamespace(model=SimpleNamespace(base_url=base_url))
   9
  10
  11def test_remote_model_preflight_blocks_rejected_auth(monkeypatch, capsys):
  12    def fake_doctor(*, config, check_model):
  13        assert check_model is True
  14        return [Check("model_auth", False, "OpenRouter rejected API key: User not found")]
  15
  16    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.cli.run_doctor", fake_doctor)
  17
  18    assert _ensure_remote_model_ready_for_worker(_config("https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"), fake=False) is False
  19
  20    out = capsys.readouterr().out
  21    assert "model is not ready; daemon not started" in out
  22    assert "model_auth: OpenRouter rejected API key" in out
  23    assert "doctor --check-model" in out
  24
  25
  26def test_remote_model_preflight_skips_fake_runs(monkeypatch):
  27    def fake_doctor(*, config, check_model):
  28        raise AssertionError("fake runs should not need remote model auth")
  29
  30    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.cli.run_doctor", fake_doctor)
  31
  32    assert _ensure_remote_model_ready_for_worker(_config("https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"), fake=True) is True
  33
  34
  35def test_remote_model_preflight_does_not_block_local_endpoints(monkeypatch):
  36    def fake_doctor(*, config, check_model):
  37        raise AssertionError("local endpoints are checked by the worker, not daemon preflight")
  38
  39    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.cli.run_doctor", fake_doctor)
  40
  41    assert _ensure_remote_model_ready_for_worker(_config("http://localhost:11434/v1"), fake=False) is True
  42
  43
  44def test_start_does_not_spawn_daemon_when_model_preflight_fails(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
  45    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
  46    checked = {}
  47
  48    def fake_ready(config, *, fake):
  49        checked["fake"] = fake
  50        return False
  51
  52    def fake_popen(*args, **kwargs):
  53        raise AssertionError("daemon should not spawn when model preflight fails")
  54
  55    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.cli._ensure_remote_model_ready_for_worker", fake_ready)
  56    monkeypatch.setattr("subprocess.Popen", fake_popen)
  57
  58    args = build_parser().parse_args(["start", "--quiet"])
  59    args.func(args)
  60
  61    assert checked["fake"] is False
tests/nipux_cli/test_compression.py 76 lines 
   1from nipux_cli.compression import refresh_memory_index
   2from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
   3
   4
   5def test_refresh_memory_index_includes_durable_progress_ledgers(tmp_path):
   6    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
   7    try:
   8        job_id = db.create_job(
   9            "Keep improving a report",
  10            title="report",
  11            metadata={
  12                "task_queue": [
  13                    {
  14                        "title": "Draft evidence-backed section",
  15                        "status": "active",
  16                        "priority": 10,
  17                        "output_contract": "report",
  18                    }
  19                ],
  20                "finding_ledger": [{"name": "Teacher traces improve tool use"}],
  21                "source_ledger": [{"source": "https://example.test/paper", "usefulness_score": 0.8}],
  22                "experiment_ledger": [
  23                    {
  24                        "title": "Citation density check",
  25                        "status": "measured",
  26                        "metric_name": "citations",
  27                        "metric_value": 12,
  28                        "metric_unit": "count",
  29                    }
  30                ],
  31                "roadmap": {
  32                    "title": "Research paper roadmap",
  33                    "status": "active",
  34                    "current_milestone": "Improve literature review",
  35                },
  36                "pending_measurement_obligation": {
  37                    "source_step_no": 42,
  38                    "tool": "shell_exec",
  39                    "summary": "benchmark output needs accounting",
  40                    "metric_candidates": ["latency 120ms", "throughput 9 req/s"],
  41                },
  42            },
  43        )
  44        db.append_event(
  45            job_id,
  46            event_type="loop",
  47            title="message_end",
  48            metadata={
  49                "usage": {
  50                    "prompt_tokens": 1200,
  51                    "completion_tokens": 300,
  52                    "total_tokens": 1500,
  53                    "estimated": True,
  54                }
  55            },
  56        )
  57
  58        refresh_memory_index(db, job_id)
  59
  60        memory = db.list_memory(job_id)[0]["summary"]
  61        assert "Durable progress ledgers:" in memory
  62        assert "tasks=1" in memory
  63        assert "findings=1" in memory
  64        assert "sources=1" in memory
  65        assert "experiments=1" in memory
  66        assert "Draft evidence-backed section" in memory
  67        assert "Citation density check" in memory
  68        assert "Teacher traces improve tool use" in memory
  69        assert "Research paper roadmap" in memory
  70        assert "pending_measurement step=#42 tool=shell_exec" in memory
  71        assert "latency 120ms" in memory
  72        assert "Model usage:" in memory
  73        assert "total_tokens=1.5K" in memory
  74        assert "estimated_calls=1" in memory
  75    finally:
  76        db.close()
tests/nipux_cli/test_config.py 103 lines 
   1from pathlib import Path
   2
   3from nipux_cli.config import DEFAULT_CONTEXT_LENGTH, default_config_yaml, load_config
   4
   5
   6def test_load_config_defaults_to_qwen_openrouter(tmp_path, monkeypatch):
   7    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
   8
   9    config = load_config()
  10
  11    assert config.runtime.home == tmp_path
  12    assert config.model.model == "qwen/qwen3.6-27b"
  13    assert config.model.base_url == "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"
  14    assert config.model.api_key_env == "OPENROUTER_API_KEY"
  15    assert config.model.context_length == DEFAULT_CONTEXT_LENGTH
  16    assert config.runtime.state_db_path == tmp_path / "state.db"
  17    assert config.runtime.daily_digest_enabled is True
  18    assert config.runtime.daily_digest_time == "08:00"
  19
  20
  21def test_load_config_from_yaml(tmp_path, monkeypatch):
  22    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path / "home"))
  23    cfg = tmp_path / "config.yaml"
  24    cfg.write_text(
  25        """
  26model:
  27  name: local-test
  28  base_url: http://127.0.0.1:9999/v1/
  29  context_length: 12345
  30  input_cost_per_million: 0.1
  31  output_cost_per_million: 0.2
  32runtime:
  33  home: ./agent-home
  34  max_step_seconds: 42
  35  daily_digest_enabled: false
  36  daily_digest_time: "07:30"
  37email:
  38  enabled: true
  39  to_addr: kai@example.com
  40""",
  41        encoding="utf-8",
  42    )
  43
  44    config = load_config(cfg)
  45
  46    assert config.model.model == "local-test"
  47    assert config.model.base_url == "http://127.0.0.1:9999/v1"
  48    assert config.model.context_length == 12345
  49    assert config.model.input_cost_per_million == 0.1
  50    assert config.model.output_cost_per_million == 0.2
  51    assert config.runtime.home == Path("./agent-home")
  52    assert config.runtime.max_step_seconds == 42
  53    assert config.runtime.daily_digest_enabled is False
  54    assert config.runtime.daily_digest_time == "07:30"
  55    assert config.email.enabled is True
  56    assert config.email.to_addr == "kai@example.com"
  57
  58
  59def test_load_config_reads_local_env_file(tmp_path, monkeypatch):
  60    monkeypatch.setenv("NIPUX_HOME", str(tmp_path))
  61    monkeypatch.delenv("OPENROUTER_API_KEY", raising=False)
  62    (tmp_path / ".env").write_text("OPENROUTER_API_KEY" + "=secret-test-key\n", encoding="utf-8")
  63    (tmp_path / "config.yaml").write_text(
  64        """
  65model:
  66  name: provider/test-model
  67  base_url: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1
  68  api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
  69""",
  70        encoding="utf-8",
  71    )
  72
  73    config = load_config()
  74
  75    assert config.model.api_key == "secret-test-key"
  76
  77
  78def test_default_config_yaml_allows_provider_template_without_secret():
  79    text = default_config_yaml(
  80        model="provider/model",
  81        base_url="https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/",
  82        api_key_env="OPENROUTER_API_KEY",
  83        context_length=8192,
  84    )
  85
  86    assert "name: provider/model" in text
  87    assert "base_url: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1" in text
  88    assert "api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY" in text
  89    assert "context_length: 8192" in text
  90    assert "input_cost_per_million: null" in text
  91    assert "output_cost_per_million: null" in text
  92    assert "sk-" not in text
  93
  94
  95def test_config_example_matches_default_provider():
  96    root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
  97    text = (root / "config.example.yaml").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
  98
  99    assert "name: qwen/qwen3.6-27b" in text
 100    assert "base_url: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1" in text
 101    assert "api_key_env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY" in text
 102    assert "input_cost_per_million: null" in text
 103    assert "output_cost_per_million: null" in text
tests/nipux_cli/test_daemon.py 349 lines 
   1from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
   2import json
   3import time
   4
   5import pytest
   6
   7from nipux_cli.config import AppConfig, RuntimeConfig
   8from nipux_cli.daemon import (
   9    Daemon,
  10    DaemonAlreadyRunning,
  11    RUNTIME_CODE_FILES,
  12    append_daemon_event,
  13    current_runtime_fingerprint,
  14    daemon_lock_status,
  15    read_daemon_events,
  16    runtime_stale,
  17    single_instance_lock,
  18    update_lock_metadata,
  19    _exception_backoff,
  20    _parse_retry_after,
  21    _step_failure_backoff,
  22)
  23from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
  24from nipux_cli.worker import StepExecution
  25
  26
  27def test_single_instance_lock_rejects_second_holder(tmp_path):
  28    lock_path = tmp_path / "agentd.lock"
  29    with single_instance_lock(lock_path):
  30        with pytest.raises(DaemonAlreadyRunning):
  31            with single_instance_lock(lock_path):
  32                pass
  33
  34
  35def test_daemon_lock_status_reports_free_lock(tmp_path):
  36    status = daemon_lock_status(tmp_path / "agentd.lock")
  37
  38    assert status["running"] is False
  39    assert status["detail"] == "daemon lock is free"
  40
  41
  42def test_lock_metadata_can_be_updated_while_held(tmp_path):
  43    lock_path = tmp_path / "agentd.lock"
  44    with single_instance_lock(lock_path) as handle:
  45        update_lock_metadata(handle, last_state="step", consecutive_failures=2)
  46        status = daemon_lock_status(lock_path)
  47
  48    assert status["running"] is True
  49    assert status["metadata"]["last_state"] == "step"
  50    assert status["metadata"]["consecutive_failures"] == 2
  51
  52
  53def test_daemon_lock_status_detects_stale_runtime(tmp_path):
  54    lock_path = tmp_path / "agentd.lock"
  55    with single_instance_lock(lock_path) as handle:
  56        update_lock_metadata(handle, runtime={"runtime_hash": "old"})
  57        status = daemon_lock_status(lock_path)
  58
  59    assert status["running"] is True
  60    assert status["stale"] is True
  61    assert status["current_runtime"]["code_hash"]
  62    assert status["current_runtime"]["code_mtime"]
  63    assert runtime_stale({"runtime": {"runtime_hash": "old"}}) is True
  64    assert runtime_stale({"runtime": current_runtime_fingerprint()}) is False
  65
  66
  67def test_runtime_fingerprint_tracks_progress_code():
  68    assert "progress.py" in RUNTIME_CODE_FILES
  69
  70
  71def test_rate_limit_backoff_uses_retry_after_header():
  72    class RateLimit(Exception):
  73        status_code = 429
  74        response = type("Response", (), {"headers": {"Retry-After": "42"}})()
  75
  76    assert _exception_backoff(RateLimit("too many requests"), poll_seconds=0, consecutive_failures=1) == 42
  77
  78
  79def test_rate_limit_backoff_has_conservative_fallback():
  80    class RateLimit(Exception):
  81        status_code = 429
  82
  83    assert _exception_backoff(RateLimit("rate limit exceeded"), poll_seconds=0, consecutive_failures=1) == 10
  84
  85
  86def test_failed_step_provider_config_error_gets_long_backoff():
  87    result = StepExecution(
  88        job_id="job",
  89        run_id="run",
  90        step_id="step",
  91        tool_name=None,
  92        status="failed",
  93        result={
  94            "error_type": "PermissionDeniedError",
  95            "error": "Error code: 403 - key limit exceeded",
  96        },
  97    )
  98
  99    assert _step_failure_backoff(result, poll_seconds=0, consecutive_failures=1) == 300
 100
 101
 102def test_failed_step_rate_limit_gets_throttled_backoff():
 103    result = StepExecution(
 104        job_id="job",
 105        run_id="run",
 106        step_id="step",
 107        tool_name=None,
 108        status="failed",
 109        result={
 110            "error_type": "RateLimitError",
 111            "error": "429 too many requests",
 112        },
 113    )
 114
 115    assert _step_failure_backoff(result, poll_seconds=0, consecutive_failures=1) == 60
 116
 117
 118def test_retry_after_parses_epoch_milliseconds():
 119    future_ms = str(int((time.time() + 5) * 1000))
 120
 121    parsed = _parse_retry_after(future_ms)
 122
 123    assert parsed is not None
 124    assert 0 <= parsed <= 6
 125
 126
 127def test_daemon_run_once_claims_next_job_with_fake_step(tmp_path):
 128    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 129    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 130    try:
 131        job_id = db.create_job("Run forever in small steps")
 132        daemon = Daemon(config=config, db=db)
 133
 134        result = daemon.run_once(fake=True)
 135
 136        assert result is not None
 137        assert result.job_id == job_id
 138        assert result.status == "completed"
 139        assert db.list_artifacts(job_id)[0]["title"] == "daemon-fake-step"
 140    finally:
 141        db.close()
 142
 143
 144def test_daemon_ignores_ui_focus_for_worker_scheduling(tmp_path):
 145    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 146    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 147    try:
 148        first = db.create_job("First job", title="first")
 149        second = db.create_job("Second job", title="second")
 150        (tmp_path / "shell_state.json").write_text(json.dumps({"focus_job_id": second}), encoding="utf-8")
 151        daemon = Daemon(config=config, db=db)
 152
 153        job = daemon.next_runnable_job()
 154
 155        assert first != second
 156        assert job is not None
 157        assert job["id"] == first
 158    finally:
 159        db.close()
 160
 161
 162def test_daemon_skips_deferred_jobs_until_due(tmp_path):
 163    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 164    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 165    try:
 166        deferred = db.create_job("Deferred job", title="deferred")
 167        ready = db.create_job("Ready job", title="ready")
 168        db.update_job_status(
 169            deferred,
 170            "queued",
 171            metadata_patch={"defer_until": (datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=1)).isoformat()},
 172        )
 173        daemon = Daemon(config=config, db=db)
 174
 175        job = daemon.next_runnable_job()
 176
 177        assert job is not None
 178        assert job["id"] == ready
 179    finally:
 180        db.close()
 181
 182
 183def test_daemon_idle_sleep_wakes_for_deferred_job(tmp_path):
 184    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 185    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 186    try:
 187        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
 188        job_id = db.create_job("Deferred job", title="deferred")
 189        db.update_job_status(
 190            job_id,
 191            "queued",
 192            metadata_patch={"defer_until": (now + timedelta(seconds=2)).isoformat()},
 193        )
 194        daemon = Daemon(config=config, db=db)
 195
 196        sleep_seconds = daemon.idle_sleep_seconds(poll_seconds=30, now=now)
 197
 198        assert 1.9 <= sleep_seconds <= 2.1
 199    finally:
 200        db.close()
 201
 202
 203def test_daemon_idle_sleep_uses_poll_when_no_deferred_jobs(tmp_path):
 204    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 205    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 206    try:
 207        db.create_job("Ready job", title="ready")
 208        daemon = Daemon(config=config, db=db)
 209
 210        assert daemon.idle_sleep_seconds(poll_seconds=30) == 30
 211        assert daemon.idle_sleep_seconds(poll_seconds=0) == 5.0
 212    finally:
 213        db.close()
 214
 215
 216def test_daemon_advances_multiple_runnable_jobs_without_focus_starvation(tmp_path):
 217    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path, daily_digest_enabled=False))
 218    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 219    try:
 220        first = db.create_job("First job", title="first")
 221        second = db.create_job("Second job", title="second")
 222        (tmp_path / "shell_state.json").write_text(json.dumps({"focus_job_id": second}), encoding="utf-8")
 223        daemon = Daemon(config=config, db=db)
 224
 225        daemon.run_forever(poll_seconds=0, quiet=True, max_iterations=4, fake=True)
 226
 227        assert db.list_steps(job_id=first)
 228        assert db.list_steps(job_id=second)
 229    finally:
 230        db.close()
 231
 232
 233def test_daemon_writes_due_daily_digest_once(tmp_path):
 234    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path, daily_digest_time="00:00"))
 235    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 236    try:
 237        db.create_job("Keep finding findings", title="findings")
 238        daemon = Daemon(config=config, db=db)
 239        now = datetime(2026, 4, 23, 8, 30)
 240
 241        first = daemon.send_due_daily_digest(now=now)
 242        second = daemon.send_due_daily_digest(now=now)
 243
 244        assert first is not None
 245        assert first["status"] == "dry_run"
 246        assert second is None
 247        assert (tmp_path / "digests" / "2026-04-23-daily.md").exists()
 248    finally:
 249        db.close()
 250
 251
 252def test_daemon_event_log_round_trips_jsonl(tmp_path):
 253    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 254
 255    path = append_daemon_event(config, "step", job_id="job_1", status="completed")
 256    events = read_daemon_events(config, limit=3)
 257
 258    assert path.name == "daemon-events.jsonl"
 259    assert events[-1]["event"] == "step"
 260    assert events[-1]["job_id"] == "job_1"
 261
 262
 263def test_daemon_recovers_stale_running_steps_on_start(tmp_path):
 264    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path, daily_digest_enabled=False))
 265    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 266    try:
 267        job_id = db.create_job("Recover stale work", title="stale")
 268        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 269        stale_step = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="browser_navigate")
 270        daemon = Daemon(config=config, db=db)
 271
 272        daemon.run_forever(poll_seconds=0, quiet=True, max_iterations=1, fake=True)
 273
 274        steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
 275        stale = next(step for step in steps if step["id"] == stale_step)
 276        events = read_daemon_events(config, limit=5)
 277        assert stale["status"] == "failed"
 278        assert stale["error"] == "daemon recovered abandoned running work from a previous process"
 279        assert db.list_runs(job_id, limit=10)[-1]["status"] == "failed"
 280        assert any(event.get("event") == "stale_work_recovered" for event in events)
 281    finally:
 282        db.close()
 283
 284
 285def test_daemon_survives_unexpected_step_exception(tmp_path):
 286    class ExplodingDaemon(Daemon):
 287        def run_once(self, *, fake: bool = False, verbose: bool = False):  # noqa: ARG002
 288            raise RuntimeError("provider fell over")
 289
 290    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path, daily_digest_enabled=False))
 291    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 292    try:
 293        daemon = ExplodingDaemon(config=config, db=db)
 294
 295        daemon.run_forever(poll_seconds=0, quiet=True, max_iterations=1)
 296
 297        status = daemon_lock_status(tmp_path / "agentd.lock")
 298        events = read_daemon_events(config, limit=5)
 299        assert status["metadata"]["last_state"] == "error"
 300        assert status["metadata"]["consecutive_failures"] == 1
 301        assert any(event.get("event") == "daemon_error" for event in events)
 302    finally:
 303        db.close()
 304
 305
 306def test_daemon_treats_blocked_steps_as_recoverable(tmp_path):
 307    class BlockedDaemon(Daemon):
 308        def run_once(self, *, fake: bool = False, verbose: bool = False):  # noqa: ARG002
 309            return StepExecution(
 310                job_id="job",
 311                run_id="run",
 312                step_id="step",
 313                tool_name="web_search",
 314                status="blocked",
 315                result={"error": "search loop blocked", "recoverable": True},
 316            )
 317
 318    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path, daily_digest_enabled=False))
 319    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 320    try:
 321        daemon = BlockedDaemon(config=config, db=db)
 322
 323        daemon.run_forever(poll_seconds=0, quiet=True, max_iterations=3)
 324
 325        status = daemon_lock_status(tmp_path / "agentd.lock")
 326        events = read_daemon_events(config, limit=10)
 327        assert status["metadata"]["consecutive_failures"] == 0
 328        assert sum(1 for event in events if event.get("event") == "step") == 3
 329        assert not any(event.get("event") == "daemon_error" for event in events)
 330    finally:
 331        db.close()
 332
 333
 334def test_fake_daemon_can_run_100_iterations_without_auto_stop(tmp_path):
 335    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path, daily_digest_enabled=False))
 336    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 337    try:
 338        job_id = db.create_job("Run a long fake worker", title="long")
 339        daemon = Daemon(config=config, db=db)
 340
 341        daemon.run_forever(poll_seconds=0, quiet=True, max_iterations=100, fake=True)
 342
 343        steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
 344        assert len(steps) == 100
 345        assert any(step["kind"] == "reflection" for step in steps)
 346        assert db.list_artifacts(job_id)
 347        assert daemon_lock_status(tmp_path / "agentd.lock")["running"] is False
 348    finally:
 349        db.close()
tests/nipux_cli/test_dashboard.py 86 lines 
   1from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
   2
   3from nipux_cli.artifacts import ArtifactStore
   4from nipux_cli.config import AppConfig, RuntimeConfig
   5from nipux_cli.dashboard import collect_dashboard_state, render_dashboard, render_overview
   6from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
   7
   8
   9def test_dashboard_collects_jobs_steps_and_artifacts(tmp_path):
  10    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
  11    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
  12    try:
  13        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic every morning", title="research", kind="generic")
  14        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake-model")
  15        step_id = db.add_step(
  16            job_id=job_id,
  17            run_id=run_id,
  18            kind="tool",
  19            tool_name="write_artifact",
  20            input_data={"arguments": {"title": "Findings"}},
  21        )
  22        ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db=db).write_text(
  23            job_id=job_id,
  24            run_id=run_id,
  25            step_id=step_id,
  26            title="Findings",
  27            summary="first saved finding",
  28            content="Acme Corp",
  29        )
  30        db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", summary="saved finding", output_data={"success": True})
  31        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
  32        db.append_lesson(job_id, "Low-evidence summaries are not finding batches.", category="source_quality")
  33        db.append_task_record(job_id, title="Explore primary sources", status="open", priority=5)
  34
  35        state = collect_dashboard_state(db, config, job_id=job_id)
  36        rendered = render_dashboard(state, width=100)
  37        overview = render_overview(state, width=100)
  38
  39        assert state["daemon"]["running"] is False
  40        assert state["focus"]["counts"]["artifacts"] == 1
  41        assert state["focus"]["counts"]["tasks"] == 1
  42        assert "Nipux CLI Dashboard" in rendered
  43        assert "research" in rendered
  44        assert "write_artifact" in rendered
  45        assert "Findings" in rendered
  46        assert "Low-evidence summaries are not finding batches" in rendered
  47        assert "Explore primary sources" in rendered
  48        assert "Nipux Status" in overview
  49        assert "latest artifact: Findings" in overview
  50        assert "latest lesson:" in overview
  51    finally:
  52        db.close()
  53
  54
  55def test_overview_marks_stopped_daemon_as_not_advancing(tmp_path):
  56    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
  57    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
  58    try:
  59        db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
  60        state = collect_dashboard_state(db, config)
  61        overview = render_overview(state, width=100)
  62
  63        assert "job will not advance" in overview
  64    finally:
  65        db.close()
  66
  67
  68def test_overview_marks_old_heartbeat_as_busy_for_running_step(tmp_path):
  69    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
  70    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
  71    try:
  72        job_id = db.create_job("Measure a process", title="measure")
  73        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake-model")
  74        db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="shell_exec", status="running")
  75        state = collect_dashboard_state(db, config, job_id=job_id)
  76        state["daemon"]["running"] = True
  77        state["daemon"]["metadata"] = {
  78            "last_heartbeat": (datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(seconds=180)).isoformat(),
  79        }
  80
  81        overview = render_overview(state, width=100)
  82
  83        assert "busy #1 shell_exec" in overview
  84        assert "heartbeat 180s ago (stale)" not in overview
  85    finally:
  86        db.close()
tests/nipux_cli/test_db.py 396 lines 
   1from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
   2
   3
   4def test_db_job_run_step_and_artifact_roundtrip(tmp_path):
   5    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
   6    try:
   7        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic every day", title="research", kind="generic")
   8        assert job_id == "research"
   9        job = db.get_job(job_id)
  10        assert job["status"] == "queued"
  11        assert job["kind"] == "generic"
  12
  13        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="local-test-model")
  14        step_id = db.add_step(
  15            job_id=job_id,
  16            run_id=run_id,
  17            kind="tool",
  18            tool_name="write_artifact",
  19            input_data={"x": 1},
  20        )
  21        db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", summary="wrote artifact", output_data={"ok": True})
  22        artifact_id = db.add_artifact(
  23            job_id=job_id,
  24            run_id=run_id,
  25            step_id=step_id,
  26            path=tmp_path / "artifact.md",
  27            sha256="abc",
  28            artifact_type="text",
  29            title="A",
  30        )
  31        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
  32
  33        assert db.get_job(job_id)["status"] == "running"
  34        assert db.list_steps(run_id=run_id)[0]["output"]["ok"] is True
  35        assert db.list_runs(job_id)[0]["id"] == run_id
  36        assert db.get_artifact(artifact_id)["title"] == "A"
  37        assert db.list_artifacts(job_id)[0]["id"] == artifact_id
  38    finally:
  39        db.close()
  40
  41
  42def test_create_job_uses_unique_readable_slug_ids(tmp_path):
  43    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
  44    try:
  45        first = db.create_job("Research topic", title="Nightly Research")
  46        second = db.create_job("Research more topics", title="Nightly Research")
  47
  48        assert first == "nightly-research"
  49        assert second == "nightly-research-2"
  50    finally:
  51        db.close()
  52
  53
  54def test_step_numbers_increment_across_runs_for_a_job(tmp_path):
  55    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
  56    try:
  57        job_id = db.create_job("Long job")
  58        run_1 = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
  59        step_1 = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_1, kind="tool")
  60        db.finish_step(step_1, status="completed")
  61        db.finish_run(run_1, "completed")
  62
  63        run_2 = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
  64        step_2 = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_2, kind="tool")
  65
  66        steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
  67        assert step_2 != step_1
  68        assert [step["step_no"] for step in steps] == [1, 2]
  69    finally:
  70        db.close()
  71
  72
  73def test_job_token_usage_aggregates_message_usage(tmp_path):
  74    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
  75    try:
  76        job_id = db.create_job("Long job")
  77        db.append_event(
  78            job_id,
  79            event_type="loop",
  80            title="message_end",
  81            metadata={
  82                "usage": {
  83                    "prompt_tokens": 100,
  84                    "completion_tokens": 25,
  85                    "total_tokens": 125,
  86                    "cost": 0.001,
  87                    "prompt_tokens_details": {"cached_tokens": 10},
  88                    "completion_tokens_details": {"reasoning_tokens": 3},
  89                }
  90            },
  91        )
  92        db.append_event(
  93            job_id,
  94            event_type="loop",
  95            title="message_end",
  96            metadata={"usage": {"prompt_tokens": 150, "completion_tokens": 50, "total_tokens": 200, "estimated": True}},
  97        )
  98
  99        usage = db.job_token_usage(job_id)
 100
 101        assert usage["prompt_tokens"] == 250
 102        assert usage["completion_tokens"] == 75
 103        assert usage["total_tokens"] == 325
 104        assert usage["latest_prompt_tokens"] == 150
 105        assert usage["cost"] == 0.001
 106        assert usage["has_cost"] is True
 107        assert usage["estimated_calls"] == 1
 108        assert usage["reasoning_tokens"] == 3
 109        assert usage["cached_tokens"] == 10
 110    finally:
 111        db.close()
 112
 113
 114def test_append_operator_message_roundtrip(tmp_path):
 115    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 116    try:
 117        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic")
 118
 119        entry = db.append_operator_message(job_id, "Focus on artifact-backed findings", source="shell")
 120        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 121
 122        assert entry["message"] == "Focus on artifact-backed findings"
 123        assert job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][0]["source"] == "shell"
 124        assert job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][0]["mode"] == "steer"
 125        assert job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][0]["message"] == "Focus on artifact-backed findings"
 126        assert job["metadata"]["last_operator_message"]["message"] == "Focus on artifact-backed findings"
 127        events = db.list_timeline_events(job_id)
 128        assert events[-1]["event_type"] == "operator_message"
 129        assert events[-1]["body"] == "Focus on artifact-backed findings"
 130    finally:
 131        db.close()
 132
 133
 134def test_claim_operator_messages_marks_one_message_at_a_time(tmp_path):
 135    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 136    try:
 137        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic")
 138        first = db.append_operator_message(job_id, "first steer", source="chat")
 139        db.append_operator_message(job_id, "second steer", source="chat")
 140
 141        claimed = db.claim_operator_messages(job_id, modes=("steer",), limit=1)
 142        second_claim = db.claim_operator_messages(job_id, modes=("steer",), limit=1)
 143
 144        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 145        messages = job["metadata"]["operator_messages"]
 146        events = db.list_timeline_events(job_id, limit=20)
 147
 148        assert [item["message"] for item in claimed] == ["first steer"]
 149        assert claimed[0]["event_id"] == first["event_id"]
 150        assert [item["message"] for item in second_claim] == ["second steer"]
 151        assert all(message.get("claimed_at") for message in messages)
 152        assert any(event["event_type"] == "loop" and event["title"] == "steering claimed" for event in events)
 153    finally:
 154        db.close()
 155
 156
 157def test_acknowledge_operator_messages_marks_delivered_context(tmp_path):
 158    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 159    try:
 160        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic")
 161        entry = db.append_operator_message(job_id, "correct the target before continuing", source="chat")
 162        db.claim_operator_messages(job_id, modes=("steer",), limit=1)
 163
 164        result = db.acknowledge_operator_messages(
 165            job_id,
 166            message_ids=[entry["event_id"]],
 167            summary="target correction incorporated",
 168        )
 169
 170        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 171        message = job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][0]
 172        events = db.list_timeline_events(job_id, limit=20)
 173
 174        assert result["count"] == 1
 175        assert message["acknowledged_at"]
 176        assert job["metadata"]["last_operator_context_ack"]["summary"] == "target correction incorporated"
 177        assert any(event["event_type"] == "operator_context" for event in events)
 178    finally:
 179        db.close()
 180
 181
 182def test_rename_job_updates_title_without_changing_id(tmp_path):
 183    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 184    try:
 185        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="old title")
 186
 187        renamed = db.rename_job(job_id, "new title")
 188        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 189
 190        assert renamed["id"] == job_id
 191        assert renamed["title"] == "new title"
 192        assert job["title"] == "new title"
 193    finally:
 194        db.close()
 195
 196
 197def test_delete_job_removes_related_rows(tmp_path):
 198    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 199    try:
 200        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="delete me")
 201        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 202        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="write_artifact")
 203        artifact_path = tmp_path / "artifact.md"
 204        artifact_path.write_text("artifact", encoding="utf-8")
 205        db.add_artifact(
 206            job_id=job_id,
 207            run_id=run_id,
 208            step_id=step_id,
 209            path=artifact_path,
 210            sha256="abc",
 211            artifact_type="text",
 212            title="Artifact",
 213        )
 214        db.upsert_memory(job_id=job_id, key="rolling_state", summary="summary")
 215
 216        result = db.delete_job(job_id)
 217
 218        assert result["job"]["title"] == "delete me"
 219        assert result["counts"]["runs"] == 1
 220        assert result["counts"]["steps"] == 1
 221        assert result["counts"]["artifacts"] == 1
 222        assert result["counts"]["memory"] == 1
 223        try:
 224            db.get_job(job_id)
 225        except KeyError:
 226            pass
 227        else:
 228            raise AssertionError("job still exists after delete")
 229        assert db.list_steps(job_id=job_id) == []
 230        assert db.list_artifacts(job_id) == []
 231        assert db.list_memory(job_id) == []
 232    finally:
 233        db.close()
 234
 235
 236def test_append_lesson_roundtrip(tmp_path):
 237    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 238    try:
 239        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic")
 240
 241        entry = db.append_lesson(
 242            job_id,
 243            "Low-evidence pages are not useful evidence sources.",
 244            category="source_quality",
 245            confidence=0.9,
 246        )
 247        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 248
 249        assert entry["category"] == "source_quality"
 250        assert job["metadata"]["lessons"][0]["lesson"] == "Low-evidence pages are not useful evidence sources."
 251        assert job["metadata"]["last_lesson"]["confidence"] == 0.9
 252    finally:
 253        db.close()
 254
 255
 256def test_append_lesson_dedupes_repeated_memory(tmp_path):
 257    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 258    try:
 259        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic")
 260
 261        first = db.append_lesson(job_id, "Use chamber directories.", category="strategy", metadata={"step": 1})
 262        second = db.append_lesson(job_id, "Use chamber directories.", category="strategy", metadata={"step": 2})
 263        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 264
 265        assert first["lesson"] == second["lesson"]
 266        assert len(job["metadata"]["lessons"]) == 1
 267        assert job["metadata"]["lessons"][0]["seen_count"] == 2
 268        assert job["metadata"]["lessons"][0]["metadata"]["step"] == 2
 269    finally:
 270        db.close()
 271
 272
 273def test_source_and_finding_ledgers_dedupe_and_update(tmp_path):
 274    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 275    try:
 276        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic")
 277
 278        source = db.append_source_record(
 279            job_id,
 280            "https://example.com/source",
 281            source_type="web_source",
 282            usefulness_score=0.7,
 283            yield_count=3,
 284            outcome="yielded reusable findings",
 285        )
 286        updated_source = db.append_source_record(
 287            job_id,
 288            "https://example.com/source",
 289            usefulness_score=0.9,
 290            yield_count=2,
 291            fail_count_delta=1,
 292        )
 293        finding = db.append_finding_record(
 294            job_id,
 295            name="Acme Finding",
 296            url="https://acme.example",
 297            category="example category",
 298            score=0.8,
 299        )
 300        updated_finding = db.append_finding_record(
 301            job_id,
 302            name="Acme Finding",
 303            url="https://acme.example",
 304            contact="source note",
 305            score=0.85,
 306        )
 307        reflection = db.append_reflection(job_id, "Keep using directories", strategy="Prioritize chambers")
 308        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 309
 310        assert source["key"] == updated_source["key"]
 311        assert updated_source["yield_count"] == 5
 312        assert updated_source["fail_count"] == 1
 313        assert finding["created"] is True
 314        assert updated_finding["created"] is False
 315        assert updated_finding["contact"] == "source note"
 316        assert len(job["metadata"]["source_ledger"]) == 1
 317        assert len(job["metadata"]["finding_ledger"]) == 1
 318        assert job["metadata"]["last_reflection"]["summary"] == reflection["summary"]
 319    finally:
 320        db.close()
 321
 322
 323def test_task_queue_dedupes_and_updates(tmp_path):
 324    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 325    try:
 326        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic")
 327
 328        first = db.append_task_record(
 329            job_id,
 330            title="Explore primary sources",
 331            status="open",
 332            priority=3,
 333            goal="Find direct evidence",
 334        )
 335        second = db.append_task_record(
 336            job_id,
 337            title="Explore primary sources",
 338            status="done",
 339            priority=5,
 340            result="Saved source artifact",
 341        )
 342        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 343
 344        assert first["created"] is True
 345        assert second["created"] is False
 346        assert len(job["metadata"]["task_queue"]) == 1
 347        assert job["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]["status"] == "done"
 348        assert job["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]["priority"] == 5
 349        assert job["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]["result"] == "Saved source artifact"
 350    finally:
 351        db.close()
 352
 353
 354def test_timeline_events_cover_visible_activity(tmp_path):
 355    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 356    try:
 357        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research")
 358        db.append_operator_message(job_id, "operator note", source="test")
 359        db.append_agent_update(job_id, "agent note", category="chat")
 360        db.append_lesson(job_id, "durable lesson", category="strategy")
 361        db.append_source_record(job_id, "https://example.com", usefulness_score=0.7, outcome="useful")
 362        db.append_finding_record(job_id, name="Reusable finding", reason="evidence")
 363        db.append_task_record(job_id, title="Explore branch", status="open")
 364        db.append_reflection(job_id, "reflect summary", strategy="next strategy")
 365        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 366        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="web_search", input_data={"query": "x"})
 367        db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", summary="searched", output_data={"ok": True})
 368        db.add_artifact(
 369            job_id=job_id,
 370            run_id=run_id,
 371            step_id=step_id,
 372            path=tmp_path / "artifact.md",
 373            sha256="abc",
 374            artifact_type="text",
 375            title="Artifact",
 376            summary="saved",
 377        )
 378        db.upsert_memory(job_id=job_id, key="rolling_state", summary="compact state")
 379
 380        events = db.list_timeline_events(job_id, limit=50)
 381        event_types = {event["event_type"] for event in events}
 382
 383        assert "operator_message" in event_types
 384        assert "agent_message" in event_types
 385        assert "lesson" in event_types
 386        assert "source" in event_types
 387        assert "finding" in event_types
 388        assert "task" in event_types
 389        assert "reflection" in event_types
 390        assert "tool_call" in event_types
 391        assert "tool_result" in event_types
 392        assert "artifact" in event_types
 393        assert "compaction" in event_types
 394        assert any(event["body"] == "operator note" for event in events)
 395    finally:
 396        db.close()
tests/nipux_cli/test_digest.py 43 lines 
   1from nipux_cli.config import AppConfig, RuntimeConfig
   2from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
   3from nipux_cli.digest import render_daily_digest, render_job_digest, write_daily_digest
   4
   5
   6def test_daily_digest_includes_ledgers_lessons_sources_and_strategy(tmp_path):
   7    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
   8    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
   9    try:
  10        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic", title="research", kind="generic")
  11        db.append_finding_record(job_id, name="Acme Finding", category="example category", reason="reusable result", score=0.8)
  12        db.append_task_record(job_id, title="Explore primary sources", status="open", priority=5)
  13        db.append_source_record(job_id, "https://example.com", usefulness_score=0.9, yield_count=1, outcome="yielded findings")
  14        db.append_lesson(job_id, "Low-evidence pages are not finding sources.", category="source_quality")
  15        db.append_reflection(job_id, "Directories are working.", strategy="Try chambers next.")
  16        db.start_run(job_id, model="test-model")
  17        db.append_event(
  18            job_id,
  19            event_type="loop",
  20            title="message_end",
  21            metadata={"usage": {"prompt_tokens": 1200, "completion_tokens": 300, "total_tokens": 1500, "cost": 0.0025}},
  22        )
  23
  24        body = render_daily_digest(db)
  25        job_body = render_job_digest(db, job_id)
  26        result = write_daily_digest(config, db, day="2026-04-25")
  27
  28        assert "Counts: 1 findings, 1 sources, 1 tasks, 0 experiments, 1 lessons" in body
  29        assert "Model usage:" in body
  30        assert "1.5K tokens" in body
  31        assert "cost=$0.0025" in body
  32        assert "## Model Usage" in job_body
  33        assert "test-model: 1 calls" in job_body
  34        assert "Experiments:" in body
  35        assert "Acme Finding" in body
  36        assert "Explore primary sources" in body
  37        assert "Low-evidence pages are not finding sources." in body
  38        assert "https://example.com" in body
  39        assert "Try chambers next." in body
  40        assert result["status"] == "dry_run"
  41        assert (tmp_path / "digests" / "2026-04-25-daily.md").exists()
  42    finally:
  43        db.close()
tests/nipux_cli/test_doctor.py 110 lines 
   1import io
   2import json
   3import urllib.error
   4
   5from nipux_cli.config import AppConfig, ModelConfig, RuntimeConfig
   6from nipux_cli.doctor import run_doctor
   7
   8
   9class FakeHTTPResponse:
  10    def __init__(self, payload: dict):
  11        self.payload = payload
  12
  13    def __enter__(self):
  14        return self
  15
  16    def __exit__(self, exc_type, exc, tb):
  17        return False
  18
  19    def read(self, _limit=-1):
  20        return json.dumps(self.payload).encode("utf-8")
  21
  22
  23def test_doctor_checks_local_runtime_without_model_call(tmp_path):
  24    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
  25
  26    checks = run_doctor(config=config, check_model=False)
  27
  28    assert {check.name for check in checks} == {"state_dir_writable", "sqlite", "model_config", "tool_surface", "browser_runtime"}
  29    assert all(check.ok for check in checks)
  30
  31
  32def test_doctor_warns_when_remote_model_key_is_missing(tmp_path, monkeypatch):
  33    monkeypatch.delenv("OPENROUTER_API_KEY", raising=False)
  34    config = AppConfig(
  35        runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path),
  36        model=ModelConfig(
  37            model="provider/model",
  38            base_url="https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
  39            api_key_env="OPENROUTER_API_KEY",
  40        ),
  41    )
  42
  43    checks = run_doctor(config=config, check_model=False)
  44    model_check = next(check for check in checks if check.name == "model_config")
  45
  46    assert not model_check.ok
  47    assert "OPENROUTER_API_KEY is not set" in model_check.detail
  48    assert "sk-" not in model_check.detail
  49
  50
  51def test_doctor_reports_openrouter_auth_failure(tmp_path, monkeypatch):
  52    monkeypatch.setenv("TEST_OPENROUTER_KEY", "bad-key")
  53    config = AppConfig(
  54        runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path),
  55        model=ModelConfig(
  56            model="nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-omni-30b-a3b-reasoning:free",
  57            base_url="https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
  58            api_key_env="TEST_OPENROUTER_KEY",
  59        ),
  60    )
  61
  62    def fake_urlopen(_request, timeout):
  63        raise urllib.error.HTTPError(
  64            "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/key",
  65            401,
  66            "Unauthorized",
  67            hdrs=None,
  68            fp=None,
  69        )
  70
  71    monkeypatch.setattr("urllib.request.urlopen", fake_urlopen)
  72
  73    checks = run_doctor(config=config, check_model=True)
  74    model_check = checks[-1]
  75
  76    assert model_check.name == "model_auth"
  77    assert model_check.ok is False
  78    assert "OpenRouter rejected API key" in model_check.detail
  79
  80
  81def test_doctor_reports_generation_limit_after_model_listing(tmp_path, monkeypatch):
  82    monkeypatch.setenv("TEST_OPENROUTER_KEY", "limited-key")
  83    config = AppConfig(
  84        runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path),
  85        model=ModelConfig(
  86            model="qwen/qwen3.6-27b",
  87            base_url="https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
  88            api_key_env="TEST_OPENROUTER_KEY",
  89        ),
  90    )
  91
  92    def fake_urlopen(request, timeout):
  93        url = request.full_url
  94        if url.endswith("/key"):
  95            return FakeHTTPResponse({})
  96        if url.endswith("/models"):
  97            return FakeHTTPResponse({"data": [{"id": "qwen/qwen3.6-27b"}]})
  98        if url.endswith("/chat/completions"):
  99            body = b'{"error":{"message":"Key limit exceeded (total limit).","code":403}}'
 100            raise urllib.error.HTTPError(url, 403, "Forbidden", hdrs=None, fp=io.BytesIO(body))
 101        raise AssertionError(url)
 102
