 103    monkeypatch.setattr("urllib.request.urlopen", fake_urlopen)
 104
 105    checks = run_doctor(config=config, check_model=True)
 106    model_check = checks[-1]
 107
 108    assert model_check.name == "model_generation"
 109    assert model_check.ok is False
 110    assert "Key limit exceeded" in model_check.detail
tests/nipux_cli/test_generic_runtime_audit.py 35 lines 
   1from pathlib import Path
   2
   3
   4FORBIDDEN_RUNTIME_LITERALS = {
   5    "192.168",
   6    "9060 xt",
   7    "canadian",
   8    "client finder",
   9    "lead batch",
  10    "lead ledger",
  11    "client prospect",
  12    "edmonton",
  13    "home ssh",
  14    "home-ssh.local",
  15    "home@",
  16    "huggingface.co/qwen",
  17    "livebusiness",
  18    "qwen_qwen",
  19    "ssh home",
  20    "treefrog",
  21    "yelp",
  22    "llama.cpp",
  23}
  24
  25
  26def test_runtime_code_has_no_task_specific_literals():
  27    root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] / "nipux_cli"
  28    haystack = "\n".join(
  29        path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace").lower()
  30        for path in sorted(root.glob("*.py"))
  31        if path.name != "__init__.py"
  32    )
  33
  34    for literal in FORBIDDEN_RUNTIME_LITERALS:
  35        assert literal not in haystack
tests/nipux_cli/test_llm.py 103 lines 
   1from types import SimpleNamespace
   2
   3from nipux_cli.config import ModelConfig
   4from nipux_cli.llm import OpenAIChatLLM, _enrich_openrouter_generation_usage
   5
   6
   7class _FakeCompletions:
   8    def __init__(self):
   9        self.kwargs = None
  10
  11    def create(self, **kwargs):
  12        self.kwargs = kwargs
  13        usage = SimpleNamespace(prompt_tokens=11, completion_tokens=7, total_tokens=18, cost=0.00042)
  14        message = SimpleNamespace(content="ok", tool_calls=[])
  15        choice = SimpleNamespace(message=message)
  16        return SimpleNamespace(id="gen_test", model="provider/model", choices=[choice], usage=usage)
  17
  18
  19def test_chat_llm_omits_redundant_tool_choice(monkeypatch):
  20    fake_completions = _FakeCompletions()
  21    monkeypatch.setenv("TEST_API_KEY", "test")
  22
  23    class FakeOpenAI:
  24        def __init__(self, **kwargs):
  25            pass
  26
  27        chat = SimpleNamespace(completions=fake_completions)
  28
  29    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.llm.OpenAI", FakeOpenAI)
  30
  31    llm = OpenAIChatLLM(ModelConfig(model="test/model", base_url="https://example.test/v1", api_key_env="TEST_API_KEY"))
  32    response = llm.next_action(messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "hi"}], tools=[{"type": "function", "function": {"name": "noop"}}])
  33
  34    assert response.content == "ok"
  35    assert response.usage["prompt_tokens"] == 11
  36    assert response.usage["completion_tokens"] == 7
  37    assert response.usage["cost"] == 0.00042
  38    assert response.model == "provider/model"
  39    assert response.response_id == "gen_test"
  40    assert fake_completions.kwargs["tools"]
  41    assert "tool_choice" not in fake_completions.kwargs
  42
  43
  44def test_chat_llm_complete_response_returns_usage(monkeypatch):
  45    fake_completions = _FakeCompletions()
  46    monkeypatch.setenv("TEST_API_KEY", "test")
  47
  48    class FakeOpenAI:
  49        def __init__(self, **kwargs):
  50            pass
  51
  52        chat = SimpleNamespace(completions=fake_completions)
  53
  54    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.llm.OpenAI", FakeOpenAI)
  55
  56    llm = OpenAIChatLLM(ModelConfig(model="test/model", base_url="https://example.test/v1", api_key_env="TEST_API_KEY"))
  57    response = llm.complete_response(messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "hi"}])
  58
  59    assert response.content == "ok"
  60    assert response.usage["prompt_tokens"] == 11
  61    assert response.usage["completion_tokens"] == 7
  62    assert response.usage["cost"] == 0.00042
  63    assert response.model == "provider/model"
  64    assert response.response_id == "gen_test"
  65    assert fake_completions.kwargs["model"] == "test/model"
  66
  67
  68def test_openrouter_generation_usage_enriches_cost_and_tokens(monkeypatch):
  69    class FakeHTTPResponse:
  70        def __enter__(self):
  71            return self
  72
  73        def __exit__(self, *_args):
  74            return False
  75
  76        def read(self):
  77            return (
  78                b'{"data":{"total_cost":"0.0042","native_tokens_prompt":123,'
  79                b'"native_tokens_completion":45,"native_tokens_total":168}}'
  80            )
  81
  82    captured = {}
  83
  84    def fake_urlopen(request, timeout):
  85        captured["url"] = request.full_url
  86        captured["timeout"] = timeout
  87        return FakeHTTPResponse()
  88
  89    monkeypatch.setattr("nipux_cli.llm.urllib.request.urlopen", fake_urlopen)
  90
  91    usage = _enrich_openrouter_generation_usage(
  92        {"prompt_tokens": 10, "completion_tokens": 5, "total_tokens": 15, "estimated": False},
  93        response_id="gen_123",
  94        base_url="https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
  95        api_key="sk-test",
  96    )
  97
  98    assert captured["url"] == "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/generation?id=gen_123"
  99    assert captured["timeout"] == 5
 100    assert usage["cost"] == 0.0042
 101    assert usage["prompt_tokens"] == 123
 102    assert usage["completion_tokens"] == 45
 103    assert usage["total_tokens"] == 168
tests/nipux_cli/test_metric_format.py 11 lines 
   1from nipux_cli.metric_format import format_metric_value
   2
   3
   4def test_format_metric_value_spaces_named_units():
   5    assert format_metric_value("citations", 42, "count") == "citations=42 count"
   6    assert format_metric_value("speed", 2.7, "tokens/s") == "speed=2.7 tokens/s"
   7
   8
   9def test_format_metric_value_keeps_attached_symbol_units():
  10    assert format_metric_value("accuracy", 98.2, "%") == "accuracy=98.2%"
  11    assert format_metric_value("throughput", 120, "/s") == "throughput=120/s"
tests/nipux_cli/test_operator_context.py 30 lines 
   1from nipux_cli.operator_context import inactive_prompt_operator_ids, operator_entry_is_prompt_relevant
   2
   3
   4def _entry(message: str, *, event_id: str = "op_1", mode: str = "steer") -> dict:
   5    return {"event_id": event_id, "mode": mode, "message": message}
   6
   7
   8def test_conversation_only_operator_messages_do_not_enter_worker_prompt():
   9    for message in ("hello", "how is it going?", "clear", "stop 1", "jobs"):
  10        assert not operator_entry_is_prompt_relevant(_entry(message))
  11
  12
  13def test_actionable_operator_messages_remain_worker_constraints():
  14    for message in (
  15        "do not run local testing on my computer",
  16        "use the corrected target from the chat",
  17        "focus on measured results instead of saved notes",
  18        "the address is wrong, use `target-box`",
  19    ):
  20        assert operator_entry_is_prompt_relevant(_entry(message))
  21
  22
  23def test_inactive_prompt_operator_ids_returns_only_conversation_active_messages():
  24    messages = [
  25        _entry("hello", event_id="op_chat"),
  26        _entry("use the corrected target", event_id="op_use"),
  27        {**_entry("clear", event_id="op_done"), "acknowledged_at": "2026-04-26T00:00:00+00:00"},
  28    ]
  29
  30    assert inactive_prompt_operator_ids(messages) == ["op_chat"]
tests/nipux_cli/test_planning.py 67 lines 
   1from nipux_cli.planning import initial_plan_for_objective, initial_roadmap_for_objective, initial_task_contract, objective_profiles
   2
   3
   4def test_initial_task_contracts_are_generic_and_complete():
   5    for title in [
   6        "Clarify the exact success criteria and constraints.",
   7        "Map the first research or execution branches.",
   8        "Collect evidence and save outputs as files.",
   9        "Reflect on what worked, update memory, and continue with the next branch.",
  10    ]:
  11        contract = initial_task_contract(title)
  12
  13        assert contract["output_contract"] in {"research", "artifact", "experiment", "action", "monitor", "decision", "report"}
  14        assert contract["acceptance_criteria"]
  15        assert contract["evidence_needed"]
  16        assert contract["stall_behavior"]
  17
  18
  19def test_initial_roadmap_uses_valid_generic_contracts():
  20    roadmap = initial_roadmap_for_objective(title="paper", objective="write a paper")
  21
  22    for milestone in roadmap["milestones"]:
  23        for feature in milestone["features"]:
  24            assert feature["output_contract"] in {
  25                "research",
  26                "artifact",
  27                "experiment",
  28                "action",
  29                "monitor",
  30                "decision",
  31                "report",
  32            }
  33
  34
  35def test_initial_plan_adapts_to_measurable_objectives():
  36    plan = initial_plan_for_objective("optimize a generic process for lower latency and higher throughput")
  37    contracts = [initial_task_contract(title)["output_contract"] for title in plan["tasks"]]
  38
  39    assert plan["profile"] == "measured"
  40    assert "experiment" in contracts
  41    assert any("baseline" in title.lower() for title in plan["tasks"])
  42    assert any("metric" in question.lower() for question in plan["questions"])
  43
  44
  45def test_initial_plan_adapts_to_deliverable_objectives():
  46    plan = initial_plan_for_objective("write a full research paper from evidence")
  47    contracts = [initial_task_contract(title)["output_contract"] for title in plan["tasks"]]
  48
  49    assert plan["profile"] == "deliverable"
  50    assert "report" in contracts
  51    assert any("draft" in title.lower() or "report" in title.lower() for title in plan["tasks"])
  52
  53
  54def test_initial_plan_adapts_to_monitoring_objectives():
  55    plan = initial_plan_for_objective("monitor a recurring process and report important changes")
  56    contracts = [initial_task_contract(title)["output_contract"] for title in plan["tasks"]]
  57
  58    assert plan["profile"] == "monitor"
  59    assert "monitor" in contracts
  60    assert any("cadence" in question.lower() or "check" in question.lower() for question in plan["questions"])
  61
  62
  63def test_objective_profiles_stay_generic():
  64    profiles = objective_profiles("investigate build quality and compare output changes")
  65
  66    assert profiles
  67    assert all(profile in {"measured", "deliverable", "monitor", "implementation", "research", "general"} for profile in profiles)
tests/nipux_cli/test_progress.py 87 lines 
   1from nipux_cli.progress import build_progress_checkpoint, ledger_counts, recent_progress_bits
   2
   3
   4def test_progress_checkpoint_reports_deltas_and_recent_durable_work():
   5    metadata = {
   6        "finding_ledger": [{"title": "First finding"}, {"title": "Better branch"}],
   7        "source_ledger": [{"url": "https://example.test"}],
   8        "task_queue": [
   9            {"title": "Draft report", "status": "done", "priority": 2},
  10            {"title": "Validate report", "status": "open", "priority": 8},
  11        ],
  12        "experiment_ledger": [{"title": "Quality check", "metric_name": "score", "metric_value": 0.82}],
  13        "lessons": [{"lesson": "Prefer measured output"}],
  14        "roadmap": {"milestones": [{"title": "Publishable draft", "status": "validating"}]},
  15    }
  16
  17    checkpoint = build_progress_checkpoint(
  18        metadata,
  19        previous_counts={"findings": 1, "sources": 0, "tasks": 2, "experiments": 0, "lessons": 1, "milestones": 0},
  20        step_no=40,
  21        tool_name="record_findings",
  22    )
  23
  24    assert checkpoint.counts == {
  25        "findings": 2,
  26        "sources": 1,
  27        "tasks": 2,
  28        "experiments": 1,
  29        "lessons": 1,
  30        "milestones": 1,
  31    }
  32    assert checkpoint.deltas["findings"] == 1
  33    assert checkpoint.deltas["sources"] == 1
  34    assert checkpoint.deltas["tasks"] == 0
  35    assert checkpoint.category == "progress"
  36    assert "+1 findings" in checkpoint.message
  37    assert "+1 sources" in checkpoint.message
  38    assert "+1 experiments" in checkpoint.message
  39    assert "finding=Better branch" in checkpoint.message
  40    assert "task=Validate report" in checkpoint.message
  41    assert "measurement=score=0.82" in checkpoint.message
  42    assert "milestone=Publishable draft" in checkpoint.message
  43
  44
  45def test_progress_checkpoint_for_saved_output_is_concise():
  46    metadata = {"finding_ledger": [{}], "source_ledger": [{}, {}], "task_queue": [{}], "experiment_ledger": []}
  47
  48    checkpoint = build_progress_checkpoint(
  49        metadata,
  50        step_no=12,
  51        tool_name="write_artifact",
  52        artifact_id="art_123",
  53        is_finding_output=True,
  54    )
  55
  56    assert checkpoint.category == "finding"
  57    assert checkpoint.message.startswith("Saved output art_123")
  58    assert "1 findings, 2 sources, 1 tasks, and 0 experiments" in checkpoint.message
  59
  60
  61def test_progress_checkpoint_without_delta_is_activity_not_progress():
  62    metadata = {"finding_ledger": [{}], "source_ledger": [{}], "task_queue": [{}], "experiment_ledger": []}
  63
  64    checkpoint = build_progress_checkpoint(
  65        metadata,
  66        previous_counts={"findings": 1, "sources": 1, "tasks": 1, "experiments": 0, "lessons": 0, "milestones": 0},
  67        step_no=50,
  68        tool_name="web_extract",
  69    )
  70
  71    assert checkpoint.category == "activity"
  72    assert "no new durable ledger entries" in checkpoint.message
  73
  74
  75def test_progress_helpers_ignore_malformed_metadata():
  76    metadata = {
  77        "finding_ledger": "bad",
  78        "source_ledger": [None, {"url": "ok"}],
  79        "task_queue": [{"title": "Task", "status": "blocked", "priority": "bad"}],
  80        "roadmap": {"milestones": ["bad", {"title": "Milestone", "status": "active"}]},
  81    }
  82
  83    assert ledger_counts(metadata)["sources"] == 1
  84    assert ledger_counts(metadata)["milestones"] == 2
  85    bits = recent_progress_bits(metadata)
  86    assert "task=Task" in bits
  87    assert "milestone=Milestone" in bits
tests/nipux_cli/test_project_atlas.py 46 lines 
   1import importlib.util
   2import sys
   3from pathlib import Path
   4
   5
   6def _load_generator():
   7    path = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] / "scripts" / "generate_project_atlas.py"
   8    spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("generate_project_atlas", path)
   9    assert spec is not None
  10    module = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
  11    assert spec.loader is not None
  12    sys.modules[spec.name] = module
  13    spec.loader.exec_module(module)
  14    return module
  15
  16
  17def test_project_atlas_generator_maps_prompts_tools_and_source_without_self_embedding():
  18    generator = _load_generator()
  19
  20    files = generator.load_source_files()
  21    prompts = generator.extract_prompts(files)
  22    tools = generator.extract_tools(files)
  23
  24    assert "docs/project-atlas.html" not in {source.path for source in files}
  25    assert any(prompt.path == "nipux_cli/worker.py" and "SYSTEM_PROMPT" in prompt.name for prompt in prompts)
  26    assert any(tool["name"] == "web_search" for tool in tools)
  27
  28
  29def test_project_atlas_redacts_secret_assignments_from_rendered_source():
  30    generator = _load_generator()
  31    openrouter_key = "OPENROUTER_API_KEY"
  32    openai_key = "OPENAI_API_KEY"
  33    source = generator.SourceFile(
  34        path=".env.example",
  35        text=f"{openrouter_key}=\n{openai_key}=secret\nNORMAL=value",
  36        lines=[openrouter_key + "=", openai_key + "=secret", "NORMAL=value"],
  37        tree=None,
  38    )
  39
  40    rendered = generator.render_source_file(source)
  41
  42    assert openrouter_key + "=" not in rendered
  43    assert openai_key + "=secret" not in rendered
  44    assert f"{openrouter_key} = &lt;redacted&gt;" in rendered
  45    assert f"{openai_key} = &lt;redacted&gt;" in rendered
  46    assert "NORMAL=value" in rendered
tests/nipux_cli/test_templates.py 15 lines 
   1from nipux_cli.templates import program_for_job
   2
   3
   4def test_generic_template_pushes_artifacts_and_updates():
   5    program = program_for_job(kind="generic", title="research", objective="Find findings")
   6
   7    assert "Save important observations as artifacts" in program
   8    assert "Use report_update" in program
   9    assert "Use record_lesson" in program
  10    assert "record_source" in program
  11    assert "record_findings" in program
  12    assert "record_tasks" in program
  13    assert "record_roadmap" in program
  14    assert "record_milestone_validation" in program
  15    assert "record_findings" in program
tests/nipux_cli/test_tools.py 729 lines 
   1import json
   2
   3from nipux_cli.artifacts import ArtifactStore
   4from nipux_cli.config import AppConfig, RuntimeConfig
   5from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
   6from nipux_cli.tools import APPROVED_TOOL_NAMES, DEFAULT_REGISTRY, ToolContext
   7
   8
   9def test_static_tool_surface_is_focused():
  10    assert tuple(DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()) == tuple(sorted(APPROVED_TOOL_NAMES))
  11    assert "terminal" not in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  12    assert "delegate_task" not in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  13    assert "skill_manage" not in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  14    assert "browser_navigate" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  15    assert "shell_exec" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  16    assert "write_file" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  17    assert "write_artifact" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  18    assert "defer_job" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  19    assert "report_update" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  20    assert "record_lesson" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  21    assert "record_source" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  22    assert "record_findings" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  23    assert "record_tasks" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  24    assert "record_roadmap" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  25    assert "record_milestone_validation" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  26    assert "record_experiment" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  27    assert "acknowledge_operator_context" in DEFAULT_REGISTRY.names()
  28
  29
  30def test_artifact_tools_roundtrip(tmp_path):
  31    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
  32    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
  33    try:
  34        job_id = db.create_job("Save evidence")
  35        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
  36        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="write_artifact")
  37        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
  38
  39        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("write_artifact", {"content": "needle text", "title": "Evidence"}, ctx)
  40        result = json.loads(raw)
  41        assert result["success"] is True
  42
  43        read_raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("read_artifact", {"artifact_id": result["artifact_id"]}, ctx)
  44        assert json.loads(read_raw)["content"] == "needle text"
  45
  46        path_raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("read_artifact", {"artifact_id": result["path"]}, ctx)
  47        assert json.loads(path_raw)["artifact_id"] == result["artifact_id"]
  48
  49        title_raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("read_artifact", {"title": "Evidence"}, ctx)
  50        assert json.loads(title_raw)["content"] == "needle text"
  51
  52        number_raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("read_artifact", {"artifact_id": "1"}, ctx)
  53        assert json.loads(number_raw)["content"] == "needle text"
  54
  55        search_raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("search_artifacts", {"query": "needle"}, ctx)
  56        assert json.loads(search_raw)["results"][0]["id"] == result["artifact_id"]
  57    finally:
  58        db.close()
  59
  60
  61def test_defer_job_records_resume_time_without_pausing(tmp_path):
  62    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
  63    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
  64    try:
  65        job_id = db.create_job("Monitor a long process")
  66        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
  67        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="defer_job")
  68        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
  69
  70        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
  71            "defer_job",
  72            {"seconds": 60, "reason": "process is still running", "next_action": "check status"},
  73            ctx,
  74        )
  75        result = json.loads(raw)
  76
  77        assert result["success"] is True
  78        assert result["status"] == "running"
  79        job = db.get_job(job_id)
  80        assert job["status"] == "running"
  81        assert job["metadata"]["defer_until"]
  82        assert job["metadata"]["defer_reason"] == "process is still running"
  83        assert job["metadata"]["defer_next_action"] == "check status"
  84        assert any(event["event_type"] == "agent_message" for event in db.list_events(job_id=job_id, limit=10))
  85    finally:
  86        db.close()
  87
  88
  89def test_shell_exec_tool_runs_bounded_command(tmp_path):
  90    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
  91    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
  92    try:
  93        job_id = db.create_job("Run command")
  94        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
  95        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="shell_exec")
  96        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
  97
  98        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("shell_exec", {"command": "printf hello", "timeout_seconds": 5}, ctx)
  99        result = json.loads(raw)
 100
 101        assert result["success"] is True
 102        assert result["returncode"] == 0
 103        assert result["stdout"] == "hello"
 104    finally:
 105        db.close()
 106
 107
 108def test_write_file_tool_writes_and_appends_workspace_file(tmp_path, monkeypatch):
 109    monkeypatch.chdir(tmp_path)
 110    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 111    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 112    try:
 113        job_id = db.create_job("Write deliverable")
 114        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 115        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="write_file")
 116        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 117
 118        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("write_file", {"path": "out/report.md", "content": "one\n"}, ctx)
 119        result = json.loads(raw)
 120        append_raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 121            "write_file",
 122            {"path": "out/report.md", "content": "two\n", "mode": "append"},
 123            ctx,
 124        )
 125        append_result = json.loads(append_raw)
 126
 127        assert result["success"] is True
 128        assert append_result["success"] is True
 129        assert (tmp_path / "out" / "report.md").read_text() == "one\ntwo\n"
 130    finally:
 131        db.close()
 132
 133
 134def test_shell_exec_timeout_kills_process_group(tmp_path):
 135    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 136    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 137    try:
 138        job_id = db.create_job("Run command")
 139        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 140        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="shell_exec")
 141        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 142
 143        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("shell_exec", {"command": "sleep 5 | cat", "timeout_seconds": 1}, ctx)
 144        result = json.loads(raw)
 145
 146        assert result["success"] is False
 147        assert result["timed_out"] is True
 148        assert result["duration_seconds"] < 4
 149    finally:
 150        db.close()
 151
 152
 153def test_shell_exec_does_not_attach_local_ssh_config(tmp_path):
 154    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 155    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 156    try:
 157        job_id = db.create_job("Run command")
 158        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 159        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="shell_exec")
 160        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 161
 162        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("shell_exec", {"command": "ssh -V", "timeout_seconds": 5}, ctx)
 163        result = json.loads(raw)
 164
 165        assert "ssh_config" not in result
 166    finally:
 167        db.close()
 168
 169
 170def test_shell_exec_reports_nonzero_stderr_as_error(tmp_path):
 171    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 172    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 173    try:
 174        job_id = db.create_job("Run command")
 175        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 176        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="shell_exec")
 177        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 178
 179        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 180            "shell_exec",
 181            {"command": "printf 'sudo: a terminal is required to read the password\\n' >&2; exit 1", "timeout_seconds": 5},
 182            ctx,
 183        )
 184        result = json.loads(raw)
 185
 186        assert result["success"] is False
 187        assert "interactive sudo/password" in result["error"]
 188    finally:
 189        db.close()
 190
 191
 192def test_update_job_state_keeps_terminal_statuses_operator_only(tmp_path):
 193    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 194    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 195    try:
 196        job_id = db.create_job("Keep running")
 197        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 198        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="update_job_state")
 199        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 200
 201        for requested in ("paused", "cancelled", "completed", "failed"):
 202            raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("update_job_state", {"status": requested}, ctx)
 203            result = json.loads(raw)
 204
 205            assert result["success"] is True
 206            assert result["requested_status"] == requested
 207            assert result["kept_running"] is True
 208            assert db.get_job(job_id)["status"] == "running"
 209    finally:
 210        db.close()
 211
 212
 213def test_report_update_tool_records_operator_visible_note(tmp_path):
 214    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 215    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 216    try:
 217        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic")
 218        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 219        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="report_update")
 220        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 221
 222        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle("report_update", {"message": "Found a usable finding source", "category": "finding"}, ctx)
 223        result = json.loads(raw)
 224        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 225
 226        assert result["success"] is True
 227        assert job["metadata"]["agent_updates"][-1]["message"] == "Found a usable finding source"
 228        assert job["metadata"]["last_agent_update"]["category"] == "finding"
 229    finally:
 230        db.close()
 231
 232
 233def test_record_lesson_tool_records_durable_learning(tmp_path):
 234    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 235    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 236    try:
 237        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic")
 238        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 239        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_lesson")
 240        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 241
 242        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 243            "record_lesson",
 244            {"lesson": "Competitor low-evidence lists are not finding sources.", "category": "source_quality", "confidence": 0.8},
 245            ctx,
 246        )
 247        result = json.loads(raw)
 248        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 249
 250        assert result["success"] is True
 251        assert job["metadata"]["lessons"][-1]["lesson"] == "Competitor low-evidence lists are not finding sources."
 252        assert job["metadata"]["last_lesson"]["category"] == "source_quality"
 253    finally:
 254        db.close()
 255
 256
 257def test_record_source_and_findings_tools_update_ledgers(tmp_path):
 258    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 259    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 260    try:
 261        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic")
 262        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 263        source_step = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_source")
 264        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=source_step)
 265
 266        source_raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 267            "record_source",
 268            {"source": "https://example.com", "source_type": "web_source", "usefulness_score": 0.8, "yield_count": 2},
 269            ctx,
 270        )
 271        finding_raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 272            "record_findings",
 273            {
 274                "findings": [
 275                    {
 276                        "name": "Acme Finding",
 277                        "url": "https://acme.example",
 278                        "source_url": "https://example-source.com/acme",
 279                        "location": "Toronto",
 280                        "category": "example category",
 281                        "reason": "reusable result",
 282                        "score": 0.75,
 283                    }
 284                ]
 285            },
 286            ctx,
 287        )
 288        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 289
 290        assert json.loads(source_raw)["source"]["yield_count"] == 2
 291        finding_result = json.loads(finding_raw)
 292        assert finding_result["added"] == 1
 293        assert finding_result["sources_updated"] == 1
 294        assert job["metadata"]["source_ledger"][0]["source"] == "https://example.com"
 295        assert any(source["source"] == "https://example-source.com/acme" for source in job["metadata"]["source_ledger"])
 296        assert job["metadata"]["finding_ledger"][0]["name"] == "Acme Finding"
 297        assert job["metadata"]["last_agent_update"]["category"] == "finding"
 298    finally:
 299        db.close()
 300
 301
 302def test_record_tasks_tool_updates_task_queue(tmp_path):
 303    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 304    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 305    try:
 306        job_id = db.create_job("Research topic")
 307        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 308        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_tasks")
 309        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 310
 311        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 312            "record_tasks",
 313            {
 314                "tasks": [
 315                    {
 316                        "title": "Explore primary sources",
 317                        "status": "open",
 318                        "priority": 5,
 319                        "goal": "Find artifact-backed evidence",
 320                        "source_hint": "official docs",
 321                    }
 322                ]
 323            },
 324            ctx,
 325        )
 326        result = json.loads(raw)
 327        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 328
 329        assert result["success"] is True
 330        assert result["added"] == 1
 331        assert job["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]["title"] == "Explore primary sources"
 332        assert job["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]["priority"] == 5
 333        assert job["metadata"]["last_agent_update"]["category"] == "plan"
 334    finally:
 335        db.close()
 336
 337
 338def test_record_roadmap_tool_updates_roadmap(tmp_path):
 339    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 340    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 341    try:
 342        job_id = db.create_job("Build a broad generic outcome")
 343        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 344        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_roadmap")
 345        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 346
 347        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 348            "record_roadmap",
 349            {
 350                "title": "Generic Roadmap",
 351                "status": "active",
 352                "scope": "Coordinate broad work through milestones.",
 353                "current_milestone": "Foundation",
 354                "validation_contract": "Each milestone needs evidence.",
 355                "milestones": [{
 356                    "title": "Foundation",
 357                    "status": "active",
 358                    "priority": 7,
 359                    "acceptance_criteria": "first durable output exists",
 360                    "evidence_needed": "artifact and ledger update",
 361                    "features": [{
 362                        "title": "Create first checkpoint",
 363                        "status": "active",
 364                        "output_contract": "artifact",
 365                    }],
 366                }],
 367            },
 368            ctx,
 369        )
 370        result = json.loads(raw)
 371        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 372        roadmap = job["metadata"]["roadmap"]
 373
 374        assert result["success"] is True
 375        assert roadmap["title"] == "Generic Roadmap"
 376        assert roadmap["status"] == "active"
 377        assert roadmap["milestones"][0]["title"] == "Foundation"
 378        assert roadmap["milestones"][0]["features"][0]["title"] == "Create first checkpoint"
 379        assert job["metadata"]["last_agent_update"]["metadata"]["roadmap_status"] == "active"
 380    finally:
 381        db.close()
 382
 383
 384def test_record_roadmap_dedupes_milestone_titles_even_when_keys_change(tmp_path):
 385    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 386    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 387    try:
 388        job_id = db.create_job("Keep broad work coordinated")
 389        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 390        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_roadmap")
 391        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 392
 393        DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 394            "record_roadmap",
 395            {
 396                "title": "Generic Roadmap",
 397                "milestones": [{
 398                    "key": "initial-key",
 399                    "title": "Foundation",
 400                    "status": "planned",
 401                    "features": [{"key": "feature-a", "title": "First feature", "status": "planned"}],
 402                }],
 403            },
 404            ctx,
 405        )
 406        DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 407            "record_roadmap",
 408            {
 409                "title": "Generic Roadmap",
 410                "milestones": [{
 411                    "key": "model-invented-key",
 412                    "title": "Foundation",
 413                    "status": "active",
 414                    "features": [{"key": "different-feature-key", "title": "First feature", "status": "done"}],
 415                }],
 416            },
 417            ctx,
 418        )
 419        roadmap = db.get_job(job_id)["metadata"]["roadmap"]
 420
 421        assert len(roadmap["milestones"]) == 1
 422        assert roadmap["milestones"][0]["status"] == "active"
 423        assert len(roadmap["milestones"][0]["features"]) == 1
 424        assert roadmap["milestones"][0]["features"][0]["status"] == "done"
 425    finally:
 426        db.close()
 427
 428
 429def test_record_milestone_validation_creates_follow_up_tasks(tmp_path):
 430    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 431    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 432    try:
 433        job_id = db.create_job("Validate broad work")
 434        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 435        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_milestone_validation")
 436        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 437
 438        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 439            "record_milestone_validation",
 440            {
 441                "milestone": "Foundation",
 442                "validation_status": "failed",
 443                "result": "Missing durable evidence.",
 444                "issues": ["no artifact"],
 445                "next_action": "Create evidence.",
 446                "follow_up_tasks": [{
 447                    "title": "Produce missing evidence",
 448                    "output_contract": "artifact",
 449                    "acceptance_criteria": "saved output exists",
 450                }],
 451            },
 452            ctx,
 453        )
 454        result = json.loads(raw)
 455        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 456        roadmap = job["metadata"]["roadmap"]
 457
 458        assert result["success"] is True
 459        assert result["validation"]["validation_status"] == "failed"
 460        assert result["follow_up_tasks"][0]["title"] == "Produce missing evidence"
 461        assert roadmap["milestones"][0]["status"] == "blocked"
 462        assert job["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]["parent"] == "Foundation"
 463        assert job["metadata"]["last_agent_update"]["metadata"]["validation_status"] == "failed"
 464    finally:
 465        db.close()
 466
 467
 468def test_record_experiment_tool_tracks_best_measured_result(tmp_path):
 469    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 470    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 471    try:
 472        job_id = db.create_job("Improve a measurable process")
 473        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 474        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_experiment")
 475        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 476
 477        first = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 478            "record_experiment",
 479            {
 480                "title": "baseline attempt",
 481                "status": "measured",
 482                "metric_name": "score",
 483                "metric_value": 2.0,
 484                "metric_unit": "units",
 485                "higher_is_better": True,
 486                "config": {"variant": "a"},
 487                "result": "baseline measured",
 488                "next_action": "try variant b",
 489            },
 490            ctx,
 491        )
 492        second = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 493            "record_experiment",
 494            {
 495                "title": "second attempt",
 496                "status": "measured",
 497                "metric_name": "score",
 498                "metric_value": 3.5,
 499                "metric_unit": "units",
 500                "higher_is_better": True,
 501                "config": {"variant": "b"},
 502                "result": "improved",
 503                "next_action": "test a different branch",
 504            },
 505            ctx,
 506        )
 507        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 508        experiments = job["metadata"]["experiment_ledger"]
 509
 510        assert json.loads(first)["experiment"]["best_observed"] is True
 511        assert json.loads(second)["experiment"]["best_observed"] is True
 512        assert experiments[0]["best_observed"] is False
 513        assert experiments[1]["best_observed"] is True
 514        assert experiments[1]["delta_from_previous_best"] == 1.5
 515        assert job["metadata"]["best_experiment_record"]["title"] == "second attempt"
 516        assert job["metadata"]["last_agent_update"]["metadata"]["best_observed"] is True
 517    finally:
 518        db.close()
 519
 520
 521def test_acknowledge_operator_context_tool_marks_context(tmp_path):
 522    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 523    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 524    try:
 525        job_id = db.create_job("Run with operator corrections")
 526        entry = db.append_operator_message(job_id, "use the corrected target", source="chat")
 527        db.claim_operator_messages(job_id, modes=("steer",), limit=1)
 528        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 529        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="acknowledge_operator_context")
 530        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 531
 532        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 533            "acknowledge_operator_context",
 534            {"message_ids": [entry["event_id"]], "summary": "correction incorporated"},
 535            ctx,
 536        )
 537        result = json.loads(raw)
 538        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 539
 540        assert result["success"] is True
 541        assert result["count"] == 1
 542        assert job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][0]["acknowledged_at"]
 543        assert job["metadata"]["last_operator_context_ack"]["summary"] == "correction incorporated"
 544    finally:
 545        db.close()
 546
 547
 548def test_record_tasks_accepts_generic_output_contracts(tmp_path):
 549    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 550    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 551    try:
 552        job_id = db.create_job("Improve measurable process")
 553        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 554        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_tasks")
 555        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 556
 557        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 558            "record_tasks",
 559            {
 560                "tasks": [{
 561                    "title": "Run one comparison",
 562                    "status": "open",
 563                    "output_contract": "experiment",
 564                    "acceptance_criteria": "metric recorded",
 565                    "evidence_needed": "command output or artifact",
 566                    "stall_behavior": "record blocker and pivot",
 567                }]
 568            },
 569            ctx,
 570        )
 571        result = json.loads(raw)
 572        task = db.get_job(job_id)["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]
 573
 574        assert result["success"] is True
 575        assert task["output_contract"] == "experiment"
 576        assert task["acceptance_criteria"] == "metric recorded"
 577        assert task["evidence_needed"] == "command output or artifact"
 578        assert task["stall_behavior"] == "record blocker and pivot"
 579    finally:
 580        db.close()
 581
 582
 583def test_record_tasks_downgrades_done_artifact_without_delivery_evidence(tmp_path):
 584    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 585    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 586    try:
 587        job_id = db.create_job("Update a deliverable")
 588        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 589        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_tasks")
 590        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 591
 592        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 593            "record_tasks",
 594            {
 595                "tasks": [{
 596                    "title": "Update report draft",
 597                    "status": "done",
 598                    "output_contract": "artifact",
 599                    "result": "Updated the report",
 600                }]
 601            },
 602            ctx,
 603        )
 604        result = json.loads(raw)
 605        task = db.get_job(job_id)["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]
 606
 607        assert result["success"] is True
 608        assert task["status"] == "active"
 609        assert task["metadata"]["completion_validation"] == "missing_recent_deliverable_evidence"
 610        assert task["metadata"]["claimed_result"] == "Updated the report"
 611    finally:
 612        db.close()
 613
 614
 615def test_record_tasks_allows_done_artifact_after_delivery_evidence(tmp_path):
 616    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 617    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 618    try:
 619        job_id = db.create_job("Update a deliverable")
 620        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 621        artifact_step = db.add_step(
 622            job_id=job_id,
 623            run_id=run_id,
 624            kind="tool",
 625            tool_name="write_artifact",
 626            input_data={"arguments": {"title": "Final report draft", "summary": "Updated report deliverable"}},
 627        )
 628        db.finish_step(artifact_step, status="completed", summary="write_artifact saved art_demo")
 629        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_tasks")
 630        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 631
 632        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 633            "record_tasks",
 634            {
 635                "tasks": [{
 636                    "title": "Update report draft",
 637                    "status": "done",
 638                    "output_contract": "artifact",
 639                    "result": "Saved final report draft",
 640                }]
 641            },
 642            ctx,
 643        )
 644        result = json.loads(raw)
 645        task = db.get_job(job_id)["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]
 646
 647        assert result["success"] is True
 648        assert task["status"] == "done"
 649        assert "completion_validation" not in task.get("metadata", {})
 650    finally:
 651        db.close()
 652
 653
 654def test_record_tasks_does_not_treat_stderr_redirect_as_delivery_write(tmp_path):
 655    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 656    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 657    try:
 658        job_id = db.create_job("Update a deliverable")
 659        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 660        shell_step = db.add_step(
 661            job_id=job_id,
 662            run_id=run_id,
 663            kind="tool",
 664            tool_name="shell_exec",
 665            input_data={"arguments": {"command": "cat draft.md 2>/dev/null"}},
 666        )
 667        db.finish_step(shell_step, status="completed", summary="shell_exec rc=0")
 668        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_tasks")
 669        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 670
 671        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 672            "record_tasks",
 673            {
 674                "tasks": [{
 675                    "title": "Update report draft",
 676                    "status": "done",
 677                    "output_contract": "artifact",
 678                    "result": "Saved final report draft",
 679                }]
 680            },
 681            ctx,
 682        )
 683        result = json.loads(raw)
 684        task = db.get_job(job_id)["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]
 685
 686        assert result["success"] is True
 687        assert task["status"] == "active"
 688        assert task["metadata"]["completion_validation"] == "missing_recent_deliverable_evidence"
 689    finally:
 690        db.close()
 691
 692
 693def test_record_tasks_rejects_checkpoint_as_delivery_evidence(tmp_path):
 694    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 695    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 696    try:
 697        job_id = db.create_job("Update a deliverable")
 698        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
 699        artifact_step = db.add_step(
 700            job_id=job_id,
 701            run_id=run_id,
 702            kind="tool",
 703            tool_name="write_artifact",
 704            input_data={"arguments": {"title": "Compiled report checkpoint", "summary": "Checkpoint before final rewrite"}},
 705        )
 706        db.finish_step(artifact_step, status="completed", summary="write_artifact saved art_demo")
 707        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="record_tasks")
 708        ctx = ToolContext(config=config, db=db, artifacts=ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db), job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id)
 709
 710        raw = DEFAULT_REGISTRY.handle(
 711            "record_tasks",
 712            {
 713                "tasks": [{
 714                    "title": "Update report draft",
 715                    "status": "done",
 716                    "output_contract": "artifact",
 717                    "result": "Saved final report draft",
 718                }]
 719            },
 720            ctx,
 721        )
 722        result = json.loads(raw)
 723        task = db.get_job(job_id)["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]
 724
 725        assert result["success"] is True
 726        assert task["status"] == "active"
 727        assert task["metadata"]["completion_validation"] == "missing_recent_deliverable_evidence"
 728    finally:
 729        db.close()

   1import json
   2from pathlib import Path
   3
   4from nipux_cli.artifacts import ArtifactStore
   5from nipux_cli.config import AppConfig, RuntimeConfig
   6from nipux_cli.db import AgentDB
   7from nipux_cli.llm import LLMResponse, LLMResponseError, ScriptedLLM, ToolCall
   8from nipux_cli.worker import MAX_WORKER_PROMPT_CHARS, SYSTEM_PROMPT, build_messages, run_one_step, _render_worker_prompt
   9

  11class SnapshotRegistry:
  12    def openai_tools(self):
  13        return []
  14
  15    def handle(self, name, args, ctx):
  16        del name, args, ctx
  17        return json.dumps({"success": True, "data": {"snapshot": "short snapshot"}})
  18
  19
  20class SuccessRegistry:
  21    def openai_tools(self):
  22        return []
  23
  24    def handle(self, name, args, ctx):
  25        del ctx
  26        return json.dumps({"success": True, "tool": name, "args": args, "results": []})
  27
  28
  29class MeasuredShellRegistry:
  30    def openai_tools(self):
  31        return []
  32
  33    def handle(self, name, args, ctx):
  34        del args, ctx
  35        if name == "shell_exec":
  36            return json.dumps({"success": True, "command": "run test", "returncode": 0, "stdout": "score 2.7 units/s", "stderr": ""})
  37        return json.dumps({"success": True, "results": []})
  38
  39
  40class DiagnosticShellRegistry:
  41    def openai_tools(self):
  42        return []
  43
  44    def handle(self, name, args, ctx):
  45        del args, ctx
  46        if name == "shell_exec":
  47            return json.dumps({
  48                "success": True,
  49                "command": "df -h && nproc && free -h",
  50                "returncode": 0,
  51                "stdout": "Filesystem Size Used Avail Use% Mounted on\\n/dev/root 233G 198G 23G 90% /\\nCPU COUNT 24\\nRAM 93Gi",
  52                "stderr": "",
  53            })
  54        return json.dumps({"success": True})
  55
  56
  57class SourceCodeShellRegistry:
  58    def openai_tools(self):
  59        return []
  60
  61    def handle(self, name, args, ctx):
  62        del args, ctx
  63        if name == "shell_exec":
  64            return json.dumps({
  65                "success": True,
  66                "command": "git show HEAD:nipux_cli/cli.py",
  67                "returncode": 0,
  68                "stdout": 'for index, task in enumerate(plan["tasks"], start=1):\n    rate(plan["tasks"], start=1)\n',
  69                "stderr": "",
  70            })
  71        return json.dumps({"success": True})

  74class LargeShellEvidenceRegistry:
  75    def openai_tools(self):
  76        return []
  77
  78    def handle(self, name, args, ctx):
  79        del args, ctx
  80        if name == "shell_exec":
  81            return json.dumps({
  82                "success": True,
  83                "command": "find . -type f",
  84                "returncode": 0,
  85                "stdout": "\n".join(f"./file_{index}.py" for index in range(200)),
  86                "stderr": "",
  87            })
  88        return json.dumps({"success": True})

  91class ExtractRegistry:
  92    def openai_tools(self):
  93        return []
  94
  95    def handle(self, name, args, ctx):
  96        del args, ctx
  97        if name == "web_extract":
  98            return json.dumps({
  99                "success": True,
 100                "pages": [
 101                    {"url": "https://source.example/a", "text": "useful source text " * 250},
 102                    {"url": "https://source.example/b", "error": "timeout"},
 103                ],
 104            })
 105        return json.dumps({"success": True})

 108class CapturingLLM:
 109    def __init__(self, response):
 110        self.response = response
 111        self.messages = None
 112
 113    def next_action(self, *, messages, tools):
 114        del tools
 115        self.messages = messages
 116        return self.response
 117
 118
 119class ExplodingLLM:
 120    def next_action(self, *, messages, tools):
 121        del messages, tools
 122        raise AssertionError("LLM should not be called")
 123
 124
 125class AntiBotBrowserRegistry:
 126    def openai_tools(self):
 127        return []
 128
 129    def handle(self, name, args, ctx):
 130        del args, ctx
 131        if name == "browser_snapshot":
 132            return json.dumps({
 133                "success": True,
 134                "data": {
 135                    "origin": "https://source.example/search",
 136                    "snapshot": 'Iframe "Security CAPTCHA" You have been blocked. You are browsing and clicking at a speed much faster than expected.',
 137                },
 138            })
 139        return json.dumps({"success": True})
