 142def test_system_prompt_is_contract_first_not_research_first():
 143    assert "Use a contract-first durable cycle" in SYSTEM_PROMPT
 144    assert "Research is only one possible contract" in SYSTEM_PROMPT
 145    assert "Use this durable cycle: discover one source" not in SYSTEM_PROMPT
 146
 147
 148def test_run_one_step_executes_scripted_tool_call(tmp_path):
 149    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 150    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 151    try:
 152        job_id = db.create_job("Find 10 durable research findings", title="research", kind="generic")
 153        llm = ScriptedLLM([
 154            LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
 155                ToolCall(
 156                    name="write_artifact",
 157                    arguments={
 158                        "title": "first finding",
 159                        "summary": "smoke finding",
 160                        "content": "Acme Design, https://example.com",
 161                    },
 162                )
 163            ])
 164        ])
 165
 166        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=llm)
 167
 168        assert result.status == "completed"
 169        assert result.tool_name == "write_artifact"
 170        artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job_id)
 171        assert artifacts[0]["title"] == "first finding"
 172        steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
 173        assert steps[0]["tool_name"] == "write_artifact"
 174        assert steps[0]["status"] == "completed"
 175        memory = db.list_memory(job_id)
 176        assert memory[0]["key"] == "rolling_state"
 177        assert artifacts[0]["id"] in memory[0]["artifact_refs"]
 178    finally:
 179        db.close()
 180
 181
 182def test_run_one_step_records_estimated_usage_for_scripted_model(tmp_path):
 183    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 184    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 185    try:
 186        job_id = db.create_job("Summarize progress", title="usage", kind="generic")
 187
 188        run_one_step(
 189            job_id,
 190            config=config,
 191            db=db,
 192            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(content="No tool this turn.")]),
 193        )
 194
 195        usage = db.job_token_usage(job_id)
 196        assert usage["calls"] == 1
 197        assert usage["prompt_tokens"] > 0
 198        assert usage["completion_tokens"] > 0
 199        assert usage["estimated_calls"] == 1
 200        event = next(
 201            event
 202            for event in db.list_events(job_id=job_id, event_types=["loop"])
 203            if event.get("title") == "message_end"
 204        )
 205        event_usage = event["metadata"]["usage"]
 206        assert event_usage["prompt_chars"] > 0
 207        assert event_usage["context_length"] == config.model.context_length
 208        assert event_usage["context_fraction"] > 0
 209    finally:
 210        db.close()
 211
 212
 213def test_run_one_step_executes_tool_call_batch_in_order(tmp_path):
 214    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 215    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 216    try:
 217        job_id = db.create_job("Build a durable report", title="batch", kind="generic")
 218        llm = ScriptedLLM([
 219            LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
 220                ToolCall(
 221                    name="write_artifact",
 222                    arguments={
 223                        "title": "evidence checkpoint",
 224                        "summary": "first useful output",
 225                        "content": "The worker saved evidence before updating the task queue.",
 226                    },
 227                ),
 228                ToolCall(
 229                    name="record_tasks",
 230                    arguments={
 231                        "tasks": [
 232                            {
 233                                "title": "Review saved output",
 234                                "status": "open",
 235                                "priority": 5,
 236                                "output_contract": "report",
 237                                "acceptance_criteria": "Saved evidence has been inspected and summarized.",
 238                                "evidence_needed": "Artifact reference and concrete next action.",
 239                                "stall_behavior": "Record a lesson and pivot if the artifact is not useful.",
 240                            }
 241                        ]
 242                    },
 243                ),
 244            ])
 245        ])
 246
 247        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=llm)
 248
 249        assert result.status == "completed"
 250        assert result.tool_name == "record_tasks"
 251        steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
 252        assert [step["tool_name"] for step in steps] == ["write_artifact", "record_tasks"]
 253        assert [step["status"] for step in steps] == ["completed", "completed"]
 254        artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job_id)
 255        assert artifacts[0]["title"] == "evidence checkpoint"
 256        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 257        tasks = job["metadata"]["task_queue"]
 258        assert any(task["title"] == "Review saved output" and task["output_contract"] == "report" for task in tasks)
 259        run = db.list_runs(job_id, limit=1)[0]
 260        assert run["status"] == "completed"
 261    finally:
 262        db.close()
 263
 264
 265def test_write_artifact_reconciles_matching_report_task(tmp_path):
 266    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 267    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 268    try:
 269        job_id = db.create_job(
 270            "Write a durable report",
 271            title="report",
 272            kind="generic",
 273            metadata={
 274                "task_queue": [
 275                    {
 276                        "title": "Draft paper - Methods section",
 277                        "status": "open",
 278                        "priority": 5,
 279                        "output_contract": "report",
 280                        "acceptance_criteria": "Methods section is saved as an output.",
 281                    }
 282                ]
 283            },
 284        )
 285        llm = ScriptedLLM([
 286            LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
 287                ToolCall(
 288                    name="write_artifact",
 289                    arguments={
 290                        "title": "Paper Draft - Section 3: Methods",
 291                        "summary": "Methods section for the report",
 292                        "content": "This methods section explains the approach and evidence.",
 293                    },
 294                )
 295            ])
 296        ])
 297
 298        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=llm)
 299
 300        assert result.status == "completed"
 301        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 302        task = job["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]
 303        assert task["status"] == "done"
 304        assert task["metadata"]["auto_reconciled_from_artifact"]
 305        assert "Saved output" in task["result"]
 306    finally:
 307        db.close()
 308
 309
 310def test_evidence_artifact_does_not_complete_deliverable_task(tmp_path):
 311    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 312    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 313    try:
 314        job_id = db.create_job(
 315            "Improve a durable report",
 316            title="report",
 317            kind="generic",
 318            metadata={
 319                "task_queue": [
 320                    {
 321                        "title": "Update report with new citations",
 322                        "status": "open",
 323                        "priority": 5,
 324                        "output_contract": "artifact",
 325                        "acceptance_criteria": "Report text is updated with citations.",
 326                        "evidence_needed": "Updated report draft, not just source notes.",
 327                    }
 328                ]
 329            },
 330        )
 331        llm = ScriptedLLM([
 332            LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
 333                ToolCall(
 334                    name="write_artifact",
 335                    arguments={
 336                        "title": "Evidence: citation sources",
 337                        "summary": "Extracted source notes for citations",
 338                        "content": "These notes describe sources that could later be used in the report.",
 339                    },
 340                )
 341            ])
 342        ])
 343
 344        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=llm)
 345
 346        assert result.status == "completed"
 347        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 348        task = job["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]
 349        assert task["status"] == "open"
 350        assert "auto_reconciled_from_artifact" not in task.get("metadata", {})
 351    finally:
 352        db.close()
 353
 354
 355def test_checkpoint_artifact_does_not_complete_deliverable_task(tmp_path):
 356    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 357    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 358    try:
 359        job_id = db.create_job(
 360            "Compile a durable report",
 361            title="report",
 362            kind="generic",
 363            metadata={
 364                "task_queue": [
 365                    {
 366                        "title": "Compile full report",
 367                        "status": "open",
 368                        "priority": 5,
 369                        "output_contract": "artifact",
 370                        "acceptance_criteria": "Final compiled report is saved.",
 371                    }
 372                ]
 373            },
 374        )
 375        llm = ScriptedLLM([
 376            LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
 377                ToolCall(
 378                    name="write_artifact",
 379                    arguments={
 380                        "title": "Compiled report checkpoint",
 381                        "summary": "Current state checkpoint, not a final compiled report",
 382                        "content": "This checkpoint describes what still needs to be written.",
 383                    },
 384                )
 385            ])
 386        ])
 387
 388        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=llm)
 389
 390        assert result.status == "completed"
 391        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 392        task = job["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]
 393        assert task["status"] == "open"
 394        assert "auto_reconciled_from_artifact" not in task.get("metadata", {})
 395    finally:
 396        db.close()
 397
 398
 399def test_evidence_artifact_can_complete_research_task(tmp_path):
 400    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 401    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 402    try:
 403        job_id = db.create_job(
 404            "Gather source evidence",
 405            title="research",
 406            kind="generic",
 407            metadata={
 408                "task_queue": [
 409                    {
 410                        "title": "Collect citation source evidence",
 411                        "status": "open",
 412                        "priority": 5,
 413                        "output_contract": "research",
 414                        "acceptance_criteria": "Evidence sources are saved.",
 415                    }
 416                ]
 417            },
 418        )
 419        llm = ScriptedLLM([
 420            LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
 421                ToolCall(
 422                    name="write_artifact",
 423                    arguments={
 424                        "title": "Evidence: citation sources",
 425                        "summary": "Extracted source evidence",
 426                        "content": "Citation source evidence for later report writing.",
 427                    },
 428                )
 429            ])
 430        ])
 431
 432        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=llm)
 433
 434        assert result.status == "completed"
 435        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 436        task = job["metadata"]["task_queue"][0]
 437        assert task["status"] == "done"
 438        assert task["metadata"]["auto_reconciled_from_artifact"]
 439    finally:
 440        db.close()
 441
 442
 443def test_run_one_step_blocks_artifact_churn_until_progress_accounting(tmp_path):
 444    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 445    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 446    try:
 447        job_id = db.create_job("Keep a durable progress ledger", title="ledger", kind="generic")
 448        for index in range(3):
 449            run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="test")
 450            step_id = db.add_step(
 451                job_id=job_id,
 452                run_id=run_id,
 453                kind="tool",
 454                tool_name="write_artifact",
 455                input_data={"arguments": {"title": f"Output {index}", "content": "notes"}},
 456            )
 457            db.finish_step(
 458                step_id,
 459                status="completed",
 460                summary=f"write_artifact saved art_{index}",
 461                output_data={"success": True, "artifact_id": f"art_{index}"},
 462            )
 463            db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
 464
 465        blocked = run_one_step(
 466            job_id,
 467            config=config,
 468            db=db,
 469            llm=ScriptedLLM([
 470                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
 471                    ToolCall(name="write_artifact", arguments={"title": "Another output", "content": "more notes"})
 472                ])
 473            ]),
 474        )
 475
 476        assert blocked.status == "blocked"
 477        assert blocked.result["error"] == "progress accounting required"
 478        allowed = run_one_step(
 479            job_id,
 480            config=config,
 481            db=db,
 482            llm=ScriptedLLM([
 483                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
 484                    ToolCall(
 485                        name="record_tasks",
 486                        arguments={"tasks": [{"title": "Review saved outputs", "status": "open", "priority": 2}]},
 487                    )
 488                ])
 489            ]),
 490        )
 491        assert allowed.status == "completed"
 492        assert allowed.tool_name == "record_tasks"
 493    finally:
 494        db.close()
 495
 496
 497def test_activity_checkpoint_streak_blocks_more_churn_until_ledger_update(tmp_path):
 498    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 499    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 500    try:
 501        job_id = db.create_job("Keep working until durable progress appears", title="stagnation", kind="generic")
 502        db.update_job_metadata(
 503            job_id,
 504            {
 505                "activity_checkpoint_streak": 3,
 506                "last_checkpoint_counts": {
 507                    "findings": 0,
 508                    "sources": 0,
 509                    "tasks": 1,
 510                    "experiments": 0,
 511                    "lessons": 0,
 512                    "milestones": 0,
 513                },
 514            },
 515        )
 516
 517        blocked = run_one_step(
 518            job_id,
 519            config=config,
 520            db=db,
 521            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "more background"})])]),
 522        )
 523
 524        assert blocked.status == "blocked"
 525        assert blocked.result["error"] == "durable progress required"
 526
 527        allowed = run_one_step(
 528            job_id,
 529            config=config,
 530            db=db,
 531            llm=ScriptedLLM([
 532                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="record_tasks", arguments={"tasks": [{"title": "Pivot branch", "status": "open"}]})])
 533            ]),
 534        )
 535
 536        assert allowed.status == "completed"
 537        assert allowed.tool_name == "record_tasks"
 538    finally:
 539        db.close()
 540
 541
 542def test_run_one_step_blocks_similar_artifact_search(tmp_path):
 543    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 544    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 545    try:
 546        job_id = db.create_job("Review saved outputs", title="artifact-search", kind="generic")
 547        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="test")
 548        step_id = db.add_step(
 549            job_id=job_id,
 550            run_id=run_id,
 551            kind="tool",
 552            tool_name="search_artifacts",
 553            input_data={"arguments": {"query": "distillation agentic paper evidence", "limit": 20}},
 554        )
 555        db.finish_step(
 556            step_id,
 557            status="completed",
 558            summary="search_artifacts returned 0 results",
 559            output_data={"success": True, "results": []},
 560        )
 561        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
 562
 563        result = run_one_step(
 564            job_id,
 565            config=config,
 566            db=db,
 567            llm=ScriptedLLM([
 568                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
 569                    ToolCall(name="search_artifacts", arguments={"query": "paper evidence for agentic distillation", "limit": 20})
 570                ])
 571            ]),
 572        )
 573
 574        assert result.status == "blocked"
 575        assert result.result["error"] == "similar artifact search blocked"
 576        assert result.result["blocked_tool"] == "search_artifacts"
 577    finally:
 578        db.close()
 579
 580
 581def test_run_one_step_blocks_artifact_review_when_tasks_are_exhausted(tmp_path):
 582    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 583    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 584    try:
 585        job_id = db.create_job(
 586            "Review saved outputs",
 587            title="review-exhausted",
 588            kind="generic",
 589            metadata={"task_queue": [{"title": "Review first output", "status": "done", "priority": 5}]},
 590        )
 591
 592        result = run_one_step(
 593            job_id,
 594            config=config,
 595            db=db,
 596            llm=ScriptedLLM([
 597                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="search_artifacts", arguments={"query": "paper evidence"})])
 598            ]),
 599        )
 600
 601        assert result.status == "blocked"
 602        assert result.result["error"] == "task branch required before more work"
 603        assert result.result["blocked_tool"] == "search_artifacts"
 604    finally:
 605        db.close()
 606
 607
 608def test_run_one_step_recovers_repeated_guard_blocks_without_llm(tmp_path):
 609    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 610    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 611    try:
 612        job_id = db.create_job("Recover repeated blocked work", title="guard", kind="generic")
 613        for index, tool_name in enumerate(["search_artifacts", "shell_exec", "read_artifact"], start=1):
 614            run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="test")
 615            step_id = db.add_step(
 616                job_id=job_id,
 617                run_id=run_id,
 618                kind="tool",
 619                tool_name=tool_name,
 620                input_data={"arguments": {"query": f"blocked {index}"}},
 621            )
 622            db.finish_step(
 623                step_id,
 624                status="blocked",
 625                summary=f"blocked {tool_name}; progress ledger update required",
 626                output_data={"success": True, "recoverable": True, "error": "progress ledger update required"},
 627            )
 628            db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
 629
 630        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=ExplodingLLM())
 631
 632        assert result.status == "completed"
 633        assert result.tool_name == "guard_recovery"
 634        assert result.result["guard_recovery"]["error"] == "progress ledger update required"
 635        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 636        assert any(task["title"] == "Resolve guard: progress ledger update required" for task in job["metadata"]["task_queue"])
 637        assert any("Repeated guard block" in lesson["lesson"] for lesson in job["metadata"]["lessons"])
 638    finally:
 639        db.close()
 640
 641
 642def test_run_one_step_recovers_repeated_known_bad_source_blocks(tmp_path):
 643    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 644    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 645    try:
 646        job_id = db.create_job("Avoid repeatedly blocked sources", title="guard")
 647        for index in range(3):
 648            run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="test")
 649            step_id = db.add_step(
 650                job_id=job_id,
 651                run_id=run_id,
 652                kind="tool",
 653                tool_name="web_extract",
 654                input_data={"arguments": {"urls": ["https://bad.example/source"]}},
 655            )
 656            db.finish_step(
 657                step_id,
 658                status="blocked",
 659                summary="blocked web_extract; known bad source https://bad.example/source",
 660                output_data={"success": False, "error": "known bad source blocked"},
 661            )
 662            db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
 663
 664        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=ExplodingLLM())
 665
 666        assert result.status == "completed"
 667        assert result.tool_name == "guard_recovery"
 668        assert result.result["guard_recovery"]["error"] == "known bad source blocked"
 669        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 670        assert any(task["title"] == "Resolve guard: known bad source blocked" for task in job["metadata"]["task_queue"])
 671    finally:
 672        db.close()
 673
 674
 675def test_guard_recovery_does_not_repeat_after_recovery_step(tmp_path):
 676    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 677    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 678    try:
 679        job_id = db.create_job("Recover repeated blocked work once", title="guard-once", kind="generic")
 680        for index in range(3):
 681            run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="test")
 682            step_id = db.add_step(
 683                job_id=job_id,
 684                run_id=run_id,
 685                kind="tool",
 686                tool_name="search_artifacts",
 687                input_data={"arguments": {"query": f"blocked {index}"}},
 688            )
 689            db.finish_step(
 690                step_id,
 691                status="blocked",
 692                summary="blocked search_artifacts; progress ledger update required",
 693                output_data={"success": True, "recoverable": True, "error": "progress ledger update required"},
 694            )
 695            db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
 696
 697        first = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=ExplodingLLM())
 698        assert first.tool_name == "guard_recovery"
 699
 700        second = run_one_step(
 701            job_id,
 702            config=config,
 703            db=db,
 704            llm=ScriptedLLM([
 705                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
 706                    ToolCall(name="record_lesson", arguments={"lesson": "Recovered guard and chose a new branch", "category": "strategy"})
 707                ])
 708            ]),
 709        )
 710
 711        assert second.status == "completed"
 712        assert second.tool_name == "record_lesson"
 713        assert [step["tool_name"] for step in db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)[-2:]] == ["guard_recovery", "record_lesson"]
 714    finally:
 715        db.close()
 716
 717
 718def test_web_extract_auto_records_source_quality(tmp_path):
 719    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 720    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 721    try:
 722        job_id = db.create_job("Track source quality", title="sources", kind="generic")
 723
 724        result = run_one_step(
 725            job_id,
 726            config=config,
 727            db=db,
 728            llm=ScriptedLLM([
 729                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_extract", arguments={"urls": ["https://source.example/a"]})])
 730            ]),
 731            registry=ExtractRegistry(),
 732        )
 733
 734        assert result.status == "completed"
 735        sources = db.get_job(job_id)["metadata"]["source_ledger"]
 736        assert {source["source"] for source in sources} == {"https://source.example/a", "https://source.example/b"}
 737        useful = next(source for source in sources if source["source"] == "https://source.example/a")
 738        failed = next(source for source in sources if source["source"] == "https://source.example/b")
 739        assert useful["usefulness_score"] >= 0.55
 740        assert failed["fail_count"] == 1
 741    finally:
 742        db.close()
 743
 744
 745def test_worker_cannot_mark_job_completed_by_default(tmp_path):
 746    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 747    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 748    try:
 749        job_id = db.create_job("Keep improving forever", title="perpetual", kind="generic")
 750        llm = ScriptedLLM([
 751            LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
 752                ToolCall(
 753                    name="update_job_state",
 754                    arguments={"status": "completed", "note": "best result saved"},
 755                )
 756            ])
 757        ])
 758
 759        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=llm)
 760        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 761
 762        assert result.status == "completed"
 763        assert result.result["kept_running"] is True
 764        assert job["status"] == "running"
 765        assert job["metadata"]["agent_updates"][-1]["metadata"]["requested_status"] == "completed"
 766    finally:
 767        db.close()
 768
 769
 770def test_run_one_step_claims_one_steering_message_per_turn(tmp_path):
 771    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 772    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 773    try:
 774        job_id = db.create_job("Find durable research findings", title="research", kind="generic")
 775        db.append_operator_message(job_id, "first instruction", source="chat")
 776        db.append_operator_message(job_id, "second instruction", source="chat")
 777        llm = CapturingLLM(LLMResponse(content="No tool this turn."))
 778
 779        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=llm)
 780
 781        assert result.status == "completed"
 782        prompt = llm.messages[-1]["content"]
 783        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 784        events = db.list_timeline_events(job_id, limit=30)
 785        assert "first instruction" in prompt
 786        assert "second instruction" not in prompt
 787        assert job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][0]["claimed_at"]
 788        assert not job["metadata"]["operator_messages"][1].get("claimed_at")
 789        assert any(event["event_type"] == "loop" and event["title"] == "agent_start" for event in events)
 790        assert any(event["event_type"] == "loop" and event["title"] == "turn_end" for event in events)
 791    finally:
 792        db.close()
 793
 794
 795class FailingLLM:
 796    def next_action(self, *, messages, tools):
 797        del messages, tools
 798        raise RuntimeError("provider returned no choices")
 799
 800
 801class HardProviderFailingLLM:
 802    def next_action(self, *, messages, tools):
 803        del messages, tools
 804        raise LLMResponseError(
 805            "Key limit exceeded (total limit)",
 806            payload={"error": {"message": "Key limit exceeded (total limit)", "code": 403}},
 807        )
 808
 809
 810def test_run_one_step_records_model_failures_instead_of_raising(tmp_path):
 811    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 812    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 813    try:
 814        job_id = db.create_job("Keep running despite provider failures", title="provider")
 815
 816        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=FailingLLM())
 817
 818        assert result.status == "failed"
 819        assert result.result["error"] == "provider returned no choices"
 820        steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
 821        assert steps[0]["kind"] == "llm"
 822        assert steps[0]["status"] == "failed"
 823        assert steps[0]["error"] == "provider returned no choices"
 824        assert db.list_runs(job_id)[0]["status"] == "failed"
 825    finally:
 826        db.close()
 827
 828
 829def test_run_one_step_pauses_job_on_hard_provider_failure(tmp_path):
 830    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 831    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 832    try:
 833        job_id = db.create_job("Keep running when provider is configured", title="provider")
 834
 835        result = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=HardProviderFailingLLM())
 836
 837        assert result.status == "failed"
 838        assert result.result["provider_action_required"] is True
 839        assert result.result["pause_reason"] == "llm_provider_blocked"
 840        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 841        assert job["status"] == "paused"
 842        assert "operator action" in job["metadata"]["last_note"]
 843        assert job["metadata"]["provider_blocked_at"]
 844        events = db.list_events(job_id=job_id, limit=10)
 845        assert any(event["event_type"] == "agent_message" and event["title"] == "error" for event in events)
 846    finally:
 847        db.close()
 848
 849
 850def test_prompt_includes_recent_tool_arguments_and_observations():
 851    job = {"title": "research", "kind": "generic", "objective": "find research"}
 852    steps = [{
 853        "step_no": 7,
 854        "kind": "tool",
 855        "status": "completed",
 856        "tool_name": "web_search",
 857        "summary": "web_search query='target model docs' returned 1 results",
 858        "input": {"arguments": {"query": "target model docs", "limit": 5}},
 859        "output": {"query": "target model docs", "results": [{"title": "Target Docs", "url": "https://example.com"}]},
 860    }]
 861
 862    messages = build_messages(job, steps)
 863
 864    content = messages[-1]["content"]
 865    assert "target model docs" in content
 866    assert "Target Docs <https://example.com>" in content
 867    assert "do not search the same query again" in content
 868    assert "shell_exec runs on the machine hosting this Nipux worker" in content
 869    assert str(Path.cwd()) not in content
 870    assert "read_artifact is only for those saved outputs" in content
 871
 872
 873def test_prompt_does_not_inject_local_ssh_alias_context(monkeypatch, tmp_path):
 874    monkeypatch.setenv("HOME", str(tmp_path))
 875    ssh_dir = tmp_path / ".ssh"
 876    ssh_dir.mkdir()
 877    (ssh_dir / "config").write_text("Host remote-box\n  HostName 100.64.0.1\n  User operator\n", encoding="utf-8")
 878    job = {"title": "remote work", "kind": "generic", "objective": "benchmark remote target"}
 879
 880    messages = build_messages(job, [])
 881
 882    content = messages[-1]["content"]
 883    assert "Local CLI context:" not in content
 884    assert "100.64.0.1" not in content
 885    assert "remote-box ->" not in content
 886
 887
 888def test_prompt_includes_operator_steering_messages():
 889    job = {
 890        "title": "research",
 891        "kind": "generic",
 892        "objective": "find research",
 893        "metadata": {
 894            "operator_messages": [{
 895                "at": "2026-04-24T20:40:00+00:00",
 896                "source": "shell",
 897                "message": "Focus on actual strong evidence sources, not competing irrelevant sources.",
 898            }],
 899        },
 900    }
 901
 902    messages = build_messages(job, [])
 903
 904    assert "Operator context:" in messages[-1]["content"]
 905    assert "Focus on actual strong evidence sources" in messages[-1]["content"]
 906
 907
 908def test_prompt_keeps_claimed_operator_context_until_acknowledged(tmp_path):
 909    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 910    try:
 911        job_id = db.create_job("Find durable research findings", title="research", kind="generic")
 912        entry = db.append_operator_message(job_id, "use the corrected target from chat", source="chat")
 913        claimed = db.claim_operator_messages(job_id, modes=("steer",), limit=1)
 914        assert claimed[0]["event_id"] == entry["event_id"]
 915
 916        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 917        messages = build_messages(job, [], include_unclaimed_operator_messages=False)
 918        content = messages[-1]["content"]
 919
 920        assert "Operator context:" in content
 921        assert "use the corrected target from chat" in content
 922        assert "delivered" in content
 923
 924        db.acknowledge_operator_messages(job_id, message_ids=[entry["event_id"]], summary="incorporated correction")
 925        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 926        messages = build_messages(job, [], include_unclaimed_operator_messages=False)
 927
 928        assert "use the corrected target from chat" not in messages[-1]["content"]
 929    finally:
 930        db.close()
 931
 932
 933def test_run_one_step_drops_conversation_only_chat_from_worker_prompt(tmp_path):
 934    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
 935    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
 936    try:
 937        job_id = db.create_job("Keep improving a generic task", title="context", kind="generic")
 938        chat = db.append_operator_message(job_id, "hello", source="chat")
 939        correction = db.append_operator_message(job_id, "use the corrected target from chat", source="chat")
 940        llm = CapturingLLM(
 941            LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="report_update", arguments={"message": "noted", "category": "progress"})])
 942        )
 943
 944        run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=llm)
 945
 946        content = llm.messages[-1]["content"]
 947        assert "hello" not in content
 948        assert "use the corrected target from chat" in content
 949        job = db.get_job(job_id)
 950        messages = {entry["event_id"]: entry for entry in job["metadata"]["operator_messages"]}
 951        assert messages[chat["event_id"]]["acknowledged_at"]
 952        assert messages[correction["event_id"]]["claimed_at"]
 953        assert not messages[correction["event_id"]].get("acknowledged_at")
 954    finally:
 955        db.close()
 956
 957
 958def test_build_messages_keeps_generic_context_under_budget():
 959    job = {
 960        "title": "large context",
 961        "kind": "generic",
 962        "objective": "Improve a measurable process without looping.",
 963        "metadata": {
 964            "operator_messages": [
 965                {"event_id": "chat", "mode": "steer", "message": "how is it going?"},
 966                {"event_id": "use", "mode": "steer", "message": "use the corrected target from chat"},
 967            ],
 968            "lessons": [{"category": "memory", "lesson": "lesson " + "x" * 700} for _ in range(30)],
 969            "task_queue": [
 970                {
 971                    "title": f"Task {index}",
 972                    "status": "open" if index % 3 else "done",
 973                    "priority": index,
 974                    "output_contract": "experiment",
 975                    "acceptance_criteria": "accept " + "x" * 500,
 976                    "evidence_needed": "evidence " + "x" * 500,
 977                    "stall_behavior": "stall " + "x" * 500,
 978                }
 979                for index in range(40)
 980            ],
 981            "finding_ledger": [{"name": f"Finding {index}", "category": "generic", "score": index} for index in range(200)],
 982            "source_ledger": [
 983                {
 984                    "source": f"https://source{index}.example",
 985                    "source_type": "web",
 986                    "usefulness_score": index / 100,
 987                    "yield_count": index % 4,
 988                    "fail_count": index % 3,
 989                    "last_outcome": "outcome " + "x" * 500,
 990                }
 991                for index in range(90)
 992            ],
 993            "experiment_ledger": [
 994                {
 995                    "title": f"Experiment {index}",
 996                    "status": "measured",
 997                    "metric_name": "score",
 998                    "metric_value": index,
 999                    "metric_unit": "units",
1000                    "best_observed": index in {38, 39},
1001                    "result": "result " + "x" * 600,
1002                    "next_action": "next " + "x" * 600,
1003                }
1004                for index in range(40)
1005            ],
1006            "reflections": [{"summary": "summary " + "x" * 800, "strategy": "strategy " + "x" * 800} for _ in range(20)],
1007        },
1008    }
1009    steps = [
1010        {
1011            "step_no": index,
1012            "kind": "tool",
1013            "status": "completed",
1014            "tool_name": "shell_exec",
1015            "summary": "summary " + "x" * 800,
1016            "input": {"arguments": {"command": "command " + "x" * 800}},
1017            "output": {"success": True, "command": "command", "returncode": 0, "stdout": "stdout " + "x" * 3000},
1018        }
1019        for index in range(30)
1020    ]
1021    memory_entries = [{"key": "rolling_state", "summary": "memory " + "x" * 20000, "artifact_refs": [f"art_{i}" for i in range(40)]}]
1022    timeline = [{"event_type": "tool_result", "title": "event", "body": "body " + "x" * 900} for _ in range(40)]
1023
1024    messages = build_messages(job, steps, memory_entries=memory_entries, timeline_events=timeline)
1025    content = messages[-1]["content"]
1026
1027    assert "use the corrected target from chat" in content
1028    assert "how is it going" not in content
1029    assert len(content) < MAX_WORKER_PROMPT_CHARS
1030    assert "Next-action constraint:" in content
1031
1032
1033def test_prompt_timeline_filters_low_signal_tool_noise():
1034    job = {
1035        "title": "timeline",
1036        "kind": "generic",
1037        "objective": "keep useful context visible",
1038        "metadata": {},
1039    }
1040    timeline = [
1041        {
1042            "event_type": "tool_result",
1043            "title": "web_search",
1044            "body": f"search noise {index}",
1045            "metadata": {"status": "completed"},
1046            "created_at": f"2026-05-01T12:{index:02d}:00+00:00",
1047        }
1048        for index in range(20)
1049    ]
1050    timeline.extend([
1051        {
1052            "event_type": "artifact",
1053            "title": "Saved durable report",
1054            "body": "operator-visible output",
1055            "metadata": {},
1056            "created_at": "2026-05-01T13:00:00+00:00",
1057        },
1058        {
1059            "event_type": "finding",
1060            "title": "Useful durable finding",
1061            "body": "result worth keeping",
1062            "metadata": {},
1063            "created_at": "2026-05-01T13:01:00+00:00",
1064        },
1065        {
1066            "event_type": "tool_result",
1067            "title": "shell_exec",
1068            "body": "command failed with actionable blocker",
1069            "metadata": {"status": "failed"},
1070            "created_at": "2026-05-01T13:02:00+00:00",
1071        },
1072    ])
1073
1074    content = build_messages(job, [], timeline_events=timeline)[-1]["content"]
1075
1076    assert "Recent visible timeline:" in content
1077    assert "High-signal timeline counts:" in content
1078    assert "Saved durable report" in content
1079    assert "Useful durable finding" in content
1080    assert "command failed with actionable blocker" in content
1081    assert "search noise" not in content
1082
1083
1084def test_emergency_prompt_clipping_repeats_operator_and_next_action():
1085    job = {"title": "clip", "kind": "generic", "objective": "keep context safe"}
1086    sections = [(f"Noise {index}", "noise " * 2000) for index in range(90)]
1087    sections.insert(45, ("Operator context", "Still-active durable operator context: use the corrected target."))
1088    sections.append(("Next-action constraint", "Next use the validated branch."))
1089
1090    content = _render_worker_prompt(job, sections=sections)
1091
1092    assert len(content) <= MAX_WORKER_PROMPT_CHARS
1093    assert "middle context clipped" in content
1094    suffix = content.split("middle context clipped", 1)[1]
1095    assert "Operator context:" in suffix
1096    assert "use the corrected target" in suffix
1097    assert "Next-action constraint:" in suffix
1098    assert "Next use the validated branch" in suffix
1099
1100
1101def test_build_messages_keeps_rolling_memory_when_not_first():
1102    job = {"title": "memory order", "kind": "generic", "objective": "keep long-running context stable"}
1103    memory_entries = [
1104        {"key": "newer_note", "summary": "newer side note"},
1105        {"key": "other_note", "summary": "less important side note"},
1106        {"key": "rolling_state", "summary": "durable rolling state with usage and task progress"},
1107    ]
1108
1109    content = build_messages(job, [], memory_entries=memory_entries)[-1]["content"]
1110
1111    assert "durable rolling state with usage and task progress" in content
1112    assert "newer side note" in content
1113    assert "less important side note" not in content
1114
1115
1116def test_measurement_obligation_blocks_research_until_recorded(tmp_path):
1117    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1118    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1119    try:
1120        job_id = db.create_job("Improve a measurable process", title="measure", kind="generic")
1121
1122        first = run_one_step(
1123            job_id,
1124            config=config,
1125            db=db,
1126            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="shell_exec", arguments={"command": "run test"})])]),
1127            registry=MeasuredShellRegistry(),
1128        )
1129        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1130        assert first.tool_name == "shell_exec"
1131        assert job["metadata"]["pending_measurement_obligation"]["metric_candidates"]
1132
1133        second = run_one_step(
1134            job_id,
1135            config=config,
1136            db=db,
1137            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "more notes"})])]),
1138            registry=MeasuredShellRegistry(),
1139        )
1140        assert second.status == "blocked"
1141        assert second.result["error"] == "measurement obligation pending"
1142
1143        third = run_one_step(
1144            job_id,
1145            config=config,
1146            db=db,
1147            llm=ScriptedLLM([
1148                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[
1149                    ToolCall(
1150                        name="record_experiment",
1151                        arguments={
1152                            "title": "measured trial",
1153                            "status": "measured",
1154                            "metric_name": "score",
1155                            "metric_value": 2.7,
1156                            "metric_unit": "units/s",
1157                        },
1158                    )
1159                ])
1160            ]),
1161        )
1162        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1163        assert third.tool_name == "record_experiment"
1164        assert job["metadata"].get("pending_measurement_obligation") == {}
1165        assert job["metadata"]["experiment_ledger"][0]["metric_value"] == 2.7
1166    finally:
1167        db.close()
1168
1169
1170def test_diagnostic_shell_output_does_not_create_measurement_obligation(tmp_path):
1171    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1172    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1173    try:
1174        job_id = db.create_job("Improve a measurable process", title="measure", kind="generic")
1175
1176        result = run_one_step(
1177            job_id,
1178            config=config,
1179            db=db,
1180            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="shell_exec", arguments={"command": "df -h && nproc && free -h"})])]),
1181            registry=DiagnosticShellRegistry(),
1182        )
1183
1184        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1185        assert result.tool_name == "shell_exec"
1186        assert job["metadata"].get("pending_measurement_obligation") in (None, {})
1187    finally:
1188        db.close()
1189
1190
1191def test_source_code_shell_output_does_not_create_measurement_obligation(tmp_path):
1192    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1193    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1194    try:
1195        job_id = db.create_job("Improve a measurable process", title="measure", kind="generic")
1196
1197        result = run_one_step(
1198            job_id,
1199            config=config,
1200            db=db,
1201            llm=ScriptedLLM([
1202                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="shell_exec", arguments={"command": "git show HEAD:nipux_cli/cli.py"})])
1203            ]),
1204            registry=SourceCodeShellRegistry(),
1205        )
1206
1207        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1208        assert result.tool_name == "shell_exec"
1209        assert job["metadata"].get("pending_measurement_obligation") in (None, {})
1210    finally:
1211        db.close()

1213
1214def test_large_shell_output_must_be_saved_before_more_shell_churn(tmp_path):
1215    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1216    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1217    try:
1218        job_id = db.create_job("Audit a repository", title="audit", kind="generic")
1219
1220        first = run_one_step(
1221            job_id,
1222            config=config,
1223            db=db,
1224            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="shell_exec", arguments={"command": "find . -type f"})])]),
1225            registry=LargeShellEvidenceRegistry(),
1226        )
1227        second = run_one_step(
1228            job_id,
1229            config=config,
1230            db=db,
1231            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="shell_exec", arguments={"command": "find . -name '*.md'"})])]),
1232            registry=LargeShellEvidenceRegistry(),
1233        )
1234
1235        assert first.tool_name == "shell_exec"
1236        assert second.status == "blocked"
1237        assert second.result["error"] == "artifact required before more research"
1238    finally:
1239        db.close()
1240
1241
1242def test_stale_diagnostic_measurement_obligation_is_cleared(tmp_path):
1243    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1244    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1245    try:
1246        job_id = db.create_job(
1247            "Improve a measurable process",
1248            title="measure",
1249            kind="generic",
1250            metadata={
1251                "pending_measurement_obligation": {
1252                    "source_step_no": 1,
1253                    "command": "df -h && nproc && free -h",
1254                    "metric_candidates": ["CPU COUNT 24", "RAM 93"],
1255                }
1256            },
1257        )
1258
1259        result = run_one_step(
1260            job_id,
1261            config=config,
1262            db=db,
1263            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="record_lesson", arguments={"lesson": "continue", "category": "memory"})])]),
1264        )
1265
1266        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1267        assert result.tool_name == "record_lesson"
1268        assert job["metadata"].get("pending_measurement_obligation") == {}
1269        assert "diagnostic context" in job["metadata"]["last_agent_update"]["message"]
1270    finally:
1271        db.close()
1272
1273
1274def test_measurable_objective_blocks_research_after_budget_but_allows_action(tmp_path):
1275    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1276    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1277    try:
1278        job_id = db.create_job("Optimize a measurable process", title="measured", kind="generic")
1279        for index in range(19):
1280            run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
1281            step_id = db.add_step(
1282                job_id=job_id,
1283                run_id=run_id,
1284                kind="tool",
1285                tool_name="web_search" if index % 2 == 0 else "web_extract",
1286                input_data={"arguments": {"query": f"research branch {index}"}},
1287            )
1288            db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", output_data={"success": True})
1289            db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
1290
1291        blocked = run_one_step(
1292            job_id,
1293            config=config,
1294            db=db,
1295            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "more research"})])]),
1296            registry=MeasuredShellRegistry(),
1297        )
1298        assert blocked.status == "blocked"
1299        assert blocked.result["error"] == "measured progress required"
1300
1301        action = run_one_step(
1302            job_id,
1303            config=config,
1304            db=db,
1305            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="shell_exec", arguments={"command": "run test"})])]),
1306            registry=MeasuredShellRegistry(),
1307        )
1308        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1309        assert action.status == "completed"
1310        assert action.tool_name == "shell_exec"
1311        assert job["metadata"]["pending_measurement_obligation"]["metric_candidates"]
1312    finally:
1313        db.close()
1314
1315
1316def test_measurable_objective_blocks_shell_churn_without_experiment_accounting(tmp_path):
1317    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1318    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1319    try:
1320        job_id = db.create_job("Optimize a measurable process", title="measured", kind="generic")
1321        for index in range(4):
1322            run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
1323            step_id = db.add_step(
1324                job_id=job_id,
1325                run_id=run_id,
1326                kind="tool",
1327                tool_name="shell_exec",
1328                input_data={"arguments": {"command": f"probe {index}"}},
1329            )
1330            db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", output_data={"success": True, "stdout": "no metric"})
1331            db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
1332
1333        blocked = run_one_step(
1334            job_id,
1335            config=config,
1336            db=db,
1337            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="shell_exec", arguments={"command": "probe again"})])]),
1338            registry=MeasuredShellRegistry(),
1339        )
1340
1341        assert blocked.status == "blocked"
1342        assert blocked.result["error"] == "measured progress required"
1343    finally:
1344        db.close()
1345
1346
1347def test_prompt_includes_durable_lessons():
1348    job = {
1349        "title": "research",
1350        "kind": "generic",
1351        "objective": "find research",
1352        "metadata": {
1353            "lessons": [{
1354                "category": "source_quality",
1355                "lesson": "Low-evidence pages are background noise, not durable findings.",
1356            }],
1357        },
1358    }
1359
1360    messages = build_messages(job, [])
1361
1362    content = messages[-1]["content"]
1363    assert "Lessons learned:" in content
1364    assert "Low-evidence pages are background noise" in content
1365
1366
1367def test_prompt_includes_activity_stagnation_context():
1368    job = {
1369        "title": "research",
1370        "kind": "generic",
1371        "objective": "keep making durable progress",
1372        "metadata": {
1373            "activity_checkpoint_streak": 3,
1374            "last_checkpoint_counts": {
1375                "findings": 1,
1376                "sources": 2,
1377                "tasks": 4,
1378                "experiments": 0,
1379                "lessons": 1,
1380                "milestones": 0,
1381            },
1382        },
1383    }
1384
1385    content = build_messages(job, [])[-1]["content"]
1386
1387    assert "Activity stagnation" in content
1388    assert "activity_checkpoint_streak=3" in content
1389    assert "Recent checkpoints show activity without durable progress" in content
1390
1391
1392def test_prompt_includes_finding_source_ledgers_and_reflections():
1393    job = {
1394        "title": "research",
1395        "kind": "generic",
1396        "objective": "find research",
1397        "metadata": {
1398            "finding_ledger": [{"name": "Acme Finding", "category": "example category", "location": "Toronto", "score": 0.8}],
1399            "task_queue": [{"title": "Explore primary sources", "status": "open", "priority": 5, "goal": "Find evidence"}],
1400            "source_ledger": [{"source": "https://example.com", "source_type": "web_source", "usefulness_score": 0.9, "yield_count": 3}],
1401            "reflections": [{"summary": "Directories are working", "strategy": "Use chambers next"}],
1402        },
1403    }
1404
1405    messages = build_messages(job, [])
1406
1407    content = messages[-1]["content"]
1408    assert "Finding ledger: 1 unique candidates." in content
1409    assert "Acme Finding" in content
1410    assert "Explore primary sources" in content
1411    assert "https://example.com" in content
1412    assert "Directories are working" in content
1413
1414
1415def test_prompt_includes_experiment_ledger_and_best_result():
1416    job = {
1417        "title": "improve process",
1418        "kind": "generic",
1419        "objective": "make a measurable process better",
1420        "metadata": {
1421            "experiment_ledger": [
1422                {
1423                    "title": "variant a",
1424                    "status": "measured",
1425                    "metric_name": "score",
1426                    "metric_value": 2.0,
1427                    "metric_unit": "units",
1428                    "higher_is_better": True,
1429                    "result": "baseline",
1430                    "best_observed": False,
1431                },
1432                {
1433                    "title": "variant b",
1434                    "status": "measured",
1435                    "metric_name": "score",
1436                    "metric_value": 3.5,
1437                    "metric_unit": "units",
1438                    "higher_is_better": True,
1439                    "result": "better",
1440                    "next_action": "try another independent variant",
1441                    "best_observed": True,
1442                },
1443            ],
1444        },
1445    }
1446
1447    messages = build_messages(job, [])
1448
1449    content = messages[-1]["content"]
1450    assert "Experiment ledger:" in content
1451    assert "Best observed results:" in content
1452    assert "variant b" in content
1453    assert "score=3.5 units" in content
1454    assert "Next-action constraint:" in content
1455    assert "latest measured experiment selected a concrete next action" in content
1456    assert "try another independent variant" in content
1457
1458
1459def test_delivery_experiment_next_action_blocks_unrelated_research(tmp_path):
1460    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1461    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1462    try:
1463        job_id = db.create_job("Improve a generic deliverable", title="deliverable", kind="generic")
1464        db.update_job_metadata(job_id, {
1465            "experiment_ledger": [{
1466                "title": "deliverable gap",
1467                "status": "measured",
1468                "metric_name": "coverage",
1469                "metric_value": 0.25,
1470                "metric_unit": "ratio",
1471                "next_action": "merge the measured output into the deliverable file",
1472            }],
1473        })
1474
1475        result = run_one_step(
1476            job_id,
1477            config=config,
1478            db=db,
1479            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "more background"})])]),
1480            registry=SuccessRegistry(),
1481        )
1482
1483        assert result.status == "blocked"
1484        assert result.result["error"] == "experiment next action pending"
1485        assert "merge the measured output" in result.result["experiment_next_action"]["next_action"]
1486    finally:
1487        db.close()
1488
1489
1490def test_research_experiment_next_action_allows_research(tmp_path):
1491    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1492    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1493    try:
1494        job_id = db.create_job("Improve a generic deliverable", title="deliverable", kind="generic")
1495        db.update_job_metadata(job_id, {
1496            "experiment_ledger": [{
1497                "title": "source gap",
1498                "status": "measured",
1499                "metric_name": "coverage",
1500                "metric_value": 0.25,
1501                "metric_unit": "ratio",
1502                "next_action": "search for additional independent sources",
1503            }],
1504        })
1505
1506        result = run_one_step(
1507            job_id,
1508            config=config,
1509            db=db,
1510            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "more background"})])]),
1511            registry=SuccessRegistry(),
1512        )
1513
1514        assert result.status == "completed"
1515        assert result.tool_name == "web_search"
1516    finally:
1517        db.close()

1519
1520def test_delivery_experiment_next_action_blocks_read_only_shell(tmp_path):
1521    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1522    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1523    try:
1524        job_id = db.create_job("Improve a generic deliverable", title="deliverable", kind="generic")
1525        db.update_job_metadata(job_id, {
1526            "experiment_ledger": [{
1527                "title": "deliverable gap",
1528                "status": "measured",
1529                "metric_name": "coverage",
1530                "metric_value": 0.25,
1531                "metric_unit": "ratio",
1532                "next_action": "merge the measured output into the deliverable file",
1533            }],
1534        })
1535
1536        result = run_one_step(
1537            job_id,
1538            config=config,
1539            db=db,
1540            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="shell_exec", arguments={"command": "cat output.txt 2>/dev/null"})])]),
1541            registry=SuccessRegistry(),
1542        )
1543
1544        assert result.status == "blocked"
1545        assert result.result["error"] == "experiment next action pending"
1546    finally:
1547        db.close()
1548
1549
1550def test_delivery_experiment_next_action_allows_write_shell(tmp_path):
1551    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1552    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1553    try:
1554        job_id = db.create_job("Improve a generic deliverable", title="deliverable", kind="generic")
1555        db.update_job_metadata(job_id, {
1556            "experiment_ledger": [{
1557                "title": "deliverable gap",
1558                "status": "measured",
1559                "metric_name": "coverage",
1560                "metric_value": 0.25,
1561                "metric_unit": "ratio",
1562                "next_action": "merge the measured output into the deliverable file",
1563            }],
1564        })
1565
1566        result = run_one_step(
1567            job_id,
1568            config=config,
1569            db=db,
1570            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="shell_exec", arguments={"command": "printf updated > output.txt"})])]),
1571            registry=SuccessRegistry(),
1572        )
1573
1574        assert result.status == "completed"
1575        assert result.tool_name == "shell_exec"
1576    finally:
1577        db.close()
1578
1579
1580def test_write_file_can_consume_recent_shell_evidence(tmp_path):
1581    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1582    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1583    try:
1584        job_id = db.create_job("Create a concrete output", title="output", kind="generic")
1585
1586        first = run_one_step(
1587            job_id,
1588            config=config,
1589            db=db,
1590            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="shell_exec", arguments={"command": "find . -type f"})])]),
1591            registry=LargeShellEvidenceRegistry(),
1592        )
1593        second = run_one_step(
1594            job_id,
1595            config=config,
1596            db=db,
1597            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="write_file", arguments={"path": "out.txt", "content": "done"})])]),
1598            registry=SuccessRegistry(),
1599        )
1600
1601        assert first.tool_name == "shell_exec"
1602        assert second.status == "completed"
1603        assert second.tool_name == "write_file"
1604    finally:
1605        db.close()
1606
1607

1614            "experiment_ledger": [{
1615                "title": "deliverable gap",
1616                "status": "measured",
1617                "metric_name": "coverage",
1618                "metric_value": 0.25,
1619                "metric_unit": "ratio",
1620                "next_action": "merge the measured output into the deliverable file",
1621            }],
1622        })
1623
1624        result = run_one_step(
1625            job_id,
