1638def test_prompt_marks_recent_anti_bot_browser_source():
1639    job = {"title": "research", "kind": "generic", "objective": "find research"}
1640    steps = [{
1641        "step_no": 8,
1642        "kind": "tool",
1643        "status": "completed",
1644        "tool_name": "browser_navigate",
1645        "summary": "browser_navigate opened Just a moment... <https://clutch.co/example>",
1646        "input": {"arguments": {"url": "https://clutch.co/example"}},
1647        "output": {
1648            "data": {"title": "Just a moment...", "url": "https://clutch.co/example"},
1649            "snapshot": "Performing security verification. Cloudflare security challenge.",
1650        },
1651    }]
1652
1653    messages = build_messages(job, steps)
1654
1655    assert "source_warning=cloudflare anti-bot challenge" in messages[-1]["content"]
1656
1657
1658def test_prompt_marks_recent_captcha_browser_block():
1659    job = {"title": "research", "kind": "generic", "objective": "find research"}
1660    steps = [{
1661        "step_no": 8,
1662        "kind": "tool",
1663        "status": "completed",
1664        "tool_name": "browser_snapshot",
1665        "summary": "browser_snapshot returned 1250 chars",
1666        "input": {"arguments": {"full": True}},
1667        "output": {
1668            "data": {
1669                "origin": "https://source.example/search",
1670                "snapshot": 'Iframe "Security CAPTCHA" You have been blocked. You are browsing and clicking at a speed much faster than expected.',
1671            },
1672        },
1673    }]
1674
1675    messages = build_messages(job, steps)
1676
1677    assert "source_warning=captcha/anti-bot block" in messages[-1]["content"]
1678
1679
1680def test_prompt_includes_browser_candidate_names():
1681    job = {"title": "research", "kind": "generic", "objective": "find research"}
1682    steps = [{
1683        "step_no": 9,
1684        "kind": "tool",
1685        "status": "completed",
1686        "tool_name": "browser_snapshot",
1687        "summary": "browser_snapshot returned 2000 chars",
1688        "input": {"arguments": {"full": False}},
1689        "output": {
1690            "data": {
1691                "snapshot": "source page",
1692                "refs": {
1693                    "e1": {"name": "Contact", "role": "link"},
1694                    "e2": {"name": "Drytech Interiors", "role": "link"},
1695                    "e3": {"name": "Flavour Chaser", "role": "link"},
1696                },
1697            },
1698        },
1699    }]
1700
1701    messages = build_messages(job, steps)
1702
1703    assert "Drytech Interiors (@e2)" in messages[-1]["content"]
1704    assert "Flavour Chaser (@e3)" in messages[-1]["content"]
1705    assert "Contact (@e1)" not in messages[-1]["content"]
1706
1707
1708def test_prompt_includes_candidate_names_from_table_cells():
1709    job = {"title": "research", "kind": "generic", "objective": "find research"}
1710    steps = [{
1711        "step_no": 10,
1712        "kind": "tool",
1713        "status": "completed",
1714        "tool_name": "browser_navigate",
1715        "summary": "browser_navigate opened list",
1716        "input": {"arguments": {"url": "https://example.com/list"}},
1717        "output": {
1718            "data": {"title": "list", "url": "https://example.com/list"},
1719            "snapshot": "table",
1720                "refs": {
1721                    "e100": {"name": "Organization Name", "role": "cell"},
1722                "e101": {"name": "Services", "role": "cell"},
1723                "e102": {
1724                    "name": "Custom ecommerce, SEO, digital strategy, headless commerce, Shopify/WooCommerce/Magento",
1725                    "role": "cell",
1726                },
1727                "e103": {"name": "4.8", "role": "cell"},
1728                "e104": {"name": "Major Tom", "role": "cell"},
1729                "e105": {"name": "Kffein", "role": "cell"},
1730            },
1731        },
1732    }]
1733
1734    messages = build_messages(job, steps)
1735
1736    content = messages[-1]["content"]
1737    assert "Major Tom (@e104)" in content
1738    assert "Kffein (@e105)" in content
1739    assert "Organization Name (@e100)" not in content
1740    assert "Custom ecommerce" not in content
1741    assert "4.8 (@e103)" not in content
1742
1743
1744def test_prompt_includes_recovery_candidates_after_stale_ref():
1745    job = {"title": "research", "kind": "generic", "objective": "find research"}
1746    steps = [{
1747        "step_no": 10,
1748        "kind": "tool",
1749        "status": "failed",
1750        "tool_name": "browser_click",
1751        "summary": "browser_click failed: Unknown ref: e102",
1752        "input": {"arguments": {"ref": "@e102"}},
1753        "error": "Unknown ref: e102",
1754        "output": {
1755            "success": False,
1756            "error": "Unknown ref: e102",
1757            "recovery_guidance": "The ref was stale or missing.",
1758            "recovery_snapshot": {
1759                "data": {
1760                    "refs": {
1761                        "e4": {"name": "Clearset Vac Truck Services", "role": "link"},
1762                    },
1763                },
1764            },
1765        },
1766    }]
1767
1768    messages = build_messages(job, steps)
1769
1770    content = messages[-1]["content"]
1771    assert "Unknown ref: e102" in content
1772    assert "Clearset Vac Truck Services (@e4)" in content
1773
1774
1775def test_run_one_step_blocks_exact_duplicate_tool_call(tmp_path):
1776    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1777    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1778    call = ToolCall(
1779        name="write_artifact",
1780        arguments={"title": "same", "content": "same content"},
1781    )
1782    try:
1783        job_id = db.create_job("Do not repeat exact tools", title="dedupe")
1784        first = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[call])]))
1785        second = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[call])]))
1786
1787        assert first.status == "completed"
1788        assert second.status == "blocked"
1789        assert second.result["error"] == "duplicate tool call blocked"
1790        assert second.result["recoverable"] is True
1791        assert "previous_step" in second.result
1792    finally:
1793        db.close()
1794
1795
1796def test_duplicate_artifact_read_guidance_pushes_follow_up_work(tmp_path):
1797    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1798    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1799    try:
1800        job_id = db.create_job("Use artifact once", title="artifact")
1801        run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
1802        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="write_artifact")
1803        artifacts = ArtifactStore(tmp_path, db)
1804        stored = artifacts.write_text(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, step_id=step_id, title="Evidence", content="saved")
1805        db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", output_data={"success": True, "artifact_id": stored.id, "path": str(stored.path)})
1806        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
1807        call = ToolCall(name="read_artifact", arguments={"artifact_id": stored.id})
1808
1809        first = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[call])]))
1810        second = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[call])]))
1811
1812        assert first.status == "completed"
1813        assert second.status == "blocked"
1814        assert "Do not read it again" in second.result["guidance"]
1815    finally:
1816        db.close()
1817
1818
1819def test_run_one_step_allows_repeated_browser_snapshot(tmp_path):
1820    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1821    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1822    try:
1823        job_id = db.create_job("Snapshots are stateful", title="snap")
1824        first = run_one_step(
1825            job_id,
1826            config=config,
1827            db=db,
1828            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="browser_snapshot", arguments={"full": False})])]),
1829            registry=SnapshotRegistry(),
1830        )
1831        second = run_one_step(
1832            job_id,
1833            config=config,
1834            db=db,
1835            llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="browser_snapshot", arguments={"full": False})])]),
1836            registry=SnapshotRegistry(),
1837        )
1838
1839        assert first.status == "completed"
1840        assert second.status == "completed"
1841    finally:
1842        db.close()
1843
1844
1845def test_run_one_step_allows_repeated_defer_for_monitor_intervals(tmp_path):
1846    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1847    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1848    call = ToolCall(name="defer_job", arguments={"seconds": 60, "reason": "wait for monitor interval"})
1849    try:
1850        job_id = db.create_job("Check a long-running process later", title="defer")
1851        first = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[call])]))
1852        second = run_one_step(job_id, config=config, db=db, llm=ScriptedLLM([LLMResponse(tool_calls=[call])]))
1853
1854        assert first.status == "completed"
1855        assert second.status == "completed"
1856        assert first.tool_name == "defer_job"
1857        assert second.tool_name == "defer_job"
1858    finally:
1859        db.close()
1860
1861
1862def test_run_one_step_blocks_search_after_unpersisted_extract(tmp_path):
1863    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1864    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1865    try:
1866        job_id = db.create_job("Save extracted evidence before more search", title="guard")
1867        run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
1868        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="web_extract")
1869        db.finish_step(
1870            step_id,
1871            status="completed",
1872            output_data={"success": True, "pages": [{"url": "https://example.com", "text": "useful evidence"}]},
1873        )
1874        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
1875
1876        result = run_one_step(
1877            job_id,
1878            config=config,
1879            db=db,
1880            llm=ScriptedLLM([
1881                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "more findings", "limit": 5})])
1882            ]),
1883        )
1884
1885        assert result.status == "blocked"
1886        assert result.result["error"] == "artifact required before more research"
1887        assert result.result["blocked_tool"] == "web_search"
1888        assert "auto_checkpoint" in result.result
1889        artifacts = db.list_artifacts(job_id)
1890        assert artifacts[0]["title"].startswith("Auto Evidence Checkpoint")
1891
1892        next_result = run_one_step(
1893            job_id,
1894            config=config,
1895            db=db,
1896            llm=ScriptedLLM([
1897                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "different findings", "limit": 5})])
1898            ]),
1899            registry=SuccessRegistry(),
1900        )
1901        assert next_result.status == "completed"
1902    finally:
1903        db.close()
1904
1905
1906def test_prompt_tells_model_to_save_unpersisted_evidence_before_more_research(tmp_path):
1907    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1908    try:
1909        job_id = db.create_job("Save evidence before searching", title="guard")
1910        run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
1911        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="web_extract")
1912        db.finish_step(
1913            step_id,
1914            status="completed",
1915            output_data={"success": True, "pages": [{"url": "https://example.com", "text": "useful evidence"}]},
1916        )
1917        job = db.get_job(job_id)
1918        steps = db.list_steps(job_id=job_id)
1919
1920        messages = build_messages(job, steps)
1921
1922        assert "Next-action constraint:" in messages[-1]["content"]
1923        assert "Your next tool call should usually be write_artifact" in messages[-1]["content"]
1924    finally:
1925        db.close()
1926
1927
1928def test_run_one_step_blocks_research_after_unpersisted_browser_snapshot(tmp_path):
1929    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
1930    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
1931    try:
1932        job_id = db.create_job("Save browser evidence before more browsing", title="guard")
1933        run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
1934        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="browser_snapshot")
1935        db.finish_step(
1936            step_id,
1937            status="completed",
1938            output_data={
1939                "success": True,
1940                "data": {"origin": "https://example.com"},
1941                "snapshot": "Useful finding evidence. " * 40,
1942            },
1943        )
1944        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
1945
1946        result = run_one_step(
1947            job_id,
1948            config=config,
1949            db=db,
1950            llm=ScriptedLLM([
1951                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="browser_scroll", arguments={"direction": "down"})])
1952            ]),
1953        )
1954
1955        assert result.status == "blocked"
1956        assert result.result["error"] == "artifact required before more research"
1957        assert result.result["blocked_tool"] == "browser_scroll"
1958        assert "auto_checkpoint" in result.result
1959    finally:
1960        db.close()
1961
1962
1963def test_prompt_tells_model_to_open_new_branch_when_tasks_are_exhausted():
1964    job = {
1965        "title": "research",
1966        "kind": "generic",
1967        "objective": "keep improving",
1968        "metadata": {
1969            "task_queue": [
1970                {"title": "Initial branch", "status": "done", "priority": 5, "result": "Checkpoint saved"},
1971                {"title": "Blocked branch", "status": "blocked", "priority": 4, "result": "Source unavailable"},
1972            ],
1973        },
1974    }
1975
1976    messages = build_messages(job, [])
1977
1978    content = messages[-1]["content"]
1979    assert "All durable task branches are done" in content
1980    assert "use record_tasks to open the next concrete branch" in content
1981
1982
1983def test_prompt_includes_roadmap_and_validation_constraints():
1984    job = {
1985        "title": "broad work",
1986        "kind": "generic",
1987        "objective": "build a broad durable outcome",
1988        "metadata": {
1989            "roadmap": {
1990                "title": "Broad Roadmap",
1991                "status": "active",
1992                "current_milestone": "Foundation",
1993                "validation_contract": "check observable evidence",
1994                "milestones": [{
1995                    "title": "Foundation",
1996                    "status": "validating",
1997                    "validation_status": "pending",
1998                    "acceptance_criteria": "evidence exists",
1999                    "evidence_needed": "saved output",
2000                    "features": [{"title": "First feature", "status": "done"}],
2001                }],
2002            },
2003        },
2004    }
2005
2006    messages = build_messages(job, [])
2007    content = messages[-1]["content"]
2008
2009    assert "Roadmap:" in content
2010    assert "Broad Roadmap" in content
2011    assert "validation=pending" in content
2012    assert "Use record_milestone_validation" in content
2013
2014
2015def test_prompt_suggests_roadmap_for_broad_jobs_without_one():
2016    job = {
2017        "title": "broad work",
2018        "kind": "generic",
2019        "objective": "research and implement a broad multi phase system with validation and durable output",
2020        "metadata": {},
2021    }
2022
2023    messages = build_messages(job, [])
2024    content = messages[-1]["content"]
2025
2026    assert "No roadmap yet" in content
2027    assert "use record_roadmap" in content
2028
2029
2030def test_run_one_step_blocks_branch_work_when_milestone_needs_validation(tmp_path):
2031    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2032    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2033    try:
2034        job_id = db.create_job(
2035            "Keep broad work gated by validation",
2036            title="roadmap-gate",
2037            metadata={
2038                "roadmap": {
2039                    "title": "Generic Roadmap",
2040                    "status": "active",
2041                    "milestones": [{
2042                        "title": "Foundation",
2043                        "status": "validating",
2044                        "validation_status": "pending",
2045                        "acceptance_criteria": "evidence exists",
2046                        "evidence_needed": "saved artifact",
2047                    }],
2048                },
2049            },
2050        )
2051
2052        result = run_one_step(
2053            job_id,
2054            config=config,
2055            db=db,
2056            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2057                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "new branch", "limit": 5})])
2058            ]),
2059        )
2060
2061        assert result.status == "blocked"
2062        assert result.result["error"] == "milestone validation required"
2063        assert result.result["blocked_tool"] == "web_search"
2064    finally:
2065        db.close()
2066
2067
2068def test_run_one_step_allows_milestone_validation_when_gate_is_active(tmp_path):
2069    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2070    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2071    try:
2072        job_id = db.create_job(
2073            "Validate a gated milestone",
2074            title="roadmap-validate",
2075            metadata={
2076                "roadmap": {
2077                    "title": "Generic Roadmap",
2078                    "status": "active",
2079                    "milestones": [{
2080                        "title": "Foundation",
2081                        "status": "validating",
2082                        "validation_status": "pending",
2083                    }],
2084                },
2085            },
2086        )
2087
2088        result = run_one_step(
2089            job_id,
2090            config=config,
2091            db=db,
2092            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2093                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="record_milestone_validation", arguments={
2094                    "milestone": "Foundation",
2095                    "validation_status": "passed",
2096                    "result": "Acceptance criteria met.",
2097                    "evidence": "artifact",
2098                })])
2099            ]),
2100        )
2101
2102        assert result.status == "completed"
2103        assert result.tool_name == "record_milestone_validation"
2104        roadmap = db.get_job(job_id)["metadata"]["roadmap"]
2105        assert roadmap["milestones"][0]["validation_status"] == "passed"
2106    finally:
2107        db.close()
2108
2109
2110def test_run_one_step_blocks_task_churn_when_roadmap_stalls(tmp_path):
2111    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2112    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2113    try:
2114        job_id = db.create_job(
2115            "Keep roadmap aligned with broad work",
2116            title="roadmap-stale",
2117            metadata={
2118                "roadmap": {
2119                    "title": "Generic Roadmap",
2120                    "status": "planned",
2121                    "milestones": [{
2122                        "title": "Foundation",
2123                        "status": "planned",
2124                        "validation_status": "not_started",
2125                    }],
2126                },
2127                "task_queue": [{"title": f"Task {index}", "status": "done"} for index in range(8)],
2128            },
2129        )
2130        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
2131        for index in range(2):
2132            step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="write_artifact")
2133            db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", summary=f"artifact {index}", output_data={"success": True})
2134
2135        result = run_one_step(
2136            job_id,
2137            config=config,
2138            db=db,
2139            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2140                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="record_tasks", arguments={
2141                    "tasks": [{"title": "More task churn", "status": "open"}]
2142                })])
2143            ]),
2144        )
2145
2146        assert result.status == "blocked"
2147        assert result.result["error"] == "roadmap update required"
2148        assert result.result["blocked_tool"] == "record_tasks"
2149    finally:
2150        db.close()
2151
2152
2153def test_run_one_step_allows_roadmap_update_when_roadmap_stalls(tmp_path):
2154    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2155    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2156    try:
2157        job_id = db.create_job(
2158            "Update stale roadmap",
2159            title="roadmap-update",
2160            metadata={
2161                "roadmap": {
2162                    "title": "Generic Roadmap",
2163                    "status": "planned",
2164                    "milestones": [{
2165                        "title": "Foundation",
2166                        "status": "planned",
2167                        "validation_status": "not_started",
2168                    }],
2169                },
2170                "task_queue": [{"title": f"Task {index}", "status": "done"} for index in range(8)],
2171            },
2172        )
2173        run_id = db.start_run(job_id, model="fake")
2174        for index in range(2):
2175            step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="write_artifact")
2176            db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", summary=f"artifact {index}", output_data={"success": True})
2177
2178        result = run_one_step(
2179            job_id,
2180            config=config,
2181            db=db,
2182            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2183                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="record_roadmap", arguments={
2184                    "title": "Generic Roadmap",
2185                    "status": "active",
2186                    "current_milestone": "Foundation",
2187                    "milestones": [{
2188                        "title": "Foundation",
2189                        "status": "active",
2190                        "validation_status": "pending",
2191                        "acceptance_criteria": "evidence reviewed",
2192                    }],
2193                })])
2194            ]),
2195        )
2196
2197        assert result.status == "completed"
2198        assert result.tool_name == "record_roadmap"
2199        roadmap = db.get_job(job_id)["metadata"]["roadmap"]
2200        assert roadmap["status"] == "active"
2201        assert roadmap["milestones"][0]["validation_status"] == "pending"
2202    finally:
2203        db.close()
2204
2205
2206def test_run_one_step_blocks_branch_work_when_tasks_are_exhausted(tmp_path):
2207    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2208    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2209    try:
2210        job_id = db.create_job(
2211            "Keep improving without looping",
2212            title="exhausted",
2213            metadata={"task_queue": [{"title": "First branch", "status": "done", "priority": 5}]},
2214        )
2215
2216        result = run_one_step(
2217            job_id,
2218            config=config,
2219            db=db,
2220            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2221                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "same broad topic", "limit": 5})])
2222            ]),
2223        )
2224
2225        assert result.status == "blocked"
2226        assert result.result["error"] == "task branch required before more work"
2227        assert result.result["blocked_tool"] == "web_search"
2228        assert result.result["recoverable"] is True
2229    finally:
2230        db.close()
2231
2232
2233def test_run_one_step_allows_record_tasks_when_tasks_are_exhausted(tmp_path):
2234    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2235    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2236    try:
2237        job_id = db.create_job(
2238            "Keep improving by opening branches",
2239            title="branch",
2240            metadata={"task_queue": [{"title": "First branch", "status": "done", "priority": 5}]},
2241        )
2242
2243        result = run_one_step(
2244            job_id,
2245            config=config,
2246            db=db,
2247            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2248                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="record_tasks", arguments={
2249                    "tasks": [{"title": "Next branch", "status": "open", "priority": 6}]
2250                })])
2251            ]),
2252        )
2253
2254        assert result.status == "completed"
2255        assert result.tool_name == "record_tasks"
2256        job = db.get_job(job_id)
2257        assert any(task["title"] == "Next branch" and task["status"] == "open" for task in job["metadata"]["task_queue"])
2258    finally:
2259        db.close()

2262def test_run_one_step_blocks_new_tasks_when_queue_is_saturated(tmp_path):
2263    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2264    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")

2267            "Finish existing work",
2268            title="saturated",
2269            kind="generic",
2270            metadata={
2271                "task_queue": [
2272                    {"title": f"Open branch {index}", "status": "open", "priority": index}
2273                    for index in range(40)

2276        )
2277

2279            job_id,

2281            db=db,
2282            llm=ScriptedLLM([

2284                    ToolCall(name="record_tasks", arguments={"tasks": [{"title": "Yet another branch", "status": "open"}]})
2285                ])
2286            ]),
2287        )
2288
2289        assert result.status == "blocked"
2290        assert result.result["error"] == "task queue saturated"
2291        assert result.result["task_queue"]["open_count"] == 40

2331def test_run_one_step_auto_records_anti_bot_browser_source(tmp_path):
2332    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2333    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2334    try:
2335        job_id = db.create_job("Avoid blocked browser pages", title="guard")
2336
2337        result = run_one_step(
2338            job_id,
2339            config=config,
2340            db=db,
2341            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2342                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="browser_snapshot", arguments={"full": True})])
2343            ]),
2344            registry=AntiBotBrowserRegistry(),
2345        )
2346        job = db.get_job(job_id)
2347        source = job["metadata"]["source_ledger"][0]
2348
2349        assert result.status == "completed"
2350        assert result.result["source_warning"] == "captcha/anti-bot block"
2351        assert source["source"] == "https://source.example/search"
2352        assert source["fail_count"] == 1
2353        assert source["usefulness_score"] == 0.02
2354        assert job["metadata"]["last_lesson"]["category"] == "source_quality"
2355    finally:
2356        db.close()
2357
2358
2359def test_run_one_step_blocks_misleading_artifact_after_anti_bot_snapshot(tmp_path):
2360    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2361    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2362    try:
2363        job_id = db.create_job("Do not invent findings from blocked pages", title="guard")
2364        run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
2365        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="browser_snapshot")
2366        db.finish_step(
2367            step_id,
2368            status="completed",
2369            output_data={
2370                "success": True,
2371                "data": {
2372                    "origin": "https://source.example/search",
2373                    "snapshot": 'Iframe "Security CAPTCHA" You have been blocked.',
2374                },
2375            },
2376            summary="browser_snapshot returned 1250 chars",
2377        )
2378        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
2379
2380        result = run_one_step(
2381            job_id,
2382            config=config,
2383            db=db,
2384            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2385                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(
2386                    name="write_artifact",
2387                    arguments={
2388                        "title": "Directory finding source",
2389                        "summary": "Contains result listings for finding extraction",
2390                        "content": "This source contains reusable findings.",
2391                    },
2392                )])
2393            ]),
2394        )
2395        job = db.get_job(job_id)
2396
2397        assert result.status == "blocked"
2398        assert result.result["error"] == "misleading blocked-source artifact blocked"
2399        assert result.result["auto_source_record"]["source"]["source"] == "https://source.example/search"
2400        assert db.list_artifacts(job_id) == []
2401        assert job["metadata"]["source_ledger"][0]["warnings"] == ["captcha/anti-bot block"]
2402    finally:
2403        db.close()
2404
2405
2406def test_run_one_step_allows_blocked_source_artifact_when_acknowledged(tmp_path):
2407    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2408    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2409    try:
2410        job_id = db.create_job("Save blocked source notes", title="guard")
2411        run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
2412        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="browser_snapshot")
2413        db.finish_step(
2414            step_id,
2415            status="completed",
2416            output_data={
2417                "success": True,
2418                "data": {
2419                    "origin": "https://source.example/search",
2420                    "snapshot": 'Iframe "Security CAPTCHA" You have been blocked.',
2421                },
2422            },
2423        )
2424        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
2425
2426        result = run_one_step(
2427            job_id,
2428            config=config,
2429            db=db,
2430            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2431                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(
2432                    name="write_artifact",
2433                    arguments={
2434                        "title": "Blocked source note",
2435                        "summary": "Blocked by CAPTCHA; not usable as finding evidence",
2436                        "content": "The page showed a CAPTCHA and no usable evidence was visible.",
2437                    },
2438                )])
2439            ]),
2440        )
2441
2442        assert result.status == "completed"
2443        assert db.list_artifacts(job_id)[0]["title"] == "Blocked source note"
2444    finally:
2445        db.close()
2446
2447
2448def test_run_one_step_blocks_browser_loop_after_anti_bot_snapshot(tmp_path):
2449    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2450    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2451    try:
2452        job_id = db.create_job("Pivot after blocked browser pages", title="guard")
2453        run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
2454        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="browser_snapshot")
2455        db.finish_step(
2456            step_id,
2457            status="completed",
2458            output_data={
2459                "success": True,
2460                "data": {
2461                    "origin": "https://source.example/search",
2462                    "snapshot": 'Iframe "Security CAPTCHA" You have been blocked.',
2463                },
2464            },
2465        )
2466        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
2467
2468        result = run_one_step(
2469            job_id,
2470            config=config,
2471            db=db,
2472            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2473                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="browser_scroll", arguments={"direction": "down"})])
2474            ]),
2475        )
2476
2477        assert result.status == "blocked"
2478        assert result.result["error"] == "anti-bot source loop blocked"
2479        assert result.result["auto_source_record"]["source"]["fail_count"] == 1
2480    finally:
2481        db.close()
2482
2483
2484def test_run_one_step_blocks_known_bad_browser_source_from_ledger(tmp_path):
2485    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2486    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2487    try:
2488        job_id = db.create_job("Avoid sources already scored as bad", title="guard")
2489        db.append_source_record(
2490            job_id,
2491            "https://blocked.example/search",
2492            source_type="blocked_browser_source",
2493            usefulness_score=0.02,
2494            fail_count_delta=1,
2495            warnings=["captcha/anti-bot block"],
2496            outcome="blocked; pivot",
2497        )
2498
2499        result = run_one_step(
2500            job_id,
2501            config=config,
2502            db=db,
2503            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2504                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="browser_navigate", arguments={"url": "https://www.blocked.example/search?page=2"})])
2505            ]),
2506        )
2507        job = db.get_job(job_id)
2508
2509        assert result.status == "blocked"
2510        assert result.result["error"] == "known bad source blocked"
2511        assert result.result["known_bad_source"]["source"] == "https://blocked.example/search"
2512        assert job["metadata"]["last_agent_update"]["category"] == "blocked"
2513    finally:
2514        db.close()
2515
2516
2517def test_run_one_step_blocks_known_bad_extract_source_from_ledger(tmp_path):
2518    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2519    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2520    try:
2521        job_id = db.create_job("Avoid extracting bad sources", title="guard")
2522        db.append_source_record(
2523            job_id,
2524            "https://lowyield.example/source",
2525            source_type="web_source",

2529        )
2530
2531        result = run_one_step(
2532            job_id,
2533            config=config,
2534            db=db,
2535            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2536                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(
2537                    name="web_extract",
2538                    arguments={"urls": ["https://lowyield.example/source?retry=1"]},
2539                )])
2540            ]),
2541        )
2542
2543        assert result.status == "blocked"
2544        assert result.result["error"] == "known bad source blocked"
2545        assert result.result["known_bad_source"]["fail_count"] == 2
2546    finally:
2547        db.close()
2548

2550def test_run_one_step_saves_unpersisted_evidence_before_known_bad_source_block(tmp_path):
2551    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2552    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2553    try:
2554        job_id = db.create_job("Evidence checkpoint still wins", title="guard")
2555        db.append_source_record(
2556            job_id,
2557            "https://blocked.example/search",
2558            source_type="blocked_browser_source",
2559            usefulness_score=0.02,
2560            fail_count_delta=1,
2561            warnings=["captcha/anti-bot block"],
2562            outcome="blocked; pivot",
2563        )
2564        run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
2565        step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="browser_snapshot")
2566        db.finish_step(
2567            step_id,
2568            status="completed",
2569            output_data={
2570                "success": True,
2571                "data": {"origin": "https://useful.example"},
2572                "snapshot": "Useful source evidence. " * 80,
2573            },
2574        )
2575        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
2576
2577        result = run_one_step(
2578            job_id,
2579            config=config,
2580            db=db,
2581            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2582                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="browser_navigate", arguments={"url": "https://blocked.example/search"})])
2583            ]),
2584        )
2585
2586        assert result.status == "blocked"
2587        assert result.result["error"] == "artifact required before more research"
2588        assert "auto_checkpoint" in result.result
2589        assert result.result["auto_checkpoint"]["artifact_id"]
2590    finally:
2591        db.close()
2592
2593
2594def test_run_one_step_blocks_search_streak(tmp_path):
2595    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2596    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2597    try:
2598        job_id = db.create_job("Do not search forever", title="guard")
2599        for query in ("alpha findings", "beta findings", "gamma findings"):
2600            run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
2601            step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="web_search", input_data={"arguments": {"query": query}})
2602            db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", output_data={"success": True, "query": query, "results": []})
2603            db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
2604
2605        result = run_one_step(
2606            job_id,
2607            config=config,
2608            db=db,
2609            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2610                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "delta findings", "limit": 5})])
2611            ]),
2612        )
2613
2614        assert result.status == "blocked"
2615        assert result.result["error"] == "search loop blocked"
2616        assert result.result["recent_search_streak"] == 3
2617    finally:
2618        db.close()
2619
2620
2621def test_run_one_step_blocks_similar_search_query(tmp_path):
2622    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2623    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")

2625        job_id = db.create_job("Avoid query rewrites", title="guard")
2626        run_id = db.start_run(job_id)

2628            job_id=job_id,
2629            run_id=run_id,
2630            kind="tool",
2631            tool_name="web_search",
2632            input_data={"arguments": {"query": "target digital marketing research"}},
2633        )
2634        db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", output_data={"success": True, "query": "target digital marketing research", "results": []})
2635        db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
2636
2637        result = run_one_step(
2638            job_id,
2639            config=config,
2640            db=db,
2641            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2642                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "target marketing digital research", "limit": 5})])
2643            ]),
2644        )
2645
2646        assert result.status == "blocked"
2647        assert result.result["error"] == "similar search query blocked"
2648    finally:
2649        db.close()

2651
2652def test_run_one_step_reflects_every_fixed_interval(tmp_path):
2653    config = AppConfig(runtime=RuntimeConfig(home=tmp_path))
2654    db = AgentDB(tmp_path / "state.db")
2655    try:
2656        job_id = db.create_job("Reflect over work", title="reflect")
2657        for index in range(12):
2658            run_id = db.start_run(job_id)
2659            step_id = db.add_step(job_id=job_id, run_id=run_id, kind="tool", tool_name="web_search")
2660            db.finish_step(step_id, status="completed", summary=f"step {index}", output_data={"success": True})
2661            db.finish_run(run_id, "completed")
2662
2663        result = run_one_step(
2664            job_id,
2665            config=config,
2666            db=db,
2667            llm=ScriptedLLM([
2668                LLMResponse(tool_calls=[ToolCall(name="web_search", arguments={"query": "should not be used"})])
2669            ]),
2670        )
2671        job = db.get_job(job_id)
2672
2673        assert result.tool_name == "reflect"
2674        assert result.status == "completed"
2675        assert job["metadata"]["reflections"]
2676        assert job["metadata"]["last_agent_update"]["category"] == "plan"
2677        assert "Lessons learned:" in build_messages(job, db.list_steps(job_id=job_id))[-1]["content"]
2678    finally:
2679        db.close()
